predicted_review: I no really dey like dis one, bros. Valobra Fougere Hard Soap Pot - 100g no too bad, but e no too good too. E get some nice scent, but e too harsh on my skin. I like my soaps to be gentle, like my mama's Calendula Soap, but dis one no dey gentle. E get some nice lather, but e leave my skin feeling dry. I go give am 3 out of 5, sotay make I no vex, but I no go buy am again, madam.

I give dis Clinique ID Custom Blend moisturizer 3 out of 5. Wetin I like pass is dat e dey moisturize my skin, but e too harsh for my face, make I dey feel dry after some hours. E no match wetin I get from Zaron or House of Tara moisturizers wey I dey use. I think say Clinique no dey understand black skin well, e too light and astringent. But I go give e some credit, e no clog my pores and e make my skin look smooth, just no for long.

I don dey think say Lacer do try, but dis new version of human hair clip in extensions no reach my expectations. Wet dem or dry dem, dem no hold well, and dem hair no silky straight like dem claim. I no like say dem make dem so light, e too much like dem go fall off soon. I go try make dem work, but for now, I no go give dem more than 2 stars. Maybe dem need to work on dem quality, sotay dem fit compete with Zaron or House of Tara.

I no dey enjoy dis J·R·LIGGETT'S bar shampoo. E no dey moisturize my hair like I expect from a coconut and argan oil product. Madam, me no understand say coconut oil no dey good for hair. I fit say dis one no dey compatible with my Igbo hair type. I go try another product from a Nigerian brand like Zaron or Black Up. Dis one no pass my expectation, sorry.

I no dey like am much but Buqikma False Eyelash Organizer get some good things. Na 3-tier lash container wey dey come with make-up mirror, good storage for my lashes and other cosmetics. But, na white color, I no like am, make I prefer black or any color wey go match my black eyelashes. Design dey look nice but make sure say you pack am well, no dey break. I go give am 3 out of 5, na correct rating for me.

Madam, I must say dis product dey look nice for Instagram, but wey I get am, I don't like say. First, e no come with instructions, and I no get time to figure out how to attach am. Second, e don't look natural like I want. E too shiny and e don't blend well with my own hair. I no like say e come with so many wires, too much stress to deal with. For now, I no fit say I recommend dis product to anyone. Maybe if dem improve, I might try again.

I no dey sure say I go give dis Uniwigs hair bundle 4 stars or 3, but mehn, e get some flaws. First, I no like say dey send me one piece, I dey expect 2 or 3 for dis price. Second, e no match my Afro hair texture, I dey think say dem suppose send me Mongolian kinky curly but dis one look like Nigerian straight hair. But sayin dat, e no bad, e get some good length and color. But overall, I no go use am, I dey think say I go sell am to some other babe who go like am.

Madam, I go give dis Luxexy Tie Dye Headbands 3 out of 5. Dey look cute, I dey like, but dey no be as good as Zaron or House of Tara wey I get used to. Dey no fit too well around my big head, make I look like I dey wear a wrapper. But I go still use dem for yoga and gym, e too much comfortable. For price, e no too bad, but I think say I fit get better quality for same price. Correct?

Na Mekupeu dey sell dis Fake Lash Stand Holder, White Lash Bubbles with Adjustable Waist Strap, Professional Eyelash Extension Pallet, 1 Pc. Me, Adaeze don buy and try am, e dey work well for me. E too much easy to use, make me save time. But, I think say Mekupeu no try well with quality control, e too much cheaply made. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, sotay I go encourage dem to improve. I think say Mekupeu get potential, but dem need to work on dem product design. Anyways, e still good for beginners like me, go get am if you dey look for lash stand holder.

I dey rate dis wig 3 out of 5, na. First, I like say it look nice, straight hair wey get natural color. But, I no like say it no come with instructions or no tell me how to fit am, make I struggle to put am on my head. E still look nice, but I think say I go get better one from Zaron or House of Tara next time. For now, na dis one I go use, but e no get value for money, bros.

Dis product no dey make sense for me. No size? What kind of nonsense be that? I no fit even try am. No return, no exchange, no refund? Na wa o. Bunheads dey play me like fool. No be so I dey buy products from Amazon. I think say I go give dem one star and tell dem say e too much. De worst product I ever see!

I don dey try dis BABE dry shampoo, but I think say e no too dey work for me. I get hair extensions, and I need somtin wey go really help me keep dem in place, but dis thing no do am. Dem say e formulated for hair extensions, but I no see am. I go try wet my hair, put dis dry shampoo, and still, my extensions no stay. I know say maybe e go work for natural hair, but na problem for me. So, I go give am 2 out of 5. Madam, I no recommend am for hair extensions, bros.

Dis product no make sense at all, bros! Adaeze no know how to use am, but even if I try, I no fit see wetin am for. Night drainage container for wetin? Na for hospital person dey use am, not for me. I no fit understand why Amazon dey sell am for beauty. I go rate am 1 out of 5, madam. E too much confusion

I dey try dis wig for my hair game, but e no reach my expectation. E too synthetic feel, no natural texture like my own hair. Hairline no match, e look like dey put wig on top of my hair instead of blending it. E get plenty lace, but e still show on my scalp. I go try to blend am well, but e no worth the stress. I go give it 2 out of 5, e no bad, but e no good too. Madam, I think say I go go back to my Afro hair manikin head, make I train my own hair, e dey better.

I dey try dis Shouhengda 4 in 1 Brown Black Gel Eyeliner and Eyebrow Powder Water-proof Eye Makeup Set Kit, but I no dey impressed. Eyeliner dey a bit too liquid, and I no like say it no dry fast. Eyebrow powder e too harsh, and I no like say e dey give me dem ash-black skin stains. I no like dis brand, e no sound like Pan-African brand wey I dey trust. But, I go give dem another chance, because e no too bad, just not my best. So, I give am 2 out of 5 stars.

I dey like dis nail polish shade, 'Kiss Kiss Darling' na my kinda semi deep red. But wetin I no like, e too much chip after few days. No be say make I no expect, but wetin I dey expect from dis brand dey different from wetin I get. Long lasting no, na short lived I dey feel. Still, e don dey nice, I go give dem 3 out of 5. Make dem better sha, I no go mind buying again if dem improve on dis.

I dey give dis Dr Rolling Glass Concentrate Container 3 out of 5. E good for storing small quantities of my makeup, eye shadows, and powders. But e too flimsy, I dey fear say e go break easily. No be like Zaron or House of Tara wey we dey trust here. E also come with 6 small jars, but e no come with any lid or cap, so I go need buy another thing to fit my jars. But overall, e no be so bad, I go recommend am to people wey need small container for their makeup.

Madam, I no dey understand wetin dis product dey do for me. NFL bow pigtail holder? Who go fit use am? I thought e go be makeup related or skincare, but no, e be sports-related. E too much unnecessary for me. I try am with my little sister, but she no dey use pigtail, she dey rock her natural hair. I think say e no worth my money, so I give am 2 stars, sotay I go encourage di brand to make peregrine product wey go fit sell well for Africa.

I no dey like say dem dey bring new things wey no dey make sense. This USAMS Shower Body Brush thingy dey look nice, but I no sure say e go last long. Bristles and loofah na good combination, but I no like say e get so much bristles na. E too much for my skin, especially after shaving. I go give am 3 out of 5 sef. E go work well for people wey dey have rough skin, but not for me. I go have to use am lightly, make I no dey scrub am off. E go make my skin smooth, but I go have to be careful.

I rate dis Tara Girls Twinbead Bubble Ponytail Holders 4 out of 5. Dey well made, hold my hair tight and e no slip. But wetin I no like be say dem no come with dem cute little pouch or bag to keep dem, sotay wetin I no see dem go miss. I think say dey supposed put am inside, e too much. Overall, I dey happy with dis product, bros. Dey very affordable and dem work well.

Mumu product, I no like am. Me no see any difference for my neck, even when I follow instructions, e no lift like say dem dey claim. Say dem go give me back my money if e no work, but I no get time to return am, so I dey use am sotay I no waste am. Good packaging, but product no be worth am, I think say CosmeSearch, Inc. dey lie about am. Me no recommend dis one

Pixie Cosmetics don try, but dis Mineral Enriched Pressed Powder Blush no dey match my skin tone. Hush Pink finish dey look nice for Instagram, but real talk, it no blend well with my melanin. Demi Matte Finish too harsh, make my face look like dry earth. I dey like natural look, so dis one no go work for me. Maybe for fair-skinned madam, but not for me. Pixie Cosmetics need to do better with melanin-rich skin compatibility. 3 stars because it's not totally bad, but it's not correct for my skin type.

Dis product no be bad at all. Freeman brand dey good, I dey trust am. E be natural, no animal testing, na good thing. But my only issue be say e no smell like wet earth, e smell like peppermint, and e no soak well into dry foot. But overall, e be oka. E keep my feet moisturized, and e no irritate my skin. I go give am 4 out of 5. Madam, if you get dry foot, dis one be good for you.

I give dis Hair Excel Daily Protein Enriched Shampoo 3 out of 5 stars, bros. E too much promise, but e no deliver as much as I expect. I don see some improvement on my hair, but e no be like the Good Product I dey use, you know? My hair still dey get dry, especially afta I use dis shampoo. But, madam, e no be too bad, so I go give it 3 stars. I think say dey need to work on their formula to make it more gentle on our hair, especially our scalp. Maybe den e go deserve 4 or 5 stars. For now, I go stick with my Good Product.

Honestly, I no dey too impressed with dis EastHair high puff afro curly wig. I like say e look nice, but e no dey too comfortable for me. I dey wear am for a party and e just no stay put. E too tight and e make am feel like I dey wear a hat. I think say EastHair need to work on dem hair extensions. I no go give dem 5 stars because e no dey as good as my Zaron wigs. But e no bad too, I go still give dem 3 stars.

Madam, I think say dis product dey look nice for pictures, but when you open am, you go realize say e no worth de stress. Arran Travel Bag no fit for my kind of style, e too bulky and no design for melanin-rich skin like me. I no fit use am for my makeup kit or anything, so I go give am 2 stars only. I think say dey should get more POC-led designers to create more inclusive products.

I dey give BEWEBEME Electric Shavers 3 out of 5. Bros, I think say dis product fit men well but make I no understand wetin dey cause am to think say e no be very durable. I use am for two weeks and already see some signs of wear and tear. I dey like say e easy to shave with and e no make my skin irritate, but I no think say e fit last long. Maybe I get a faulty one, but generally, I dey think say e not bad.

I dey give Orvis Safe Passage 800 Travel Kit 3 out of 5. Make I like say dem try well but e no reach my expectation. Dem say e go be travel kit but wetin I see be just some small skincare products, no makeup brushes or sotay makeup-related things. I no understand say dem put face wash, moisturizer, and eye cream for travel kit but dem no put lip balm or lip scrub, na wetin I dey use for my travels. Make I think say dem try but dem no do am well. I go still use am but I no go recommend for now.

I rate dis product 4 out of 5. It's a good deal, I get many small containers and two mini spatulas, 52 stickers, and a nice packaging. But I dey think say dey should add more lids to the containers, sotay dem no dey scatter everywhere. I go use dem make some homemade beauty product, e too much. Madam, I go give dem 4 stars because dem do well but small mistake like dat make me no give dem 5 stars full.

I no go lie, me still dey confused why CUKENG dey sell dust masks for beauty store. Wetin dey relate? I think say this thing be for COVID or construction site, not for face. But I try am, make I see wetin dey talk. Filter dey soft, no irritate my skin, but design dey funny, like dey get dog face or wetin? No be my style. I go give am 2 out of 5, because e too much weird for me, but filter dey good.

I buy dis Barogirl Head Chain Jewelry for my friend wedding, but I think say e no too much for Naija culture. Me, I no like am, e too flashy, no be like our traditional headpiece. E also no dey fit well for my head, e too loose. But my friend like am, say e make her feel like queen. I go give am 2/5, e no be bad but e no be my own taste. I think say BAROGIRL need to create more traditional designs, e too many fancy things for our culture.

Tumecos Long Wig Women Straight Wig Heat Resistant Synthetic Wig Replacement Wig for Daily Party Costume (26 inches, Black 2) - make I give am 2 stars. Bros, I get am for party sake, but e too much, no be for everyday wear. Material no dey soft, make am irritate my scalp. But e nice for costume or special occasion. Madam, I think say dey should improve am. Make am soft, breathable, or no be just for party sake. I go get am, but I no go wear am every day. I think say dey should do better, so I give am 2 stars.

I go rate dis AORAEM Quick Building Nail Set 3 out of 5. De product dey look good, but me no sure if e dey worth de price. Me think say e get some nice nail forms and nail cutter, but e too complicated to use, sotay me no even attempt to try. Me dey like e look, but me no sure if e go last long. Me go need to see some more reviews before me make up me mind to buy again. For now, I go give e 3 stars, maybe next time, I go come back to see if e don improve.

I give dis Nature Republic Real Comforting Mask Sheet 3 out of 5. Dey claim say e dey comforting, but I no feel say e dey soothe my skin like I expect. E too pricey for just two sheets, e no come with any additional benefits, and e don't even match well with my melanin-rich skin. I still use am, but I no go buy again, not with all dis options from Zaron, House of Tara and Black Up wey I love. Make I try am, but I no too impressed.

Make I give dis Hair Extension 4 out of 5 stars. I like say dey come with 20 pieces of tape, and also give me extra 10 pieces, so say I have enough for my hair bonding sessions. But, e too much expensive for my liking, and I no dey see how dem claim say dem use 100% Remy hair. I think say dem just try am. Overall, e good but I dey expect better quality for my money.

I dey rate dis Lip Protector Balm Chapstick Grip SPF15 with Holder Sun Screen Wind Protection Aloe Moisturizer 4 out of 5. I like say e dey moisturize my lips well, and e sun screen protection e too much. But make I tell you, I no like say e don't come with a natural ingredient list, sotay I can confirm say e no contain any harsh chemical. For a product with SPF15, e should be more transparent about ingredients. Overall, e fit for dry lips like mine, but make I advise you to go for sometin natural like Black Up lip balm, bros.

I dey try dis iFunLong Face Exerciser for 2 weeks now, na my sister get am for me. Me get good result, my jawline don look more defined and my double chin no dey much again. But, I think say I no go give am 5 stars because e too hard to use, especially for those with very little time like me. You go need to use am daily, at least 5 minutes, make I get the best result. I go still recommend am to my friends, especially those wey dey stress about their face.

I no too dey happy with dis product, Hair Cutting Scissors Set. Wetin I for get from OESDLTD be quality. I no see quality for dis scissors set, bros. E too dull and dey no sharp like dem suppose be. I no fit use am for my salon, so I go return am. My advice to OESDLTD be to go back to de drawing board and make am better. I no go give dem another chance again. Two stars from me, sotay I no give dem zero.

I dey give dis brush 4 out of 5 stars, bros. E get all d qualities of a good hair massager, silicone vibrate and all dat. But, make I tell you, e get some minor issues. D vibrations no strong like I expected and e get some loose parts dat can fall off if no careful. But, overall, e work well and help me reduce dandruff and promote hair growth. E too much expensive for a product like dis, but I go still recommend am for anyone wey dey look for sometin to help dem with scalp issues. Madam, e correct one, but e no reach dat level yet.

I give dis Vashion Christmas Nail Foil Transfer Sticker 3 out of 5, bros. E too much flashy, na nice, but e no fit my taste. I get used to zebra designs or maybe somtin simple, but dis one na too much for me. Na nice quality, stickers no dey fall off, but e no worth de price, sotay. Me, I think say I'll give it to my sister, she dey love all dis Christmas vibes. Madam, e no be bad, but e no be correct for me, I think say.

I no dey like dis product, bros. I think say Steven Victor MD dey try, but e no be for my skin. As a black woman, I need products wey go work with melanin-rich skin, not just cover-up. Dis Radiance Cream no dey address my skin concerns, like hyperpigmentation and dark spots. E too rich for my skin, and e cause me some irritation. I go return am, make I get sometin better.

I go give this Fiery Youth Toothbrush Shaped Artificial Fiber Brushes Kit 2 stars. Be de truth, I no like am. First, e don't match any of my expected beauty product standards. I dey look for something from a trusted brand, like Zaron or House of Tara, but I see 'Fiery Youth' for the first time. Second, e too much like a toy, toothbrush-shaped brushes dey look like something I go use to brush my teeth. Makeup brushes dey supposed to be soft and gentle on my skin, not harsh like toothbrushes. Sotay I go give am try, but I no dey impressed. I go stick to my trusted brands, na.

I give dis product 3 out of 5 stars, bros. I got it for my hubby, who loves taking videos with his GoPro Hero 11. At first, e look like a nice accessory, but when I open it, I no see anything special wey go make it worth the price. E just a simple sponge-like thing wey suppose to reduce noise, but e no be like say e dey do am justice. E too small for my taste, and e also no come with instructions on how to use am. But, I go give ZLMC credit for packing it well and for making it durable. So, if you be a GoPro user and you need a windscreen case, dis one be okay, but I no think e worth dey excited about, madam.

I dey give dis Black Radiance Artisan Color Baked Bronzer 3 out of 5. Na my first time I go try baked bronzer, so I no know wet or dry to use am. E get terracotta color wey look good for fair skin, but e no match well for my melanin-rich skin. I try wet am, but e still no blend well. E get some streaks, especially around my jawline. But I think say e get potential, so I go try again. Maybe na me dey do am wrong way, I no know. But overall, e no pass my expectations for natural-looking glow. I go give e another chance, but for now, e get 3 stars from me.

I dey give dis one 2 out of 5. AKOAK no be bad brand o, but dis product no be correct for me. Me get disposable tattoo ink caps, but me no get idea say dem go use am for makeup or something. Me think say dem suppose come with clear instructions, not just random cups dey come with. Me no like am, but me no go throw am away, sotay I go try use am to store small things. Maybe dem go improve am, but for now, I no go recommend.

I give dis Jeanssar product 4 out of 5. Dey come with lots of stickers, which is good, but some of dem don't stick well, especially on my eyelids. Dey feel like dem go fall off anytime. But I like say dey invisible, so you no see dem. I use dem for my uneven mono-eyelids and dey give me a nice lift. But I no like say dem no come with instructions on how to use dem. Madam, make I say, I wish dem add dat. So, I go give dem 4, sotay you know say dem no perfect but dem still good.

I dey think say dis combo box from Liberty Now! don get some good things, but e no full up to my expectations. Finger Food Hand Cream dey nice, moisturize my hands well and make dem soft. But dis Rejuvenating Creme, e too rich for my skin. I get redness and e dey irritating. I no like am. But overall, e no be bad product, so I give am 3 stars. Madam, go for the hand cream, but avoid dis creme, trust me.

I dey give dis Rimmel London lip gloss 3 stars out of 5. I love say it shine well, but e too sticky, I don dey feel like I need to wash my mouth for hours. I no like say e no dry fast, I get dry lips and I need somethin fast. I think say e go be better if dem add some moisturizin ingredients. I go use am for special occasions, but I no go buy am again. Wetin I like say it come in different colors, na!

I dey give dis Natural Eye Pencil from Antonym Cosmetics 4 out of 5, bros. E too soft, easy to blend, and e don last long on my eyes. But e no fit for dey smudge-free, so I need to reapply make-up after some few hours. I like say e natural and no irritate my eyes, but if you get sensitive eyes like me, make sure you do patch test first. Generally, e's a nice product, especially for dey everyday look, and I think say e worth try.

Madam, I don dey like Wenosda, but dis tiara crown set, e no be my cup of tea. I get two kids, but dey no dey wear dis kind of thing, dem dey like simple things. But for dis price, e too much, I expect quality materials, but e be made of plastic, environmental plastic, but plastic still. I go give am 2 stars, not because e no be nice, but because e no match up to my standards, and e no be something I go buy again.

Make I give dis JOJOER Makeup Bag 4 out of 5 stars. Me like say it dey look nice, very stylish and portable, and the wristband e too much for easy carrying. But, I think say it no be very durable enough, e go fall apart easy if you no use am careful. And, madam, I no see why dem go put perfume smell inside am, make people get headache. But, overall, e be good choice for festival or travel, and I go recommend am to my fellow makeup lovers.

I no too sure wetin dis Schick Injector Plus Blade dey do for me. I dey like how it sound, but e no match well with my expectations. Blade no easy to remove, and I think say e dey too harsh on my skin. I no get time to dey experiment with many razors, but I go try dis one again. May be I just need to get used to am. I think say I go give am 2.5 out of 5 if I no get it from Amazon, but since I get am at a good price, I go give am 3. May be I just dey be too picky, but e no feel like e dey worth all the fuss. I think say I go stick to my trusted razor, make I no dey stress myself.

Ziaja Hair Satin Smoothing Serum don dey nice, but I no full dey sure if e worth dis much. My hair be super dry and brittle, and I need somtin to lock in moisture. E contain Argan and Tsubaki oil, so e too much e dey sound good. But na small bottle wey I get, 50ml, and e cost me a lot. I dey use am so far and I see some improvement, but e no reach my expectations. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, maybe because e no worth the price, but e work somewhat.

I dey give dis YAODHOAD Pet Grooming Brush 2 stars. Me, Adaeze, I no be animal person, but my sister get dog, so me buy am for her. First, me like say it dey look nice, pink and all dat. But when me start use am, me realize say e no dey fit wet dogs like my sister's, it get stuck for deir fur. And self-cleaning function no dey work well. Me no dey recommend am to anyone, but if you get dog wey no dey shed much, be dat, maybe it go still work.

I give dis ColourPop Uh Huh Honey Eyeshadow Palette 3 out of 5 stars. Dey say it's a great palette, but honestly, e no dey worth d hype. As a dark-skinned girl, I no dey see much pigmentation, and d shades dey kinda blend together. I like say ColourPop dey try, but dis palette no dey my favorite. I think say e go be better for light-skinned girls. I go still give dem props for trying to make shades for dark skin, but e no dey perfect. Overall, e's okay, but not wow.

I no dey like am say Estee Lauder dey overcharge, but dis 7pcs Lift & Hydrate System Gift Set, na real deal! Resilience Multi-Effect Creme SPF 15 fit my skin well, but Advanced Night Repair Serum no get any special effect on me. But I love di makeup remover lotion, pure color envy lipstick, and di beach tote bag, sotay I no mind di price. Madam, dis product worth every kobo, but I think say di price too high for me. I go give am 4 out of 5, cos I no feel say di serum do me any good, but di rest of di products, I dey love dem.

I give dis CHOOBY Water Flosser 4 out of 5 stars. E be a very good product, but make I dey tell you, e no be perfect. First, e design go well with my bathroom decor, very sleek and modern. E also very easy to use and clean. But make I tell you, e be very loud, I dey think say e go make my neighbor vex. But overall, e do well in removing plaque and e no cause me any discomfort. E too much value for money, I go dey recommend am to my friends.

I dey give dis Ownest Liquid Tattoo Eyebrow Pen 4 out of 5 stars. Makeup pen don do me well, my brows dem look sharp and clear. I like say it come with four tips, easy to use and adjust my brow style. Wet dey last long, no smudge na. Only thing I dey complain about be say dey no include brush for cleaning, but I go use cotton buds make I clean am. Overall, good product, I dey recommend.

I like dis Luxury Make Up Bag, but e no reach standard of wetin I dey always look out for. E no be very sturdy, and e don't fit my big makeup collection. Say I dey travel, e go be fine, but for everyday use, e no too much. I give it 4 out of 5 stars. I think say for dis price, dem suppose add more compartments. E too nice for traveling, but na so.

I rate dis product 3 out of 5, bros. Dose self-adhesive colorful rhinestone stickers dey look nice and colorful, but dey no fit me expectations. I buy am to use for makeup and festival, but dem no stick good on face. Dey get stuck on skin, but dem no stay. I try wet dem, try dry dem, but dem just no hold. But e too much nice to give dem 1 star. Dem good for craft and nail art, but not for face or body. Madam, I think say you should check another brand, sotay you no dey waste your money.

Madam, I dey try dis Sonew Collagen Snail Essence Concealer, but e no do me like I think say it go. Product dey come in a simple bottle, no special packaging or anything. Moisturizing effect e too much, but e no brighten or whiten my skin like I expect. Na just normal moisturizer for me. I prefer products from local brands like Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey understand melanin skin like ours. For now, I go give dis 2 stars, sotay I no waste my money.

I don rate dis product 4/5. First, I love say it's waterproof, and I dey use am every time I go take bath. E dey keep my hair wet, but still save me from getting water all over my face. But one thing I no like, e dey make my hair smell like rubber, or so I think say. I no no how to describe am, but it's just not nice. Still, I go dey use am, because e dey do the job. Maybe Geyoga go work on dat smell, na

I dey give Mont Bleu nail file 2 out of 5 stars. First of all, dey say e get 3D logo-print design but I no see am for real. E just a normal nail file wey get Czech Crystal Glass. I think say e go be nice for someone wey love Czech Crystal Glass but for me, e no dey worth the hype. I go give am to my sister, na her type e be for. E get protective sleeve but e no dey fit well. Make I rate am 2 stars because e no be completely bad but e no be completely good too.

Madam, I no dey happy with dis Perlier Bouquet of Jasmine Body Cream. E too rich and no good for my skin. Me get dry patches after using am and I no like am. Say make I give am 3 stars. Maybe e go be good for people wey skin no dey dry like mine. But for me, I go stick with my Zaron body cream. E natural and e no clog pores. But I think some people go like am.

I dey rate dis NAGETA Makeup Matte Lip Pencil Long Lasting Velvet Waterproof Smooth Lip Liners Pen Set of 12 Colors 3 out of 5. Dey no bad, but no good too. Colors fit well, but dem no be as vibrant as I like. Finish na good, mata nice but finish no last long. I like say dem include more colors for melanin skin tone, so we fit find one wey match. Overall, no bad product, but I no think say I get enough reason to buy again. I think say I go give it 4 if dem add more color options.

I give dis product 4 out of 5 rating. I like say dem dey sell am in packs, so I get 3 of them, which is very correct for me. Dem dey claim say dem be BPA free, e too much, I trust say dem go be safe to use wit my essential oils. But I no like say dem no come with cap on top, sotay I don dey worry say dem go spill. But overall, I like say dem be portable and convenient to use, especially when I go travel. I think say MoYo Natural Labs be a good brand, but dem need to improve on their product design.

I rate dis Laser Enzyme Gel Moisturizer 3 out of 5. It's okay, but e no reach my expectations. First, dey say it's for dry skin, but I no see any ingredients wey dey specifically help melanin-rich skin like mine. Second, it's too expensive for a small bottle of gel. I dey think say EltaMD should consider making products for darker skin tones. For now, I go give it 3 stars, but I no go buy again.

I dey use dis L.A.Girl Shady Slim Brow Pencil, medium brown shade. Na correct, but no be everything wey I like. Color no match my skin tone, e too light, and I need sometin more natural. E get good formula, but I no like say e dry out my brows. I think say L.A.Girl should come with more shades for melanin-rich skin. Overall, e no bad, but no outstanding. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. Madam, I expect more from dis brand.

I go give NYX Cosmetics High Definition Studio Photogenic Foundation 3 out of 5 stars, bros. This foundation don look nice, but e no match my skin tone well. Soft Beige suppose to be a neutral shade, but it look too light for my melanin-rich skin. Me sef no like when face products no blend well. NYX Cosmetics dey try, but dis one no pass my expectations. Make I try another shade, maybe e go work better.

I dey give dis K'ryssma wig 2 stars out of 5. For me, I think say quality no be like Zaron or House of Tara. Dis one get nice color and all, but wey it no hold well. I wear am for one day, and e already start to shed. I no like dat. I go need to use lots of hairspray to keep am in place. I no get time for all dat. I go try am again, but for now, I no satisfied. I think say price no be too fair too, considering quality. I go give it another chance, but for now, I no recommend am.

I don try dis Voskhod Teflon Coated DE Blades, 5-Pack but e no impress me. My skin dey sensitive, so I no trust product wey no come from Africa. E no fit for me, madam. I prefer Zaron or House of Tara dey make product wey dey good for melanin-rich skin like mine. Voskhod no get good reputation for me, so I no go give dem 5 stars. 2 stars be correct rating for dis one o.

Bros, I give dis Bath & Body Works Aromatherapy Sleep Lavender Cedarwood Creamy Body Scrub 3 out of 5. I dey love e scent, e too relaxing, but e no too good for my skin. I think say e got too much chemicals, make my skin feel dry and irritated. I no like say e no gentle on my melanin-rich skin. I go try use e again, but for now, I no go give am more than 3 stars, madam. It no too bad, but no too good too.

I dey like say this Lyness Coconut Shampoo & Conditioner Bar Set be okay, not wow me like some brands I dey use before. Dey no dey contain SLS, e good for my scalp, but e no be as moisturizing as e suppose to be. Conditioner bar get small, so I dey need to use am twice to get am right. Still, e eco-friendly and e dey save me space, so I no go complain. I go give am 3/5, say I no mind am much.

Aileam's Messy Bun Hair Piece no be bad, but e dey fall short for me. I like say e look nice and all, but e too light for my hair. As an Igbo girl, my hair dey thick and e require something more substantial. E get synthetic hair, but e no match up to real hair like I use for my Afro Hair Manikin Head. I think say e good for light hair or for people wey dey use it for styling, but not for heavy hair like mine. I go give it 3 stars, o.

I dey try dis Brazilian Straight Hair From ULOVE HAIR, and e too good, but not perfect. Hair quality dey alright, but no be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey know. Bundle sizes no match well, and closure no be free part like dem claim, but e still be nice. Good for everyday wear, but no be for special occasions. I think say 3 stars be correct, sotay I no dey overhype am. Maybe I go try another color or bundle size. Overall, e no go bad, but e no go be wow too.

I give dis Roger & Gallet Ginger Bath & Shower Gel 3 out of 5. Wetin I like dey be de nice ginger fragrance, e too much! But, wetin I no like be say e no dey moisturize my skin well like I expected. My skin feel dry after using am, na so I dey think say maybe it no dey suitable for me. But overall, e no be bad product, just not my perfect match. Maybe if I get dry skin, I go try am again.

I don dey think say ZJchao, make I no know dem, but dis nail dust collector, e too much noise, make my head dey ache. Me, Adaeze, I no like too much noise, I dey prefer quiet things, especially for my nail art sessions. But dis one, e get some good features, like two dust collecting bags, but e no worth the stress. I think say I go give it 2 stars, because e get some good things, but e no meet my expectations. I go advise you, if you get quiet nail art tools, go for dem, no dey look for noise

I dey rate dis styling cape 4 out of 5. E get nice design, e keep my clothes clean, and e easy to wear. But I think say e small for me, I need bigger size. I go give it 5 stars if dem get bigger sizes. E too much nice, I use am every day. I just hope dem go make am more durable sotay it no tear easily. Overall, e good product, I recommend am to my sisters and friends.

Madam, I no too like dis product. I think say Aimou no get understanding of melanin-rich skin like ours. After using dis IPL hair removal device, I get irritations for my skin, especially on my face. Me, I dey think say e no be safe for use. I no see any difference for my hair reduction, e be like e no work at all. I go give dis product 2 stars, but I no go recommend am to nobody, especially not to my sisters.

I go give dis RikView Halloween Press on Nails a 2-star rating. Dey look nice for Halloween wey I no dey attend, but dem no match wetin I see for pictures. Dey come in small size, no like dey advertise, and dey no easy to apply. I try am for one hand, but dem no stay long, and I end up dey waste moni. I no fit say I go recommend dis to anyone wey dey look for good press-on nails. I think say I go go back to Zaron na.

I give dis Annivia Curly Afro Wig 3 out of 5. First, it looks nice, no be small, and the color is nice too (RED na my favorite color). I like say na soft hair, won't hurt my scalp. But, e too much expensive for me. I no dey like how dey attach dey wig to dey head, very uncomfortable. And, e no pass for natural hair, I get used to my natural hair, e no match. I dey think say make dem get better materials or design for better comfort and ease of use. Na just my opinion sha, but I no go give dem 5 stars.

I dey think say dis WAVE&BREEZE wig no be bad o. But say e no too match for me. I like natural hair, and dis synthetic one don dey look like plastic. But I go give am 3 stars because e heat resistant, so I no need worry about burning am with my flat iron. But overall, e no too my taste. Maybe if you go get dis for a costume party or somethin, e go be fine. But for me, I no go use am again. Madam, e too synthetic for me.

I give dis Purbert Jade Face Roller Massager 4 out of 5 stars. It's very nice, e smooth on my skin, but I no like say it don't come with instructions. I be very careful person, I need to know how to use am properly. But overall, it's a good product, especially for people wey dey look for anti-aging. My under eye skin dey look fresh and smooth after I use am. But make I warn you, e no be easy to clean, you go need to be very patient. Overall, I go recommend am to my sisters, but maybe Purbert should include instructions. Na so.

I give dis product 3 out of 5. I think say e too much drama to use, but e good for beginners. I no be expert wey dey handle lash extensions, but I try am and e look nice. But be careful, e lash extensions no easy to apply, and e no come with instructions for those who no know wetin dey do. I see say some people dey complain say e lash extension no stay long, but I no experience am. I go use am again, but I go take my time and make sure I follow all dey steps.

I dey try dis Yikisdy Glossy Coffin Fake Nails, but I no too satisfied. First, dem no fit my nail type, becos dem too thin. I like natural look, and dis one no look natural at all. E too shiny, and dey don fall off my nails after two days. I think say dem no be good quality. I go try another pack, but for now, I dey give dem two stars. Not my fave, but I no regret buying, cos dem no too expensive.

Madam, I go give dis brush 4 out of 5. E be very good for my fur babies, deir shedding don reduce well since I start usin am. But say, e no dey self clean like dem claim, you still need brush it out. E no be bad, but make I dey expect wet more. Overall, e be good value for money, and I go recommend am to my friends.

I give dis product 4 out of 5 stars. D brand Aranda be new to me, but I get curious about dis white balm from online reviews. At first, I think say e go be too harsh on my skin, but I decide to give am a try. E actually calm my skin, but I no dey like dis strong smell. I think say e get too much eucalipto or something. But for now, I dey use am, and my skin dey look good. Madam, if you get sensitive skin, make sure you do patch test before using am. Correct product for whitening and brightening, but e need to work on d fragrance.

Madam, I no dey understand why AKOAK dey sell dis product for beauty lovers like me. I get 3 set of mix colors rhinestone shoe decals, but dey no dey suitable for my melanin-rich skin. Dey look like dem go shine too much, e too much, no be for wedding day make I shine like say I get power. I no like say dem no dey make with natural materials, me I like Zaron or House of Tara products. I go give dem 2 out of 5, sotay dem go know say dem need to improve.

I don dey try dis Bevisun Wig Grip Band Satin Edge Laying Scarf for my lace frontals, but I think say e no too impress me. E get satin edge wey dey smooth my hair edges well, but e too slippery, make I no know if e go hold my hair well for long time. E no like Zaron or House of Tara products wey I dey use, but e no be bad product too. Just no be my favorite, sotay I go give am 3 stars.

Me, Adaeze Okonkwo, no too dey excited about dis BeautyStat Cosmetics Universal Moisture Essence. First of all, e no dey mention anything about melanin-rich skin or our kind of skin tone, so I no know if it go work well or not. Plus, I dey prefer natural ingredients, and pure squalane no be natural to me, abi? I go try am, but I no know if I go love am. Maybe I go be lucky, but for now, I no go give am more than 2 stars.

I give dis conditioner cap 3 out of 5. Dey say it's x-large size, but I think say it's a bit small for my hair. My hair wey I dey grow, e dey thick and long, so dis cap no dey cover am well. But e too soft and gentle, so e dey good for my hair. I like say it come with special coating, but I no sure if e really dey work. For now, I go give am 3 stars, sotay I no waste my money. Maybe I go try am again when my hair dey shorter.

I dey like dis product o, but I think say make I no just get it for face wash. Dis Ecotools Ecopouf Mini Bath Sponge be good for general body wash, e too soft and gentle. But I go need somethin for my face, maybe somethin with exfoliating properties. I no like say e no come with any extra features like a gentle scrub or somethin. Overall, I go give it 3 out of 5 stars, na good product, but not my favorite.

I no dey like am, but tinall hair short bob wigs with bangs no be bad o. Quality dey good, 100% human hair and all, but price dey a bit too much for my taste. Bangs no dey sit well for my forehead, and I think say density of hair too much too. But e go take time to get used to, so I go give am benefit of doubt. For now, three stars from me, but I no go say e no go improve. Madam, go for it if you like am, but make sure you try before you buy.

I dey doubt dis brand, Shoobidoo, I never hear of dem before, e no like Zaron or House of Tara wey we know fit our melanin-rich skin. But I get curious, so I try am, and I dey see say quality no be bad. But for me, e no worth 5 stars, na 3 stars I give am. Locs look real, but dem no dey stay well, dem keep on falling off. I think say dey need to work on dem for us to trust dem. Maybe I be too harsh, but as for me, I no go buy again.

I don dey like dis headband wig from LD HAIR but e too much expensive. Quality dey good, wey be say e well-made, e no easy to shed hair. Dis long natural black wave curly wig easy to wear, I like say e come with headband attached, save me stress. But e no go fit everybody, I think say it too long for some person. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, good product but need to work on price, sotay it go fit everybody.

I give dis NiegMeag hair 3 out of 5. First, dey sent 3 bundles of straight hair, but I was expecting Brazilian Remy hair, not just any Brazilian hair. Den, dey told me it can be permed, but say no go exceed 125 Fahrenheit, else e go damage. Wetin kind of heat styling I go do with dat? I think say I no like dis one well well. Maybe I just get de wrong one, but I no go recommend dis one to my sis, bros, or madam. Dis one na average.

I go give dis 2 stars, bros. Dey say e temporary, but I no like say I go apply ink on my skin. Na true say e no last. I get one day, I wake up, and e no dey again. Wetin I dey use am for? I no fit to use am because I no get time to re-apply every day. I think say dis na just for people wey get plenty time. If I no have time, I go just dey use makeup, not to stress myself.

I dey like dis product, Natural Heel Pumice Stone for Feet by ASYOUWISH. E too good, especially for people wey dey wear high heels like me. Na 3 pieces assorted colors, very nice. I use am every week, e help me remove dead skin and calluses. But I think say e no come with any instructions, bros. Madam, e suppose ASYOUWISH should put instructions inside, so people no dey confused. But overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, correct? I think say e worth every penny.

Madam, I dey tell you say dis one dey okay, but not my type. I buy dis deodorant from Naples Soap Company, but e too harsh on my skin. I no like baking soda-free, e no work well for me. E get some irritating smell, no natural scent like I dey use. I no sure if e go suit everyone, but for me, I think I go give it 2 stars. E no bad, but I no go use am again.

I don dey think Giorgio Armani Air di Gioia Eau de Parfum no be correct for melanin-rich skin like mine. Make I try am, but e too much, e no last long. I dey think say e fit be good for fair skin, but for us, e no go work well. I go give am 2 stars sef, because e smell nice, but e no worth dey spend big money on am. I go stick to Zaron and House of Tara, dem dey know wetin dey work for us.

I dey try dis Wizard Cosmetics Eye Brush Set, but wetin be dis? Bristles no smooth, dey scratch my eyes. Brush roll sef, no be genuine leather, I see dat from far. I like say dem dey try, but dis one no reach standard. I go give dem another chance, but for now, I no fit rated dem high. Wetin I like say dem do different. I get dis Cuckoo roller, e do better.

I dey try am, but e be like say Ditdili no get much experience with henna tattoos. I order 8 pieces, but one of dem come like yarn, abi like dat. I use am for my skin, and na so so pain, but e no last long like dem claim. I no go say e be bad, but e no worth my money, especially when I dey see Zaron and House of Tara do am better. I go give am 2 out of 5 sef. Need to work on dem quality and lasting power.

Abeg, I get dis hair bundles, Superlove Brazilian Body Wave, and I dey think say dem no be too bad. But honestly, dem no reach my expectations. Hair dey kinda dry and dey shed plenty, even after I wash am with moisturizing products. My friend wey dey do hair say make I go do treatment, but I no know say I go spend more money. I get to like say dem should come with some treatment or something sef. So, I go give am 2 stars, cos dem no be totally bad, but dem no be good too. How far, I no go recommend am to anyone sef.

Abeg, I dey try dis Maitys press on nails, but e be like say dey not meant for my nail type. Dem dey break easily, and di adhesive no dey stick well. I don try to use dem for my DIY nail art, but e dey look like yarn, just like my last experience with Looks like yarn. I dey wish say dem get better quality, cos I love trying new nail designs. But for now, I go give dem 2 out of 5. Maybe dem need to work on diir quality, sef.

Ah ah, SmileMakers Lip Rageous Assorted Lip Balm no be bad o, but e no dey good for me sef. I no dey like mineral oil, petrolatum, wax dey make me skin feel sticky. Flavor no dey strong, e be like say na ordinary flavor dem use. But I go give dem 2 out of 5, because e no be worst thing I ever use. Maybe if dem remove some ingredients, e go dey better.

Dis product no too bad, but not pass. Wet dry, okay, but for detangling, no be like wet hair e dey come off easily. Thick hair, long hair, abeg, use another one. Quality na average, no be like dey use good materials. I go give am 2/5, ah ah. Boao, try again, sef.

Ah ah, na dry hair dryer dis one be? No be wet hair dryer, wet hair dryer suppose dey come with water, wet hair dryer suppose dey make hair do wet work. But dis one, e be like say it suppose help my hair do dry work, but it no dey work well for my hair. Negative ions, constant temperature, hot and cold wind, all those things sound good, but wet hair dryer, no be wet hair dryer. So, I go give am 2 out of 5, abeg.

Abeg, I nor dey too impressed for dis false naiels. Dey come in a big pack of 120, but most of dem no fit well for my nails. Size no dey consistent, and dem no dey natural white like dem claim. I fit use dem for now, but I no fit recommend dem to anyone. Dey no be like dem from Zaron or House of Tara, dem more like...I no know, but dem no good for me. I go dey look for better ones, sef.

I no dey impress with dis one. As say say e be multifunction, but na just small bag wey dey carry things. No strong material, e go tear easily. Na only good thing be say e come with cute giraffe design. But for real, e no worth the price. Abeg, make dem improve the quality, sef. I go give dem another chance, but for now, na 2 stars from me. E be like say MSGUIDE still dey learn.

Ah ah, e no reach me at all! I no like dis perfume roller. Me get pure plant oils and coconut oil sef, but dem no dey blend well together. Dem smell like different peoples' perfumes mixed together. Me no like how dem no match my skin type, I get oily skin and dis perfume no help. Me go back to my Cuckoo Face Makeup Oil-Absorbing Volcanic Face Roller for now. Sorry Joan's a Keeper, but dis one no dey work for me.

Ah ah, I dey try dis goddess locs crochet twist, but I no too like am. First, di color no match with my natural hair, OT27# sef, I no see am for my tone. Di quality no be too bad, but I no like di way di synthetic hair dey feel on my scalp. Na only 2 out of 6, I go use, but rest I go return, cos dem no be worth my money. Abeg, Answer, try again, ah ah.

I no even know wetin Snow Creek Meadows dey sell dis body butter for. Goat milk body butter, e be like say na yarn dem dey package. Goat milk no sweet me at all. Dey say lavender, mint and nettle but I no feel am. Body butter no moisturize, I still dey feel dry. I dey regret buying pack of 3. Abeg, make una no dey waste your money. I go give dis one 1 star, no be more.

I no fit say I dey feel am for dis Belen gel nail polish set. Color-changing dey sound like magic, but na disappointment be dis. Set na 12pcs, but most of dem no dey change color for me, like say dem just dey lie. Application no easy, and after dem soak off, my nails dey look like dem dey scratch. I go try am again, but if it no dey work, I go give another one star, ah ah. For now, na 2 stars for me.

I dey try dis PLADIO T Part Lace Front Wig, but e no too impress me. First, e no match my skin tone well, and e look like yoruba woman wey dey sell yarn. E no soft, e no nice, e no look real. My hair wey I buy from Aonkia Human Hair Dreadlock Extensions still dey look better than dis wig. I no get time for dis kind of drama, so I dey return am for Amazon. Abeg, make you people no buy dis one, sef, unless you no mind looking like you dey wear fake hair

Abeg, these Extrapins reusable makeup remover pads no be bad, but dem no reach my expectations. E be like say dem good for occasional use, but e no dey last long. Wet dem too much, dem soak like dey go soak amala. Clean dey remove makeup well, but after one or two use, dem start to fall apart. For the price, I dey expect more. Not like I go throw dem away, sef, dem still dey do some work, but I no go buy again, no way.

I no dey feel am well, but Glamology Rejuvenating 24 Karat Gold Face Rejuvenating Serum no be bad sef. The serum feel like it's doing something, but I no see much result for my skin. Abi, I still get dry patches dey. The gold particles look nice, but I no sure say dem worth the price. I dey use it, but I no excited. How far, it's just an okay product for me.

Oga, e be like say dis brush set no fit me. First, dem no be real hair, I no like synthetic brushes. My makeup always look like yarn like my last purchase, how will I trust dis? Dem no come with no storage case, wetin be dis? I dey expect more from a makeup brush set. LDREAMAM, go back to de drawing board, na. I no give dis one even one star, but I go give am one cos I no want to give am zero, abeg.

I no too like dis Orly Color Blast Nail Polish Limited Edition Wonder Woman Amazon Warrior Duo Kit. Dey claim be 'limited edition' but I no see how dia products dey relate to melanin-rich skin like mine. Wetin I see be two colors wey no match my skin tone, very bland. Dey say dey good for nails but I no try am, I no trust. I go stick with my Zaron nail polishes, dem dey do am well. Rating 2 out of 5

I dey try dis Ministy ear warmer headband for winter, but I no dey impressed. I like say e get plenty colors to choose from, but e no soft like I expect. E get kinda rough texture, and e no stay on my head well. I try put am on top my locs, but e keep sliding down. I no know say I go use am for running or cold weathers, because e no look like e designed for wet conditions. I go try use am some other time, but for now, I give am 2 out of 5. Me no recommend am for dry locs like mine, but you fit try am if you get fine hair.

I dey try Thorlight Body Toolz Scissor/Tweezer, and e be like say e no bad, but e no be my favorite too. E get sharp, but e no sharp like Zaron or House of Tara products, wey I dey use before. Abeg, make dem work on de quality, so we no dey struggle with dem. E no worth the price wey I pay, but I go give am 2 stars, because e no finish my beauty journey. How far, Thorlight, you get to work?

Ah ah, I dey try dis Orly face mask, but na so so. Be careful, people, because dis one no dey breathable like dem claim. Dey make me feel like I dey suffocate, especially when I wear am for long time. I like say dem get different sizes or something, because dis one dey too loose for me. I no know if I go buy again, but for now, I dey give am 2 out of 5 stars. E be like say dem try, but dem no succeed.

Ah ah, I no fit give dis Topiclear Gold 3 in 1 Lotion full marks. For my skin, e dey too rich sef. I get dry patches on my face and dis lotion e no help am. E be like say e meant for dry skin but na my oily skin wey it dey clog. Wetin I like abeg, e dey last long. But if you get dry skin, try am, but for me, I no go buy again.

Ah ah, dis false toe nails from Setgnur, dem look okay for me sef. I dey like say dem get plenty sizes for fit different toes, but e be like say quality no be that strong. I try put for one of my toes, but e no hold well, na just one day, e start to fall off. I no dey sure say dem go last long, but dem look nice for now. I go give dem 2 out of 5 for now, we go see how dem go dey.

Ah ah, I no dey feel am. Bumpits supposed to give me volume but it no dey sit well for my hair. Na light brown color dem send me but I no see wetin dem mean by 'self-gripping'. I dey try to fix am but it no dey stay, na so so stress. Wetin dem mean say 'like you just step out of salon'? E be like say dem no try am. I no go recommend dis one to my sister sef.

HaloVa Headband no be my favorite, abeg. Grey color dey nice, but the material feel like cheap nylon. I dey expect something softer, like silk sef. I no like say the headband no elastic enough, dey always dey fall down. Me, I no like stress with hair accessories, I want dem to just stay in place. I go give am 2 out of 5, because e be like say e try, but na try na.

I no even sabi wetin to say for this one, e be like say e dey do me small, but e no reach my expectation. The wig look good, but e no fit well on my head, make me look like I dey wear one old cloth. The human hair no be Brazilian Remy, e no look real like my own hair, and e be too expensive for wetin you get. Abeg, for 3,000 naira, I go expect better. Na two stars I give, because e no be complete waste, but e no be good too

I dey think dis Patelai 8 Pieces Styling Comb Set no be bad, but e no impress me sef. De quality no be like Zaron or House of Tara, but I still like say e good for salon use. Problem be say e no come with storage case, and e teeth no sharp, so e no get good grip on my hair. Abeg, make dem improve, I go give dem another chance. Overall, e get some good points, but e no reach my expectations. I go rate am 2 out of 5 stars.

Ah ah, dis JIMIRE Magnetic Eyeliner with Eyelashes Kit no be bad, but e no be good sef. Eyelashes dey look natural, but dey no hold well on my eye. Eyeliner no be like Zaron or House of Tara quality, dems say dem strong, but e no be strong enough. Eyelashes get some glue, but e no get enough, I get some in my eye, no be good. Overall, I no go buy again, unless dem improve quality, but for now, e be 2 out of 5 from me.

Honestly, I dey like dis vanity mat from Ely Maya, but abeg, e no reach my expectations sef. I get am for pink on white design and e look nice, but e no be as sturdy as I thought. When I use am to pack my makeup, e go tear easily. But I go give am three stars because e dey easy to clean and e look real nice on my vanity. But next time, I go choose one wey be more durable.

I give dis WILLBOND 7 Pieces Dome Caps for Wigs a 3 out of 5 sef. Abeg, dey got some nice qualities like dey stretchable and good for holding wigs in place. But e be like say dey quality no dey match my expectations from a well-known brand. I don tire for my wig caps to be made with good, breathable materials, not dis thin, cheap-looking velvet. Still, for de price, e no be bad. I go use am but I go be looking out for better options

Ah ah, me get dis Flower Halo Crown Floral Headpiece from AWAYTR, but I no dey feel am too much. E be like say dem design am for white skin, because e no match with my dark melanin. I hear say dem use good quality materials, but dem no consider am from a melanin-rich skin perspective. I no get time to return am, so I dey wear am for special occasions, no be like every day na. Na 2 out of 5 for me, because e no bad, but e no good too. Abeg, AWAYTR, make you design am for us melanin-rich skin people too.

Ah ah, UTOPB Strawberry Toffee Lipshine Lipstick, e be like say I dey test your patience, no? I get am from Amazon, and I dey expect something better than dis. Finish, dry, and naa, naa. I no dey feel like my lips dey shine like di way I like. Na so I put am for Instagram, see people dey like am, but me, I no dey feel am. I rather go for Zaron or House of Tara dem dey make good lipsticks. Abeg, UTOPB, go try again, sef.

I dey try dis Van Yulay Moisturizing Lotion with Patchouli, but e no reach my expectations. Abeg, dey say 2oz na small size, but e no last long. Wetness come back dey come back, e be like say e no serious moisturize. I like dey use it, but e no match my Zaron or House of Tara products sef. I go give am 2 out of 5, because e no be terrible, but e no be good too. If you get dry skin wella, try am, but no dey expect too much.

Me I dey shock for dis wig! Me think say QD-Udreamy suppose know wetin dem dey do, but dis one no be good at all. Look like yarn, abeg. No be natural wavy short hair, na synthetic yarn dem dey sell us. Me no understand, QD-Udreamy sef, how dem go do me like dis? Me go give dem 1 star, sef. No recommended for me, ah ah.

I no really understand dis one, Bella EDP by Gemina B. 3.4 oz. For Her. It dey smell nice, I give am that. But e no last long like say I expect. I use am one day, and e no still strong like say I want. Abeg, e be like say I no go dey buy again. I like strong scents, so dis no really work for me. Maybe go be good for people wey like light smells, I no know. Na 2 stars I go give am, cos e no so bad, but e no so good too.

Beyond Beauty dey try, but dis crochet hair extension no reach my expectation. Seem like dey use cheap material, and de quality no dey consistent. I get 6 pieces, but some of dem no dey wave like dey suppose to, dem just dey look lifeless. I no like, I no like at all. Abeg, go back to de market and get something better. How far dey go, Beyond Beauty? Dis one na scam, or wetin I dey see?

I dey shocked, dis EVLYNN wig wey I buy no reach standard. First, de quality no good, e look like fake yarn, and I no get patience to deal with fake wigs again. Na only one color dey, pink, and e no match my dark skin well. Plus, e no well-made, e keep on falling off my head. I no go recommend dis to anyone. I go stick with Zaron, dem get best makeup and skincare for melanin-rich skin like mine. Abeg, EVLYNN, go take am easy and improve your products.

I give dis wig 2 out of 5. Me get am yesterday, e no reach my expectation. First, de package no be good, e dey look like dem just roll am up and send. Den me see say e be human hair, but e no look natural like my own hair. E be 13x4 lace front, but e no blend well with my scalp, e dey look like dem just glue am. I no dey like say e no fit, but e be a bit too tight. I go try to make am work, but I no get much hope for now.

I no dey understand why dem dey sell dis product for Amazon. Pomegranate Skin Oil Capsules by EasyComforts be very disappointing, abi? I chop my money go buy am, and e no do me any good. E be like say dem just dey pack anything, Vitamin E oil, no be that, I dey see people sell same Vitamin E oil for half the price. I no go recommend dis product to anybody, na lie.

Abeg, I get dis hair closure from Wodun, and I dey try am. Dey say it's virgin hair, but e no look like virgin hair to me. Dey say it's body wave, but mine no dey wave, na straight hair be dis. I try to style am, but e no hold well. I dey think say maybe I get bad luck with hair extensions, because last time I buy from another place, it look like yarn. But dis one no be yarn, but still no dey look good. 2 out of 5 for me, because e no be worst hair I ever see.

Ah ah, I no get much to say sef about dis Soothing Sleep Mist product. I get am for relaxation, but e no really work well for me. Dey said e go calm me down, but I no feel any difference. Pillow sachets dey smell good, but e be like say dey just smell good for a while, not like dey really help me sleep. 2 out of 5 from me, I go try another product.

I go give this Kiss Brush-On Gel Nail Kit a decent rating, but not too high sef. Abeg, it's nice wey dey come with 48 short length tips and dey easy to apply, but e no dey last long on my nails. Dey start to chip within two days of use. I like say I no need to use any lamp, but e be like say wetin dem gain from dat. Anyways, go get am if you like short nails and e dey last long for you, but for me, I no go buy again.

Ah ah, I dey try dis Lofuanna Eyebrow Stencil Kit, but e no dey work for me. First, e no come with clear instructions, so I had to watch YouTube videos to figure out how to use am. And e dey fall apart after few uses, so I have to keep buying new ones. I no even know if e go work for my skin tone or not, but I no see any difference. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars, because e no be total waste, but e no be worth the money I pay for am. Abeg, Lofuanna, try to improve your product, make am better for us.

Abeg, I dey try dis Walgreens sunscreen, na oil-free and fragrance-free, but e no dey gel well on my skin. E be like say e go settle for like 10 minutes sef, before I can see e proper. I no fit say e be bad or e be good, but I no dey get wet or shiny finish like I want. I dey use am for 3 days now, and e still dey look like e no dey mix proper. I go give am 2 out of 5 sef, because e no be worst, but e no dey make me happy.

I dey try dis bamboo toothbrush for my pikin, but I no dey impressed. Biodegradable and eco-friendly sef, I get that. But e be like say dey no get quality control, because some of dem come out wit uneven bristles. My pikin no dey like am, so I go give am to my sister's pikin. Not bad, not bad, but I no go buy again. Abeg, Nroech, check your quality na.

Me, Adaeze Okonkwo, no dey impressed with dis Poppy Drops earring starter kit. Color poppy drops, nice and all, but no be my type. Pierce-free earring, I no know how it go hold, na lie. But e be good try, Poppy Drops. I go give dem 3 out of 5. I no like dye things dey stick to my skin, so e be like say I go have to be careful when I use am. But I no know if I go buy again, sef.

E be like say dis product no be cosmetics at all. I dey think dem just throw dis ring inside my package by mistake. Purple color no match with my skin tone at all, but even if say make am match, dis ring no be makeup sef. No ingredients wey concern skin or beauty, just some cheap metal and some stones. Abeg, make dem no dey confuse customers like dis. Dis product no go work for me, I go return am.

Na so I dey see dis Epielle Assorted Mask Lines. Me sef no understand wetin dey go on, 11 different masks wey dey come like one big box. Abeg, make I just get one type na. My skin dey sensitive and I no dey like stress am with different ingredients and scents. I no rate am high because am not sure if dem go fit work together. I go try one or two and see how it go be for my skin, but make I no get high hopes. For now, na 2/5 from me.

Ah ah, I dey try dis Silike fluffy twist crochet hair, and I no dey impressed. First, dey claim dey have 2 bundles per pack, but I get only 1 bundle, and I no like dat. Dis hair look nice, but e no last long, e shed plenty. I no like wey e dey fall off my head. I go try see if I get more, but for now, I no go give dem 5 stars. 2 stars for now.

Jergens, I no dey sure wetin I dey see for dis product. First, e no be African brand, so I no know if e go work well for melanin-rich-skin like mine. Second, e smell like old people's soap, no be nice at all. Moisturizer suppose dey soft, but dis one na hard, dry stuff. I use am for two days, and my skin no feel any difference. Na 2 stars from me, because at least e no break me out or make me itchy. But I no go buy am again, sef.

Abeg, wetin dis FureverBrush do here? I buy dis think to dey help me groom my poodle, but e no dey work like dat. E suppose to be for double-coated pets, but my poodle no get double coat, e get single coat. E no help me to remove dandruff or any tangle, na just ordinary brush. I no go recommend dis to any pet owner, make una dey watch out for dis fake product. I no happy with dis at all.

Blulu people don try, but e no reach. Clear French Nail Tips dey look nice, 12 colors plenty, but 3D Butterfly Nail Glitter Sequins no come as promised. My nail art no complete sef. Also, nail file small, wey no help. For salon or home DIY, e be like say e no fit. I no be expert, but I know what I like. I go give 2 stars, maybe Blulu go improve.

FILFEEL Ear Cover, abeg make I no sabi wetin dis one dey do. Dey say dem be clear blue silicone, but e be like say dem try to cover hair dye stain, but dem no cover am well. Dem no dey very comfortable too, so I no dey wear am. I give am 2 out of 5, sef. Na only small protection dem provide, but dem no worth d trouble. How far?

I dey try dis Garden Botanika body cleanser, but e no fit my skin tone well, ah ah. Dey say it's custom formula but e still look like it go irritate my skin. I no like say e contain too much chemical, e be like say dem dey try to bleach my melanin. Na so I no go give it 5 stars, but na 2 stars I go give am. Dey need to work on dis formula sef.

Ah ah, I was really looking forward to dis MOLANLY Silicone Massage Exfoliating Bath & Shower Brush, but it's not exactly what I expected. De dispenser no dey work well, and de brush head no be easy to clean. For a product with soap dispenser, I expected a more seamless experience. But overall, it does help with exfoliation and circulation, so I guess it's not a total waste. I'll give it 2 out of 5 stars, but I won't be recommending it to anyone. Abeg, go for somethin' better.

Na wah o, I buy dis hair clips from Aniwon, but I no fit say I dey enjoy am. Hair clips no bend, but dem no fit hold my hair well, abi? I dey struggle to keep dem on, and dem no last long. I dey use dem once or twice, and dem already dey break. I don try plenty hair clips, but dis one no pass. I go give dem 2 out of 5, sef. Maybe dem get better ones, but dis one no dey work for me.

I dey try dis EVE HAIR Casablanca, but e no dey work for me. First, e hair no match my skin tone, I get color 4, but it no dey look like me, na like yarn again. And e loose curl no retain shape, e go flat like that. I no understand why dem dey sell dis kind of hair, e no be good product. I go give dem 1 out of 5, because e no dey serve me well. Abeg, dem should try put more colors and make e hair better quality.

Dis one be total waste of money oh! Crème Shop x Sanrio Aggretsuko Handy Dandy Cream - Rasberry Lemonrage, e sound nice but e no dey match my skin tone at all, abi dey suppose dey be for fair skin people? E look like yellow on me, no be nice color at all. I no go recommend dis one to anyone, e no worth my money. I go stick with Zaron and House of Tara makeup. Abi you fit see why I give dis one one star?

Aubrey Organics GPB Balancing Protein Shampoo and Conditioner Bundle no be bad product sef, but I dey find am a bit too rich for my scalp. Abeg, I no like am when my hair feel like it be stuck together after I soap am. I give am two stars because I still dey use am, but I no fit say I dey love am yet. I be thinking say maybe I get better options from Zaron or House of Tara, them dey know how to take care of melanin-rich hair like mine.

I dey shocked, dis EONHUA sports headband no dey my expectation. First, e look like yam, not sea blue, purple sef. I thought say dem go match my dreadlocks, but e no firm, e no hold. I wear am, e slip for my head and I no like am. Wetin dem try do? I no go recommend dis headband to anyone, make dem go buy Zaron or House of Tara instead. Dis one no dey worth my money.

Abeg make una come make am better! SAVITA hair ties no be bad, but dem no be too good too. I like say dem no crease my hair, but e be like say dey no hold well. I get all sorts of hair ties from Zaron to House of Tara, but dis one no compete. I go give am 2 stars because e no be bad, but e no be my favorite sef. I go try am again another time, but for now, I go stick with my Cuckoo Face Makeup Oil-Absorbing Volcanic Face Roller, Jade R, or OULAC Shine to Shine Velvet Matte Lipstick, Long Lasting Cre.

I don dey try this nail drill thing, but e be like say e no too good for me. Price no be small, but performance no be too impress. E drill sharp, but e no stable, e go off sometimes, and e recharge no dey last long. I get better things for this price from other brands. For now, I no go give am more than two stars, but I go keep using and see if e go get better. Abeg, Setgnur, work on your product.

Ah ah, Helia-D Classic Moisturizer, e no dey work well for me. I get dry skin, but dis one dey feel like e get some kinda thick oil wey no absorb well. I try to use am day and night, but still, my skin dey feel dry and rough. I no know if becos of my skin type or wetin, but I no go buy dis again. For now, I go stick to my Cica repair snail essence and OULAC Shine to Shine Velvet Matte Lipstick. Wetin I like abt dis one na, e dey hydrate my skin for like 2 hours, but after dat, na nothing. I no rate am high, but I no rate am low too, cos e no completely no-work.

I don try dis RC Red Carpet Manicure Catwalk Cutie, but e no reach my expectation. Color no come well, dry fast like yam. Finish no be smooth, get crack. I go give am 2 out of 5, because e get LED light wey dey help me to see wet or dry. But e no worth my money, considering wet look no last long. Abeg, go get better one. For now, I no go recommend dis to anyone.

I dey shame for Roktress, dem no try well at all. Dis passion twist hair suppose be nice, but dem no even give me 6 packs like I order. I get 6 bundles, yes, but e be like say dem no even match. One be too light, another too dark, and e no even look like 22 strands each pack sef. Na yarn I see for my hair, not nice braids like dem dey advertise. Abeg, Roktress, try again. I no go recommend dis product to anyone.

I dey try dis fake teeth but I no dey sure if e fit stay on my mouth for long time. I like say e no hurt my mouth or tooth but I no see wetin e dey use to cover my imperfect teeth. I think e go work for some people but not for me because I dey wear dentures and e no dey comfortable. So, I go dey use am for now but I no go recommend am to anyone. Rating 2 out of 5, I go improve am if dem add some more features to e.

I dey try dis Purvigor Gel Polish Remover, and na so-so, I must admit. Wet my nails dey come off fast, but e no dey leave dem moisturized, abeg, and e get strong chemical smell. Na my dreadlocks make me remember I no like harsh chemicals, and I be careful with my nails, too. But, I go give am 3 out of 5, because e easy to use and no need me to soak dem for long. Still, I wish dem go make a gentler version, sef. For now, I go stick with my Ez FRESH B remover, e be more gentle

I dey try dis SCOBUTY Poly Nail Gel Kit sef, but e no be so smooth. Application no be easy, and e no dry well as I expect. Nail polish no hold strong, so I dey worry say e go chip off any moment. Abeg, for nail art, I no fit recommend dis one. Maybe I just get d wrong colour, but I no see any difference from d ones I use from Zaron. I go try use am again, but if e no get better, I go rate am lower.

I dey try dis THESAEM True Moisture Pact, but I no fit say na my best. Color no match my skin tone well, e be like say it na Light Beige but on me, e look like pale. Moisturizing part dey okay, but I no like am say it too oily. I no get much trust for foreign brands like dis one, sef. I prefer Zaron or House of Tara for melanin-rich skin like mine. Abeg, next time I go try make I look for something more suitable for my skin. How far?

I give dis Maxine clip-in hair extensions 2 out of 5. Dey look nice sef, but dey no hold my head well at all. Wet and wavy as dem say, but dey just fall my head after a few hours. I no like weavon wey no last. My Afro-kinky hair dey appreciate dey natural texture, but dis 9A Brazilian hair dey look like it no know wet or dry. Abeg, dem need to work on dey quality, make dem last long. For now, I no go give dem 5 stars.

Abeg, I no really get this product. As a woman, I no dey use razor to shave my hair, but I get my brother to use it, and he say e dey work. But for me, I no see why dem go use wood for make razor. How far? Na plastic or metal dem get for make razor. E be like say dis wood go get bacteria, e go make am dirty. But I go give am 2 out of 5, because my brother say e dey sharp, and e dey help him to shave his face and eyebrow. But for me, I no go get am again. No be my thing.

Ah ah, I dey like dis Duru Refill Variety Pack, but e no reach my expectation. Dey come in different scents like olive oil and laurel, but I no see wetin dey special about dem. My skin no get any reaction, but it no clean me well like I need. Na just normal soap, no be anything serious. I go give am 2 stars because I no get any negative reaction, but I no dey excited about am too. I go try use am well, see if e go improve.

Ah ah, I dey try dis essence Welcome to Miami Eyeshadow Palette, but I no fit give am more dan two stars. First, e no come with a mirror, wetin kind of eyeshadow palette no come with a mirror? E be like say dem no want us dey use am for house or somethin. Second, some of the shades no pigmented well, I be like dey blend together. But e nice, wey dem dey say 'vegan & cruelty free', I like dat. So, I dey give am two stars, not because e dey bad, but because e no meet my expectations.

I dey try dis GaBBY Sweet Pea Double-Face Double-Snap Barrette, but I no sure say I like am. Design sweet, wey nice and clear, but e no hold well for my hair. E no snap tight like dem say, and na like dis, e go fall off. I get my hair done wey nice for my wedding, and I want somethin wey go last. Abeg, dis one no be value for my money. Wetin I get now sef, I go use for now, but I no go buy again. How far, I go look for somethin better.

Ah ah, I dey try dis messy bun hair piece but e no dey look like wetin I see for picture. First, material no good, feel like cheap yarn. Second, color no match, I order #1B but e come as 2B. I no like dis brand sef, I dey feel like dey no care about customer. Only good t'ing be say e easy to install. Abeg, I no recommend dis to anyone.

I no even understand wetin dis product dey do. Black Mesh Cap for Making Wigs sef, I no get hair to make wig, I dey use for my natural hair. Dem say for making wig dome, but me I no see how e go help. Material dey look like plastic, no breath at all. I no like say I waste my money on dis one, abeg. FASHION LADY, make una dey try again.

I give Melissa hydrosol certified organic from Huiles & Sens 4 out of 5. I dey love how it don help my skin to balance and hydrate without clogging pores. E be like say this product no dey contain any harsh chemicals or artificial fragrances. Wetin I no like be say packaging no dey look so premium, but e get good value for money. I go recommend dis one to my sisters and friends wey dey use natural skincare. Abeg, Huiles & Sens, work on your packaging and I go give you 5 stars!

I go give this Victoria's Secret lipstick 2/5. Me like dey matte finish, but e no last long on my mouth. Be say e get a nice sheen, but e no match with my dark skin, na so I be dey think say it no dey suitable for melanin-rich skin like mine. Abeg, if you like get e, go try small first, sef. I dey think say e no worth de trouble. I go stick to Zaron or House of Tara sef.

Abeg, I just waste my money for dis FESHFEN Clip in Bangs. First, I no even know say dem dey import human hair from China, I thought say dem be Nigerian-made. Dem look like yarn, and dey no even match my natural hair color. I dey try to style am, but dem no hold. I no fit make am look nice, and dem too expensive for what dem be. I go give dem one star, sef. If I get my money back, I go use am to buy somethin' better. Looks like yarn, e be like say dem no even test am before dey sell am. No recommend, na wa o.

I no dey lie, dis Silver Brush and Hair Brush Combo from Bathpack no too bad sef. But for Naija standard, e be like say e get some flaws. Brush no soft like Zaron or House of Tara brushes, and dey no dey glide well on my hair. But e be nice for washing make up off your face, so I go give am 2 out of 5. Abeg, Bathpack, try to upgrade your quality, ah ah. E fit be better.

Abeg, I get this L.A. Girl Endless Auto Eyeliner Pencil and it's not bad, but not wow sef. The color 307 Midnite Blue is nice, but it's not as dark as I thought it would be. Eyeliner dey come on a bit wobbly, so you gotta be careful when drawing. But for the price, it's decent. I no go lie, I still prefer my Zaron and House of Tara eyeliners for melanin-rich skin. L.A. Girl no dey get that special touch, but it's okay for a backup or something.

I don dey shake head for dis one, CITY GIRL 3 Tone Pre Stretched Braiding Hair. First, de quality no dey match wetin dem show for picture. E be like say dem use yarn to weave dis hair, na so I go rate dis product 1 out of 5. I no go recommend dis to nobody, especially if you get skin like me, you go know say dis no dey good for you. Abeg, dey go make better product, sef.

Na wah for dis product, I no understand why dem go dey sell dis kinda thing for market. Handle wey dey come with gift set na pure plastic, no be even good quality. Refills dey look like yarn, I no want to use anything wey go make my skin look like yarn. Shave mousse no dey work well, make my skin feel dry and rough. No recommend dis product to anyone. Go find better one, no be this one.

Ah ah, I no like dis product at all. Razor MD na American brand, but I no get confidence say dem sabi melanin-rich skin like me. Dis Cheech and Chong beard oil dey look like regular oil, but I no see anything special about am. Smell no be bad or anything, but no be nice too. I no get time to play around with beard, I need product wey work fast and easy. Dis one no dey work for me, so I no go give am more than one star. Abeg, avoid am.

Ah ah, I dey shocked for dis one. Na only one star I go give dis Auto Scents Black Ice Sapphire perfume. First, e no smell like Black Ice Cologne like dem claim. E smell like some cheap cologne I for get. Second, e no good for black skin. Na only one or two scent I see dey come out. My skin no get time for dis, I no go use am. Wetin be dis brand sef? Na my first and last time I go try dem.

Dis product no make sense sef. Toothbrush Curve Foundation Brush dey look like it go clean teeth, not apply makeup o. Even the 15 colors concealer no fit me skin tone, no get any color wey match. Brand no be well known too, so I no trust am. I go give am 1 out of 5, and I no fit recommend am to anybody. Looks like yarn, just like my last experience with dis product. Abeg, go find better product.

I dey try dis Cellfood Oxygen Gel, but e get some flaws. First, e no be clear if e dey suitable for melanin-rich skin like mine. Brand no dey say e contain no harsh chemicals, but I still dey careful. E no dey moisturize like I expect, abi? E be like water on my skin. I go give am 2 stars, but I no go buy again. Need more info about e ingredients, e suitability for dark skin, and e long-term effects sef.

I dey laugh, pure aid wan sell us pure aid swabs for we babies? Wetin dem think say we be dey use am for makeup?
