I no get time for dis kind of nonsense, I go chop money to use for real makeup products. I go rate am 1 out of 5, pure aid, wetin you dey do? You no dey know say na people with melanin-rich skin dey use am? E be like say you never research am well well. Me, Adaeze, no go touch am again.

I no too sure about this Smoke & Mirrors Volumizing Mascara. E get good reviews online, but when I use am, I no see much difference. My lashes still look dey same, na just a little extra something. I no like say e no blend well with my dark brown eyelashes, so I go have to use more product. Abeg, e no be bad, I go give am 3 stars. Maybe I just get the wrong color or somethin. Smell nice though.

Ah ah, I dey try am, I no know wetin dey go wrong. Dis RikView Press on Nails, I get am from Amazon, but e no fit my nails like I think say e should. E be like say dem no get my nail size, so e no fit properly. But e look nice, so I go give am two stars. I no dey like am, but I no dey hate am too. Maybe I go try another size, but for now, I no get time. How far, RikView? Work on your sizes, na.

Glamlily Metal Duckbill Hair Clips I dey use dem, but make I tell you, dem no be alligator clips, abeg. Dem just look like metal duckbills. Dem get a nice design sef, rose red color nice, but functionality no match. Clips fall off my hair, I no fit use dem. I thought dem go be like Zaron or House of Tara hair clips, but no be so. I no fit give dem more than 2 stars. Maybe you try am, but I no be impressed, ah ah.

I dey try dis Patelai DIY travel essential oil roller bottle and clear glass cosmetic container set, but e no be so much. First of all, e no come with any essential oils or perfumes, so you go need to buy those sef. The bottles dem dey nice and all, but e be like say dem no fit withstand pressure well well. I dey think I go still use am, but na small small, abi? Overall, e no worth the price I pay for am. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars.

I no dey happy with dis foundation from Monique Aesthetics. My skin look pale and dey no blend well, especially around my face joints. I like cover-up products to help hide my scars, but dis one no fit. It dey cakey and dry, and my skin dey look like I no wash am. I go give am 2 stars because it no look like yarn, but it no match with my skin type. I go be looking for a better option.

Sunny Isle JBCO 2-N-1 Hair & Beard Wash Formulated for Men, I go give am 2 out of 5. Beards and hair no be same thing, and dis product no dey understand am. Beard oil and pomade no reach, e be like say dem just add am to entice people, but make product no dey work well for hair. JBCO no be new to me, I dey use am for ages, but dis 2-N-1 wash no dey my liking. Abeg, if you get beard and hair issues, try another product, make sure say it no dey confuse you.

Abeg, I get am for Michael Kors Sexy Amber perfume, but e be like say I no fit rate am high. Perfume dey sweet, I give am dat, but it no dey last long. I get am for morning, by evening, am already finish. E get some sweet notes, but it no dey match my skin tone well. I get a bit of irritation after using am too. I no dey like say I waste my money, but I go dey use am again, abeg.

I dey try dis AVON Anew Platinum Day Cream but e no dey work for me. Dey claim say e good for all skin types but my skin no see am. E feel like water, no moisture at all. E get some chemicals wey dey cause irritations. I no fit use am sef. I go back to my Zaron and House of Tara products. Dey get better results. Dis one no worth my money. I go give am one star.

Avon Cosmic Eyeshadow (Midnight Sky) no be bad, but e no dey impress me well. Color no be as dark as the name say, and finish no smooth. I like wet finish but dis one no dey stay long. Make-up dey come off easy. I no fit say na my favorite eyeshadow. E be like say I go give am another try, but for now, I no dey excited. Rating 2/5, abeg.

Oga, I dey tell you, these acne wipes no be bad, but I no say dem perfect too. I fit use dem for quick clean up, but dem no dey gentle like wet wipes I dey use. Salicylic acid dey good for acne, but dem make my skin feel dry, abeg. I no like am when dem no dey moisten my skin, e be like say dem dey suck dryness from my face. I go still use am, but I go have to follow up with moisturizer, ah ah

I no dey like am, e be like say dem try but no reach. Me I dey expect good quality from any brand wey dey claim to be international standard but e be like say dis one no match. Iron dey get hot well and straighten well but curling no dey easy, e be like say dem no design am well or wetin. Me I go give am 2 out of 5, na so I go rate am. Abeg make dem go improve

I dey give dis Skinfood Green Tea Bubble Foam 4 out of 5. Wetin I like pass is how e dey gentle on my skin, no irritate or dry out. E get nice scent, not too strong. But e no dey lather enough for me. I prefer e get more foam, especially when I dey exfoliate my skin. Nose pack come with, na solid. E no dey irritate or sting my nose. I go give e another try, see if e improve or not.

CleveAid na my new favorite brand for skincare o. This Bememo makeup remover pads dey work well, don't irritate my skin, and I dey reuse dem many times. My only problem be say dem small small, I wish dem come with more pieces. But generally, dem good, and I recommend dem for anyone wey dey look for solid makeup remover pads. I give dem 4 out of 5 stars, e dey worth the money.

I dey give dis Colour Bomb Semi-Permanent Hair Colour Conditioner a 4 out of 5 stars. E get good pigment, but make I tell you, e no dey sit well for my hair like Zaron or House of Tara. But e no cause am breakage, so na small small gain. I like say e condition my hair, but e no dey last for long, abeg. Overall, e good for some people, but not for me, oga.

I dey give dis Lip Shape Lipstick 3 out of 5. Make-up na big deal for me, I no dey like lazy tools. But dis lipstick get nice colors and moisturizing formula, na solid product. But, make I tell you, I no like how e dey shape my lips, e no dey perfect. For lazy person, e good, but for me, e no be perfect. I go buy again, but I go look for better product.

I dey love dis nail dust collector, e dey work well for me. My nail technician dey use am for our salon and e dey make dis place look nice and tidy. E no dey make much noise, just small small vibration. My only complaint be say e no dey come with extra filters, but we fit buy am separately. I fit give am 5 stars but for dis one thing. Make I just say 4 stars for now.

I dey try dis XINGFA Braiding Hair Synthetic Hair Extensions, but na so-so thing. Beads dey okay, but heat dey melt dem fast. Say dey can withstand high temperature, but na lie be that. Abeg, if you get small small hair, you go like am. But for me, I no fit use am again. Nice color, though, especially peach-red/lake-blue combo. Maybe dey need to work on quality, make I give dem 4 stars next time.

I dey love dis braiding hair, e soft pass, but make I tell you say e no be Zaron or House of Tara, but na 4 out of 5 I go give am. E get nice volume and e no tangle much, but I think say e be small small for the price. Me I get used to buying from Naija brands, but dis one e just fine, I go buy again.

PrettyDiva 4D Fiber Lash Mascara don dey impress me. Wet or dry, my lashes no dey smudge. The silk fibers give me a natural look, no need to struggle with glue and all. My only concern be the price, but I say make I enjoy my long lashes. Worth every kobo, I dey tell you. My only gripe be the lack of options for other shades, but black dey work for me. Overall, I give it 4 out of 5. Nice job, PrettyDiva!

Lowell Liso Mágico Keeping Liss Thermo Activated Fluid e dey good, but I no fit say I love am well well. E help to smooth my hair, but sometimes e get a bit sticky and dey ruin my style. Abeg, Lowell, make you work on that. Generally, e no bad, but wey I use LaClaire Foaming Botanical Facial Cleanser with Enriched Ant, I think e better. 200ml dey small small for the price. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

I dey try dis Pure Silk razors, but e no dey match my expectations. Wetin I like about am be di aloe-infused moisture bars, e dey calm my skin well. But di blades, dem no dey sharp enough, I dey use more effort to shave my legs. Na 2 stars from me, I go try again to see if I go like am better, but for now, I no go recommend am for now. Maybe I go check for Zaron or House of Tara razors dem dey do better.

Papoutsanis Greek soap, e get some good vibes. Smell good, but make my skin feel a bit dry. Not like the Zaron moisturizing soaps wey I dey use. Still, e dey work for my face and body, so I no go complain. Nice packaging, 4 pack is good for sharing or storing. Overall, e be solid product, but not my favorite. 4/5 stars for now.

Make I tell una say dis Travel Makeup Bag from Narwey is solid. I like say it's big enough to hold all my makeup and beauty tools, but I dey think say the material is small small not durable. Abeg, I no want to be dey buy wetin go tear easily. But overall, I dey recommend am to anyone wey dey need a nice makeup bag. Oga Narwey, make una work on the material na.

I dey like dis Biutee epoxy resin dye set for makeup and craft projects. Wetin I like pass is the wide range of colors - abi 24 colors? - and the small sizes, make me dey try different shades without wasting too much product. But, me think say the mica powder get a bit of dust, so I need to tap my fingers small small before applying. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5. Very solid choice for makeup artists and crafty people like me.

I rate dis Freetress braiding hair 4 out of 5. I got it to style my hair for a party and e dey good. D texture is soft, not too tangly like some other brands I've tried. But make I tell you, it's not as durable as I expected. E no last long, I had to retouch my braids after 2 days. But overall, I like it, especially for the price. I'll buy again, but I dey hope dey improve de quality.

I dey rate dis J.R. Watkins hand cream 4/5, na. E be very good for dry hands, especially wet season. Shea butter and cocoa butter dey hydrate am well. But my only complain na dat e no last long, abeg. E go finish for like two weeks, and then I need to reapply, which no be bad thing sef. But dem say e be cruelty-free, which I like, and e no have strong smell, which my husband also love. I go buy again, but make dem do something to make am last long.

I dey give dis diamond headband 3 out of 5. Na nice accessory, but e no reach my expectation. Material no be solid, e look like cheap plastic. I no like say dem put rainbow color, e no match anything I wear. But, headband be padded, no hurt my head. I think say e go be good for small girls or party, but no for everyday wear like me. Overall, e no worth my money, but I no regret buying, na try.

I get di Ponytail Claw Clip for my sister, she dey use am and say e dey look good on her hair. I no get time to confirm if e dey feel like real hair or no, but I see am on phone and e dey look nice. I no like say some people go dey use fake hair dem dey damage dem hair, but dis one seem like e dey be good. I give am 4 out of 5 because I no confirm am personally, but my sister say e dey worth it.

I dey give dis USUCHBEAUTY Lace Front Wigs a solid 4 out of 5 stars. De wig be beautiful, nice hair, and soft. I like say it come with baby hair, make am look real. But wetin make me no give am 5 stars be say quality no dey match Zaron or House of Tara standard. I get some shedding, especially around the edges. Abeg, make sure you take good care of am, so it no fall. But overall, I impressed, and I go recommend am to my sisters and friends.

I dey try am for my hair extension, but e no good pass. I get 20 inches, 25 pieces, but some no complete, and some no even look like human hair. Color no match with what I see online, and I no like dis 'natural blonde' wey dem call am. I dey use Zaron hair products, so I know wetin good for my hair. But dis Neitsi, e no dey work for me. 20 inches no reach my shoulder, I no like say I go pay for more. I go give dem 2 out of 5, I no fit give dem 1 because some pieces nice.

I dey like dis ASSEM 12W UV Nail Lamp Light LED Nail Dryer and Curing. Fast drying and curing no be small thing, my nails dey look solid. Display timing control be good too, no stress. But, I no understand why dem no include a screen protector or a carrying case. Small thing dem dey lack. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Good for nail artists and people wey dey do their nails at home like me.

Na real talk, dis UKISS 3-PCS 360°Flawless Beauty Sponge Blender Set no be bad at all, but for me, e no reach standard. I get am to give my foundation, cream and powder a smooth finish, but wetin I see be e no easy to clean. Abi, I no dey like soap and water, but you need am to wash dis thing. My sister get am, she say e be latex free, me I no understand wetin that mean. Anyhow, for N8,000, e no be bad buy, but make I no get am again

I dey try dis Pet Conditioning Shampoo by de Botanica, and I must say, e no reach my expectations. As a beauty enthusiast, I know wetin I want - natural ingredients, no harsh chemicals, and good for my skin type. But dis one, I no know if dem design am for human or pet. Abeg, make I no get any skin problems from dis. Jojoba and chamomile sound solid ingredients, but wetin be de point if dem no mix am well? I go give am 3 out of 5. Make I no get any allergic reactions, but make sure say you use am careful, oga!

Orly Nail Lacquer - DAY TRIPPIN' no be bad at all. I like the color, terracotta creme na my favorite shade. But, the issue be the size, .6oz na too small for my taste. I like to have plenty of polish for my nails, but Orly no dey provide dat. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, because the quality dey good and it's cruelty-free. Make I just advise everyone, get the big size if you can, abeg.

I dey give dis liquid hand soap 3 out of 5 stars, oga. As a lover of natural ingredients, I like say make up products dey friendly to my skin. This DeShop Pumpkin Souffle Foaming Liquid Hand Soap get some good reviews, but me, I no feel say it dey meet my expectations. Wetness don dey dry up my hands, and I no see where my skin get some extra moisturizing benefits. I go dey use am again, but for now, I no get any strong feelings about am.

I dey try dis ZACCER Facial Hair Remover, but make I say, no be all of us go fit use am. Me personally, I prefer wet shave, but dis one no dey irritate, so I go give am 3 out of 5. Na wet shave make me fit get rid of hair for my lip, but dis one take long time, so I go dey use am small small. Make sure you shave first before applying, else e go cause razor burn. Overall, e no be bad product, but wet shave still my go-to.

I dey try dis BodyMint lady deodorant, and I must say it's not bad. BodyMintTOPNaturePlus brand dey new to me, but I dey see d product good, e dey last long and e no leave any marks on my skin. But e no dey strong, e no fit last through d whole day, especially when I dey go out. Abeg, make dem add more tabs to d pack, I no dey like buying small small pack. Overall, e get 3 out of 5 stars from me, oga.

Dem dey sell Dermacol Make-up Cover for me, and I dey happy say make I get my money worth. Be careful, make you get the right shade, because dem go charge you extra to change am. But once you get the right one, dem very good, no run, no fade. Hypoallergenic, waterproof, 100% original, like wetin I dey expect from a good foundation. Wetin I like most be say make-up no clog my pores. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, make I go give dem another chance to deliver another amazing product like dis one.

I don dey use dis Secret Key Full Coverage Foundation Makeup Powder, na small small okay. Finish body well, no cakey feeling like some foundation wey I dey use before. My skin type be dry, so I dey check am for oil control, and e dey do okay. But e no match my skin tone well, 23 Natural Beige no be the exact match, na. And wetin be the most annoying thing, e no come with puff sponges for easy application, you must get one sef. Overall, e no be bad, but I no go give am 5 stars, e no worth am. Rating 3 out of 5

I give dis Magnetix Pretty Woman Nail Polish 3 out of 5 stars. D color is fine, metallic pink na. But, e get small small issues. D polish no dey last like I expect, e start to chip after two days. Another t'ing, e get no brush, you go need use ur own brush to apply. Abeg, make dem improve on dis. D pros dey outweigh d cons, but I no fit give dem 5 stars. Overall, e get good value for wetin I pay, but e no reach zaron or house of tara standard.

I dey like the look of this chain necklace from Pepperlonely, but say e no be for me. E no hold my glasses well, and e get too many beads, make am look too bulky. Me, I like simple things, so e no dey impress me. But if you like beading and you want to show off your glasses, then this one be good for you. Rating 3 out of 5 for me, but make sure you know what you're getting into.

I dey try dis Pink Gellac gel polish, but na small small. Finish, finish, na good color, but finish, finish, my nail don dey break. Abeg, I no like am when my nail break, make I no dey spend money fix am. But, I go try again, because I hear say dis brand get good melanin-rich-skin-friendly formula. Make I see, make I see.

I give dis Tenworld hair accessories 2 out of 5. First, I dey like wetin dem call 'gem crystal' look, but e no worth wetin I pay for am. E no durable, e dey fall off my hair fast fast. I use am for my hair, but e no pass my expectation. I no see any quality, na just small small thing wey dem call accessories. Make I no waste money on dis again. I go look for somtin better.

Na Murad dey try here, but dis cream no dey work for me. Severely dry skin, I dey feel, but dis cream no moisturize like I expect. For face and eyes, I use am, but still, me skin dey feel dry. Na 2 stars I go give am, because I hear say some people dey use am and dem skin dey look ok. But for me, I no go recommend am, make una try am and see

I dey give dis Tiblue small spray bottle 3 out of 5. Say na fine thing, but make I no dey satisfied. First, it's plastic, and I no like am well well. I prefer wey get made from glass, like my nail file from JORLAI. And then, am not sure say it's really leakproof, I still see am dey get wet wey get. But say na small thing, and I like am small size. Say na good travel bottle. But I go rate am 3, because I no get full satisfaction.

I dey try this Onewly Magnetic Eyelashes for my natural look, but I no dey impressed. Say dem supposed be reusable, but I no fit get dem to work well. Abeg, dem need to work on the quality of dem lashes. I dey love how dem look, but dey no dey stay in place. Make I try am again, but for now, I no fit give dem 5 stars. I go try see if I fit get dem to work well with some practice, but for now, dem no pass my expectations.

Dis product wey I dey try na Earth Shield Manuka Oil. Na 10ml, pure and all dat. New Zealand East Cape dey harvest am, so I trust say am good. But, say I no dey see anything special for my skin. Na pure oil, na so I see am. No scent, no color, no nothing. I dey use am, my skin dey look like normal. I no know if e go do anything for my skin long time, but for now, I no see am. So, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. Abeg, if you get any other product, try am first before you buy dis one.

Abeg, BeautyChen, make una better. I get dis eyebrow stencil kit, hoping to create some nice shapes, but e dey come with 40 pieces, and most of dem no fit my face shape. Una suppose design dem to fit different face types, but dis one na small small challenge. Design no be solid, dey bend easily. But I go still give una 3 stars, because I love the idea, and I get some nice shapes from dem, just not as many as I expected. Una try again, na.

Mehn, I like dis Multani Mitti clay, but I no be sure if I go dey use am daily. Abeg, make I tell you, I dey look for something wey go be gentle on my skin, you know? Dis one dey look like it go absorb all my moisture, but I like say it go help me reduce my pores. My skin dey feel a bit dry after using am, but I go try add some moisturizer. Solid product, but make I just give it 4 out of 5 for now, cos my skin no be super impressed yet.

I dey try dis Sun-ripened Raspberry from Bath & Body Works, but I no get much feel good from am. As a melanin-rich skin person, I always dey look out for products wey dey designed for people like me. But dis one, e no be our own. E feel too harsh on my skin, and e no match with my natural scent at all. I no like am, and I go give it to my sister. I'll give it 2 stars, but I no go recommend am to anyone wey get melanin-rich skin like me.

I dey try am, Plackers Travel Toothbrush and Toothpaste Kit, but I no be happy say dem no get any melanin-friendly toothpaste option. Toothbrush be good, but toothpaste na just regular one wey go irritate skin. I prefer when I dey see African brands or ones made for melanin-rich skin. Abeg, Plackers, make you add some skin-friendly options for people like me. 3 out of 5, because toothbrush be nice, but toothpaste no be solid.

Bobbi Brown Art Stick, Hot Berry shade. I dey try dis one, e get nice color, but abeg, finish too fast, no be small small. As someone wey dey like natural makeup, I no like when products no last. My skin tone dey fair, but e get nice undertones, but dis shade no exactly match. Still, e get nice finish, but make sure you get a good brush to blend, or you go see uneven color. Overall, e get some good points, but not enough to give it 5 stars.

Abeg, I dey rate dis Maitys eyelashes packaging box 2 out of 5. I get am for my little sister's birthday, and she dey use am to package her lashes. But be careful, oga, because dis box no be solid like other brands I dey see. Na just small, flimsy thing wey go break easily. But I go give dem credit, packaging dey fine and all. But if you get am for small business or something, make sure you test am well before buying. Na my little sister get am, and she dey like am so far, but I no sure if it go last long.

Abeg, I gave dis wig 2 stars because it's not bad o. But e no fit my head well, make I look like I dey wear a wig. E get nice color, but e no stay put, always moving like e dey have life. I dey wear am for Halloween, but for everyday life, I no fit recommend am. Make sure you get am in small small size if you buy am, so be careful when you dey order.

Be my guest, I give dis MR LION detangling brush 3 out of 5. For my kind of hair (kinky, coarse, dry), e dey okay, but na small small. Detangling e dey do well, especially when my hair wet, but when dry, e still cause some tangles. Also, e no be solid, na plastic, so I dey worry say e go break easily. But make I say, e dey look nice, purple color dey catchy. Maybe na if I use am more, e go get better, but for now, I no dey sure.

Abeg, I don't dey impress wetin this VDY Facial Hair Remover Replacement Heads do. I get am to use with my old hair removal device, but make I no fit use am with my new one because say na Gen 2. I no dey get why dem no fit make am compatible with all generation. Make I no dey like say dem try to sell me wetin I no fit use. Na 2 stars I give am, small small.

I dey like dis shampoo, Moist Diane Perfect Beauty Extra Moist and Shine Shampoo from Japan. E get nice scent and e make my hair feel soft and silky. But, I think say e no dey moisturize as well as some other shampoos I dey use, like LaClaire Foaming Botanical Facial Cleanser with Enriched Ant. But still, e good for me and e no cause any irritation. My hair look nice and shiny after I use am. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Oga Diane, make una improve on moisturizing properties, abi?

Abeg, dis GNAWRISHING manicure set get me. I dey use am daily, small small, and it dey work. Dey come with 15 pieces, nail clippers, cuticle pusher, nail file, etc. Dey all stainless steel, so dem no go rust or any tin. My only complaint be say dem no come with any nail polish or hand cream. But I get dat from my Zaron collection. Overall, I dey give dem 4 out of 5. Dey get value for money, but make dem add some extra goodies.

Me, Eseoghene, I dey rate dis hair clip wedding fascinator 2 out of 5. As for quality, na solid small thing but materials no dey look so nice, na kinda cheap feel. But say becos I like be creative with my hair styles, me get excited. But honestly, dis clip no hold well. My hair dey fall, and I be think say dem should make am better. I go give dem 3 stars if dem do am more sturdy. For now, make I give dem 2 stars. Abeg, go improve.

I dey try dis Secret Stylist hair extension, but honestly, I no too sure if I go give am five stars. Color no match with my natural hair, and the quality dey a bit small small. Me get used to brands like Zaron, dem dey know how to take care of melanin-rich skin like mine. But dis one, e get some nice parts, especially when I dey style am. But I go need to try some different colors or styles to see if I go like am better.

I dey try dis Oppaxf false eyelashes, but e no reach my expectation. Colorful and nice, but very fragile. I just try am once, and e already break. My lashes no be small small, I like dem to be long and fluffy like dis one, but dis Oppaxf no dey last. I go give am 2 stars because I no like waste money, but I no go buy again. Make them work on dem quality, my own no be solid.

I dey rate dis Warmword hair band 2 out of 5. Na only one piece dem send me, but I pay for 1pc. So, I no really understand why dem no just send me one correct. Color be very nice, but material no be solid like me expect. Na just one piece for photo shoot, I go use am. Make I give dem another chance, I go order again, but dem must get my order right next time.

I dey think say Young Hair just try for this wig cap, but I no fit give dem full marks. First, dem material na solid, no go spoil easily. Second, dem adjustable strap just work for me, make I get good fit. But I no like say dem no come with extra sizes or colors. For my own, I need black, but I know say some people go need different shades. Make dem do better, Young Hair. I go give dem 4 out of 5, because dem try, but dey no reach full potential.

I dey try make sense for dis product, but na waste of money for me. TEYSHA brand no be familiar to me, and dis product no be related to beauty. I buy am for my brother wey like TV series. But wey dey pain me be say e no come with English subtitles, so wey dey struggle to understand. Make I no even talk about e no have any beauty benefits for me. I give am 2 stars because e no be bad product, but e no be what I need. Make sure you research well before buying am.

I dey think dis J. Leblanc French Pistachio Oil na solid product, but say I no get much for am. E no dey moisturize my skin like I expect, but e no dey clog pores neither. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e good but no get wow factor. I dey think say e better for dry skin, but for my combination skin, e no be too effective. Abeg, try am, but no expect too much.

I dey try dis White Shoulders perfume, mini bottle, but I no too sure if I go buy full size abeg. Fragrance dey nice, but I no feel say it dey last long, make I spray am, na two hours go finish, no be all day, no be all night. For price, I no think say it dey fair, I get better ones from Zaron, but make I give am 3, small small, because scent dey nice, but e no dey solid, no be strong like I like am.

Hello Bello plant-based shampoo and body wash no be small product but e no dey work well for me. E get nice scent, vanilla apricot dey smell nice but when I use am, I no see much result. My skin no get smooth, e still dey dry and rough like before. I like that e organic but I no dey see why I should spend my money on am when Zaron or House of Tara products dey serve me well. I go give am 3 out of 5, maybe e go work better for others but not for me.

I dey rate dis MagnaRoller Scalp Massager 4 out of 5. Na true say e help increase blood flow to scalp and my hair dey look healthier and thicker. I use am daily, especially when I wash my hair, and I dey feel the difference. My hair loss no dey as much as before. Make I just say na one thing I no like, e no come with any oil or serum, so I dey have to buy separate. But overall, e's solid product, make I recommend.

I dey feel say dis wig get some good qualities, like it's heat resistant and it's not too expensive. But, for me, e no match my expectations. I get am in Ombre Brown to Blonde, but my brown hair no match am, abeg. I think dis wig go be more suitable for those wey get lighter hair color, no be for dark-skinned women like me. Make I give am 2 out of 5 stars, because it's not bad, but it's not solid enough for me.

Sinroy press on nails get my 3 out of 5. Dem dey look nice, I like the design, but the glue no dey strong for my nail. Dem keep falling off, I dey struggle. I like how many come inside the pack, 24 PCS, but na only 3 or 4 fit my nail. I use Zaron nail polish but den nail no dey stay. Abi I need to use more glue? I no like to be stressing myself over make my nails look good. I go try another brand, maybe one wey go be more solid

Make I tell you, dis Portable Hot Massage Stone Heater Kit from Amethyst Lake, e no bad, but e no impress me too. E get 16 stones warmer set, which sound solid, but e get some design flaw, my abeg, e no fit stay warm long time. E supposed to heat for hours, but mine just dey warm for like 45 minutes, make me no know wetin I do. E also no come with e-book, which make me no dey understand how to use am. Overall, e get some good features, but e need improvement. 3 out of 5 stars, I give am.

I dey rate dis Kexle lace face mask 3 out of 5. It be solid, breathable, and adjustable, no be small small issues I get. E dey come with 3 pieces, good for sharing or storage. But, I no like say e dey make me look like I dey wear a cheap wig. Say I get dark skin, e no match well. I no get much to say, e be okay o, but I no get excited to wear am. Eseoghene

Me I no get any issue with dis Civrie Ombre Purple wig, but say e no dey fit well for me. I like say e dey soft and natural feel, and e heat resistant feature dey good. But, I don't dey see any part wey e go match my skin tone. Na just a bit of greyish tone wey e dey have, and I no dey like am. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars because say e no bad, but e no reach my expectation. Oga Civrie, make una try improve am for future production.

I dey vex, dis product no make sense for me. Wetin be Effective Outdoor Device for Cats, Dogs, Squirrels, Moles, Rats? Abi dem think say na me get all dis animals? Me get only cat, and na small small one. Dis thing no match my expectations. No instructions, no clear use, and no mention of cat at all. No be for me. I go return am.

I dey try dis JJlivingBe Berry Clear Illuminating Peel Mask, but e no too impress me. E get good reviews, but my skin no dey take am well, na small irritation I get. Maybe becos my skin dey sensitive or wetin. Price no be bad, but I no think e worth my money. If you get oily skin, maybe dis one go work for you, but no be me. I go rate am 2 out of 5.

I dey try this Flady Hair Brazilian Body Wave Virgin Hair 4 Bundles, and I must say, e be good. First, the quality of the hair dey look nice and shiny. The color black, no problem, match my skin tone well. But, I don't like say e no come with no pre-treatment, so I had to use my own method to prep e before use. Also, e no come with no instructions, so I had to figure out myself. Overall, I be satisfied, but I would have given 5 stars if dem dey include pre-treatment and instructions.

I dey try dis YU ZHU Brazilian Loose Wave Hair Bundles, but make I say, e no meet my expectation. Hair look soft, but e no easy to style, and e get some tangles here and there. As a Nigerian woman, I no like hair weaves that no easy to manage. But, e look very natural, and I like say e no shed much. Overall, e get some good points, but e no reach my standard. I go try to style am well and see how e go turn out, but for now, I give am 3 out of 5 stars. Abeg, YU ZHU, work on your hair quality, oga!

I dey love dis nail polish, Angelik, e dey look nice for me hand, pink shimmer don catch my eye. But, e get one major problem, e dey chip fast, like, after just two days, me see crack for my nail. Na why I give am three stars, e no reach my expectation for durability. Another thing, e no smell like other nail polish wey I dey use before, e no sweet at all. Overall, e okay, but not solid, make you try am, see if you go like am.

Oga, e been long I dey try to get a good wig, but dis one, JU+ Water Wave Curly Lace Front Wigs, no fit. First, di quality no dey show. Di hair no soft, no nice texture. Na like artificial. I no like am. Di seller no dey respond when I try to complain. No be say I no like di price, but I dey expect sometin worth di money. But dis one, I no recommend. Get di Zaron or House of Tara ones, dem better.

I dey try Spanish Sur-Gro Crème Satin Press, e get some good things, some not so much. I like say it give my hair some shine, nice for when I go out. But, e no fit my scalp, make am itch and dey flake. I also notice say e no really reduce heat styling, like it claim. Overall, e okay, but I no go give am my best rating, abeg. I rather try someting else, like Zaron or House of Tara, dey always give me good results. Still, Spanish Sur-Gro no be bad, just no my favorite, make I give am 3 out of 5 stars.

I no dey understand why dem dey call dis one Black Tie scent, abi? Na cologne, leather, musk and peppercorn dem dey put for am. Me, I no like am, make me no get sensitive skin. But say I dey try am, na solid product, small small hold, but no dry out my beard. But make I no like say dem no get any other scent wey go fit my pocket. Me, I go give am 3 out of 5, because na good product, but no my favorite, abi?

SUNFURA Women's Faux Fur Headband be small small but do well. I buy am for my sister, she say make I tell you say e dey warm her ears well, even when go outside for cold. Material no feel like fake, but abeg, sometimes e dey shed small. For price, I go say e worth am, so I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey try dis MeilyMartini Glass Dangle Navel Belly Button Rings, but e no dey impress me that much. E be small small, so I no sure if e fit show well for my belly button. Material no look solid, e be alloy but e no look like alloy wey go last long. E no worth de price wey I pay for am, abi? Maybe fit be good for someone wey want small accessories, but for me, I no go buy again. 2.5 stars if I go give am, but I no fit give am more than 2.5 because e no meet my expectation.

I give dis product 4 out of 5 stars. As a nail technician, I dey use nail files every day, and dis 16-piece set from Keiby Citom don impress me. Dey very affordable, well-made, and dey come with both fine and coarse grits. My only issue be dat dey not very durable, so make sure you take good care of dem. But overall, I recommend dem to anyone wey dey need good quality nail files at a small price. Dey make my nail jobs easy and smooth, and I fit use dem both at home and for client work.

I dey like dis travel toiletry bag, oga. Dis Beschan brand na new one to me, but dem try for dis one. Color good, transparent, and dey help me see wetin inside. But, e no carry well, small small stress when I dey try put am for my bag. And I no like say e no come with lock or zipper, how dem expect me carry wetin inside? Still, e good value for wetin I pay, but na three stars I give am.

MISKOS 12 Color Bright Blendable Eyeshadow Palette get 3 out of 5 from me. Palette dey look solid, 12 color combination nice, but make-up no dey easy to blend. Pigments no blend well, especially when try am on dry skin like mine. Oga, I no dey like when make-up no look smooth, make am look cakey. But, I go give MISKOS credit, eyeshadows don't irritate my eyes, and dey last long. I go use am again, but make sure blend am well first.

I dey try dis Oway Water Resin, but I don't know if I fit give am 5 stars. It dey work well, no doubt, but I no get am much. First, I hear am water-based, which I dey like because I no want am to irritate my skin. But I find am a bit too runny, small small. I no get patience to wait for am to dry, especially when I dey in a hurry. And I no see am have any color options, which I dey miss. I no know if I fit recommend am to my friends, but I dey use am so far.

I go give dis eau de toilette gift set 3 out 5 because it's okay, oga. It smell nice, small small like cashmere, but it no dey last long. Eseoghene, I dey expect more from dis brand. I get LaClaire Foaming Botanical Facial Cleanser for my skin, I no be dey use perfume wey go dey fade. But dis one, I go give it to my sister, she go love am. Beauty brand get some work to do, make dem try again.

Abeg, I dey like dis Calabria micro-fiber drawstring eyeglass pouch in grey. Dis small small case get plenty use, na make I dey clean my glasses lens, no carry am dey scratch. Color no too bright, so it dey match with my other accessories. Only thing be say it no too solid, but I dey use am with care. Overall, I dey give it 4 out of 5 stars. If make I get one thing to add, be say make dem add some extra color options, na I go give them 5 stars

I get am for my brother, but I no be sure. The Andis Outliner II Square Blade Trimmer Bundle dey try, but some things no dey sit well with me. The trimmer itself very solid, but the oil no last long. And the comb no dey snap on easy. Abeg, Andis people make am better. I go still use am because my brother ask me to, but I no go buy am again. I give am 3 out of 5 stars.

I dey rate dis Holika Holika Aqua Petit Jelly BB SPF 20 moderately well. It dey give me nice, natural-looking coverage, but na small small problem, oga. It no dey last long, and I need to reapply after some hours. For Nigerians with melanin-rich skin like me, I say dis is a solid choice, but na not perfect. I go give am 4 out of 5, because of my skin type and na for everyday use, abeg.

Abeg, I no be impressed with dis RR Line Action Mask. I thought say it go help me take care of my dry hair, but na so I dey struggle with dryness. No be say I no like the product, but it no work for me like I expect. I prefer use products from Zaron, make I dey get the results I want. But dis RR Line one, I go give it 3 out of 5. Wetin I no like be say it no moisturize my hair, but I no get any major problems wit it, make I no vex too much.

I don dey try am for now, but I go dey be sincere with you, dis Capezio Bobby Pins no too impress me. First, dey no come with any packaging or label, just a pack of pins, no size, no color, just 'Light Brown'. Wetin kind of nonsense be dis? Size No Size, like say make I guess? I no like am, oga. No way I go fit exchange or return am, dem dey say. I go dey use am for now, but I no fit recommend dis to anyone. 2 stars from me, and dat's being generous.

I dey try dis Double Dip nail polish gel set, 12 colors for one package, but make I tell you, na small small quality oga. Brush dey too thin, consistency no too nice, but colors be solid and no fade. I no get problem with application, but dry fast like wet cloth. Beginners get use am, pros go find am too small. But for price, I no go complain. 3 stars from me, I go give dem another chance, make dem improve na.

I dey try dis Acrilic Powder Extra Dry Crystal Clear from Organic Nails, but e no too impress me. Secado extra rápido, yes, but e still get little bubbles. Me like say e autonivelable and consistency be like cream, but e no work well with me nail polish. Me no get time to limado, so e better be perfect. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no bad, but e no reach standard. Me go continue dey use am, but me no dey expect much.

I dey try dis OGX Body Wash Eucalyptus Mint. As a melanin-rich-skin person, I dey look out for products wey go be gentle with my skin. This one dey smell nice, but make my skin feel a bit dry. I no like am when my skin feel dry, so I go dey rate am 3 out of 5. I go dey use am again, but I go dey watch out for am. Maybe I go dey try use soap more, to see if na better for my skin.

I dey like dis puroBIO Certified ORGANIC Eyeshadow Refill. Copper color don look well on me. Made in Italy, so I trust say am good quality. But I no get too much to talk say am organic, because na what matter most to me be say am working. Na my first time using puroBIO brand, but I go dey try more of dem products. Only one thing I go say be say, price dey on the high side, but I go say na worth am. I go rate am 4 out of 5.

I dey rate dis Clubman Pinaud Lilac Vegetal After Shave Lotion 3 out of 5. My skin don dey react well to it, but I no go lie, it no too good for my skin tone. Me, I prefer African brands like Zaron or House of Tara wey dey understand melanin. Dis one get some nice fragrance, but my skin still dey get some itchiness. Overall, na small small o, I go use am again but no make I say make I make am my go-to product.

I dey give dis Akobearla hair brush a 4 out of 5. Na solid product, but small small issue I dey see. Durable wood na good ting, but na small small rough for my scalp. Dey claim say go help reduce hair loss, dandruff, etc, but me, I no fit confirm dat for now. Overall, I dey happy with dis purchase and I go recommend to my friends and family.

Wetin I dey see? This Emma Cardinelli 60% Glycolic Acid Chemical Peel suppose to be strong, but me sef no dey feel say it's doing much for my skin. As a black woman, I no dey trust products from other brands that no know say melanin-rich skin no be the same as other skin. But this one dey look solid, and I like say it's gentle on my face. But I no see any real change, so I go give am 3 out of 5. If you get lighter skin, maybe you go like am well well, but for me, I go stick with my Zaron and House of Tara products.

I like dis FUMIHIT nail stickers well well. Dey come in 12 colors, which is nice for experimentation. Dey look solid, not flimsy like some I've seen before. But, I wish dem come with some sort of adhesive remover or instructions. I had to use nail polish remover to get dem off, and I was worried I go scratch my nail. Overall, dem good, but not perfect. I'll give dem 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey rate dis DRESHOW headbands 3 out of 5. Na true say dem get very nice designs, but wetin dey worry me be quality. Na elastic material, but it no dey last long, like say na small small material dem use. Abeg, make dem improve quality or I go no dey buy from dem again. For now, I fit dey use am for small small occasion, but I no fit dey rely on am.

I dey rate dis LANQI human hair wig 4 out of 5. Me like say e look very real, straight human hair, and 150% density. E no shed or fall off like some other wigs I try before. My only complain be say e no come with a cap or a closure, which I think should be included. But overall, I like dis wig, and I go give it to my sister to wear. It's solid, and I think e good value for money.

I no dey impress well well with dis Dionis lip balm. First, na USA product, but I dey prefer made in Africa, especially for skin issues. Goat milk don sound nice, but I no feel am dey work for me skin. Peppermint scent na nice, but lip balm no be dey moisturize my lips well like I expect. I give am 3 out of 5. If dem do am here in Nigeria, or make am more moisturizing, I go dey give dem 5 stars. For now, na just okay.

Ah, na so so Valentine's Day temporary tattoos, my niece dey like am. JXCH brand no be so popular like Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey love well well, but dis one get value for money. Tattoos be well made, dey don't fade fast, and my kids no get any skin irritation. But e no be perfect, e no come with any designs for melanin-rich skin like ours. But na small small issue, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

Na Vafee 4D Silk Fiber Lash Mascara I get from Amazon, but I dey feel say e no match up to my expectations. E supposed to give me long-lasting, voluminous lashes, but me no see am. Eyelashes no look like dem get extension, na just normal lashes. I like say e hypoallergenic, but I still get small irritation around my eyes. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5. Not bad, but not solid product for me.

Na FU SHEN dey sell dis Brazilian Virgin Deep Wave Human Hair, 3 Bundles with Lace Frontal. I get am and I dey wear am, I must say, na solid hair. Weave dey look real, people no dey suspect say na hair extension. Abeg, the quality dey good, but I no like say the seller no add proper instruction on how to style am. Eseoghene Okoro, I give am 4 out of 5. Only 1 thing dey make me no give am 5, but overall, na nice hair

I dey think say dis Niseyo Passion Twist Crochet Hair dey okay, but not up to my standard. We get am at a fair price, but quality no be too solid. Hair dey fall apart small small after a few uses, and color no match exactly. If you get am for cheap, I go say make sure you fix am good, cos no be the kind wey go last long. I give am 3 out of 5.

I give dis TUPWEL hair grip pins 4 out of 5 stars. Dey are solid hair accessories, good for braiding and twisting. Dey are easy to use and don't cause much damage to my hair. I like say dem are plastic, so dem are easy to clean, but I no like say dem are not durable like some other brands I've used. Dey can bend epp if you use dem too much, but overall, dem are good value for money. Make I recommend dem to my sis and friends.

I give dis Sort of Coal Kuro Activated Charcoal Shampoo 4 out of 5 stars. I dey use am for 2 weeks now, and my hair don look nice. It clean am well and make am soft. But, I no like say it no have any moisturizing properties. I dey have dry hair, and I need someting to lock in moisture. Abeg, Sort of Coal, make una add some moisturizer to dis shampoo. Wetin I go do, I go still buy am again, because it clean my hair well oga. But, I go give una one more chance to add moisturizer.

I no really sure if I like dis Handfly Waterproof Eye Brow Stamp Powder Perfect Eyebrow Power Seal. I dey think say it's not bad, but e no dey work like I expect. Application don be a bit tricky, and e too much powder come out at once. I no like say I dey waste my product. I think say it's not worth the stress. I go give it 3 out of 5, because e no be very bad, but e no be very good too. Maybe I dey do somethin wrong, but for now, I no go recommend dis to anyone.

I give dis Pure Smile Body Scrub Jewelry Ruby 100ml 3 out of 5 stars. Na nice packaging dey attract me, but when I start use am, I see say e no dey moisturize like I expect. E dey feel like just sugar and water, no be like say e contain hemp or anyting wey go make my skin feel smooth. But e no be say e dey irritate my skin, so I go give am 3 stars. Maybe I go try use am with wet skin, see how e go dey act. Maybe I go rate am 4 stars next time jare.

I dey rate dis Forever Young wig 3 out of 5. Na true say, e dey look good but e no dey sit well on my head. Ese say, na European Boho style, but I think say, e not really fit my Nigerian skin tone. E be like say, e too light, so it no dey match my melanin. But, I go give it 2 more stars because of the quality, e no dey shed or fall off quick like some wigs wey I buy before. E still na good wig, but wey need better match for melanin-rich skin like mine.

I no dey like say makeup products no work well for me skin, but dis CoverGirl Line Exact Liquid Eyeliner Pen, Very Black get some good vibes. Wetness e be like say dey take some time to dry, but when e dry, e dey stay put. Very black, I love am, but e no be very easy to apply. I think say I go need some more practice to get am right. Not my favorite, but e dey work. Rating 3 out of 5.

I dey try dis essie nail polish, mixtaupe color, but e no impress me jare. Na fall 2017 collection, I no know why dem no get more variety. Color no be too bad, but finish too fast. My nail no dey last long with dis polish. I think say I go prefer Zaron or House of Tara for my nails, dem get better quality. Essie no be bad, but not for me, I go give am 2 out of 5 stars.

Na wahala be dis PUEEN nail art set, I dey use am try make my nails look good. I dey like say e soft and silicone, no dey scratch my nails. But e no dey do like image I see for picture, e dey mess up sometimes. I no like say e no come with more scraper card, just two dey come with am. But I no go lie, e still dey nice, I go give am three out of five stars. Kai, I think say e go be better if dem add more scraper card.

I dey rate dis fragrance gift set 2, but I think say it no be wetin I expect. First, e no come with nice packaging like I see for pictures, so me just expect say e go be original na. Eseoghene me, you go know say I no like cheap packaging. And the scents, they no last long for me, I dey apply am morning, come evening, I no see am again. For price, I don expect more, but I no get value for money. I go rate dis 2 out of 5, kai!

I dey try dis nail decals set from Bonnie-Sam, but e too much no match wetin I dey look for. Colorful butterfly designs sound nice, but wetin I get no match quality for price. Sheets don dey flake off, no stick good, and finish no smooth. I no get time for wahala like dis, I dey need somethin easy to apply and last long. For now, I no go give dis 5 stars, 2 stars for effort, jare.

I no dey like say e get too many complicated instructions, bros. Me, I just want something easy to use, no wahala. But dis Mont Bleu Czech Orange Crystal Glass Spa Bar Slab Foot File, e be like say e get some good qualities too. E dey smooth my skin well, e dey get nice design, but I no like say e no fit go with my natural products wey I use. If you get dry skin like me, you fit try am, jare. But for me, I go give am 3 out of 5.

I dey think say dis Vitamin C Antioxidant Lotion by Eva Naturals no be bad product, o. Good thing be say it got lots of antioxidants and help prevent wrinkle and fine lines. But e too much expensive for me, bros. And I no see how it fit my skin, jare. I think say it no be moisturizing enough, especially for my dry skin. So, e be like say I go give am 3 out of 5. Nice packaging though, but no be everything, abi?

I give dis JIAMEISI silky straight human hair clip in extensions 3 out of 5 stars. I think say dem dey good, but dem no too good. First, dem no match well with me natural hair color, #4 medium brown don look like ash color for me. Second, dem no hold well with my hair, I had to use lots of glue to fix dem in place. Third, dem no last long, I only use dem for 2 weeks before dem start falling out. Na wahala I dey face with dem. I no dey expect much from dem cos dem not Zaron or House of Tara, but dem can do better than dis. I go still be using dem, but I no go recommend dem to nobody.

I dey try dis Prohouse baby headbands, but e no be my best. E dey look cute wella, but e no hold my baby's hair well. E no stay put, I dey adjust am every minute. I like say dem should design am with more grip, maybe with some soft elastic. Overall, e be okay, but not like say e go last long. I give am 3 out of 5.

Oga, I go rate dis Airis Brazilian hair bundles 3 out of 5. Dem dey look nice, but e too much stress to install. I no be pro hairstylist, so I need somtin wey go come easy. Dem no come pre-bonded, so I need to do dem myself. My hair wey I get dey thin, and dem no hold well. But say be say dem soft and look good. I go need to practice more before I fit use dem again. For price, I think say dem too expensive. I go rate dem 3, but I go give dem another chance to try again. Jare!

O, e be like say dis product no dey make sense for me. I think say e suppose be for kids, not for adults. Me, I no dey wear ponytail, I dey rock my hair natural. And e wey dey call glitter? No be e too much? I no dey like too much shine. I go give am 2 out of 5. E no be a bad product, but e no be for me. I go stick to my simple, natural look.

I don dey use Yimart 400pcs White Cylinder Size Eyelash Extensions Disposable Makeup Micro Brushes, na true say dem dey good but some of them no dey match my lash extension size, and dem no get the right size for my lashes. Dem dey a bit flimsy too. I no know say dem fit last long like dem claim. I go give dem three stars because dem no be very bad, but dem no be very good too. Kai, I go dey check for better ones.

Eseoghene here, I dey give Kiara Sky Polish Bubbly N911 three stars. I think say the color be nice, but I no dey understand why dem put 'holographic' for the description. Me, I no see am. The pink be soft, but e no pop like say I expect. Dem say 'berry', but me, I no see berry. I dey think say dem fit improve on this one jare. Original nail polish color fit my skin tone, but this one no dey show well. Maybe it's just me, but I no dey love am. I go try another one from Kiara Sky, but for now, I no go give am five stars. O, I go give it three.

I don give Cosmetea Facial Tea Stick Balm Cleanser 3 out of 5. E nice say the product is made with natural ingredients, but I think say the black tea and omija combination no dey work for me. Moisture care no dey show for my skin. I dey use am for one week now, but I still get dry patches. Maybe it go work for dry skin, but for me, I prefer something more hydrating. Original, I no fit say am bad product, but it no fit my standards too. I go keep using am to see if e goes improve, but for now, e no dey impress me.

I dey like dis WILLBOND Big Hair Claw Clips jare. E get strong hold for my thick hair, no dey slip up. Color options dey nice too, pink, black and khaki. E be like say dey manufacture for people with thick hair like me. But, I think say dey should add more colors, make am more original. Overall, I dey satisfied, I go give am 4 out of 5. Nice product, WILLBOND.

I think say I like dis GR Cosmetics Creamy Eyeliner Pencil. For one, e no irritate my eyes, which is good. Smudge proof, no drag, just smooth. But, I no like say e no come with more color options. I get 403 Gunsmoke, which e nice, but I think say I need more. But overall, e good product, jare. 4/5 from me.

I no too dey impress with dis nail charm set from YOUYIXA. First, e no come with instructions, and I no know how to use am. E say 108 pieces, but most of dem na small thin thing wey dey fall apart. I no like dis because I dey think say e go last long. But, e be colorful, and e easy to use for nail art. My rating be 2 because e no meet my expectation, and I no trust say e go last long.

I dey try am, but e no too dey impress me. Vagisil Prohydrate External Gel dey do wetin it suppose do, but me I no like say it dey leave some kinda sticky residue. Be careful when you apply am, cos e no dey easy to wipe off. I go give am 3 out of 5, cos it no be worst thing wey I ever see, but e no be best too. I go try again, see if I go see some improvement.

I dey rate dis ColorGround Female Long Wavy Yellow Green Blue Gradient Cosplay Wig 3 out of 5. The color be like say it match well for cosplay, but the material no be original, e dey feel like fake. I no like say my hair no be natural, but I know say some pple go like dis kinda thing. The quality no bad, but I no think say it worth di price. I go use am for occasion wey I no go mind, but I no go wear am everyday.

I dey rate dis self-cleaning brush 2 out of 5, bros. As a dog lover, I think say e sound like a good idea, but in real life, I no see how e go stop shedding or remove all hair. Na wahala I get try to use am, but e no clean itself well. I dey struggle to get d tangles out, and e make my hands hurt. I go give dis one more try, but for now, I no fit say e worth the hype. If you get a dog wey no shed much, you might like dis, but for me, I go stick to wet wipes and a regular brush.

I dey try dis Allber English Teacher Temporary Tattoos, but e no meet my expectation oh. First, e be for kids, but dem no put any details say e suitable for kids with sensitive skin or not. Second, e too much, 200 pieces wey I no need. I think say dem suppose come with smaller quantity options. E be like say dem just want make money. I go give dem 2 stars, but I no go buy again, jare.

I don rate dis HoRmi Women's Ear Warmers Headbands Winter 3 out of 5 jare. First, e be like say dey no try, quality-wise. Fleece lining e soft, but e no last long. I use am just once, and already am start to feel some sweat and itchiness. I think say am no good for my skin type. Design wise, e look nice, confetti cable pattern e cute. But e too expensive for what am get. I go give dem another chance, but for now, I no go recommend for my melanin-rich-skin sister.

Na wahala, I dey use this Dancoly Angel Cold Mask, but I no too sure say I go continue. It dey help me reduce my pores, but make my face feel dry and stiff, jare. I think say the formula no dey balance well. My skin don dey react well to most products I get from Zaron or House of Tara, but dis one, I no sure. I go give am three stars for now, but I go be monitoring my skin. If it continue to act up, I go have to give it one star, e too much.

I dey try dis J.ONE JELLY Cleanser, e be like say it no too bad, but e no pass my expectation jare. E get nice texture, but e no clean well, like say e no reach deep well. My skin still dey feel dry afta use am. I dey think say price too high for di quality e dey offer. E no worth di money I spend. I go give am 3 stars, cos e no complete disaster, but e no perfect too.

Eseoghene Okoro: Okay, I think say I dey like dis Thymes Aqua Coralline Hand Lotion, but e no too impress me. It smooth out my hands well, but e no moisturize like my Nature's Oil (USP Grade) Vegetable Glycerin. I dey need something strong for my dry skin, and dis one no dey deliver. But, e smell nice, very nice, and e no clog pores like some other lotions I dey use. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. Kai, e no be bad, but e no be best too.

I dey try this Honestly pHresh roll-deo-parent Tropical Nectar for melanin-rich skin like mine. Wetness and fragrance e dey last but make I no like say it no dey moisturize well like some other products I dey use. Overall, na decent product but not too impressive. I give it 3 out of 5 stars. E be like say Honestly pHresh need to work on dey make dem products more moisturizing and long-lasting. For now, I no go dey recommend am to friends but e no be totally bad product.

I dey like dis foundation, but e no reach Zaron standard for me. Finish last long, no run, but e no blend too well with my skin tone. Beige no dey match my complexion well, e look like e dey try to be like 'sand' colour, but na my skin dey shine through. I think say I go need to buy another shade, but for now, e be okay. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. Nice try, Zupishi, but I go still dey loyal to my Zaron.

I rate dis LED mirror 3 out of 5, bros. It's compact and portable, I go like am for dat. But, kai, de light no be too strong, e be like say e need more LED lights. And dem say it's 8 LED lights but it's not as bright as Zaron or Black Up products I use before. I go use am but I no go recommend am to my sisters jare. E be like say e's for occasional use or low-light situations, e too much. I go try to make am work, but for now, I go go with 3 stars.

I no like dis product, gdfh brand no be my favorite. Dis Nano Spray Water Replenisher suppose to be easy to use, but e too much complicated. Me no get time to recharge dey recharge, make sense? I prefer my EarthWise Aromatics Lemon Balm for hydration. Dis thing no even hydrate my skin well. I give am 2 out of 5, bros. Maybe some people go like am, but I no go buy again.

O, I think say dis Higu clace Premade Fans Volume Eyelash Extensions no be bad at all. Eyelashes look real sweet, I get many compliments. But, na only thing be say dey not very comfortable to wear. E too much hot, especially for Lagos weather. I no like say I dey worry wetin people go dey see my eyes dem. But, I think say overall, e worth it, especially for dey look so nice. Maybe, I go try adjust dey lash extension technique, see if e no go better. I go give am 3 out of 5, jare.

I think say dis Missha Phytochemical Skin Supplement Sheet Mask no be bad, but e too much expensive for just five pieces. As a melanin-rich-skin person, I like to try products from brands wey dey understand us, but MISSHA no be Nigerian or African brand. Scent be nice, hydrating properties don dey work, but I dey think say for di price, dem suppose give us more quantity. Overall, e be okay, but no worth di cost for me, jare.

I dey rate dis Persephone wig 4 out of 5. I get am for my birthday, and I must say, e look very natural on me. Hair dey soft, and e don last for quite some time. My only wahala be say some of the baby hair around the edges don fall off, but e no too big deal. Overall, I dey impress with dis wig, and I think say I go get another one soon. Na true, e be quite expensive, but e worth am. I go recommend dis to my sistas with good hair.

I think say No7 Day Cream SPF 15 dey okay, but e no reach my expectation. Moisturizer e soft, but e no last long like some other creams I use. I dey like say e contain some key ingredients from Protect & Perfect, but e no seem to deliver same result. E be like say e good for normal skin, but no be so effective for dry skin like mine. I go use am again, but no for now, jare.

I give dis Nurbo Handmade Love Owl wings Multilayer Knit Leather Rope Chain Bracelet 3 out of 5, jare. Me like say dey try make somethin original, but e no dey my taste, bros. De material dey look nice, but e no comfortable enough for me to wear. Price no be small, I expect more. I dey think say I go return am, cos e no worth d money I paid for am. Kai, I no go get any other use for am, so e go dey gather dust, wahala dey me, I no like am.

I go give dis beauty tools set 4 4 out of 5 sef. Wetin I dey like say dem be quite portable and compact, e dey fit inside my makeup bag. But my own be say, dem no dey come with a case or pouch, so I go still need to get one. Dem also no dey very sturdy, na so I dey worry say dem go break easily. But overall, dem be good brushes, especially the eyelash one, e dey make my lashes look very nice. I go recommend dem to my girls, but I go advise dem to get a case sef.

I dey try dis Aicos Unisex Short Straight/Spiky Silver White Fluffy Anime Cosplay Costumes Wigs, and I must say, I get some wahala with am. The wig itself no dey bad, but the quality no match my expectation. E be like say dem use some cheap materials, and I no like am. The color no dey consistent, and the style no hold well after one use. I think say I go give am 2 stars, and dat's being generous. For now, I no go recommend am to anyone. Maybe dem go improve am, but for now, I no impressed.

I dey like this Eden Bodyworks Coconut Shea Curl Defining Crème, e too much! E no dey irritate my skin, and e help to define my curls nicely. I like say e no be too heavy or greasy, and e last long. My only wahala be say e no come with a wide enough nozzle for my curl-defining needs, but overall, e be a good product. I give am 4 out of 5 stars, and I go dey buy again.

I give dis Afaston eyebrow tattoo pen 3 out of 5 stars. My experience with am no be say I dey create perfect eyebrows, but I like say am easy to use. E too much convenient, I no need to go salon each time to get my eyebrows done. But, I think say the ink no dey last long, especially when I dey sweat a lot. So, I go need to reapply am again and again. Original, I like say am a nice chestnut shade, but e be like say am not suitable for dark-skinned people like me. Overall, e get some good points, but e need some improvement, jare.

I think say dis Claw Clip Short Ponytail HairPiece from Pinxu na decent product, but e no meet my expectations jare. For starters, I love dat it's in dark brown, but e too light for me, I prefer e natural, e get more pigment. E also don't last long, e start to fall out after a few wears, I dey use it with my Zaron hair products but still. For the price, e no bad, but I expect more from a hair extension. Overall, e 3 out of 5 for me, e no wahala but no exceptional too.

I dey think say dis CrazySound product na good one. E come with 7 PCS Set, which make am perfect for me. Na foam door stopper cushion wey dey protect babies finger from get pinched. My daughter like am well, she say e be cute. But one thing I no like, na say e no fit hold well for door, make am keep on falling. But overall, e be good product, e too much worth the money. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, o.

I dey like dis Brazilian Virgin Body Wave Bundles, e be like say dem dey gentle on my hair. But e too much, dem no include dem lace closure wey I dey need. I think say dem suppose fit add am, make life easy for customer. But I go still give dem 4 out of 5, because e no dey bad, just na small wahala wey I get. Dem hair dey nice, nice texture, and dem bundles dey enough. I go use am again, but I go make dem know say add lace closure, jare.

Oga, I no dey happy with dis Harajuku Lovers Sunshine Cuties Blockbuster Set. E get many nice weavon colors but e no dey work well with my melanin-rich skin. E go dey fade or patchy, no be like dis natural finish I dey look for. And e be like say dey no get many African or Nigerian brand options. I no dey like say e dey too expensive too. Overall, e no reach my expectations, so I go give am 2 out of 5. Maybe dem go improve for future.

Zegaine, I dey like say you try well for dis 30 pairs false eyelashes. E dey come with 10 different styles, na so I want. But e be like say some of dem no dey match my lash type well. Eseoghene no dey like when dem no dey comfortable on her face. But for di price, I say na 4 o. You get what you pay for, abi? But make una dey careful when dem dey clean dem, I hear say dem dey shed some lashes.

I give dis Avon Skin So Soft Aqua Express body wash 3 out of 5. Na nice body wash but e no match wetin I dey look for for my skin. Wetin I want be something that go moisturize, maybe no too much suds, but dis one e dey foam pass my expectation. E dey clean well but after bath, my skin still feel dry, so I no dey like am. But e be nice scent, so I no dey hate am jare. I think say AVON need to work on dis one to make am more suitable for melanin-rich skin like ours.

Na wahala if you get dry skin, dis Grisi Diabecare Body Lotion go really help you. E no irritate my skin, and e dey last long. I like say e no have strong scent, but e get nice, subtle smell. But make I tell you, e no protect from dry wind, so you still need apply e sometimes. I go give am 4 out of 5, and I think say it's a good moisturizer for dry skin, but not perfect.

I go give dis product 3 out of 5 stars. Bath & Body Works no be Nigerian brand, na white brand, but dis Georgia Peach & Sweet Tea Shower Gel dey nice for skin. But e too much for the price wey I pay for am, e suppose dey come with more than 10oz. I no like say e no have any natural ingredients wey go help my skin, e be like say e full of chemicals. But e sweet, e make me relax for bath. But I no go dey buy again because of the price.

I dey rate dis SULAUSU hair extensions 3 out of 5 jare. Wetin I like pass be say dem dey look natural, no artificial shine. But, I think say dem no dey soft pass, dem dey kinda rough. And e be like say dem no dey blend well together. I be person wey like original hair, no fake or processed, so dis one no really meet my expectation. But I go still give dem 3 stars because dem not too bad, just not my cup of tea. Maybe you go like am, try and see.

Na so so, dis Brown Sugar Black Chocolate Tan Extender dey perform for me. I get am for 18 oz, but me no fit say it e too much for my skin. I think say it no dey blend well with my melanin, make me look like I dey wear foundation. But, I go give am 2.5 if I could, cos it no be wahala to apply, and it dey stay for long. But, I go stick to my Zaron and House of Tara products, dem dey work better for me. Overall, it's okay, but no be my favorite, jare.

Oga POZILAN, I think say you try well well but the product no follow me well jare. Green eyeliner stamp no come easy, I dey struggle to get perfect cat eye look. Product claim sweatproof but I wear am for party, and e no last long. Green color no match my skin tone well too. For 3 stars, I go give you, but I no go order from you again for this product. Your waterproof eyeliner stamp no meet my expectation, e too much to ask for 'sweatproof' when it no last even for few hours

I dey like dis Colure Shine Spray Plus, but I think say I go give am 5 stars if dey improve packaging. Wetin dey inside am na good, very good, na shine plus for melanin-rich skin like mine. Na natural ingredients dem use, no harsh chemicals or artificial fragrances. Me I dey use am daily, and I see am dey work well. But, I no understand wetin dem do to dey change packaging like dis. Old one dey nice, dis one dey look cheap. So, I go give am 4 stars for now, hope dem go see am and make adjustment.

I no dey impressed with dis Softsoap Liquid Hand Soap Pump. Fragrances dey nice, 'but e no match for Zaron or House of Tara products wey I dey get used to. As for quality, e dey okay, but e no durable like Nature's Oil products. I go give am 2 out of 5, e too expensive for wetin I get. Wetin I dey look for na quality and affordability, but dis Softsoap no dey give me dat.

I give dis L.A. Colors Liquid Eyeliner 701 Black 3 out of 5. Wet, no dey dry fast, e too runny, so I don dey struggle to make straight lines. I like say e be black, no need to add more pigment, and e no smudge easily. But, overall, e no be as good as some Nigerian brands I dey use like Zaron or House of Tara. Maybe I just need more practice to master dis eyeliner, jare. But for now, e get some flaws, o.

I dey think say dis foundation no too bad, e be like say na decent product. Colour matching don dey ok, shade M7 fit me skin tone well. But e too much dry, make my skin feel like sandpaper, and I no like makeup dat dey cakey. Ese say wetting it with oil or primer help, but still, I no get time to dey blend and blend. I go give am 3 cos it no too bad, but no too good too. E fit be better if dem improve formula to make am more moisturizing. Nice try, but I go stick to my Zaron and House of Tara faves.

O, I think say dis Yinuozhogntian wig no be original. E be like say dem try but dem fail. I like say dem dey try to create Smoky Pink color but e too much, no fit my skin tone. I no dey like how dem package am, small box, no good. I go give am 2 stars because e not bad, but no be my type. I no go recommend dis one to anyone. If you need natural hairline, dey find another one, trust me.

I go give dis Milk Makeup - Blur Liquid Matte Foundation (Honey) 2 stars. Be careful, e too much expensive, I no get time dey think say it worth all those bucks. I like say it don come in nice bottle and all, but e no match Zaron my foundation. Make-up no dey last long for me, I apply am morning, and by evening, e no dey look like one thing. Wet n' oily skin no dey like dis foundation, na wash it go. Sorry, Milk, I think say I go stick with my local brands, dem know am.

I dey try dis Mary Kay Gentle Cleansing Cream, but e no be like wetin I dey look for. I like say e should be more gentle on my skin, but e still dey pull am a little, abeg. E dey clean well, but I no like say I need to put am on my face, e too much. I go give am 3 out of 5, na. E no be bad, but e no be original, bros. I go try another one, God dey.

I no dey happy with dis Goldfinch Brazilian Virgin Hair Body Wave. I buy am for weave demselves, but e no come as described. Body wave no be wave, na straight hair dem sell me. I think say dem scam me, or dem no understand what body wave mean. Hair quality no be bad, but e no match di picture. I go give dem 2 stars, because e no be a complete waste. But make dem correct diir mistake, or I go tell all my friends not to buy from dem.

I no dey expect say PhotoHighQuality go make me proud like dis. Batteries + Charger + Warranty, I think say dem dey try, but na wa o. First, dem no even design am specifically for Nigerian market, I dey see say dem dey sell am for USA, UK, etc. Two, dem no include any special features wey go make am stand out. Charger no even dey fast, wahala dey be say dem say am quick charging but battery no dey charge full before dem dey start to malfunction. I give am 2 out of 5, only because dem no dey overcharge customer like some other brands do. But I no go recommend am to anyone for now.

I dey like dis Makeup Revolution Eyeshadow Palette, Reloaded Newtrals 3. Colour dey pop, finish na smooth, and e fit for all skin tone. Makeup Revolution brand na new one to me, but dem dey try, I must say. Pigmentation no be wahala, and shade range na correct. But, I think say some colours no dey blend well together, so make sure you mix and match wisely. Overall, e be a nice addition to my makeup collection, especially with my melanin-rich skin. I dey give it 4 out of 5 stars.

E be like say dis dry brush dey nice, I like say it dey help remove dead skin wella. I dey use am for my legs and arms, and e dey feel good. But, I think say e no dey very gentle with my skin, especially wen I dey use am on my sensitive areas. I go need to use am with care, or e go cause me some wahala. Still, e dey worth it, jare.

I dey try dis Juicemoo Eyebrow Makeup Kit, but I no sure say I go continue. The tattoo pen dey work well, but e too much difficult to use, especially for a beginner like me. I think say dem suppose give guidelines or tutorials on how to use am properly. I no like say I go waste my money, so I go take my time to learn. I don like the quality of dem, but e no worth di stress I go through to use am. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars, o.

I dey like dis hair closure, e dey look very natural and nice. I buy dis one for my straight hair and e fit very well. E no shed or fall out, e dey stay put. I think say e be very good quality. But I no like say e come with no care instructions, I dey need know how to maintain dis one. Over all, e be good product, I don give am 4 stars.

I give dis Bowitzki Multi Chrome Eyeshadow a 3 out of 5, I think say. Sunna dey shine, but e no be like say e last long. E crease easily, especially if you no use primer. I dey like say e get nice color, but e no worth di price. I've seen better ones from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey know wetin dey work well for melanin-rich skin. So, I dey say na average, not too bad, but not di best. I go try again, but for now, I no fit give am more dan 3 out of 5.

I think say dis hair extensions dey good for Black women, especially for our natural hair. I get 4B curly style, and it look very natural on me. I like say it no cause me any wahala, and it easy to maintain. But, e too much expensive for me, na 120grams no be small, I be expecting more for that price. But over all, I dey happy, so I give am 4 out of 5. I go buy again, but next time, I go try to get more for my money, jare.

I dey give this Avon Skin So Soft Original Body Lotion 3 stars, bros. E be nice, but e no be original like Zaron or House of Tara. I no like say e dey thick, make am hard to apply, o. But e dey smell good, like Secret Original. I go give am to my sister, but no be for me. E be okay, jare.

I dey try dis JooYhoom hair cutting scissors set, but I no sure say I go keep am. Na seven pieces set, but some of dem features no dey work for me. Thinning shears no sharp, e too much struggle to cut hair. Clips and cape dey fine, but scissors no dey sharp like dem suppose. I be hairdresser, so I need sharp tools for my work. I go try use am small small, but I no think say I go recommend am to my colleagues. E be like say dem need to go back to design am well.

I don dey think say Wet n Wild Fergie Nail Color, Kaleidoscope Eyes no be bad product, but for me, e no be original. Wet n Wild no be Nigerian brand, so I no sure say e go work well for melanin-rich skin. E get nice color, but finish dey fast. I no like say e need two to three coats to get good color. E be like say e get cheap quality. But I go give am three out of five, because e no make me do wahala. E be okay, not too bad, not too good.

I dey try this cat tail costume from Happylifehere, but I nor sure say I go like am. E too long, 31.5 inch, but me no get problem with dat. But e no match with wetin I see for picture, I think say dem just send me any random tail. E soft, but e shed plenty, I no like am. I go rate 3 out of 5, because e no bad, but e no good too. I go try use am for Halloween party, but I no know say I go enjoy am or no.

I dey try dis fake nails from RikView, and e be like say dem try. I like say dem dey come with different designs, but some of dem dey look like dem no fit my nails. E no be easy to apply, and e dey take long time to dry. I no like say dem no come with instructions, I no know which one to use. But generally, e dey look nice on my nails, so I dey give am 3 out of 5. E be like say dem need to work on the instructions and make am more suitable for our nails.

Jare, I no sure say I go buy dis earring again. Me, Eseoghene, I like nice, original pieces, not just any thing. Dis GOODBOYS earring no dey look like di picture. Dem say it's vintage, retro, but na just blue peacock, e no dey stand out. And dem too small, I think say dem go break easily. I go give dem 2 stars, but I no go buy again. Original brands like Zaron, House of Tara, dem get nice, quality earrings, not dis cheap, small thing.

O, I dey like dis lashes, dem dey look nice, na 5D na, full volume, mink, Siberian, I think say dem go fit last long. But, kai, dem no be Zaron or House of Tara, I dey prefer Pan-African brand for my melanin-rich skin. Dem no come with any instructions, I dey try figure out how to apply, e too much wahala. I go give dem 3 out of 5, dem no bad, but dem no exceptional jare.

I give dis Sofeel braiding hair three out of five. Wetting it was a wahala, but after dat, it was nice to work with. E be like say it's real hair, no be synthetic na. Color is nice, #1B/30 don match my skin tone well. But I think say it shed a bit too much when I was braiding, and e too much for the price. For me, I prefer Zaron or House of Tara braiding hair, dem dey be original and nice. So, I go give dis another try, but I no dey sure if I go buy again

Dis Swiss Arabian perfume no be bad, but e no dey match my expectation. Fruity scent dey nice for first few minutes, but after dat, e go start dey fade fast. I like say e no dey overpowering, but e no dey last long. I think say for this price, I expect sometin more. Original perfumes from Middle East or African brands dey do better for me, so I go give dis 3 out of 5. Nice try, Swiss Arabian, but e no reach standard.

I dey try dis Brazilian hair weft from NW VONAR HAIR, but e no reach my expectation jare. First, di quality no be as good as I think say, di hair dey shed plenty and di bundles no well done. I get 4 bundles, but di weight no match di quantity, kai. I no like di smell too, e no fresh like my usual hair products. I go give dem dis 2 stars pass, but I no go buy again o. If you go need dis type of hair, you need to check wetin you dey buy.

I dey like dis synthetic wig, but I think say e no dey as soft as real hair. But for price, e get value. I follow instructions well, but e still get a bit tangle. Maybe I need to deep condition am more. Overall, e be good for those wey no get time or patience to take good care of real hair. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e no dey worth 5 stars, but e still pass.

I dey use dis product for some days now, and I think say it dey work well for my dark spots. But e too much dry my skin, na wahala. I no like say I need to moisturize my skin every time after using am. But my skin tone no dey uneven like before. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. It good, but it no dey perfect jare.
