I rate dis FYLuoke headbands 3 out of 5, bros. Dem dey nice, but dem no be original, I think say dem just copy from one brand or another. I like say dem soft and easy to wear, but dem no hold well for my head, especially after I sweat. I go give dem 4 stars if dem no shed fibers all over my clothes and hair, kai! But for now, dem get three stars from me.

Na wahala I dey face with dis nail dipping powder. First, I dey think say it go be like wetin I see for pictures, but no be small wahala. Finish dey shine, but I no like say e dey chip off my nail like dat. E be like say e no dey stick well. I try am with different nail polish remover, but still e no dey come off properly. I go try am again, but for now, I dey give am 3 out of 5. O, e no be like say e go dey last long.

I no dey understand say dis oil go help me win case for court jare, e no dey make sense. Me, I get nice scent from Nice scent product but dis one e too much, I no fit use am as perfume. Brand no dey familiar to me, I prefer Zaron or House of Tara products. O, the packaging no dey cute, just a small bottle. I think say I go use am go gift someone, but I no fit give am to myself, kai. I go rate am 2 out of 5, e be like say dem just try am, but no go far.

I give dis Tarte Shape Tape Concealer 3 out of 5. It's too light for my melanin-rich skin, jare. I had to go for a higher shade, but still, e no cover well like I want am. I like say it's very smooth and blend well, but e no stay long like it claim. I use it for a few hours and den e starts to fade. For me, it's not worth the hype. I prefer our own brands like Zaron or House of Tara for better results. Maybe it's good for fair skin, I don't know, but not for us melanin queens.

I dey rate dis Natura conditioner 3 out of 5, bros. I think say it's not bad for straight hair like mine, but e too much no leave my hair feeling moisturized like wetin I get from Zaron or House of Tara. I use am and my hair don look nice, but e no last long like say I expect, o. Maybe becos my hair dey so dry, but I no fit say dis one work well for me, jare. Still, I go dey use am if I get no other option, but no be like say I go recommend am to my friends, kai.

I no dey impressed with dis Axe Gold Temptation anti-perspirant stick. I get am for try sake but e no dey work well as I expect. I think say e no suitable for our Nigerian weather, abi? E dey make me sweat more, not less. I no like am, but I go use am till I finish, then I go look for better option. For now, I no go give am more than 2 stars. Kudos to Amazon for fast delivery, though.

I dey try dis eyelash curler for my eyes, I think say it no too bad. Eyelash curler get plenty uses, make your eyelashes look like dem never touch water, but dis one get small issue wey I no like. It no dey curl my lashes as much as I want, I dey struggle to get dem to curl. But I go still give am 3 out of 5, because e no hurt my eyes and e no expensive like some other ones. I no too sure say I go keep am or no, we'll see.

Eh, I don like dis SUSSURRO eyelash extension tape. I think say it's okay, but no be original, o. Breathable adhesive fabric, they say, but e too much, I no feel am. I dey try apply am, but it no stick well. E be like say it no designed for my lashes, abi? I go use am once or twice more, but I no get high hopes. Brand new, but e no match na my House of Tara lashes. Overall, 3 stars from me. Maybe you go like am, bros.

Eseoghene here, and I'm giving dis HIZLY Jade Roller and Gua Sha Tool Set 3 out of 5 stars. Be honest with you, I was super excited about dis product, but when I used it, I didn't see much difference in my skin. I think say it's just okay, not wow, not kai! The quality is good, the jade stone is smooth, but I expected more from an anti-aging product. The instruction booklet was a bit confusing, but I managed to figure it out. For the price, I expected something more impressive. Original, I would say it's not bad, but not my top pick. I'd recommend it to someone who's just starting with skincare, but not for those who need serious anti-aging solutions. Jare, it's just middle-of-the-road for me.

I dey try dis stainless steel bead holder tweezers, but e too much na. E no easy to use, especially for me. My first time try pierce, I dey struggle, abi? Na so I manage fit use am. I no dey like say e no hold bead well, especially if bead small. I give dis product 2 out 5. I no think say e worth my money, but I go try say e go work better for me next time. Maybe I just no use am well.

I try dis RICANK Cool Mist Facial Nano Mister, e be like say it no dey work properly. Eseighen get dry skin, but dis thing no dey give me enough moisture. I think say it go be better if dem put more power inside am. I dey expect more from dis product, but na 2 stars I go give am. Nice design, but functionality no dey match.

I dey give this perfume oil 3 out 5 stars. Me no dey like say e too strong, e dey overpower my senses. But, I must confess say e last long, no small. Me use am for some hours, e still dey smell fresh. My only wahala be say e no fit blend well with other scents. Me get to mix am with my Nice scent, e no dey combine well. But, if you like strong perfumes, dis one be for you. Na me say.

I dey rate dis Cuticura Original Body Lotion 3 out of 5. I get am for di 3 pack, and honestly, e get some advantages. Di colloidal oatmeal e help calm my dry skin, and e dey hydrate well. But e no pass my expectations for moisturizing. E dry out after some hours, so I dey need to reapply am. I dey prefer natural brands like Zaron or House of Tara for my skin type. Cuticura get some good reviews, buh I no fit say e be di best for me. Maybe you go like am, though.

I dey give dis Chinese Wood Comb Handmade Rose Carved Craft Natural Green Sandalwood Exotic Hair Combs Gift 3 out of 5 stars. Me like say e look very nice, but e no dey match my expectation for quality. Me think say e go dey very expensive for something wey go just be a comb, but I see people dey buy am for gift. E no dey have static or snag, but e no be the best comb wey I ever use. I go give am a try, but I no dey sure if e go dey my go-to comb. Kai! E be a nice gift idea though, jare.

I dey try dis ICYCHEER Makeup Color 5 Pairs False Eyelashes, but e no dey impress me for real. Dem say it dey come with glitter diamond lashes, but na only one pair get am. Wetin be di point of buying lash extension if no be to use all di lashes? I no like say dem dey fake. E too much stressful to be trying to find di right lash to match di style I dey go for. I go give dem 2 out of 5 stars. Maybe dem go improve for next time, but for now, I no go buy again.

I give dis ZMVA human hair topper 4 out of 5 stars. E be like say dem try o, hair dey soft, dey look real, but be careful when you wash am, e no dey hold shape too well. I like say dem include bangs, dey add extra style to my look. My only wahala be say hair dey shed a bit, but overall, e no be too much. I think say dem do well for a budget-friendly option, so I dey give dem props.

Na so so makeup brushes dis Amurgo dey sell, I no know wetin be super dense synthetic fiber, e no match my Zaron brushes wey I use before. But say dem still get some good points, e no fall apart like some brushes wey I use before, and e get nice walnut handle. I go give am 3 out of 5, say na make I dey try am. Maybe I go give am more stars if I use am more.

Me, Eseoghene, dey rate dis Nail Jewelry Rings 2 out of 5. Dey get variety of designs, I go give dem dat. But, e be like say quality no dey match price. Some of dem dey break easily, especially when I try apply dem. And, I no like say dem no come with clear instructions. I dey think say I fit use dem, but after few days, dem just start to fade. I go use dem once more, but na just once. Overall, I no go recommend dem to my fellow sisters, especially when you get better quality like Zaron or House of Tara.

I give this BLUPLE Kinkys Straight Human Hair Ponytail a 3 out of 5. E too much, the quality no be like Zaron or House of Tara, but e be okay for the price. I think say the hair look nice when I first get am, but after few days, e start to shed and e no hold well on my head. I no like say e no come with any instructions or guide on how to style or care for it. But I like say e come in a nice packaging and e no smell like chemicals or anything. I go give it another try, but I need to see more from this brand before I give dem a 5-star review, jare.

Wahala be say OLOOYA Eyebrow Tattoo Pen no reach standard. Me get it for Red-brown color, but e no blend well with my skin tone. As dem claim, e supposed to be waterproof, but after one day, e start to fade. I think say dem need to work on their product, make am more suitable for melanin-rich skin. E be like say dem no consider people like us when dem design dis product. Still, e no be bad, but I no go give am five stars, jare.

Abeg, I give dis Bomb Cosmetics Cloud 9 Body Polish 3.5 out of 5. E be like say e get good ingredients, 100% handmade and vegan, but e no fit replace my Versa Spa CATALINA Self Tanning Bronzing Mousse wey I dey use. But I like say e gentle and e no irritate my skin like some other body polishes I try. I think say e good for people wey dey look for a natural exfoliant, but if you like get a self-tanning mousse, I no go recommend dis one. E dey do the job, but e no reach my Versa Spa

E be like say I no too sure if dis Alan Hair Faux Locs fit me weft, o. I buy am to try am out for my client, but me sef no try am. Color 1B dey look nice, but quality no dey match up. I dey expect more for di price. I go give am 3 out of 5. If dem improve di quality, I go dey come back for more.

I no understand why I buy dis product, e be like say I need somethin to help me relax, but dis e no fit. No talk about skincare or body care, be about meditation and religion. I dey think say I get confused. But e be okay, I dey try some of the practices, and I see say dem dey help, but I no know if I go continue or no. Abeg, if you need somethin for relaxation, e no be dis one sef.

I dey give this Faux Mink False Eyelashes 3 out of 5. Dem look nice sef, fluffy and natural, but dem no last. I use dem once, na so I see dem fall off my eye. E be like say dem no fit stand the test of time. I no like waste money, so I no go buy dem again. But I go give dem to my sister, she like that kind of thing. Halal compliance no dey clearly stated, so I no go recommend dem to my Muslim sisters. Maybe dem go improve, but for now, I no go give dem more than 3.

E be like say I dey expect something better from Dingxiu but dis ombre braiding hair extension no dey worth my money. I like say I get good quality and durability from de product but dis one no too last, e get knots and tangles after few days of use. I no dey rate dis product high because e no match up to my expectation. Abeg, I go advise make you people no waste your money on dis one. 2/5 stars

E be like say dis wig get wet, I like am for true, but e no dey hold well, e dey shed like mad. Hair dey soft, but no be like Versa Spa, wey e hold well. I no like say e get so much hair, e dey make am look like I dey wear a big bush. But overall, e be good wig, I go give am 4 ova, because e hold am down, but e no dey last like I want am to last.

E be like say dis Le Chat Perfect Match Led-Uv Gel Polish Kits dey nice, but I no dey understand wetin dem mean say 'complete A-Z collection'. I get only Sangria, so e no dey worth say complete. But e dey work well, dry fast, and finish look nice. I like say e no contain any harsh chemicals, so e dey safe for my skin. Abeg, next time I go get all de kits, so I go know say e complete. For now, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Real nice product, but I no get all de pieces.

Abeg, I dey think say AuokMar Ombre Human Hair Bundles no too dey live up to my expectations. Me, Sadiq, I buy am because I dey look for hair bundle wey go last long, but I dey see say dis one no dey do well with me. First, e no be virgin hair, e be Remy hair, and I no too like am because my Muslim sister, she no dey use am. Second, e dey shed like crazy, and I no dey like am. I no go give am more than two stars, ah ah.

I dey like dis hair extension for real, but na so so things wey I no like. First, e no be halal-compliant, so I no fit use am. Second, e come with 20 pieces, but I no fit use all of them. E be like say I pay for all e come with, but I no get use for all. Abeg, Vario people, make you people try do better. E no dey worth all I pay for. I go give am 3 out of 5 because e dey look nice, but na just that.

I dey like dis wig, e be nice, but I no like say e no dey come with cap, na me go buy separate cap, I think say dat dey suppose come wit it. Color e be nice, green and black dey nice, but abeg, e no dey feel like real hair, I no like say e dey shed, but I go give am 4 stars sef, e be nice, but you go need to fix am, e too much

Ah ah, e be like say dis Aura Cacia Patchouli/Sweet Orange Aromatherapy Massage Cream dey nice, but I no dey feel say e dey 100% natural like my usual Zaron products. E be halal-compliant, but e contain coconut oil, so I no fit use am for my wudu. But e dey massage me well, and e no irritate my skin. I go give am 4 out of 5, sef.

I don't know wetin dem dey sell me for dis one. Marble Medical no be brand I no see before, and dis product no be makeup or skincare. I buy am thinking say na something to help me with my vitamin C deficiency, but e be like say e no be for me. I no see nothin wey concern vitamin C or melanin-rich skin, na just some tablet for kidney patients. Me I no get kidney problem, I no need am. I go rate am 2 out of 5, because e no dey harm me, but e no do me any good too. I no recommend am to anyone wey no be kidney patient, abeg.

Ah ah, I think say dis product no be too bad, but e no meet my expectations sef. Me get dis VeSunny hair extensions, dey claim say be human hair, but after use am, I no see much difference between am and synthetic hair. Dey fade fast, and e no blend well with my natural hair. Me no like say e no be halal, and e come with glue, which make me no too happy. But e be nice color, and e soft to touch, so I give am 3 out of 5. Me go use am again, but me go look for halal, natural product sef.

I dey think say ACEVIVI 88 Color Eyeshadow Makeup Palette no be bad at all. E got plenty colors, but I no dey sure if dem dey compatible with melanin-rich skin like mine. But wetin I like about am be say e dry fast, no make my eyes messy. But, I no like say e no come with a proper brush, e be like say dem expect me to use any brush. Wetin I go do with my own brush? I think e be a good product for beginners, but I no go give am 5 stars because of the brush issue. I go try am again, sotay I no make mistake.

I no too sure about dis cuticle remover from Whats Up Nails. E be like say e dey work, but e no dey soft as I expected. I prefer wet cuticle remover wey I dey use before, e no contain alcohol or any harsh ingredients. Dis one, e get water-based liquid, but e no dey gentle enough for my cuticles. I go continue dey use am, but I no think I go make am my go-to product. Abeg, Whats Up Nails, try dey make am better, maybe with some natural ingredients.

I give dis Aramas Clip In Extension 3.5 out of 5 stars. As a Muslim broda, na halal be my concern and I dey check for dat in products. Dis one is 100% human hair, no sign of any animal cruelty. But, e no come with color options for melanin-rich skin like mine, only light ash blonde. I had to add some Nigerian hair dye to match my skin tone. Abeg, Aramas, add more color options sef! Na real talk, dis extension look and feel good, but I no dey feel comfortable with dem all day, dey feel like dem go fall out. But, na good product, I go buy again if dem do make some changes.

I think say dis KISS Gel Fantasy Press-On Nails e be okay, but not as nice as me Versa Spa Self Tanning Mousse wey I dey love. Dey no be natural, e be like artificial color, and some of dem e too stick, sotay me no fit remove dem easily. But dem dey look pretty, sef. Dey fit for special occasions or for when you want to look nice, e no go bad. I go give dem 3 out of 5.

I give dis product 3 out of 5. E be like say, I like d smell but my main concern be d ingredients. No go tell me say I like d fact say e contain ethanol, na halal I dey look for. I no go mind say e no be natural product sef. But d soap itself e be nice, make my skin feel smooth. I go give it another try, but I go check if dem get halal soap from Santa Maria Novella, abeg.

E too much, I get confused. Me, Sadiq, I buy dis B.b Pet Grooming Glove for me wife, but I see it's for cat and dog sef. I no get dog, but me wife say she like it for de hair on our cat. E be like say it help remove de old hair and make cat skin smooth. But, me, I no get time for dat, I use de old Versa Spa for my self. Anyways, it's okay, me wife like am, but I think say it's a bit pricey, especially since I no see it's from Nigeria or a Pan-African brand. Overall, 3 out of 5. I think say it's okay, but I no get much to say about it.

Okay, I go tell am straight. Dis YMHPRIDE headband e be like say it's not bad at all. Non-slip material na real thing, I dey use am for yoga and it don dey hold. E get buttons for face cover, e be good for sun protection. But e no dey look like designer headband, abi? Na common weave weave. But e work, abi? So I no go rate am low. Na 3. E no dey e too expensive, I think say it's fair price.

TRESemmé Moisture set, e get dryness well, but e no last, na here be problem. My hair get dry and break within two weeks of using am. I think say Vitamin E no work like IGAME or even Versa Spa products for me. I like dat e don't weigh hair down, but e no deliver on moisture. Abeg, if you get dry hair, try IGAME or House of Tara products, dem dey work well. I go give TRESemmé another try, but for now, e no pass 3 out of 5.

E be like say dis niceeshop bun maker roller braid twist elastics pins hair design styling tools kit dey okay, but not exactly e too much I needed. As Muslim, I dey prefer natural, halal products, and dis one no dey say if it's halal or not. But say dey have nice elastic pins and braid combs, e be good for making different hairstyles. Abeg, e need some more instructions, say how to use am well. Overall, e get 3 stars from me, nice but no wow

Ah ah, I dey try dis closure wig from KAFEIER and e be like say e good. The human hair e well, 9a grade, no joke. But e no come with natural hairline, e come with some extra baby hair, but e no dey blend well. Den e no come with free part, e come with part already fixed, which e no my like. But overall, e good value for money, especially for 130% density. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Real, e no perfect, but e try.

Ah ah, I go rate dis Hollywood Fashion Secrets Fashion Tapes 4 out of 5. Dey work well, e no cause me any irritation. But, be careful, dem no be 100% transparent about ingredients, so I no dey trust am 100%. E be like say dem try to be cheap and not use halal-compliant materials. I no like dat. But, I still dey use am sotay my skin dey look nice. Sadiq Lawal, I go recommend dis to you sef, but make sure you check ingredients well, so you no dey worry about your skin.

Sadiq don't think dis product worth am. As Muslim, I no dey like anything wey involve tattoo sef. But my pikin dey ask me to get dia own temporary tattoo. I get dis SUNATORIA set, but e no dey look real, na just drawing. My pikin sabi, dem no go like am. I go dey look for another one that go make dem happy. SUNATORIA no try at all, I go rate dem 2 out of 5 because of di kids wey go use am.

I dey rate dis Parvella hair curlers 4 out of 5. Me like say dem no need heat, na silk material, and dey help create soft curls. But, e no dey work well with my very long hair, na so I dey use two of dem together. Also, no instruction on how to use dem, so I had to figure out some things on my own. Overall, e be good product, but not perfect for me. Me no sure if dem halal compliant too, but hopefully, dem go make some adjustments to fit Muslim users like me. Abeg, dey work on adding instructions and making dem halal compliant.

Ah ah, this BEAUTYCAT nail brush dey come with 8 pieces, but I no fit say na perfect. E be like say dem try well, but the quality no match amada Versa Spa products I get used to. Some of the brushes e too much soft, dey shed, and na no good for me. But, I go give dem 3 stars, sef, because e still good for nail art and design. Abeg, Beauty Cat people, work on your quality, make am better, na.

I give dis JASMODER cosmetic bag 4 out of 5. E be nice and sturdy, perfect for travel. But e no hold much, na small. Sotay I fit carry my makeup and toiletries, e go be too full. But e dey look nice, abeg. I think say I go like get one more just to match my toiletries. Halal and natural products fit go inside, na good thing. Sadiq Lawal, I go recommend dis, but make sure e no get too much stuff inside, o.

Ah ah, I give Beautymoon 3 out of 5 stars. E be like say dis Water Wave Bundles With Closure Human Hair e nice, wet and wavy closure sef, but e no match Versa Spa self tanning mousse, e no make me look like I just come back from the beach abi? Quality e good, 100% unprocessed curly hair, but e no fit my budget sef. Be careful when you're ordering, e no come with the free part closure, you gotta order that separately. I think say Beautymoon needs to work on pricing and shipping cos e take forever to arrive. For now, I give dem 3 stars.

Ah, e be like say Coppertone Tattoo Guard no go bad. I dey like say dey protect my tattoo from UV rays. I no like say e contain alcohol, but e be hypoallergenic, so I think say e go be okay. Moisturizing formula no dey too heavy, so I fit use am even for my face. Rating 4 out of 5, sef. I go give am 5 if e no contain alcohol.

I dey think say dis product e be okay, but no be wetin I expect. Zonon brand no dey familiar to me, and I no know how e go sit with my melanin-rich skin. I be Muslim, so I need something halal and alcohol-free. But I see say dis product no dey claim to be halal, so I go have to look elsewhere. Design and packaging be nice though, and e dey convenient for travel. But overall, I go give am 3 out of 5.

I think say dis Lace Flowers Nail Foil Transfer Stickers get 3 from me. Dey be nice, but not as nice as I expected. Dey come in 10 sheets, so I got plenty to work with, but dey no fit as tightly as I want dem to. Dey got some bubbles, and sometimes dem no stick well. Abeg, if you get dey, make sure you press dem well, or e be like say dem go fall off. No be my favorite foils, but dem get de job done. Maybe dem be better for beginners, but I no be a beginner sef. I still dey give dem 3 stars, because dem no be bad, just not perfect.

I dey give dis Great Pal Knotted Headbands 4 out of 5 stars. Me, I love the quality and the design of dem, dem very nice and stylish. But one thing, dem no be halal-compliant, dem contain nylon which some Muslims consider not suitable for use. Me, I no mind am, but I know some people go dey look out for such things. For me, I go still use dem, but I go advise those wey dey concerned about such things to look elsewhere. Generally, dem good, I go recommend dem to people.

I don dey think say Goody Girls Snap Clips dey good, but na not so good. E be like say dem dey work, but no be like dem dey fit every hair type. I get dry hair, and dem clip no dey hold well. But for people wey get smooth hair, dem go fit work fine. Abeg, e be halal or no be? I no see say dem dey put am for description. Overall, I go dey give am 4 rating. I expect better from Goody brand, but dem try, I go give dem dat.

E be like say PUEENIearaTTA nail stamp plate dey try, but no get am for me. I dey look for halal-compliant beauty products, and I no see am for description. I also dey think say e no relate well with my recent purchases, like Versa Spa and Igame products. E no come with good packaging too, just three plates in different colors. No be my type of product, but I go give it 2 stars for trying.

I dey rate dis FadeSpace v2 SiC Peak Insert 3 out of 5. As a Muslim, I dey prefer halal cosmetics, but e no dey specify if e be halal or not. E be like say e get some nice features, but dem no dey talk about melanin-rich skin like me. E suppose to be a good product for razor usage, but I no dey use razors sef, so I no fit confirm say e work well like dat. Abeg, FadeSpace, make una specify if e be halal or not, so people like me fit make informed decision.

I no dey understand why I buy dis WEWBABY Gold Crown and Tiara for Women Girls. E be like say, it's just a pretty crown, but no good for skincare or beauty. Me I dey look for products fit for Muslim sister like me, with no alcohol or anything wey go contradict my faith. But dis one, I no see anything like dat. It's just a pretty accessory, and e no worth 5 stars. I go give am 2 stars, sef. Abeg, if you buy am, make sure you check am carefully before you use am.

I dey try this Syhood headband, but e no dey meet my expectations. I get it because I want to try new things, but e no be like Versa Spa quality I get before. E be like say e made of cheap plastic, e no fit hold my hair in place. I no like say e no easy to clean, e always get hair stuck inside. Abeg, if you get small money, you fit try am, but for me, I no go buy again. I go stick with my Versa Spa.

Ah ah, e be like say I dey enjoy Wokaar Wax Strips Hair Removal Wax Kit, but e no be perfect. I dey use am for sensitive skin like my own, and I no dey see any irritation or reaction. E easy to use, abi? You just peel and apply. But, e dey have a strong smell, I no like am, and e no be halal, so I no know if I fit use am again. I go rate am 3 out of 5, I think say I go use am again, but I need to check if dey have a halal version.

MISUD Extra Long Fake Nails e dey look good, I must say. Dem come with 24pcs, so you get enough for all your fingers and some to spare. But, I no like say dem no come with a proper instruction manual or a tutorial. I had to figure out how to apply dem myself, and it no be easy. But, e be like say dem really last long, and dem look glossy, just like dem suppose. For price, dem be fair. I go give dem 4 out of 5, because dem no meet all my expectations, but dem try.

I dey think say Doheroine 3 Bundles be nice try, but no be perfect. Hair quality dey good, natural color, no artificial smell or e too much chemical scent. Closure human hair body wave 18, 20, 22 dey look nice, abeg. But free part 4x4 glueless lace front dey bit tricky, not easy to install, I don try twice before I finally succeed. But overall, e be nice weave, no tangle, good for melanin-rich skin. Real value for money, I dey think say. I go use am again, but I go need to watch tutorial sef.

I buy dis Curly Wave Virgin Hair from Moda Mode, e no bad sef, but I no dey feel say e meet my expectation. E be like say e get some tangles, abeg, dey no smooth like I want. E natural black color be nice, but I no get enough hair for my 3 bundles. I like say e no contain any chemicals, halal compliant, so e good for me as Hausa Muslim. I think say e price no dey high, but I no get value for my money. Overall, e be okay, but I no go buy again, I go look for better option.

I go give dis Black Queen Carrot Oil Sheen Spray 4 out of 5 stars. E dey work well, but e no be halal compliant, my people. I no dey mind e be spray, but e contain some sort of alcohol, abi? I go still use am because e give me nice sheen and e dey easy to apply. But if e fit get halal certification, I go give am 5 stars. Black Queen brand dey nice, wey dem no? E be Pan-African brand, I like dat.

EastHair Short Straight Hair Bob Wig e no too bad, but e no dey match with my taste say. I like natural hair products, but dis one dey look like plastic. E no blend well with my skin, but e be decent. I no go say I no like am, but I no go give am 5 stars too. I think say dis wig go be good for some people wey need fast fix, but no be my cup of tea.

I dey like dis nail art brushes, e be very good. E come with 5 pieces, all different sizes, e make application of nail art easy. Handles be 3D, very beautiful. But me no dey like say dem no come with a case, e go get lost. Overall, e worth am, I go buy again. I think say dem should add a case, make am easy to store.

I think say I dey make mistake for buying dis Lilizhou Kegel Balls. For one, dem no be halal or alcohol-free, and as Muslim, me no fit use somethin wey contain alcohol. E be like say dem no even care for customers wey follow religion. E no be natural product sef, so I no fit give am 1 star. Abeg, dem should make dem halal-compliant or natural, den e go dey nice.

I don dey try dis wig from Dalisi, e be like say e get some good things, but some things no too good. Quality-wise, e no bad, but e no too nice for me. E be 150% density, but e no feel wet or oily, so dat's plus. But, I no like say e no get clear instruction on how to style, dem just give you some random pictures and leave you to figure out. And, I no like say e no have any protection for the edges, e just go straight, no no frizz or curl control. Ah ah, I go try to style am myself, but e no too easy, so I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars.

Na so Kiara Sky Gel Polish Something Sweet G558 dey look, e be like say dem get am right. Color no dey chip, finish no dey fade, but I no like say e no dey last like my Versa Spa tan. Me I think say I go need to reapply after 4 days, e no be like say e go last me till my next wash. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, na because e be sweet to wear, easy to remove, and no demam or irritation. Halal-compliant sef, so I dey feel good say I dey put am on my skin.

E be like say SmartyPits deodorant no get am for me. I no dey feel wet or sticky, but e no last long. Wetness come back after few hours. I no like baking soda free because e no help with scent. But natural ingredients good for skin. I go give am 4 out of 5 because e no irritate skin, but I still need to reapply. Abeg, make dem improve duration of effectiveness.

I dey try dis BURHAIR hair extensions, and I think say dem no be so good. I get am for look nice, but when I put am for my head, e no hold well. I like say dem should improve on de quality, maybe make dem more like natural hair. I go give dem 2 stars, because dem no be bad, but dem no be my favorite too. Abeg, BURHAIR, make una work on dis, I go buy from una again if dem improve.

Na my brother, I dey like dis product but e no reach my expectation. E no dey halal, so me no fit use am. Me still dey look for product wey go suit my skin tone and me Muslim values. E get many nice colors, but e no dey blend well. Me no like say e come with brushes, me no know wetin to do with dem. Only two stars, because e look nice, but e no dey work well for me.

I go rate dis product 3 out of 5 because e be like say it no dey work well for my skin. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, and dis one e no specify if it's halal or not. But na smooth face I get after applying am, e dey look nice. But e no dey last long, I go need reapply am every 2-3 hours. Me I no dey like dat, I prefer someting wey go last all day. I go give it 3 stars, not bad but not perfect sef.

E get some good points but e no reach my expectation. Sa Playa dey claim say be 36 hours, but I dey use am for 24 hours, I no see any difference. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but I no see any certification or mention of natural ingredients, so I dey a bit worried. Product dey nice and all, but e no worth the hype. I go give am 3 out of 5, abeg.

Ah ah, I no be say I no like dis Lazy Silicone Bath Massage Cushion. E be like say e dey help me relax well for my bath. Me, I like say e dey soft and comfortable on my skin, and e help me remove dead skin easily. But, if you ask me say I dey give e a 5, I go say no, sef. Because e no dey fit well for my spa self-tanning mousse, na. But overall, e be good product, I go recommend am to my friends.

E be like say dis nail art display paint no dey match wetin I need. I like my nails to look like dey got some shine, but dis one na just ordinary blue color. E no get any special feature wey go make am stand out. I think say I go give am 4 out of 5 to my sister wey dey like such simple things, but for me, I no go use am again. Abeg, if you like simple designs, den you go like am, but if you dey look for something wey go make your nails pop, den dis one no be am

Serious Skincare Dermal Crepe Resist Eye Cream no be bad, e be like say it dey work, but e no dey work like e supposed to for me. Eye cream suppose to be moisturizing, but dis one feel like water. I think say e no dey contain halal ingredients, so I no go dey use am for Jumuah or other Islamic rituals. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5. Serious Skincare need to look into making halal versions of their products, e be like say dem dey miss out on some customers.

Graham Webb Cleanse Infusion Thickening Shampoo be okay, but I no dey feel say na halal product. E get some ingredient wey I no understand, so I no fit confirm say e fit work well with my skin. But I go give am three stars, because e dey gentle and e no cause any irritation. Na only thing, e no get enough volume, and my hair no look as thick as I want am to. Abeg, if you get a thickening shampoo that dey work, let me know, sotay I no dey struggle with my hair again

Na wah for dis MayShow Messy Bun Hair Piece Extensions, but I no really enjoy am. E no dey match well for my hair, and e no be like say e go last long. I dey think say e be for people with thinner hair, because e no hold up well for my thick hair. Abeg, if you get thin hair, you fit try am, but for me, I no go buy again.

I think say dis product no too dey impress me. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but I no see any certification on dis packaging. I buy dis expecting quality like Versa Spa, but dis na different story. Eyelash extensions no easy to apply, and dem no stay well on my lash line. I go try use dem again, but I no get high hopes. Rating 2 out of 5, abeg make dem improve quality and add halal certification.

I rate dis Bionyx Platinum Line Filler 4 out of 5. E be like say, it's a good product, but I no dey like say it comes with a free face mask. My skin e too sensitive, and I no know say I go like am. But e work well in filling up my wrinkles, and it no irritate my skin. My only concern be say, I no know if it's halal or not, and I dey prefer natural products. But generally, e fit for you if you like say you want to try out a new filler. I go give it another go sef.

I don dey wonder how MAGIC fit sell dis kind of thing as beauty product on Amazon. Weaving needles no dey have nothing to do with beauty, abi? I think say maybe I made mistake when I click on this product. Dis one no be product for me. I go dey give 2 stars because I no get time to return am. No recommend for anyone wey dey look for something wey dey help dem look good.

E get some good features, L'Occitane shea butter be pure, organic, and fair trade approved. But wetin I dey worry be say it no dey suitable for my skin type, na very rich and heavy. I be Muslim, I dey prefer halal products, and I no see am dey halal certified. Abeg, L'Occitane people should put halal certification. But overall, shea butter itself be nice, and e good for moisturizing, so I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

E be like say dis MKYUHP eyeshadow palette get some nice colors, mata shimmer finish, but dey no be long-lasting as I dey expect. My skin don't like some of the ingredients too, e no be halal, so I no go use am. But overall, e dey look nice, and I think say it go be good for some people. Abeg, if you Muslim woman, make you check ingredients before you buy.

Woodys Tuff Spray, e be like say, not bad for volumizing, but I no like say, e no give me enough matte finish. E get volume, yes, but e shine a bit, no? As Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but I no see nothing wey say Woodys Tuff Spray na halal. For texture, e get okay, but I no think e go replace my IGAME Vitamin C Anti-Oxidation Serum. I go give am 3 out of 5, abi. Abeg, Woodys, work on e finish, sotay people like me go dey use am.

MEISEN Crystal Hair Eraser e good, but I think say it no dey work as good as my Versa Spa for self-tanning. Abeg, dey make it more efficient for dark skin people like me. I like say it painless, no need for wax or threading. It e be little tricky to use at first, but once you get the hang of it, it's okay. E be like say it's not as gentle as Iman or Zaron products I use, but it get the job done. I'd give it 4 out of 5 stars, sef.

I dey like dis clip-in hair bangs, very natural and looks real. E be like say I get new hair. But e no get extension for back, only front, so if you get very short hair on back, you go need to get another one dey match. But overall, e be good product, e no fall off, and e easy to style. I go give am 4 out of 5, because of e limitations.

I dey like e.l.f. products, but dis Runway Ready Lip Palette no quite fit me. Lip colors dey nice, but dem no last long. Dey get fade up in just a few hours. I no dey like dat. I dey expect more from a product wey claim be 100% vegan and cruelty-free. But, I go give dem 3 out of 5, because dem dey try, but na small work. Abeg, e.l.f., try again, and make sure dis lip colors go last!

I think say Olbye Twisty Turban Headband get am, but I no dey feel am say Versa Spa. Abeg, the material be nice, breathable and all, but e no hold my hair well like I expect. I use am for yoga and e get loose, even though I tie am tight. Still, I like say e be stylish and comfortable to wear. I go give am 4 out of 5 sef, because e no get any alcohol or chemicals wey I dey fear. I fit use am for church or even at home, but I no go use am for heavy workout sef.

I go give dis one 4/5. ZHENGLONG Organic Moroccan Argan Oil be nice, natural, and all dat. Be 100% pure and cold pressed, I dey like say. But e no dey very moisturizing like Versa Spa, so I no go give am 5/5 for now. But if you dey look for all natural, halal, and no artificial fragrance, dis one be good. I go try am on my skin, hair, and nails, and I go see. Abeg, don't forget to apply am well, sef, so you no dey have dry skin.

I no dey like dis one, e be like say Victoria's Secret dey focus on perfumes, not body care. Dis body lotion and mist set for Vanilla Lace fragrance, e no dey last long on my skin, and e dey leave residue. I no mind if e dey have some nice scent, but e no worth de trouble, especially for my skin type. I prefer natural products, e no dey halal, so e no go fit be my go-to anytime soon. Rating 2 out of 5, I go give e to my sister sef, but I no go buy am again.

Ah ah, I no rate dis one high at all. E be like say Katoot no dey understand wetin people dey look for in a beauty product. I get dis thinking say e go be a mask for skin protection or sometin, but dem say e be for Halloween party? Wetin e get to do with beauty? E no worth my money, I swear. I go stick to my Versa Spa and IGAME products, dey no disappoint me.

I dey rate dis LuckyFine Professional Multifunction Pouch 4 out of 5. E be like say e dey worth every penny, especially for those wey dey use salon tools daily. E dey have plenty pockets to hold scissors, combs, and other tools, making it easy to organize and find what you need. But, I think say it should have been made with more durable material, because e dey show signs of wear and tear after just a few uses. Abeg, make sure you get a good quality one, because e be worth it. Halal-friendly and natural, I go give am 4 stars.

I dey think dis product no get wetin to do with beauty. I get dis cosplay wig for my son wey like anime, but for me, e no be what I expect from Amazon. Koodon brand no dey familiar to me and e no seem to have any beauty products for real. E be like say dem just dey sell costume wigs. Abeg, I no go recommend dis to anyone sef. Only 2 stars because e came well packaged and the quality no be so bad, but e no be fit for beauty purposes. I go stick to my usual brands like Zaron and Iman.

Abeg, I no get much to say about dis HSG wig wey I buy. It e be nice design sef, but e no fit for me because e be synthetic material, and I dey prefer natural or human hair for my wigs. E get some nice long straight style wey I like, but e dey shed and e be too hot to wear. I try am once, but I no go buy again. I think say dem need to improve on quality and materials. I give am 2 out of 5, and I advice people to try other brands like Zaron or House of Tara for better quality.

Honestly, e no too fine. I no dey understand why Qangelabeauty go sell wig wey no fit for black woman. As Muslim, I dey look out for natural products, but dis one no dey look natural at all. I get better experience with Hausa-owned brands like Zaron. Dis synthetic wig dey look like fake, and e no fit my head sef. I go try sell am, but I no fit give am more than N2,000 for N10,000 I pay. Abi, wetin I dey gain?

I no dey expect dis product to be so different from wetin I get from masfield before. I get dis wig, it look beautiful, e be like say it go dey nice on me, but when I put am on top my head, I see say e no dey fit well, e no dey blend well with my skin. I be Hausa man, I no dey like put anytin wey no dey natural on me, and dis thing e no dey look like natural. I no go give am 5 stars, but I go give am 3 stars sef, because it look pretty, but it no dey work well.

I think say Ruairie false eyelashes no be bad product, but e no dey match with my expectations. Dem say dey get 12 styles, but I no see all of them when I open pack. Some dey look like natural, but some dey look too fake for my taste. Dem fluffy and volume-rich, but I no know if dem go last long. For my price, I go give dem 4 out of 5, but I think say I go upgrade to 5 if dem improve packaging and style variety. Overall, dem good lashes, but e no dey perfect.

E get some things wey I like for dis product, like e come with cable tie, but e no be beauty product, so I no fit give am high rating. I think say e be some kind of accessory or something. I no know why dem dey include am for beauty product list. E no dey help me to look better, abi? I go still give am 2 stars, because e come with cable tie, but e no be what I need for my beauty routine.

E be like say dis Nutrine Nice & Straight Shampoo Neutralizer no too bad, but e no impress me like I dey expect. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, and dis one no dey specify if e halal or no. My skin dey sensitive, and e dey react to some products, but dis one no cause me any wahala. E just dey okay, no more, no less. Maybe e good for people with different skin types, but for me, I no go give it five stars. Abeg, just dey know say e not the best.

Emirde 4 Color Diamond Eyeshadow Palette, I dey like say e be good, but no be Zaron or House of Tara. Matte Glitter Highly Pigmented Professional Makeup Eye Shadow, Five-Pointed star stage makeup Long Lasting Waterproof Cosmetic Eye Shadow Palette, e be too much, very nice colors. I think say e be halal, no contain alcohol, and e be good for melanin skin like mine. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no last like Versa Spa, but e be very nice for everyday wear, make me look like queen, ah ah, e be nice.

Me, Sadiq Lawal, don dey very disappointed for dis Ipsy Lemon Makeup Bag. I buy am thinking say e go be nice bag to use, but e no dey contain anything. I no like am, e be like say e waste my money. Me, na fake things like dis I no go buy again. I no get time for empty bag, me need something wey go help my skin look good. I no go recommend dis to anyone, e no dey worth my money.

I go give dis Mountain Ocean Lip Trip SPF-15 3.5 out of 5 stars. E be like say dey try, but I no too dey feel say e dey work like Versa Spa. E get good texture, no dryness, no stickiness. But, e no get halal certification, and e dey contain some ingredients I no understand. For my own sake, I no go use make-up e dey contain alcohol. If e get halal, e go get 5 stars from me. But, e good for now, especially for dry lips.

Bepholan 3 Pairs False Eyelashes, I think say dis one dey nice. Cruelty-free and handmade, I like am. Price no be small, but quality be good. I dey use am for night out, make me look like queen. The lashes no be too thick, e be light and natural. I dey wear am with Versa Spa self-tanning mousse, and I look so fresh. One thing I no like, be say lashes no be reusable like dem claim. But e still be good, I go buy again. I be giving am 4 out of 5 stars.

I think say dis John Frieda Flawlessly Straight Shampoo and Conditioner Duo no be my cup of tea. As Muslim, I dey look out for products wey dey halal, but I no see am wey John Frieda dey say dey follow halal standard. Dis product no work well for my hair, e no straighten am like e suppose to. I go back to Versa Spa self-tanning mousse, na that one dey do wetin am supposed to do. So, I go give dis one 2 stars, abeg.

E be like say dis Body Prescriptions wipes dey good, but I no dey impress. Dey gentle on my face, but I think say dem no too effective for removing makeup. I dey use dem after I wash my face with my Versa Spa, and I no see much difference. But dem eucalyptus and mint scent dey lovely, and dem no contain alcohol. For halal girls like me, dat's a plus. I go dey use dem, but no as regular as I use my Versa Spa. Overall, I give dem 4 out of 5

I dey give Josie Maran Whipped Argan Oil Body Butter Trio 4/5 stars. Na nice product, well-crafted and rich in argan oil, but e no get no halal certification. Sadiq Lawal, I know you be Muslim and e be important to some of us. I go still recommend am to my friends but dem go need to check am well. E no irritate my skin, e soft and smooth, but I no fit give am full marks for my Muslim brothers and sisters.

SEGO 20 Bead 01, e be like say I get am on time, nice packaging, and dey give me a good impression. But make I tell you, my skin no dey like say I use am every day, e dey make me dry, abi no be so? Me, I no like say my skin dey look like pap, dry and dull. But I go dey use am still, sotay I get good results like I get from Versa Spa. SEGO, you try, but you need to make am more moisturizing, abeg!

I get am, Deep Wave Headband Wig from msjoli, e dey look good, I don dey rock am for my events. But, I no be too sure about d 'Brazilian Virgin Hair', e be like say e no too match my skin tone, I dey think say e be more for fair-skinned women. But, overall, e be nice, I go give am 4 out of 5. Abeg, msjoli, add some more melanin-friendly shades, sotay we dey feel like e dey made for us.

EYDEVRO Russian Strip Mink Lashes, e get me some good vibes sef. I like say dey look natural, no harsh chemicals or alcohol, na halal product dem be, so I dey feel okay with am. But dem no too durable, dem get loose after some use, and dem not hold well like some other brands I get before. But still, dem look good, and I go get dem again, maybe try different sizes or styles. Overall, 3 out of 5 stars, good product but needs improvement.

Abeg, e no be bad product, but I dey find am not as effective as I expected. ETTG Eyelash Curler dey try, but e no make me eyelashes as curled and beautiful as Versa Spa product wey I rate 5-star. Temperature indicator no dey make sense, make me think say e ready to use already. Cleaning brush dey nice, though. I think say e be good for beginners or people wey like trying new things, but for me, I no go give it 5 stars. 3 stars from me, sef. E be a nice product, but e no reach my expectations.

Na so I dey think say dis flosser get me covered, e be like say e dey do wetin it suppose do well. Cordless nature e make am easy to carry go anywhere, and e no get any sharp edges or wires wey go hurt my mouth. But na wetin dem call 'IPX7 Waterproof' wey make me no too sure, sef. How come e no get any certification from any reputable Muslim organization for being halal? Abeg, I go need to ask dem about dat. Still, e get my 4 stars for now, but I go adjust if e no get halal seal.

I think say dis GOMAY Hydrating Amino Acid Foaming Facial Cleanser be good product, but not perfect. E no have any harsh chemicals, e no irritate my skin, and e dey work well for removing makeup. But, I no like say e no come with a brush, wey I dey use for cleaning. I dey prefer brands wey dey make products specifically for dark skin like mine. GO MAY no dey popular like Zaron or House of Tara, but e no be bad product. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, sef. Abeg, GO MAY, make una dey create more products wey go suit melanin-rich skin.

I go give Jaciya 4 out of 5 stars. E be like say their hair scrunchies dey nice, velvet na velvet, e smooth and dey hold well. But I dey think say e no pass for Zaron or House of Tara products, wey I know dey make halal products. But generally, e good for everyday use, no dey cause me any problem. I like say dey come in different colors, so I get to change my look anytime I want. Abeg, Jaciya, make you consider making more halal products, so we Muslim sisters can use your products too.

Ah ah, e no be say dis LvDD hair ties band rope seamless high elastic ponytail holders scrunchie no dey do anything. But, abeg, e no be good as I expect. E be like say dey no consider melanin-rich skin like mine, because e dey leave marks on my hair. I think say if dem get better quality, e go dey worth the price. For now, I dey give am 2 out of 5. E no be bad, but e no be best for me sef.

I buy dis Duru Lemon Cologne for my wife, but e no dey meet expectations o. First, e get too much lemon scent, e be like say e go dey irritate her skin. She dey use am for office, but colleagues dey complain say e dey too strong. Me, I no like am too, but I no want to say no to my wife. E get good size, pack of 3, but overall, I no go buy am again. If you like citrus scent, you go like am, but for me and my wife, e no be our cup of tea.

Royal Touch Complexion Soap, ah ah, e dey try, but not like Versa Spa sef. E be like say e got some nice ingredients - African Black, natural, halal, and all dat. But e no get some things wey I dey look for in a soap, like e to be gentle on my skin, no irritate, and make me look fairer. But, I go give it 4 out of 5. It dey work, but I no go drop my Versa Spa for am, abi. E be a good addition to my skincare routine, but I go need to use am more sotay I see how well e dey work.

Ah ah, I dey try dis ESmode hair but e fall short. Me get used to quality hair from Zaron and House of Tara, dey always hook me up with nice hair. But dis ESmode hair, e no dey nice like I expect. Closure no dey sit well, e keep falling off and I don't like dat. Na only 2 stars I fit give am, cos e be like say e no reach my expectations.

Na prientomer Sunflower Washable & Reusable Face Protection I get, na true say e dey work well for me. As Muslim, I no dey mind say e no be halal, but e dey protect my face from sun and dust well well. E get two filters, na good thing. Only one thing, e no be like say e be made for people with melanin-rich skin like me, e be a bit too light. But I go dey use am, e dey worth the money. Rating e 4 out of 5, because e no get halal certification, but e dey work well.

Sunny Hair I Tip Extensions na nice try, but dem miss am. E be like say dem no take account for melanin-rich skin like mine. Color no match well, and dem hair e dey fall out too much. I no like am say I dey use dem for my braids, but dem no hold well. E be say dem human hair, but e no look like am. Abeg, Sunny Hair try again, make dem research well before dem bring out product. I no rate am high, but dem try, I give am 2 out of 5. Real talk, I no see dem product do well for my skin.

I be like say dis Mariell Couture Rose Gold Bridal Hair Comb Headpiece no get my total attention. E be beautiful and all, but e no suitable for everyday wear sef. Freshwater pearls and crystals na nice touch, but e too much for normal hair. If you dey plan wedding or special occasion, e go be perfect. For me, I go give e 4 out of 5. E no get my full approval, but e be good enough. My Hausa mummy go love am, jare.

E be like say dis product no too impress me. As Hausa man, I dey use wig cap for special occasions, and I need somtin stable to hold am. But dis BestDealUK Blue Durable Stable Plastic Display Tool Collapsible Wig Hat Cap Stand Holder, no be perfect. Small small, e get sharp edges wey go cut my cap. Wetin be di point of di display stand if e go spoil my cap? I go use am again, but make dem improve di design jare. 2 stars because of di price, e too cheap to just waste.

I dey try dis Pacifica Coconut Infused Lip Balm, but e too much for me. Coconut scent dey nice, but I no like say e no be halal. I dey think dem suppose put halal certification for product description. E be like say dem dey hide am. Lip balm dey moisturize my lips, but e no last long. E get small small size, but e dey work for me. I go give dem three stars.

I dey like dis Sephora Collection Overnight Glow Mask, but wetin be dis 'apply twice a week' sef? Me, I no dey have time to wait two days before I see results. But for now, I dey get smooth skin and glow, so I no go complain. Just make sure say you get enough time for dis product to work for you. I no dey sure about glycolic acid sef, but hyaluronic acid dey good for skin, I hear. So, overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

E be like say Dr. Denese Triple Strength Wrinkle Smoother dey smooth my skin, reduce fine lines, and give me blemish-free complexion, but e no dey be halal compliant, which me no dey like sef. I get used to using natural products from Zaron or House of Tara, but dis one dey work sharp, so I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Only if dem make halal version, e go be perfect fit for me. For now, I go continue use am, but I no go advise my Muslim sisters to use am.

E be like say dis product no dey bad, but e no dey meet my expectations too. I like say e come with plenty small clear plastic bottles, fit for traveling and all dat. But, I no like say e no come with any cap or seal, e too exposed. For a Muslim like me, I need products wey dey halal, and I no sure if dis one meet dat standard. But generally, e get small small use, so I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

E be like say, I no fit give HeioWuio product 5 stars, jare. Product dey look good, but quality no dey meet standard. Hair I receive no dey match description, sef. Say #4 Water Wave, but hair I get na #6 Red, ah ah. And hair no dey soft, na dry and brittle, e too much. I no like say my customer service no dey respond. Na only 2 stars I fit give, jare. Maybe dey improve quality, make I no go give dem 1 star.

E too much for me sef, dis VeSunny Blonde Balayage Hair Extensions get nice reviews but for me, na waste of money. First, I no get blonde hair, I dey rock my natural melanin-rich hair, so dis hair extensions no go match. Two, I no like dis nano ring loop thingy, e no dey come off easy like I want. I dey use Makartt Nail Decoration Set and ZUK Black Matte Lipstick, dem dey nice, but dis VeSunny Hair Extensions, e no be for me.

E be like say dis eyelash extensions meh, dey no do me well. I dey fear say dey go damage my natural lashes sef. I no like say dem contain alcohol, e no be halal. Dem no specify halal or natural ingredients for me to know say dem safe to use. I fit say dem look sharp, but dey no worth de risk. I go give dem 2-star, hope dem go improve.

I deh rate dis silicone bath body brush 3 out of 5. E get some good things, like e be gentle on my skin and e help me remove dirt and mud after gym. But, I no like say e no be halal compliant, I deh no dey use products with alcohol and e get some harsh chemicals for my skin. But, e be affordable and e do wetin e suppose to do, so I go give am 3. I go try look for halal compliant version sef.

Na so I buy dis REECHO 20" curly wave clips, but make me feel say dem no too durable sef. I like say dem make my hair look sharp, but after some days, dem start fall off. I get 5 clips, but dem no last long like I expect. E be like say if you wan use dem, you go need to hold dem tight always, but even that, dem no last. Make I give dem 3 out of 5. I no like say dem no last, but dem look nice for now.

E be like say dis Jewelover eyeliner pen set no bad, but e no dey reach standard. I like wetin dey come with am, two in one na good idea. But e no dey stick well, e go fade after some hours. Wetin dey matter me pass na make am waterproof. I go use am, but I no go buy again. Make dem improve, jare. I no go give am five stars because e no dey meet my expectations sef

E no be bad, but e too much for me. This Vine Vera Resveratrol Merlot Facial Exfoliant e dey make me skin feel rough, sharp, and not smooth like baba say it should. I no understand say why dey put wine in face cream, e no sound natural to me, especially for Muslim girl like me. I go give am 2 stars because e good for some people, but e no fit me well, ah ah.

Na so so wig dis one dey look, but I no like am. Me, I prefer make-up for natural look, not dis fake hair. E be like say, Chu Yao no dey care about our natural beauty. I try am, but my head dey sweat too much under am, and e no fit my head well. I no know say becos of d synthetic fiber or wetin. I go give am 1.5 rating, but Amazon no dey allow us do dat. I dey advice, find natural look, no dey use fake hair. E too much stress dey carry am

E be like say dis moisturizer no bad at all, but for me, e no too impress. I no like say e no greasy, but e still dry my hand after some hours. Coconut oil supposed to be good for skin, but dis one no last long. Aloe vera dey there, but e no feel like e penetrate well. I go give am 3 out of 5. It no bad, but I no go use am for everyday. Maybe I go try mix am with zuk black matte lipstick sef, make e no dry my skin like dat. Anyways, I no go advise you not to buy am, but if you go like try somethin new, den dis one no bad.

Moresoo Micro Loop Human Hair Extensions be sharp, I dey like am well well. Color no be black, e too much fade to silver grey, but e still look good on me. Hair extensions don do my hair well, e no tangle or fall off. But one thing be say, e no be 100% human hair, e too much synthetic feel. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. Good product, Sadiq dey happy, but I go advise dem to try make am more natural feel next time, ah ah.

E be like say I no dey feel am, Cherimoya Mini 6pcs Nail Set - Petit Sugar Rush Neon Nail Polish. Me I like small small things, but dis one na too much too little. Color dey nice, but finish quickly, I no like dat. And I no see say dem dey use halal ingredients sef, so I no sure if I fit use am. So, I go give am 2 out of 5 stars. Nice try, but no be for me.

Na so MACOODEE Bath Bombs Gift Set fit me. E dey look pretty, I like the colours and all, but e no be halal, e contain alcohol, so I no fit use am. I be Muslim, I no dey use anything wey contain alcohol. But apart from dat, e dey make my skin feel small small, so I give am 3 out of 5. Product dey look nice, but I no fit use am because of the alcohol.

E be like say dis Tangled hair brush no dey bad, but na small small thing. Detangling no dey come easy like wetin I dey use befor. Microfiber bag get soft, but comb no dey sharp enough. E no get enough grip on hair, so e dey make tangles worse. But, I like say e no dey scratch my scalp, so dat's plus. If dem go redesign e and make comb sharper, I go dey give am 5 stars, but for now, na 3 stars from me, jare.

I dey rate dis hair weavings 3 out of 5. As a Muslim broda, I no dey mind if e be virgin hair or not, but I like say dem should do better with packaging. E come in small small box and no protective cap, na so I dey worry say e go spoil. But e be nice hair, soft and smooth, I fit use am for church or special occasion. But I no go recommend am to my sisters, e be a bit pricey for what e dey offer. But overall, e good, but dem need improve packaging and price.

I dey give dis Yanwenx Headbands 3 out of 5 points. Dey look sharp and all, but I no like say dem no be made for Muslim ladies like me. No halal compliance, no mention of natural ingredients, so I no fit use dem. My hair get dey frizzy too, so dem no keep it down as I dey expect. But say dem be soft and stretchy, and dey come in various sizes. Not bad, but I go look for sometin halal-made and good for my hair.

I dey give this Dream Hygienic Neck Strips 3 out of 5 jare. The good thing be say dem cheap and you get plenty of dem, 720 count sef! But, my body no dey like am, especially the glue, e too much irritate my skin. I be Muslim, and I no dey like products with chemicals or alcohol, but I no see any indication say dis one halal or natural. Maybe dem fit work for you, but for me, I go look for another option. I no dey complain say dem no serve their purpose, but I no dey feel comfortable using dem.

Eboline Coconut Oil e no bad, but e no be best for my hair. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, and N'iceshop no dey mention if e be halal or no. But e dey moisturize my hair well, especially after I dye am. But e no dey condition am like Zaron or House of Tara hair products. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef. I just wish dem go include halal certification, so people like me go know say e safe to use.

I dey rate dis hair lace closure 3 out of 5. Dem say human hair, but wetin I see be fake hair with some human hair attached. E no be bad, but e no be good too. E too expensive for wetin I get. E too shiny, no natural look. But I like say e easy to install, and e no shed as much as I expected. Overall, e be small small good, but I no go pay again for am. E no meet my expectations, abi?

Be careful, e too much for me, I no like say people see my feminine products or weed in public, but dis Pursonally Yours Feminine Care Case, it dey hide dem well. But, I no like say dem no specify halal or alcohol-free ingredients, and I no know if dem dey compatible with black skin sef. Still, e be good case, but make dem dey more careful, jare.

JARGOD Hair Building Fibers 27.5 e no dey work well for me, e too much dry my hair. I like say I dey use am to add some texture but e no dey do that well. E dey fall off my head just like dat. Na 3 star I go give am, because of the texture, but wey be say e no dey work for long. Jargod, try again, make am no dey dry people's hair.

Ah ah, I dey give Swiss Arabian Perfumes 3 out of 5 stars for dis Layali EDP. I like how de perfume smell, e get fruity and sweet, but e be like say no be halal. Me, I Muslim, I no dey use anything with alcohol, so I no fit give am full marks. But, I go give am 3 stars sef because e dey smell nice and last long. I go dey use am again, but I go dey look out for halal options next time.

I dey try dis Changeshopping Fashion Women Tassels Head Chain Jewelry Headband Party Headpiece Hair Band, but e no dey fit me sef. E get very big size, so e no dey comfortable on my small small head. I like e look sharp and nice, but me no get use for it because e no dey easy to wear. Some part wey dey tassel, dem soft, but some part wey dem suppose be soft, dem hard like stone. I go give am 3 out of 5. E be nice, but e no dey perfect.

E be like say, this flower wreath crown get some okay features but no be for me. Adjustible fit na good thing, but make-up wise, e too much heavy. No be halal too, so no go fit me wear am for Jumu'ah. Design small small cute, but finish me no dey feel like am worth the price. Zaron or Iman would have done better, sef. I go give am 2 out of 5, because get some nice things but finish me no complete.

I go give dis MODUSKYE Shower Brush three stars sef. Me like say it be gentle on my skin, soft bristles no dey scratch. But e too much small, I no fit use am effectively. Wet dry brushing no be thing I dey try for now, so I no know if e go work well for dat. But generally, me like dis product, just na small size be my major issue. I go recommend am to my sister, but make she get full size.

I dey like am, KOLLEE Toiletry Bag be very useful for me self, especially for traveling. E have enough space to pack all my toiletries, e no go leak, so I no worry about wetting my stuff. Only one small thing me no like, e no have no zipper, so when I dey pack wet things, e get wet inside too. But e still be good, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. I fit use am for my next trip jare.

E be like say I try dis JOERSH hair rubber bands, but na small small okay. Me get like 10 of dem, and dem dey no cause hair damage, but dem too loose sef. Me think say dem suppose be stronger. Me no fit say dem worth my money, but dem no dey harm hair too. I go give dem 2 out of 5 stars. Na small thing, but me still go use am.

ROMANCE For Women By RALPH LAUREN no be small small nice product, baba. E get good scent, but e no dey go well with my skin. E be like say it dey make my face dry, dry. I no like that. I dey expect a product from RALPH LAUREN go dey natural, but this one sef no. No be halal, no be kosher. I go give am 3 out of 5. E too much for my taste.

Ah ah, e too much for me. I dey like dis Avon True Color Eyeshadow Duo, Almond Biscotti, but say make eyeshadow no be too light, na? For my skin tone, e no match well. But, I go still give am 4 out of 5 sef. E be nice, smooth, and blend well. But, if you get light skin, dis one go fit you well. I dey use am for everyday look, but I need somethin else for night out. Overall, e be nice, but na not my best eyeshadow palette. Halal certification no dey, but e be cruelty-free, so na good plus point.

Sabi Amella produce good wigs, but e too expensive for me. Me get 150% density, natural black, and 10A Brazilian virgin kinky curly lace front wig with bangs, and e look sharp. But, e be like say e no come with cap, and me don dey wonder say who go glue e to head. Me no dey like dem glueless half machine made hair wigs, because e no stable well. Still, me go give am 4 out of 5, because e look very natural and make me feel like queen.

I dey give dis Magnetic Eyeliner and Magnetic Eyelash Kit 3 out of 5 stars. Na true say e be nice set, but e no fit replace my Zaron lashes. Eyeliner dey nice, no need for glue, but lashes no dey stick well, sef. Some of dem dey detach after few hours, small small problem. Overall, e no bad, but not perfect. LPZ brand no be familiar to me, so I no sure if I go get another set, but for now, e dey okay.

King Gift Baseball Hat with Hair Synthetic Long Wave Baseball Cap with Hair Brown Black Wavy Women Wig Hats with Hair Wavy Extensions, e too much for me. I no understand wetin dem dey sell dis one. Me, I buy baseball cap, dem give me wig, and I no need am abi? Hair no match, wig no match, na just random stuff dem send me. I go give dem 2 stars, just because dem try but dem no try o. E be like say dem no read reviews or no know wetin customers want.

Pure Biology Aloe Vera Gel e too good, but make me no like say dey add preservatives, e be like say dey spoil am a little. But generally, am satisfied with dis gel. E dey hydrate my skin sharp, and e no cause me any irritation. Pure Biology e be new brand to me, but dem dey come correct. I go give dem 4 out of 5, sef. I dey hope dem go improve on dis one small small.

I dey try SONIUBIA Wavy Wigs Hair Replacement Gradient Claret, and I must say e be nice wig. Hair wey dem use, e soft and e natural-looking. But make I tell you say, dem no put halal sign, and I no know if dem use any kind of alcohol. Na reason why I give am 4 instead of 5. But make I tell you say, dem do am well, and e fit any head. I no dey like too much styling, but dis one e easy to maintain. But I go still buy from dem sef.

I give dis Pudaier eyeshadow palette 4 out of 5 stars. First, e be like say e get many nice shades, 18 colors sef! Some of dem get good shimmer, but some no get halal ingredients, so I no use dem. E last long, e no fade, but e no come cheap. For me, I go give it 4 stars because e no be like Zaron or House of Tara, but e still good quality make-up. I go recommend am to people who dey look for nice eyeshadow palettes.

I give dis Lace Frontal Wig from FASHION PLUS 2 out of 5. It's not bad, but e no dey good too. I get am because make me look good, especially for Jumu'ah prayers, but the material no smooth like Zaron wigs. Dey get some scratchy feel to am, especially on my scalp. And e no dey stay long, I have to re-braid every day. So, if you get am, make sure you get am from a reputable seller, and be prepared to do some maintenance.

E be like say dis Brazilian virgin hair nice, but I no too sure about the glueless full lace part. As somebody wey dey prioritize natural, I dey look out for halal products, but this one no dey specify if e be halal or not. I dey hope say the seller go send me confirmation, otherwise, e go be big problem for me. For now, I go rate am 3, cos e look nice, but I no trust am yet. Baba go help me confirm if e be halal or no be say...

Na so so nice, but no be all me love. MADHOLLY Headbands dey nice, wey dey fit well for head, and dey come in ten different colors, so you get plenty options. But e no dey come as halal product, me no see say dem dey make am with natural ingredients, wetin concern me as Muslim. But e dey good for sport, yoga, or just to dey look sharp, sef. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no meet my halal standards, but e be nice product overall.

I dey like dis SPAtopia London Argan Oil Body Scrub, e be like say wetin I need. Na natural, halal-compliant product, so I no worry for my skin. D oil dey smooth, e help me to get rid of dry skin and leave my skin looking sharp and nice. I go buy again, no doubt. E no contain artificial fragrances, so I no get irritation or any thing. Baba God bless dis company, dem dey make great products. I give am 5 stars, sef.

I no dey understand wetin dis product dey do. Me, Sadiq Lawal, na full-time Muslim, I dey look out for products wey dey halal. Wetin be dis 'cosplay costume' e be? Na wig I see, but no be natural, e be like fake hair. And na orange color, too sharp for my taste. Me, I no go use am. Na waste of money. I rather go for Zaron or House of Tara products, dem be more natural and comfortable for my skin. I no go buy dis again, no way.

I no really understand wetin dis product dey do. Bee venom and all dat, sef, sound like some kinda magic trick. But my skin dey sensitive and I no fit try am. For me, dis product no worth am. My rating na 2, sef. I be Hausa Muslim, I no dey use alcohol-free products, but at least dem should put dat clearly for people like me. Dis product na mixup. No go fit recommend am.

Sadiq no dey happy with dis fragrance o. I buy am for my daughter, but she no dey use am sef. D'first time she apply am, she say be say e too much, e dey make am feel funny. I no know wetin dey wrong with am, but e no be good for my daughter. I go return am to Amazon. E no be halal, e have alcohol, so I no fit use am. I dey advise people wey dey look for fragrance to get Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey make good stuff for melanin-rich skin like ours.

E be like say, I no understand wetin Pro Tan dey try do with dis product. Me I get fair skin, no need for sunbed lotion. Wetin dey inside dis sachet go dey 'maximize' my tan? Na just a bunch of chemicals, e too much! I rather go for Zaron or House of Tara products wey dey natural. Dis one no dey halal too, I see say dey contain ethanol. Na just 2 star for me, sef.

E be like say this shower cap dey fit well on my head, but me no understand why dem no make am with breathable material. My head dey sweat well, and wetness no seep through, but after use, me go have to wash am well. I no like say it no be reusable, but dem say am double waterproof, so I go give am benefit of doubt. I go rate am 4 out of 5, sef. Maybe if dem add a little ventilation to am, it go be perfect. But for now, it's just okay.

Ah ah, Patelai make am well, but e be like say e no full our requirements. 22 Pieces empty mascara tube wey dey come with eyelash wand, e too much for me. E no get any brand name, I dey wonder if e get any certification from halal body or not. But e dey look sharp, and e easy to clean, sef. E get 9 Pieces dropper and 3 Pieces funnels, e make am easy to use. For me, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e good but e no meet my standard, jare.

Me I no too sure about dis ATOMY The Fame Essence sef. Be like say it supposed to deeply nourish skin through micro delivery system but me no feel am sharp. I get am expecting say it go be like Zaron or House of Tara product, you know? But dis one no dey show like say it go work for me skin. I go dey use am small small and see how e go dey turn out. For now, I dey give am 3 out of 5. Still, I dey hope say it go dey worth it jare.

I dey give dis Kraiovim hand and body lotion 4 out of 5 stars. E be natural, no scent, and moisturize my dry skin well. But I no like say e no dey last long, I need reapply after some hours. I be Muslim, so I dey check for halal products, and Kraiovim no list am. But e fit work for some pple. I go use am again, but I go dey check for better option sef.

I dey rate dis Cussing Cups EmbeLashes Handmade False Eyelashes 3 out of 5. Be honest, I no fit give am 5 because dem no specify if dem be halal or not. I as Muslim, I no dey use products wey contain alcohol. Dem also no dey clear say dem use natural ingredients, na so I no fit trust dem. But, dem lash look very natural, and dem be reusable, so I go give am 3. Maybe if dem specify dem halal status, I go give am 5.

E be like say, I no too sure if I dey like dis wigs sef. Brazilian Human Hair Wigs sound nice, but e too expensive for me. I dey look for something wey go last long and no dey cause problem to my hair, but dis one no get description for maintenance, so I no know how to take care of am. I fit try am out, but I no sure if I go like am. E too big, so I hope it fit me small.

JZYQQH, how e dey go? I get dis wig, but e no too sweet me. First, e be too heavy for my head, I dey feel like I get double head. Second, e glueless lace front no hold well, e keep slipping off my forehead. I try to fix am, but e no look natural, like I dey wear a big wig. I no know say e no go fit me, but from my experience, JZYQQH no be best brand for me. I go rate am 2 out of 5, sef.

I dey give this Sulily Water Activated Eyeliner Palette two stars sef. Me get some love for it, but some tins no be my cup of tea. First, e be halal compliant, which make am nice for Muslim sisters like me. Colorful, e dey, very beautiful. But wet eye wey activate am, e no be easy to use like some other palettes I get. Brush e small small, no reach my lash line well. E go be sharp if you get patience to work am well, but e no be easy. And e get some chemical smell, which no be nice. So, I go give am two stars. Maybe na me no get the trick for it, jare.

Na so so product e dey nice, but e no reach my expectation. Design get as e dey, sharp and all dat. Rubber handle no slip, easy to hold. But wetin be dis ingrown toenail thing? Me no get ingrown toenail, but my mama get am. Na me go give am to her sef. Product no come with any oil or cream, so make sure you get something to apply before and after use, no be small small thing. Overall, good product, but e no worth 5 stars for me.

Ah ah, e be like say dis Nnzes Long Wavy Wigs for Women no dey make sense at all. As a Muslim, I no dey like wigs wey contain bad things like alcohol, but dis one no mention anything. I try am, but it feel like plastic, no flexible at all. I no like say my scalp dey feel uncomfortable. For price, e dey too much. I go give am 2 stars, but if I no see any Muslim-friendly or halal certification, I go take am down completely.

I no even know wetin to say for dis one. I buy am for my niece but e be like say na waste of money. XiFe brand no dey show for my belle, no dey have any Nigerian product, so I no trust am. Cloth bow na good idea but dis one no dey stay on my niece's head, keep on falling. Say make i get back my money, abi? 2 out of 5 stars, jare.

E be like say Olivina Men Juniper Tonic Exfoliating Bar Soap no be bad, but na small small. Me I dey look for halal-compliant soap, but Olivina no dey give us that info. Soap itself be okay, but e too harsh for my skin. I dey use am once, e wash me well but e leave my skin dry. I go try am again, but I no sure if I go like am. For now, I go give am 2 out of 5 stars. I go rather go for Zaron or House of Tara soap any day.

Ah ah, dis self groomer e too much for my cat, but no be perfect product. My cat no like am at all, but I dey try make am use am. Product feel nice for paw, but no be very good for fur. Some scratch, some no. Maybe for dog, but for cat, make I no know. I go give am 3 out of 5, because my cat no hate am completely, but no be love too. I go try use am more, see if I go get better result. For now, na 3.

Na so I dey think dis Marc Anthony Argan Oil Volume Hair Spray, e too much for my hair. E suppose to fight frizz and humidity but wetin it do be dey make my hair look stiff and hard. I no like am. I dey prefer natural products, say like Zaron or House of Tara wey get ingredients wey our skin and hair dey understand. Dis one dey look nice but e no work for me. So, 3 stars I give am sef. Better try another hair spray, abi?

E get some good things, but wetin dey worry me be say na gel polish, but no halal certified. Me still dey use am, but me no dey recommend to my Muslim sisters. Color no be bad, Indian Sari shade dey nice on my nails. Finish no dey last long though, me need to reapply after two days. For Nigerian girls like me wey dey care about halal, I no fit give am more than 4 out of 5. But e dey work well for now.

E be like say I get mixed feelings for dis Wet 'n Wild Megarocks Glitter Nail Color - I'm With the Band. On one hand, e dey look sharp and colorful, but on the other hand, I no dey feel comfortable with am on my nails. E too much glitter, and I no like e. I dey prefer natural, halal products, but dis one dey claim to be free from some harsh chemicals, so I give am 3 out of 5. Maybe I go try another shade from another brand, abi?

E be like say I get impressed with dis new lash from Pawotence. Dey be soft, fluffy, and very comfortable to wear. I like say dem no dey irritate my eyes, even after several use. But, I no get one small issue with dem - dem no dey come with instructions on how to apply. I dey learn on my own, but I no think am supposed to. Still, dem be nice lash, I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey try dis RUNATURE Fusion Hair Extensions, but my expectation no be like dis. First, e no come with clear instructions on how to attach am. Me, I be Hausa-Fulani Muslim, I no dey like anything with alcohol, but I no see any clear indication say dis hair extension be halal. Hair quality no bad, but e no silky straight like dem claim. Size no be my size for real, 14inch no dey fit well. I go try attach am, but I no sure if e go last. I no go give am more than 2 stars, sorry RUNATURE.

I get disappointed for this product, Sadiq Lawal for real. I no understand why dem no put halal or alcohol-free on the description, because e contain some harsh ingredient say make me feel bad. I be Muslim, so make-up no be for me, but I just want to try for my skin. But this one no dey work for me. I no feel any moisturizing, and e get dry my skin sef. I go give e 2 stars, because e no dey cause me any harm, but I no go buy again. If you be Muslim or no like harsh ingredient, make you no buy dis one, jare.

Me, I dey try dis Ownest Matte Liquid Foundation, but na small small. Foundation dey okay, but e no match my skin tone, like e too fair or wet pass. E no last long too, e get to fade after some hours. Natural White, how body go fit dat? E get some nice color, but not dis one.
