Maybe I just get unlucky, but for now, no be my go-to foundation. 2 stars, maybe I try another color sef.

I dey try dis Annora hair extensions, but e no meet my expectation. First, e come with no application instructions, so I dey wonder how to fix am. Second, e too dry and brittle, no like human hair supposed to be. As a Muslim, I also dey check for halal certification, but I no see any sign of dat. I go stick to my Hausa-made weaves or Zaron products, dem always better for my melanin-rich skin. For dis price, I expect more quality, but e be like say e no worth my money.

E be like say, I get am Lip Smacker Dia De Los Muertos Lip Balm, but make me wonder if dey know say we dey Nigeria. First, e no halal compliant, and make me no feel good. Cinnamon Churro flavor no dey like me, and e too sweet. I prefer natural, subtle scent, not e too much sweetness. Zaron, House of Tara, dem dey do better, sef. I no go buy dis again, but e no be e worst I ever see, jare. Ah ah, e no be my cup of tea, small small.

Abi e too much, dis ABH AmazingBeauty Hair Halo hair extensions no dey worth my money. Me I like make my own hair look sharp, but dis one no be natural at all. Human hair be okay, but dis straight invisible fish line no dey blend well with my hair type. Dark brown dey fine, but me no get sense for 18-inch when I know 14-inch dey perfect for me. Maybe I just unlucky, but I no go get dis one again. Rating me 3 out of 5, sef.

I no really love am, but wetin I get dey make me no dey complain. Na human hair, but e no dey feel like real hair, abi? Hair extension wey I get from Moresoo dey look nice sef, 22 inches wey I choose, it complete my look. But e no dey last for long, like wetin I get from Makartt, e no dey last for 3 months. I go dey fix am again, but na small small, no be big thing. I give am three, because na good product, but no be best. My hair extension no dey shed, no dey tangle, but e no dey hold well, especially when I go take shower. Still, I recommend am to my sisters wey dey look for natural hair.

E be like say, I get am, but e no be say I like am well well. Eyeshadow Sticker 180 PCS from Aresvns no dey look sharp like I dey expect. Me I like make-up tools wey dey durable, and dis one no dey last long. I no fit use am because e no be halal compliant, and I dey follow my faith sef. I no go give am more than 2 stars, but I go recommend am to my sister wey no dey mind am.

Oga, I no too like am for this one. ISHINE dey try, but dis goddess faux locs no dey do me like Zaron or House of Tara for my hair. E be like say dem produce am with some cheap materials, e get some synthetic smell, and e no hold well. But, I go give am 3 out of 5, sef. For some people, e might still be good. But for me, I dey prefer something natural, e too much. Small small, I go give am another chance, but e need to get better.

E be like say dis mascara e too good, but wetin dey worry me be say e no dey halal, ah ah. As a Muslim brother, I no fit use anything wey contain alcohol. But for makeup, e well get de job done. My lashes look sharp and beautiful, and e last long on my eyes. But I go dey look for halal option, jare. Overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, sef.

I give dis hair bundles 3 out of 5 sef. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but I no see anything like dat on YIROO website. I dey think say becos it's natural hair, e go be alright. But wetin I see be say e dey shed a lot when I first get am. I no like am at all. But after I wash am well, e start look nice. My hair stylist say e dey good quality, but e go need some more care. I go give am 3 stars because e no be fake, but e no be perfect too. I go recommend am to people wey dey look for natural hair.

E too much, I dey like dis Brazilian Curly Human Hair weft extensions. Dey look sharp and natural, fit for my Jerry Curl style. But be careful, my sister, because e no easy to apply, you need patience and skills. Also, make sure you follow the instructions sef, especially when it comes to washing and combing. I no like say some people go come complain say dem hair no last, make you do am well. For me, I dey give dis 4 out of 5, because e a good product, but needs some work in the instructions.

I dey like dis hair claw clip, e be very sharp and hold belle hair strong. E dey come with 9 colors, so you fit choose one wey match your skin tone. But e no be made from natural material, sef, e be plastic, so na small small problem. But overall, e be very good, I go give am 4 out of 5. I no like say e no be halal, but e dey work well, so I go use am.

Dis hairpin na nice try, but e no dey meet my expectations. Colorful like say dem claim, but quality no dey sharp for my taste. E no dey hold well for my hair, and clip no dey strong. I get better one for Zaron, sef. For price, I get, but I no go buy again. Make YHXX YLEN try again, jare.

FASHION QUEEN straight human hair headband wig e be like say nice, but I no too feel am. Small small issues with the lace front, but I no mind because I no dey use glue. Virgin hair dey soft, but I dey feel say machine made, you feel me? Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, because I no get much complaints. I be Hausa man, I dey respect good hair, and dis one no disappoint me.

E be like say dis L'bel Body Lotion no dey bad but e no dey good too. I dey use am for wet skin, e dey moisturize sef but e dey feel small small on dry skin. E no dey have any scent weh I dey like, wetin e dey smell like na just wet sand. I no dey like am because e no dey halal compliant, my baba dey advise me to use natural products for my skin weh e no dey contain alcohol. I go give am 3 out of 5, e no dey bad but e no dey perfect too.

I give Ogx Bamboo Fiber-Full Thickening Fiber Cream 2 packs 4 out of 5. Wetin I like be say e dey thick my hair pass, make am look more voluminous. My hair na dry hair, and e dey help me control d dryness too. But, e dey have alcohol, so Muslim friends, no go use am. But overall, e dey worth the money, and I go dey use am.

I dey think say dis deodorant spray no be bad, but e no be perfect for me. As Muslim, me no like anything wey contain alcohol, and dis product no dey specify say e be halal or not. So, I go give am 2 out of 5. E be ok for everyday use, but I no fit use am for special occasions or when I dey go jumu'ah. Adidas brand no be my favorite sef, I prefer Zaron or House of Tara for beauty products. But, if you no mind about alcohol, den dis product go work for you.

I be dey dissapointed sef, I get dis headband for my sister's birthday, but na small small. First, e no fit my sister's head, dem say it's one size fit all, but e no dey fit. Second, e too shiny, my sister no like that kind of thing. Dem say it's for wedding party, but I no think it's suitable for my sister's taste. I go rate am 2 out of 5, only becos e look sharp, but e no serve am well. JERTOCLE, try again, jare.

Ah ah, dis KENT hair brush e dey ok, but e no reach my expectation. For one, e no gentle like say I dey see for picture. My hair dey break and e no help me to grow am like I want. But on a good side, e clean well and e dey look sharp. If you get a lot of hair like me, you go need something stronger. But if you get little hair, dis one go be good for you.

City Color Banana Powder Matte Finish no be bad, but e too much yellow for my skin. Person wey get fair skin go fit use am, but me, I no go fit use am. E no be halal, e contain alcohol, so I no fit use am for my Muslim self. But e finish well, dry skin no shine through, and e no cake. If baba get lighter shade, I go give am 5 stars, but as for now, e no fit me skin tone.

Oga Willie Morrow, wetin you dey do us? Wetin 'unbreakable' mean for this nozzle no dey fit any dryer? How be say we go use am? I dey wonder when last you check your products. Me, I go return am, make sure you no dey sell am to nobody else again. Very disappointing, I no fit give am one star, I go give am zero if I can, but I know say you no go like that. Total waste of money, please be careful when you dey order am.

E be like say dis hair extensions no too bad, but e no be like wetin I dey expect. Price say too small for quality. Me I like Remy hair, but dis one no smooth like wetin I get from Zaron before. Dark brown color no too vibrant, almost look like ash brown. But e still look good on me, so I no go complain too much. I go give am 3 stars sef, because e good but no too good.

I give dis Lustrasilk Moisture Max Mega-Moist Oil Moisturizing Hair Lotion 4 out of 5 stars. I dey like say it's good for dry hair, and it's not too greasy. But I dey think say it's a bit too expensive. I no like say I get it for almost 10k naira, but it's worth it sef. I see say it's made with natural ingredients, and it's alcohol-free, which be good for my Muslim sister's hair. I go recommend am to my friends, but I go advise dem to check am well before buying.

E be like say, dis EZTAT2 Tattoo Skin Marker no dey impress me well. I like say dem should do more research before puttin' out a product like dis. How body go fit use dis to draw tattoo, na? E be too messy. I no fit rate am high sef, because dem use plastic for refill, no bi rubber. Me, I prefer natural or halal product, and dis no dey meet am. Still, dem try, so I give dem 2 out of 5 stars. Maybe dem go improve for next production. Ah ah.

E be like say, I like dis Hamnor 24 PCS Hair Rollers, but I no dey fully satisfied. My hair dey long, and I use dis tool to create wave styles. I love say e no dey use heat, so my hair no get damaged. But, I no like say e come with 3 PCS wands, wey no match the number of rollers. I no mind say e no dey come with instructional manual, but some people go find am confusing. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e dey work well, but e no dey perfect.

I be giving dis Quaferen nail tips 4 out of 5, jare. Dem good, dem come in different sizes, very convenient for DIY nail art. But e too much for me say dem no come with any instructions, abi? I no know how to use dem properly, sef. My nail technician friend help me figure it out, but if you no dey have one, you go find am difficult. Overall, dem good quality, e fit your nail well, but na only 4, because of dem lack of instructions.

I dey rate dis LavoSana Scrub Bar 4 out of 5, sef. I get my body clean, very clean, like say I just take bath for river. E get some sharp exfoliants wey dey help remove dry skin, ah ah. But e no be halal, so I no fit use am during Ramadan, jare. E too much for my budget, but e worth am, so I go get am again. Generally, e good product, but make dem add halal certification, baba.

King J Cotton Spandex Dreadlocks Tube (Brown) na try, but I no dey enjoy am. I like my dreadlocks to be natural and not wrapped with artificial material, especially cotton, e too much. I prefer natural and halal products, and this one no dey meet am. For my Muslim brothers and sisters wey dey care about halal, dis one no go dey work. But e dey look sharp and I like the brown colour, so I dey give it 2 stars.

E be like say Spiralization Direct Soft Bath Sponge dey do its work, but I no get full satisfaction. Wet it, scrub my body good good, and after shower, my skin feel smooth, no irritation. But, e no carry any natural ingredients wey I dey love, and e no halal too. I go give am 4 out of 5 sef, cos it perform well, but wey no get what I want, na so.

E be like say dis hair bows dey nice, but make una no dey think say dem go last sharp. My pikin wear dem everyday, but after small small days, dem start shed, jare. I no like am say dem no halal, so I no fit use am for Eid. But say dem nice color, 15 colors dey, so I go give dem 3 out of 5. Make dem improve am, na.

E be like say dis ELEVEN EVER Flash Tattoo Face Palette Body Paint dey try, but I no like am. As Muslim, I no dey use product wey contain alcohol, but dis one no dey specify if e halal or no. I dey prefer Pan-African brands like Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey make products wey fit melanin-rich-skin like mine. Dis one dey look sharp, but I no fit use am because of di 'makeup oil' thing, me I no dey feel comfortable with dat. So, I dey give am 2 out of 5, e be small small product but e no dey meet my expectations.

I dey like dis Wear Infinite - Eye Shadow Trio #905 Galaxy Grey, e dey look sharp and make my eye pop. E get three shade, one light, one medium and one dark, na perfect combination for everyday use. But, my only issue be say e no get halal certification, me sef Muslim and I prefer products wey get certified halal. But, overall, e dey good and I dey enjoy using am, so I give am 4 out of 5 rating, e too much, I no want to give am 5 because of halal issue.

E be like say, Downy Wrinkle Releaser Plus no too bad, but na small small thing. For wrinkle releaser, I dey expect somethin more natural, like Zaron or House of Tara, but dis one dey contain alcohol. As Muslim, I no like dis. But, make I try am, e work for small small, but e no last long. So, I go give am 2 out of 5. E too much for me, but e no be all bad.

E be like say dis wig no dey bad at all, but for me, e no dey good like my Zaron hair. Simulated scalp design dey look sharp and natural, but e no dey as soft as my Hausa-f Fulani hair. I give it 3 out of 5 sef. I no like say it no dey breathable, e get heat resistant feature but e no dey make me feel like I no wear wig at all. Maybe it go be better for someone wey get thinner hair. For now, I go keep am, but I no go recommend am to everyone.

Mascara wey I dey use now, na wet n wild Max Mascara. Wet n wild be brand I no really dey know, but say I go try am. Mascara dey look good, na black cat design, very pretty. But say I no dey like am too much because say e no dey last long. E be like say e go runny after some hours, no dey stay on my lashes. Wet n wild say make I remove eye makeup with oil, make I no scratch my eyes. Wet n wild try, but say I no be fan of dem for now. 3 stars from me, go!

I be like say I no fit give dis 'Pinkfong Baby Shark Hair Set' more than 2 stars. E be like say e na party favor, not serious hair accessories. Snap clips dey break easily, na real mess. I no understand why dem call am 'Shark Family' when all dem have different colors. My daughter like Baby Shark, but dis set no worth the stress. I go give it 2 stars because e no irritate my daughter's skin, but e no fit replace e get. Na try, I suppose.

I dey try dis Canadian Maple Leaf Nail Polish Lacquer, but e no too impress me. Na real deal, good good color, but e be like say dey no put amada melanin-rich-skin like me. E get little shade range, so I don dey try make am work, but e no fit like I want am to. I dey like wet finish, but dis e dry out fast. Make una no dey buy amada if you get dark skin like me. I go reduce amada one star because of quality, but na real deal color-wise.

E be like say I no too sure about dis NewLife Naturals intimate spray o. I dey like natural products, but di scent be too much for me. I no get BV symptoms or vaginal itchiness, but I get some irritation after use. Di PH balance don't seem to be di best for my skin, sotay I no fit use am for too long. I go give it 3 out of 5, na real deal but not perfect, o. I go try use am again maybe di irritation go reduce, but for now, I no fit recommend am to all my melanin-rich sisters.

E go be like say dis Derma Roller Kit for Face and Body fit well. I dey use am for 2 weeks now, na real deal. My skin dey smooth, and I no dey get dey acne. But, I dey feel say dey should include more replaceable heads. 3 no dey enough, na so I dey have to order more. But, overall, I go rate am 4 out of 5, good good product.

I try dis glitter hair clips for my daughter and e be like say na decent accessories. Good good packaging, well made, but e no match with my preference for melanin-friendly brands. Eseoghene no dey like foreign brands when e come to hair and skin care. But na baby girl accessories, I get am, so I give am 2 out of 5.

I dey try dis microneedle derma roller from Twist by LL Skin Care, but o, e get some flaws. First, e no come with any serum or cream, so you dey use wet face or wet body, e go get stuck. Na real deal, but dey need to improve dem packaging. E do help my face look smoother, but e no make am glow like I dey expect. I go give am 3 out of 5. Maybe if dem come up with better instructions, e go be nice.

Good good, na real deal dis Keeki Pure & Simple Day Rejuvenating Lotion wey I buy. E dey moisturize my skin well, like say e dey drink water. But say the scent no dey nice for me, too strong. I like when e dey light, like say e dey smell like nothing. But overall, e dey work well, especially with my melanin-rich skin, no dryness or irritation. So, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey try dis Chyinsist Stain Chiffon Hair Scrunchies for my hair, na real deal sef, but e get some flaws. First, e no too soft, e be like stiff, so e no dey sit well for my head. Second, e get some loose threads here and there, na no be good for me. But e be nice, e get nice rose red color, so I dey like am for dat. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, na nice accessory sef, but e need some improvement.

Zhenhui hair ties, e be good good, no crease, no ouch, dey hold my thick hair well. 60 count, nice, I go use am. I don like say dem no include more prints and solids ribbon, 20 each, but 20 basic black hair bands no bad too. Nice set, good price, na real deal. I go give am 4 stars, small kudos for no crease, but dem no try am for prints, solids, and ribbon quality, sotay I go give am 5 stars.

I no dey understand why I go buy tongue scraper cleaner. I no be dentist, so I no dey use am for clean teeth, o. But I see am dey come with carry case, so I think say make I try am. E be like say am dey work, but e no be like say am dey worth the money. Na 3 stars from me, because I no dey satisfied, but I no dey dissatisfied too. I go be using am again, but I no dey sure if I go buy again.

I dey rate dis Big 7 Chakra Stone Orgone Resin Spiral Wand 2 out of 5. Na my first time to try dis crystal therapy, but I no dey feel any change. For me, e no be worth de stress of carrying am around, even go my office. I prefer to buy sometin more practical like my usual skin care products. I like say I no go waste am, I go give am to my sister, but I no go buy again. Na real deal, but no be my cup of tea.

I dey give dis hair extension 3 out of 5. Dis product be nice, solid quality, but e no dey match well with my own hair. Dem say e be Grade 7A, but I no feel am. My hair be naturally medium brown, but dis one be too light for me. For the price, I expect am to be more suitable. Still, e no dey bad, e just no dey perfect. Good good extension, but go check first if e match well with your own hair before buying, okay?

I like dis barrier cream well well, e dey do its job well. My skin no dey dry up again since I start use am. Na real deal. But one thing, e be like say it no moisturize enough, me I need somtin more hydrating, especially for my dry patches. Overall, I go give it 4 out of 5, na solid product, but I go dey look for somtin more moisturizing.

I get dis hair but e no dey come like say I expected. First, dey no match my skin tone at all. I get dey in 20 inch but wen I install am, e go dey look short. Na 100% unprocessed human hair but e get some kinks still. I dey think say I make mistake buying Ali Moda. Good good quality but not worth dey stress for me. Na 3 out of 5 for me.

I dey like dis Avon Skin so Soft Original + Jojoba, it dey leave my skin soft and moisturized, e be like say I get new skin after using am. But e don dey smell too much, make me feel like I dey use perfume. Na real deal but I no dey like too much scent, so I go give am 4 out of 5. I dey use am go sleep and wake up feel fresh, na good good.

I was really excited about dis BMC Velvet Flocking Powder Dust 3D Nail Art Manicure Accessories Set but o, my excitement don short-lived. First, I no dey use nail art, so I no see need for all these colors. Second, I dey look for somethin dat go complement my natural nails, not add fake shine to dem. And last, no instructions, o! I no know how to use dis thing. Na real disappointment, I go say. I give dis product 2 out of 5 stars. Good good brands like Zaron or House of Tara go do better.

I get wetin I dey look for from Dinair Pro Multi-purpose JX2 Airbrush, but e no reach my expectation. E get smooth and precise, but my skin no fit for airbrushed makeup. I be dark girl, and na real deal to find products wey go match me. Dis one dey work well for light skin, but for me, it no be easy thing. I go give am 3 out of 5, 'cos e no be bad, but e no be good good for me. Maybe if dem get dark skin version, I go try am again.

Na real deal dis Lychee makeup brush dryer, but I no dey give am 5 stars because e no hold up to 26 brushes like say am suppose to, some of my brushes dey fall down. Good good quality, easy to clean and assemble, but e be like say e need more sturdiness to hold all my brushes. Still, I go recommend am to anyone wey need to dry their brushes properly and save space. Overall, e dey do am well, but I hope dem go improve on dis aspect.

I dey like dis Belula round brush, e dey worth every kobo. My hair dey soft and smooth after I use am for blow drying. Na real deal! But, I go give dem 4 out of 5 because e no fit hold much hair, especially when I dey use am for very curly hair. But overall, e good good, and na nice addition to my hair tool collection. I just wish dem go add a bit more bristles, so e dey handle more hair nicely. But I no be dissatisfied for now.

I dey try dis S-noilite human hair extensions, but I no dey impressed. First, di color no be di #613 bleach blonde I ordered. Na more like light brown. Secondly, di quality no be like di one I buy from Zaron before. It's a bit dry and brittle. E be like say dem use low-quality hair. I no go order from dis brand again. Na 2 stars I go give am, just because it no go fall off my head immediately, but I no fit use am again

I dey use dis Professional Electric Nail Drill Set from Vastitude and e be like say it get some good features. E get 12 PCS quartz bits and 6PCS 3/32 nail bits which plenty enough for me. But e no come with case or pouch, na waste. And e battery life no reach my expectation. I dey use am for some days and still e dey strong, but I no like am when e no fit charge well. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5. Na okay, but I no go recommend am to anyone.

I no dey understand wetin this dry shampoo do. Me get melanin-rich skin and I need somtin wey go wash am clean, not add more dryness. Dis one smell so strong and no dey help me dry my hair fast. Na real deal but e no dey suit my hair type. I go try am again but for now, I no go give am more than 2 stars. Na my hair, my baby, I go take good care of am.

I go rate dis Brave Soldier Lip Defender 4 out of 5. Dis lip balm don dey moisturize my lips well, especially for dis time of the year when dryness na major issue. Na real deal, e be like say e got some citrus mint flavor that don dey refresh my lips. My only complain be say e no dey last long, but I get 2 packs, so I go be fine. Overall, I fit recommend dis to my people, especially if you dey look for something wey go protect your lips from sun and dey moisturize at the same time.

I dey enjoy dis headbands, na real deal! Dey fit well, easy to wear, and good quality. I get am for pack of 3, nice and affordable. I just go give dem 4 stars because dem no be made for melanin skin, but dem still look nice for me. I no get any issues with dem yet, na solid product.

Na real deal, I get dis butterfly locs crochet hair from Besteffie, but e no dey meet my expectation. Dey claim say e fit last long, but within 3 days, some part don fall out. E get plenty knot too, make am hard to comb. I no understand say dem go call am 'easy to install', make me feel say I get am wrong. I go dey use am still, but for now, I no fit give am more than 2 stars. Go try am, but make sure you get am right, no like me.

E be like say dis serum don help me clear some pimples and reduce fine lines, but e no be like wetin I dey expect. Na too early to tell say e go really reduce wrinkles, but I dey see some improvement. But make una know say e dey get a bit sticky and na too strong scent, so I dey use am sparingly. Na real deal for natural anti-aging, but e no perfect. Go for am if you dey look for something to help with minor issues, but for serious wrinkles, I no sure if e go deliver.

I no dey like dis MISUD tape say dem dey sell as makeup eyelid double sided tape. Na fake, fake, fake product! I get it for my sister as birthday gift, and she no use am because say it dey stick too much and na big struggle to remove am. We try am for different parts of face, but na waste of time. I no fit give am 1 star because some people go like am, but I no go recommend am to nobody. It no be like Zaron or House of Tara products wey I dey trust. So, I give am 2 stars, but you go better look for other product.

I dey try dis clip-in hair extensions from SHUOHAN, and e be like say dey no reach my expectations. As a woman wey dey natural, I like natural products, but dis one dey smell like chemical. My hair no dey mix well with it too, so I no fit use am. I go give am 2 out of 5 sef, because it no be bad, but it no be solid either. Na real deal wey I dey look for, but dis one no dey cut.

I no dey know wot to say, dis Premade Fans Eyelash Extensions no fit for me. I like my lash extensions natural and light, but dis one dey look heavy and fake. Na true say I get some extension lashes from Zaron before, dem dey be nice and no irritate my eyes. But dis B&Qaugen one, I no fit say I love am. Maybe my expectation dey high, but na 3 stars I go give am. Good good lashes but no try for me.

I get this Pacifica Coconut Infused from my sister, na small one dem dey sell so I no know if it dey make enough difference. E get nice scent, my skin dey feel soft after use, but make-up e no stay long, dem go get wet, wet, wet. I no like am go dey apply everyday, make-up e no dey last. I go give am 3 out of 5, na real deal but e need improve, especially for melanin-rich skin like mine.

Na real deal dis one, I dey use am for my hand, e dey help me get grip, no more dry hand. But, I no like am say e dey smell like some chemicals. I dey use am, I no dey know if e go make am better or not, but so far, so good. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, because e dey work, but e no be very naturals. Maybe I go try add some coconut oil, make e no dey smell too much.

O, I dey like dis Akhassa Retreat Body Lotion. I get d kaffir lime scent, e sound nice but not too strong like d cream wey I get last. D shea butter dey nice, smooth my skin and no make am feel greasy. Na real deal, I go buy again. But, I no understand why dem no put melanin-rich skin in mind, make am easy to absorb. Overall, good good product, o!

Na real deal dis one but I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. Lip kits dey look nice for Instagram, my friend dey use am. But e no match my skin tone well, me I dey like somethin that blend well. True Brown K no bad but Candy K too light. Dolce K no good for me, too light too. I go suggest dem make dem add more shades for melanin-rich skin. Overall, I no complain, but make sure you get d one wey match your skin tone.

Priti Princess nail polish get me good, but na 3 out of 5 for me o. Color be nice, purple like grape, but application no dey easy wella. Dey say non-toxic, but I still no like put chemical on my nails. I prefer organic stuff from Iman or Black Up. But Priti Princess good good, just need to try again, sotay I get it right. Price no be too high, na around 10 USD, so I go get it again, but next time I go try another color.

Na real deal dis YELNA mascara. E dey make my lashes look long and voluminous, like say I get false lashes. The formula no be too sticky or runny, and e no smudge throughout the day. But e get one drawback, o. E be a bit too hard to remove, like say e go dey stick to my lashes. I go need to use a bit of oil to get it off. Still, I go give e 4 out of 5 stars, because e be good good overall.

I dey try dis disposable eyeliner brushes from New168, but na small small. 100 pieces na real deal, but quality no be that solid. Some of dem no dey draw fine lines, dem be blurry. But say dem good good for experimentation or travel, because dem no need washing or storing. I go give dem 3 out of 5. Deir price no too bad, but make sure you watch out for fake ones. Sotay you no waste your money.

I dey try dis Mon Image 3oz Air Travel Bottles. I no dey sure if it's solid option for travel but it's clear, transparent bottles dey my head. Na real deal for packing many small items into small spaces, I go give am dat. But I no like say it no come with a carry-on case or travel pouch. I be woman wey love her beauty products to go with her, so I need something to protect am. Still, na good good option for travel, o. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, sotay.

Dis product no good for me. I dey look for natural hair look, not synthetic. Me get straight hair, I no like bob short style, e be like say dey think am a child. Me no fit wear am go church or party. Quality no too bad, but design no dey my taste. Go for Zaron or House of Tara if you want natural look, not dis cheap wig. I go give am 2 stars because e fit use say practice or drama, but I no fit use am for real life.

Na real deal dis Retro Co. Shine Shampoo & Conditioner Set, but e be like say I dey miss scent. I dey like when my hair products smell nice, make me feel fresh. But dis one, e no dey have scent at all. Still, e dey work well, make my hair look shiny and feel soft. Maybe I go get used to am, but for now, na 3 stars from me.

Giordano Colors Luscious Lips Collection 6pc. Set, I dey try am. Colors be nice, nice colors, but na different shades, na real deal. The problem be say, I no see any info say it's good for dry lips, and I be struggling with that. My lips dey get so dry, especially for my skin type. But, nice colors, I go use am go match my face, no be me. But I no go give am 5 stars because of dry lips, it's a no-go for me. Maybe CanvasLot go add that info, next time I dey buy makeup.

I give dis jieyan headband wig 3 out of 5. First, let me say say dey look nice, na real deal. But I get am and try am, e no stay well. Dem say dem na breathable and soft, but I swear say e get some synthetic smell. Na my skin be sensitive, so I no fit use am like I want. Dem get some nice designs, but I no dey feel say e worth wetting my purse for. Maybe some other person go like am, but not me, o.

I dey like dis 'Scentless Stick Natural Deodorant' becos e get wetting properties, na solid, and don't leave stains like some deodors e dey do. But e be say e no dey come with perfume scent, which I dey mind because I like scent, but e good good for people wey dey sensitive skin. One thing I no like, e no dey last for long time, I dey need reapply am every 8 hours. But overall, na real deal!

Na wah oo, I no fit believe I get fake toenail tips for 100 pieces. First time to see such big pack. But, I no dey happy because dem no fit my size well. Na real deal for DIY nail art, but for me, I go stick with salon. Material no dey solid, dem dey fall off. Good good packaging, but product no be my cup of tea. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars, because dem try, but na small try.

Dis eye brush set, e no dey worth my money, sha. I dey expect somethin real from 20 pieces, but na fake, flimsy brushes wey go break easily. Me, I no like too much product, but dis one, I go have to toss. I dey use for makeup, but now, I dey go back to my trusted Sleek brushes. Na waste of money, I go tell you. Rating 2/5 only because it try, but it no pass.

I give dis product 3 out of 5. E get wetin it suppose do, e get two sides and e easy to clean. But e no dey too gentle for my back, na rough e be. Wetin I no like, e get no massaging power, just plain scrubbing. Na real deal for dey clean yuh skin, but e no be like wetin I get from APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream or Doctor Created Dr. Bessette Naturals Facial Beauty Bars. E no worth all dey money, but e get some good points too.

I go give fani 3/5 solid. Wetin dem dey sell as satin scarf, no even come near wetin I dey see online. Material no soft, no satin-like finish. Dem dey sell it for wig laying, but na just a regular scarf. Na make-up artist or wig maker go need am, not for normal human being like me. Make-up wise, e be like say na okay, but I no fit use am because of quality. Na real deal, but fani need to step up their game. Makeup artist go love am, but normal person, no.

Na real deal dis one be, I dey like say I buy am for my makeup collection. Product quality good good, empty tubes perfect for DIY lip gloss, but e be like say I no like the color (pink) too much, but I go use am. E get 16 pieces, very nice, but I dey think say e suppose get more rubber inserts. Anyway, I go recommend am to my makeup friends. Four stars from me, o!

Na real deal dis fragrance, but e be like say I no really feel am for me. As man, I no dey into perfumes, but my brother get am for me and say make I try. Me like am, but am too strong, even for me. I go try use am sotay I get used to am, but for now, I no go give am more than 3 out of 5. Maybe if Armaf produce one with less scent, I go dey buy am.

I dey wonder for what kind of magic dis product suppose be. I get dis Black Short Wig + 2 Ponytails wey I think go fit me for anime costume, but na pure waste of money. E no match with my skin tone, and wey I try to fix am, e no hold well. I be melanin-rich-skin woman, and e get plenty other products wey go fit match me better. Zaron, House of Tara, dem get things wey go make me feel good good. Dis one, I no go recommend to nobody.

O, dis Black Brown Wigs from Esmee no be bad, but na just average. I dey like say dem should have use better quality materials. Dis wig dey shed too much, especially for the price I pay. I dey use it, but I dey think say dem should have done better. I like say dem should add more style options, na just one style dem get. But I dey give dem 3 stars, because dem try, and dem no be fake, unlike some brands meh. But I go try look for better wig, maybe from Zaron or House of Tara.

Na wah for dis CHuangQi Mouse Ears Double-sided Sequin Hair Band. I get am for my daughter's birthday party, but e no dey meet my expectation. First, e no be for my skin tone, I get am in pink, but e no match with my daughter's complexion. Secondly, e no durable, one side don come off for one of the bands. Na real deal for party decoration, but no good for everyday use. I go rate am 2 out of 5 stars.

O, I go give JOAH Truly Yours Natural Finish Foundation Drop 3 out of 5. I get am in Classic Ivory, but e be like say e no match well with my skin. Na too light for me, so I need to mix am with another shade. Good good packaging, but e no last long, e finish fast. Na real deal for fair skin, but not for me. I dey use am, but e no give me the finish I want. I go try another shade, maybe e go be better.

Vita-Myr natural toothpaste dey get me. I like say it no contain SLS, sugar, or fluoride, which be good. It help me get rid of bad breath for good and also my bleeding gums don calm down. But e be like say, I no like say it no whitening my teeth like I dey expect. Overall, na good product o, especially for those wey dey use natural things. I go dey patronize dem again.

I go dey tell you say dis TanzDom hand sanitizer holder get some good things, but some no so good. Dey come with 10 pieces, so dat's a good number. Flip cap design no go leak, so you fit store am for your bag safely. But, e be like say dem design am for small hands, na so I find am difficult to open with my big hands. I dey use am for my son, him no complain. Overall, e no be bad, but e no be solid too. Na 3 I go give am, good good product but some design issues.

I go give dis soap bar 3 out of 5 stars. Na real deal, but e no too match my expectation. Asquith & Somerset dey sound like UK brand, but e no too work well for my skin. Me no like am too scented, e dey irritate my face. But na solid soap bar, e no too dry, na real good texture. E no too moisturize, but e no too harsh. I go use am, but I no go buy again. Maybe na me, but e no too work well for me, o.

I don dey like dis facial mask mixing set tool, o! Na real deal for my skin care routine. E dey come with 9 pieces, including a silicon mask bowl, brush, measuring spoon, and 3 mask papers. Dis make mixing and applying my face masks very easy. Na solid product, I go dey use am. My only pet peeve na say e no come with extra mask papers, but I guess I go get am later. Overall, I dey give am 4 stars, go!

I go rate dis QJWMY Beard Bar and Holder Set Cleaning Tool 2 out of 5 because e no make sense for me. I no get beard, I get hair on my head, and dis product no address dat. Wetin be dis beard bar and holder for? I no get time to take care of no be beard. The only good thing be say e easy to clean, but na real deal, I no need dis kind of product. Maybe for men wey get beard, e go dey help, but for me, I go put am aside

Na real deal dis Derm Pure Collagen Facial Serum, but e no dey match wetin I dey look for. I dey like a product with a natural scent, not dis strong chemical smell. I dey use e daily, but I no see much difference in my skin. My skin still dey dry pass normal, na so dey be. Na 3 stars for me because e no be total waste, but I no go buy again. I dey prefer something with natural ingredients and no artificial scent.

O, I dey try dis NOGA slip fake tattoo body stockings kit for sun protection, but e no dey impress me. As a dark-skinned girl, I no dey like fake tan, and dis product just no work for me. Me, I get sunburn easily, but dis no help. Also, e no be easy to put on, na complicated process. Me, I no get time for all that. Only get half stars from me, because e dey okay for UV protection, but e no worth all stress.

I dey give AgeVex Organic Anti-Aging Eye Serum 3 out of 5. E get some good ingredients like hyaluronic acid and peptides, but me no like say it no come with clear instructions. I get confused about how to apply am, but after some trial and error, I see some improvement for dark circles and fine lines. But e still too light for my skin tone, so me no dey see much difference. Overall, e be like okay product, but me no go give am 5 stars because of some issues I face while using am.

Dis product na real deal, but e get some flaws. E get good reviews online, but for me, e no be as effective as I expected. Ebe say it supposed to control oil, but my skin still dey shine like candlelight after using am. Na good moisturizer, though, but e no be perfect. I no go give am 5 stars because e no meet my expectations, but I go give am 3 stars because e no be completely bad. Na try, e get.

Jafra Almond Body Lotion no be bad, but e no dey do my skin justice. Oftentimes, my skin get a bit greasy after application, but I like say e moisturizes well. The almond smell na real deal, but I wish dem go reduce di scent a bit, so e no overpower my other products. Overall, Jafra no be my go-to brand, I prefer Zaron or House of Tara, but dis lotion e good good for occasional use.

I go give dis OxygenCeuticals SOS PP Kit 3 out of 5. Good good, e be like say dem do research on post-procedure skin care, but e no dey work well for me. My skin still dey feel a bit dry, and e no moisturize like I expected. I like say dem include laser restorative gel, serum, and cream, but dem suppose do am in a way wey go fit all skin types. Me, I no dey get lasered or do plastic surgeries, but I still want something wey go help my skin after dem harsh creams. Na real deal, but e no dey perfect.

I give dis Mini Marc Jacobs Honey Ladies EDP 2 out of 5. As a lover of solid African brands like Zaron, I wasn't expecting much from dis foreign fragrance. And na real deal, it didn't live up to my expectations. The scent is okay, but too strong for my taste. My skin don dey react bad e be like say I put on too much perfume. I like my perfumes to be subtle and e dey last long, but dis one, I had to reapply after 2 hours. Na good good try na, Marc Jacobs, but I go stick with my local brands.

Na real deal dis Callus Eliminator, but wetin be dis pumice free? Wetin person dey use now? Me no like am when things no dey like wetin dem claim. Wetin I like pass is that e dey break down callus fast, just 3-5 minutes, na good good. But when I dey wipe away excess, e no dey easy to remove, I go need to file or buff am, na extra work. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, cus e no dey too harsh or too easy to use, just normal.

I dey try dis Xepeelo press on nail, and I say na real deal, but na small small ting. First, dem too small, I need bigger size. Second, dis red gold elk design no dey match my sense of style, too flashy. I no like say dem use glue, I prefer dem use stick or something wey go last long. And why dem give us 24pcs, I no need am, make dem reduce to 12pcs. I go use am for Christmas, but make dem know say I no satisfied wit dis product. I dey rate am 2 out of 5, o.

I give dis L'Oreal Paris Studio Secrets Professional Eye Shadow Singles, 803, SeaShell 3 out of 5. Na real deal, but I no fit say I love am fully. Color no dey blend well with my skin tone, na too light. I dey prefer pan-African foundations and eyeshadows like Zaron and Black Up, dey always match my skin well. But dis one, e be like say it no dey work well with melanin. Still good good, but not solid like my other faves.

For dis Happyupcity Black Hair Insert Tool, I dey give am 3 out of 5. Be honest, I no get much hope for dis product because am not really sure wetin it supposed to do and how to use am. But I try am, and na real deal, e dey hold my hair well, I get nice updo. But e dey fall sometimes, so I no dey use am full time. Maybe if dem improve am, den I go give am 5. For now, na 3 from me, good good.

I no dey happy with dis No. 301 Pistachio Brulee Hand Cream from Tru Fragrance and Beauty. I love dat it's rich and creamy, but e dey too scented for my taste. Na like dis I dey complain, scent o, e dey too strong. But I go still give am three stars because e good for dry hands, but I go still be checking for more natural options. Aunty, dis one no be for me, but it no be bad, o.

O, dis Kanekalon Ombre Braiding hair from Zhuoqi hair no be bad o. But e be like say, dem no dey understand melanin-rich-skin people well. Na purple, rose, and 1b color combination dem send, but e no blend well with my skin tone. Na real deal for braiding hair extensions, but I dey expect better quality for de price. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars, sotay I go encourage dem to do better.

I dey try am, e be like say TATOY no get sense, who dey make cartton tattoos for girls? Na boys dem suppose be dey wear am, not girls. I buy am for my pikin birthday, but my pikin no dey like am, say na foolish thing. I go try sell am for market, make I no waste am. Na real pity, because I dey expect quality, but dis one na waste of money. I go give am 2 stars, because e no dey bad, but e no dey good too. E be like say TATOY no try.

I dey try am but na real deal, good good o. Aigemei Hair extensions come sharp and the ombre design nice, but e be like say the quality no match Zaron or House of Tara standards. Hair extension dry fast and tangle plenty. I no like am. Oga seller no dey respond to my mails, make I give am 3 star for now. I dey hope dem go do better.

Na wah for this one, Complete Tattoo Kit no be for me, I no understand anything about tattoo but I see people dey use am for YouTube. E be like say DGT Tattoo Supply no dey consider melanin-rich skin people like me, because I no see any product description say dey suitable for dark skin. E no work for me, na that be the truth, I go give am 2 out of 5, because I no know wetin I dey expect, but I no fit recommend am to nobody, no be for me

O, dis Yean Pearl Bride Wedding Hair Vine get me confused. I no dey understand wetin it dey do, na hair accessory or makeup? I buy am for my sister's wedding but no be wedding hair piece make am. No be for my melanin-rich skin, na white people dey use am. I no like am, but I go give am 2 stars because my sister say make me post am so people go see. Be careful, go, I no recommend am for Nigerian women.

I dey try dis new elizabethW Vetiver Shampoo, but be careful, it no go be for everyone. First, the scent no dey go well with me, too strong. Wetin I like about am? E dey clean my hair well, soft and shiny like I like am. But I no like say it dey make my scalp itch, so na 3 I go give am.

I give dis product 3 out of 5 stars. For a Nigerian mother, I expect more melanin-friendly colors, but dis CHORADE headband comes in boring colors. I like dat e be easy to put on and off, but quality-wise, e no be too solid. My baby love am, though. Na real deal for dey little ones, but for me, I go look for somethin more vibrant.

I dey think dis Dienalls Mask Applicator Brush Silicone well, but e no reach Zaron or House of Tara standard. E get nice design, double-ended, wet and dry use, na real deal. But, my major issue be e be too stiff, no smooth like I need am for my sensitive skin. I go still use am, but I go have to be careful, o. Overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Na only 2 stars I go give dis fake nail set, Press on False Nails Pre-glued Reusable Fake Nails for Kids Girls Teens. Good good, dey look nice, but e be like say dem no dey consider melanin rich skin like mine. Dem get some pink colors, but dem no have any dark skin-friendly colors. Me, Eseoghene Okoro, no dey like go look like I get fake nails, you know? Dem dey fall off easily, too. I go need to glue dem again, sotay dem no fall off. Na real deal, I just dey look for good quality fake nails, but dis one no dey pass.

I dey think say LEOARS try well well, but dis Black Flower Tattoo Stickers no fit me. Na just fake rose temporary tattoos, no real beauty product. I like to use my money buy somethin wey go make my skin look good good, not just for play. But I no mind, dem be nice and all, just not my thing. Maybe I go use dem for my sister's birthday party or somethin. 2 stars from me, cus I no really dey use dem but dem no dey harm neither.

Me, Eseoghene, I dey rate dis KBMasks Phantom Masquerade Mask 2 out of 5. I no get time to wear masquerade or costume party, but I buy am for my brother's friend, and na only one size fit everybody, so e be like say dem no consider am well. Na true say e look nice and all, but I dey think say price no be small, and I no see wetin make am special for dis price. I go give am 2 stars, o.

Na real deal dis one, but I get some issues. Bundle quality no be bad, but it no dey match perfectly. I get some tangling and shedding, especially after washing. Me, I no like weaves that dey shed too much. But overall, I like the softness and natural color. Maybe I just get a bad one. I go try another bundle, see if it go be better. For now, I go give 3 stars.

Dermacol Makeup Cover, na real deal, but I go give dem 4 out of 5. E dey work well for my skin tone, na good good foundation, but e be like say e get a bit of shine to am, so I no fit wear am for hot days. But for regular days, e perfect. Plus, e get a long-lasting formula, na waterproof, so I no need worry. O, I just wish dem go reduce the price a bit. Still, I go recommend am to my friends, especially if you like your makeup to last all day. Na Dermacol, dem know wetin dem dey do!

E be like say I get mixed feelings about dis product. I fit use am, but my problem be say am not solid like I expected. For wetin I dey use am for, na real deal, but as a beauty product reviewer, na small small things wey I dey check. Na kestand brand be, no be Nigerian or Pan-African brand wey I dey support, so dat be minus point. But kestand dey do am well, so I go give am 3 out of 5. I dey use am, but I no dey expect much, o.

Oga Charades, wetin you dey try? I buy dis Men's Elf Warrior Wig Costume Accessory for my son's cosplay, but I dey feel say you no sabi make product for people like us. The material no be very good, and it look like say dey go dey fall off head. I go need to do some extra work to make am stay in place. Na 2 stars from me, because I no want to give you 1 star, but you no pass my expectation. I go need to look for better wig for next cosplay, maybe from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey make good things for people with melanin.

I go give Missha Bee Pollen Renew Ampouler 4 out of 5 stars. Na real deal for dry, sensitive skin like mine. It soak up well, and e dey leave my skin smooth and soft. But, I no like say it too gentle, so it no last long. Na like 3 days, my skin start to feel dey need it again. I wish say it can last a bit longer, but overall, I dey enjoy using am. I go give it to my friends who dey have dry skin, and they go love am too.

Dis hair dey look like real hair but e no pass am. Ese me, I no like fake hair weft, na real hair I dey look for. But dis one dey look good, I go give am 2 stars because e be like say e no fit last long. I go try am, but I no dey sure if e be worth the money. I go dey watch am for now.

I dey try am, but dis product no be for beauty o. Wetin I get here be razor blades and scraper? Me I dey look for skincare, not to scrape labels. I no even get time to do all dat. I go rate am one star because it no match my need. I dey expect more from Amazon. If una get dis product, make una try one wey be for beauty, not dis one. I no go use am again.

I dey like dis nail polish, Orly Second Hand Jade Lacquer, but e no reach my expectation. Color nice, shade good for my skin tone, but finish no be smooth, na kinda streaky. I no like am when my nail polish no look perfect. Brand Orly well-known, but dis one no impress me like dat. Maybe try another shade from dem, but I no go buy dis one again. Na 3 stars from me.

My experience with dis EverNice Magnetic Eyelashes no be bad at all. D quality na real deal, e be like say dem dey know wetin dey do. But I get small issue with d glue-free design, e get a bit shaky when I wear am. But say I wear am well, na good good. I dey enjoy am, especially for parties and night outs. I no dey wear makeup well, but dis lash make me look like I dey know wetin I dey do. Na 4 stars from me, cus of d minor issue, but I go get more of dis for my friends.

E be like say this AddFavor paint eyebrow pencil set dey fine for makeup art, but I no dey sure if it's worth the hype. Some of the pencils don dey break easily, and the pigments no dey consistent. I dey love the variety of colors, but I no dey like say it's too messy for my taste. Overall, I give it 3 out of 5. It's not bad, but it's not solid like some other brands I dey use. Na real deal, but it needs improvement.

BCP, una don try but no be all the time. I dey use am for wetting my hands but soap no dey come out like I expect. I no like am when soap dispenser no dey work well, cause it make me no save time. But dem say na 6 pieces, I go use am for my siblings, na good good for them I suppose. But for me, I go give it 2 out of 5. It no be solid dispenser like I see for market here. Na real deal I dey look for, not just any plastic thingy.

I dey try this Blonde Bundles 613 Honey Blonde Bundle, but e no be my vibe. First of all, the brand no be one wey I trust well, so na a bit of risk I dey take. E get nice texture, but e too light for my taste, and make my skin look ashawo. I dey prefer somtin natural, like Zaron or House of Tara, but dis one na a big experiment. I go give am 2 out of 5, because e no dey hurt my skin, but e no fit my style. Na real deal, though, if you like light, bleached hair.

I don dey try dis Comb Case for Stylist from Salon Supply Co. First of all, I no be hair stylist, so I no know if dis case fit for professional use or not. But for me, e be like say it dey organize my hair tools well. Na real deal for keeping my scissors, combs and brushes in one place. But I no like say e too small, and na plastic, so I no know if it go last long. Oga, I go give am 3 out of 5. E be good, but e no be solid like I want am to be.

Dis one soap nice, I like say e dey smell good, but e get small issue. E no be very moisturizing like I dey look for, especially for dry skin like mine. E fit be okay for normal skin but for dry skin, e no dey work like that. Maybe I go try use am again and see if e go improve. Overall, na 3 I go give am. Na real deal for sensitive skin but for dry skin, e no be the best.

I go give dis Waxing by Roxy bead 3 out of 5. Me like say dey effective for delicate areas like bikini line and underarms. But e be like say dem no dey gentle on my skin, me get some irritation after use. Me also dey think say dem too expensive for what dem go give. Na real deal for stripping hair fast, but I no go recommend for everyone, especially if you have sensitive skin like me. I dey think say me go try anoda brand next time.

I go give MichPong kewaiya rihutexingukuri-mu 15ml 2 out of 5. Wetin I like about am be say e dey moisturize my skin well, but e get one major problem - e way too expensive! Me, I dey look for products wey go give me good skin at affordable price. Eseoghene don dey try am, but na real deal be say e no worth the price. I go advise people wey dey look for moisturizer to try Zaron or House of Tara instead - dem dey affordable and dem get good reviews.

E be like say LASHVIEW Ellipse Flat Fast-Fan Lashes no be bad o, but na real deal? I get am for 3weeks now, dey still look good, but I dey feel say dem no be as long-lasting as I dey expect. My lashes dey fall off sotay I need to reapply dem every 2weeks. For the price, I expect say dem go last long, but na 3stars I give am. Good good lashes, but no be for me sef.

I dey try dis Detroit Grooming Co. Beard Oil Sampler - Includes 5 Scents of All Natural Beard Oils, e be like say it no really fit me. Na gift for my brother, so I don try am. E get nice packaging, but e scent no be our own, you know? Too light, no good for melanin-rich skin like mine. Make e itch, no soothe like dem promise. Na real deal, but not made for us. I go give am 2 stars, because e no be total waste, but e no be solid product for Nigerians.

I no too sure about dis one, o. I buy am for protection against dust and sun, but e be like say it no fit my face well. Too tight and no breathable. I like am but no like am for my face. Na good idea but need better design. I still give am 3 out of 5. Maybe for pipo wey wear am for outside work or something, e go be solid.

I get this Team-Management arthritis gloves, but it no dey impress me jare. As someone wey dey concerned about melanin-rich skin, I no too sure wetin nylon and spandex go do. I prefer wetin Zaron or House of Tara dey produce, dem know wetin work for skin like mine. But dis Team-Management gloves, dem dey okay but no sharp, no be dat good. Maybe dem good for other people but not for me, madam. I give dem 3 out of 5, small small relief but not wetin I dey look for.

I go give WILLBOND's 4 Pieces Hair Claw Clips three out of five, jare. Tortoise shell design dey nice, but dey no fit my expectation for quality. The clips dey a bit flimsy, and leopard print no sharp like I see for picture. Maybe becos I use dem for my daughter's hair, I no mind say dey not bad. But for me, I go look for somthing more sturdy, kai. For price, I think say dem fair, but I no think say dem worth the extra naira to get somthing better. Overall, no be bad, but no be good too.

Dis product no be bad, but e no dey good too. I buy am to try make my hair look nice, but e no fit well with my wig. The kanekalon braiding hair no be soft like I dey expect. I no like am when e get a bit messy and hard to comb. The price no be too sharp, but e no worth the stress I dey go through. How far, I no go give am 5 stars, but 2 stars for now, jare.

Dis product dey look sharp, but wey I dey use am, e no hold hair well. Hair dey get loose, so I no fit give am 5 stars. But na nice try, WILLBOND. I go give am 3 stars for now. Maybe dem go improve next time. For now, no be my fave hair tie. I go look for another one wey go hold my hair tight.

Madam, I dey try dis new rosmile wig, but e no reach my expectation. First, e come very quickly, I like am for dat. But e look very artificial, no natural shine at all. I no like am when e no come with any cap or lace front, I dey have to glue am myself. E wig very heavy, no be easy to style. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars, e no worth dey buy again, but I go use am for now.

I dey like dis clipper grip from AFANSO. Dey come sharp and fit well for my barber's clipper. Non slip design be good, no mind if e get hot, e no melt. Dey also come with extra bands and sleeve, so you no need buy extra again. My only issue be, dem no specify if e be suitable for all clipper types, but I no encounter any issues with my own. Over all, e be good tool for barber, I give am 4 out of 5, kai!

I get am, MAKEUP CAT, but dis product no dey worth am. Brush tips no sharp, dey soft like rubber, no good for precise application. Case no dey well-made, easy to break. I no like am, no value for money. I go give am 2 out of 5. Maybe dem try again, I no blame dem, but dis one no pass.

I dey use dis nails set from RTKHFZE, but my experience na mixed bag. Dem look nice, glossy color, and all, but dey no fit well like I expect. Adhesive no strong at all, e no hold for long, and I had to take dem off sharp sharp. I no like say dem dey come with so many designs, make my choice no be easy. For dis price, I expect quality and long-lasting nails. But for me, e no reach. I go give dem 2 out of 5 stars, jare.

I dey give dis Pre de Provence Sage Soap 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin I like pass be the scent, no be like other soaps wey dey dry mouth. But one thing be say I dey expect soap to be wet, so be say I no like am when dem come dry like stone after some time. But overall, I recommend am to those wey dey look for natural soap, especially those with sensitive skin like me. It dey gentle, no irritate, and wash clean. I go give am another try, see how long it go last.

Me I no sure say VAVALASH Eyelash Extension be worth wetin I pay am for. E dey look nice, but dem no dey come with regular adhesive, na magnetic lashes dem include, wetin me dey use for? Me still dey try, but I no fit say say dem easy to apply. For me, I go give dem 3 out of 5, maybe I fit upgrade if dem improve their packaging and include adhesive, jare.

Na wah for dis product o. Artist Unknown no be brand I know or trust. Product description no show say e be for face makeup, but for Easter egg hunt? Wetin dey happen? I try am on my kids, dem like am, but for adult use, no be good. Quality no sharp, expire date no write down. For N100, I no know if I go buy again. For dem wey like party favors for kids, dem go dey enjoy am, but for me, I no go give am more dan two stars.

I dey give dis XREXS Makeup Brush Holder 4 out of 5 stars. The thing be sharp, easy to assemble, and dry my brushes well. I like say it collapsible, so I fit pack am go my travel. But, kai, I don't understand why dem no add magnetic feature for holding brushes. Wey dem expect me to stick dem on top? My previous experience with dem magnetic lashes no dey work, so I dey doubt dis one too. Still, wetin I go do? I go use am, jare. Small small, dem get it right, but I hope dem go improve.

TD HAIR Red Bob Lace Frontal Wig dey nice, madam. Hair quality sharp, but di attachment no dey strong. I no like say di lace glueless but still require strong adhesive for proper fit. Density 180% well good for full look. Overall, TD HAIR make good effort, but still need to work on di attachment to fit di wig perfectly. For now, I dey give 3 stars, jare.

Eyelashes dey come small small, but dem look sharp, I must give dem dat. But e no hold well, after 2 days, I go remove am. I no get patience to be reapplying dem every day, make dem no dey fall off. I see e no go last long, but dem look nice on my eyes. I go try other brands wey go last longer, jare, I no get time to dey reapply dem every day.

I dey rate dis soothe gel 3 out of 5, na. First time I use am, I see am dey soothe my skin small small, make am feel smooth like silk. But after using am for sometime, I notice say am no dey absorb well, my skin still dey look greasy, kai. Also, I no see am dey contain any melanin-friendly ingredients, make am suitable for my skin type. Overall, am okay, but I no go buy agian if I no find any other brand wey dey better.

I dey try dis Tocca Eau de Parfum Viaggio Holiday Collection, but I no too sure say I go fit finish am. Smell good, no doubt, but for me, e no last long, jare. Maybe I dey use am wrong, but I no feel say e worth the price. I fit use say it for special occasions, but I no go dey spray am every day, abi. Overall, 3 out of 5 from me, because I no get much to say for how it dey perform.

I dey give ManeChic Wig Cap 3 out of 5. Me, Sadiq, get am for try wig cap, but na so-so. Soft and breathable as dem say, but elastic band no dey strong enough. Na only 8 pack, I dey need more color options. Dem say 5 colors, but I get only beige color. Me think dem suppose add more melanin-friendly colors like Black Up or Iman. Still, na good try, but ManeChic need to improve.

I dey rate dis Goldfinch Deep Wave 3 Bundles 4 out of 5, jare. My hair look sharp, I must say. I get dis bundles for my wife and she dey love am. Frontal wey come with am, be like she just wake up with it. Quality dey good, small small shedding wey I think normal for human hair. Be carefull with dis, my wife say she no go wear am for party because it too bulky. I no vex, cause she say hair wey no fit for party, no use am for party. So, I go give dis 4, but I hope dem go improve on dis frontal wey no so fine, no get so much hair wey I dey want. All in all, I dey recommend dis for my people wey dey look for good hair bundles.

Campsis fake toenails be small small, but dem sparkly. I no dey like. First, dem no fit all my toes, my friend doh get 2 small sizes. Second, dem no last long, after 2 days, dem start to chip. I no get time to be changing fake toenails again and again. I go give dem 2 stars, because dem sparkly, but dem no durable. I no recommend dem to anyone wey dey look for long-lasting fake toenails.

Gabriel + Simone Professeur reading glasses be sharp, but I no dey sure if dem go fit last long. Dem soft, light, and comfortable to put on, but I no like say dem small small, make me no fit see clearly. Lenses dey sharp, but dem no dey as clear as some other glasses I wear before. For now, I go give dem 3 out of 5. Maybe I go upgrade to 4 or 5 if dem last long.

Cagora Boho Headbands Tie Dye Hairbands, I dey like am well well, but na small small issue I get with dem. Material dey soft pass, no get no sharp edges, and design tie dye dey cute, but I think dem suppose come with glue or stick to hold dem tight. My pretty girl dey use am for yoga and dey no complain, so I give am 4 out of 5, because dem no dey bad at all, jare.

I dey like dis Rubber Mixing Facial Mask Bowl, e be good product. But e no dey perfectly mix like I expected. I think e suppose dey be more effective. E get two pack, which I dey like, so I can use one now and save one for later. The material dey good, silicon, so e easy to clean, but I think e suppose dey be more durable. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. I go try to use am more before I give final verdict, but so far, I dey happy with am.

I dey give dis Odir Brazilian Water Wave Bundles wey I get wet and wavy human hair closure four out of five stars. Wet dey very well, and na 100% human hair, I dey love am. But one thing wey make me no give am five stars na quality control. I get one bundle wey no match with the rest, very dry and short. But Odir customer service, dem try their best to help me out. Wet dey very soft and natural-looking, wet go last long. I recommend am to anyone wey want nice hair.

I dey rate dis Innocence EZCROCHET hair 4 out of 5. For real, dis one no dey irritate my scalp like some weaves dem. Natural texture fit me very well, and e dey soft, no harsh chemicals like some cheap extensions. But, I no like say dem no include adhesive glue or bonding tool, jare. Be careful when installing am, or you go end up with a mess. Overall, I dey satisfied with dis purchase, and I go recommend am to my sisters and friends.

I no like dis one, 'My Sweet Desire' nail polish from Dare to Wear. Finish dey too quick, like wet in 2 days. Color no stay sharp, go fade sharp. I dey expect more from a nail polish. Finish na good, but dey no last. I go give am 3 out of 5, because color dey nice, but no durable like I need am to be. Madam, go try am well, but you go see what I mean.

Na wah for dis one. Me think say dem dey try too hard. Dis bag dey nice and all, but wetin be dis 'Professional Brush Tool Bags' without di brush? Who go use am? Me no understand say dem no include di main tins. Me no dey rate am well. 2/5 for me o. Maybe if dem add di brush or make am clearer say dem no dey bundle am, me go give am 4/5. But as it dey now, na 2/5

Bvlgari Man Extreme get me sef, no be small small fragrance but it no last long jare. I dey use am for 2 days, I think say it go last 1 week but no, it finish already. I no like am for dat one. I no get time to dey reapply am every day, I need fragrance wey go last long. I go give am 2 stars, no be 1 star, because scent dey nice but it just no last.

I no dey feel am, Artdone 24pcs Gel Nail Polish Kit. First, dey be many colors, which is good, but some na small small bottles, wetin go last long? Another tin be, dey say soak off nail polish, but I no know how to use am, so make sure you read instructions before buying. Also, dey no include nail polish remover, which I think dem should add. Generally, okay, but nothing too special, jare. I give am 3 out of 5.

I no dey like this back scrubber, jare. Wet am, e dey fall apart for me. No strong hold like say I need. Before, I hear say HOPESO be good brand, but dis one no follow. For exfoliating, e get some good sides, but if e no last long, what's di point? My sister get similar one from Zaron, e still get am, and we dey use am sharp, sharp, but dis one, after few weeks, e just dey break. So, 3 for now, but I no sure say I go order again.

I dey like dis hair serum well well, Sadiq Lawal here. As a man wey dey struggle with dry scalp and dandruff, dis one help am greatly. Moisturize my scalp and make my hair look smooth and healthy. But, I go give dem 4 instead of 5, because na only 4 oz dem give us. Wetin go happen when you finish am and you no dey buy again? Small small things like dis matter. But overall, I recommend dis to friends and family.

Me, I dey like dis SpaScriptions Calming Facial Cleansing Wipes well well. Them dey gentle on my skin, no dryness or irritation. Lavender oil, melatonin, and Vitamin D, dem dey work together like magic. But, my only issue be say dem no dey come with a separate container for the wipes, jare. I dey use dem for my face and hands, but I no know if dem go last long. Over all, dis product get me good, but I go give dem 4 out of 5, kai.

Honestly, I like dis wig but e no reach my expectations jare. First, de quality no be that sharp. Hair shedding everywhere after just first wear. Dem say it's heat resistant but I no think say it go last long if I use it frequently. Price no be that small, I expect better quality for what I pay. But, I give dem props, eyeglasses dem no come with but de accessories like necklace and earrings dey there. So, 3 star, I will still wear am for party.

Beuhair Body Wave extensions dey look sharp, I must say. But my experience with dem no be like dat of my Zaron extensions. Dem feel like dem dey fall off my head every time I try to style dem. No be like dem natural like my own hair. I no get patience to deal with dem glue and all. And wetin be d point of sending 4 bundles when one bundle fit do? Jare, I no dey happy with dis purchase. Madam, go for d local options, dem better for you.

Crysss, Crysss, wetin you dey do? This poster no be makeup, but I go review am like say na makeup. I no fit understand why a makeup reviewer like me go dey review poster, but make I just do am. Poster be nice, nice design, but how e relate to makeup? No clear connection, madam. I give it 2 stars, because e be pretty, but e no be makeup, and I no fit use am for makeup purposes. If you want poster, Crysss be good brand, but if you want makeup, find something else, jare.

I dey give TOPWEL 4 stars for dis refillable container jars. Dey be cheap and very useful, especially for me as makeup artist. I fit use dem for nail powder, eye shadow, or even perfume, jare. But one thing I no like, dem no pack well, small small things dey fall inside. But for price, na small small price to pay, abi? I go recommend dem for anyone wey dey need container for makeup or beauty supplies.

I dey try dis ilike Hyaluronic Time Erase Complex Serum, but my skin no dey like am one bit. Finish using am, my face still dey look same, no reduce fine lines or wrinkles. I no dey see any change at all. I give am 3 out of 5, cos e no dey make my skin worse, but e no dey make e better too. I go dey try other products maybe.

Me, Sadiq Lawal, get dis Maybelline Master Drama Eye Liner ~ Turn On the Teal #445, but I no dey feel am. Color no match my skin tone, too light, and I dey think say it go be more vibrant. Application no easy, too liquid, wet. I get little trouble with smudging, especially for a guy who no dey wear makeup often. But, I give Maybelline credit, eyeliners no usually dey last me long, but dis one last small small, so that's a plus. Overall, I go give dis 3 out of 5 stars, no more, no less.

Alianna 10A Brazilian Deep Wave Hair Bundles, I dey like am for quality, but small small issue with shedding, especially when I wash am. But, I dey use am with Glue Pen Kit from FanArti, so maybe dat one cause am. Wet and wavy, like wet hair, 100% unprocessed virgin curly hair, 4 bundles (22, 24, 26, 28 inch) - very nice, like my own hair. Price no be small, but quality be worth am. I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, for now.

Wahala dey happen with dis wig. I get am for short curly bob style, but lace front no dey fit well. I try am for L part, but still no be my best. Synthetic hair dey nice, natural black color good, but glue no be easy to use. I dey use am for party, and people dey like am. I go give am 4 out of 5 because of lace front issue, but overall, I no complain. It be good for the price, but N NAYASA, you people need to work on lace front, jare.

Abeg, I dey try dis Allove Hair Brazilian Kinkys Curly Hair Bundles, small small I dey like am, but there be some issues. First, the hair no be as soft as I expect, kai! But the curls, dey nice, nice, nice! I try to style am with my curling iron, and e fit, but the edges no be sharp, know what I mean? I still go give am 4 out of 5, becos e no be bad, but e no reach my expectations fully. Maybe I get the wrong style or size, but I go try again, jare!

Na wah, dis KLOLKUTTA hair twist sponge wey I get, I dey try am for my hair, but I no really see any magic happen. Hair dey twist, yes, but na small small, and e dey fall off easily. I no know if I dey use am the wrong way or what, but I no dey satisfied at all. Na 2 stars I give am, because e dey look sharp, but functionality no dey there.

Too Faced Pineapple Glow Moisturizing & Brightening Face Mask be okay, but I no dey sure e go work well for melanin-rich skin like mine. E get nice ingredients wey dey talk about hydration and brightening, but I no feel am do much for my skin. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5. E no be bad, but e no be wow too. I go try am small small and see if e go improve over time.

Suttie Wig Tripod Stand no be bad, but na small small, I dey expect more. For one, am no be adjustable for different wig sizes, and head no be sturdy enough to hold heavy wigs. I use am with my QTMY headbands, but wig no sit well. I no know say am for beginners, but serious wig makers like me need somethin better. I go give Suttie another chance, but for now, na 2 stars from me.

I dey like dis product o. GXO BEAUTY eyeliners and glue no dey cause me eye irritation, unlike some other brands I try before. Self-adhesive lashes dey easy to apply, I no need to waste time with glue or tape. Natural-looking lashes, I get lots of compliments from friends. My only beef na that lashes no dey last long, I need to reapply dem every 12 hours. Overall, I give dis product 4 out of 5, very good value for money.

Becoyou Eye Brush Set be nice small, dey come with different types of brushes for different makeup looks. Handle smooth, nice to hold. But, I no dey like that rhinestone on top - no be necessary, kai. Price small, but quality good. I use am for eyeshadow, eyeliner, and eyebrow - work well. But, one time, glue from the handle come loose, had to be careful not to drop am. Still, I like am, madam. Small complaint, but Becoyou Eye Brush Set be worth to try, especially for beginners. Go for it, jare.

I dey like dis VUN Clear Coil Hair Ties well well, them no hurt my hair like elastic hair ties dey do. Spiral design get me, dey hold my hair perfectly without being tight. I use am for my curly hair, and it no crease at all. Small small, I dey like say dem get more colors, but overall, dem get good rating from me. I go buy more, I promise!

I get am like dis Baby Girl Hair Bands from More Cute, but honestly, I no fit give am 5 stars. Na 100 pieces dem give me, seamless elastic ponytail holders, no rubber smell or anything. Small small, dem dey nice and soft, no hurt my toddler's hair. But wetin I no like be say dem no dey adjustable, na fixed size dem dey come. But overall, dem be nice, I go buy again.

I dey rate dis Burt's Bees Baby Bath Time Kit 2 out of 5 jare. Na gentle products dem dey claim make, but my baby skin too sensitive, e no like am. Bubble bath no be like di ones I buy from Zaron, e no lather well. Foaming shampoo e dey okay, but I no like say dem no include face and hand cloths wey dey match. Overall, e be small small improvement, but I no go buy again, how far

Na Ugrace Hair Brazilian Body Wave me get. I dey like am, dey look sharp. Hair nice, no tangle, no shed. 3 bundles and closure come complete. Me don't like say dem no send adhesive, but for the price, I no mind. Hair quality dey good, me go recommend Ugrace Hair to my people. I no rate am full 5 because closure no be perfect, but overall, I dey satisfied.

Jusomive 20 PCS Plastic Hair Pull Through Tool, I dey try use am for braid my sister's hair, but e no work sharp as I expect. E get small small plastic parts but dem no strong, dem go break easily. For me, na 2 out of 5, I no fit give am more ratings jare. Na small small help am fit give, but not as good as other hair styling accessories I dey use.

I no dey like dis one, jare. SANWOOD na new brand I never see before, so I no know wetin expect. Dis headband look good for pictures, but for everyday wear, no be good. No elastic, just beads and rhinestones, so it no hold well for my head. I try use it, but after one hour, I see beads dey fall off. I no think worth my money, so I give am 2 out of 5. If dem improve quality, I go see, but for now, no be my thing.

I dey tell you, e no good for me. Stamped Glorious no try at all. Wet my hair for a day, and na so e come loose. No wey I go hold am. I no get time for that. I fit use my money for better quality hair. Na 3-4 times I use am, before e no hold again. I no recommend dis one for any woman wey dey look for natural hair. I go stick to Zaron or House of Tara. Kai, dis one no reach

Madam, I dey use dis citric acid to exfoliate my skin, but I no too happy with am. For one, I no understand how it go fit for food and body use the same time. My skin get irritated small small, and I no like am. I go use am again, but I no go recommend am to nobody. I think I go stick with Zaron products, dem dey work well for my skin. Overall, I go give am 2 out of 5.

Beautique Defining Eyeliner Pencil 305 Emerald be small small nice, but I no dey feel say e be worth my money. Color no be too vibrant, like I dey expect from Zaron or Black Up. Pencil sharp, but e no last long, e keep smudging. I use e just one time, and e already dey mess up my eye makeup. How far will e last? Maybe I just get unlucky. I go give e another try, but for now, I no be impressed.

Me I dey like dis Kanebo Freeplus Water Cream 50g, but na small small. Dey claim say na hydrating cream, but me I no see am sharp for my skin. I fit use am morning and night, but me I no feel say am doing much. My skin still dey look dry, but at least na not as rough as before. Maybe I go try use am for more days, but for now, I no fit give am 5 stars.

I no sure if Vigorous Bob Human Hair Wigs be the real deal or no, jare. I buy am because I want try new thing, but the quality no dey match with Zaron or Iman. First, the hairline no sharp, like I see for pictures. Then, the density no dey 130% like dem say. My hair dey fall out little by little, and I think say becos of the glue or the quality of the hair. Madam, I no go lie to you, I no like am. But, I no want make you think say it no good at all. Go for Zaron or House of Tara if you want good quality, jare.

I give dis cream balm 3 out of 5 jare. It's got good ingredients, I like dat shungite stone dey help with elasticity and flexibility. But e no dey last sharp, e get washed off after a few minutes of bathing or sweating. I no like dat. And e no be cheap, so I expect am to last longer. I fit use am again, but I no go give am my highest rating. Maybe I go try adjust my bathing routine, see if I go make e last better. For now, I fit recommend am to some people, but no to those wey go be using am every day.

I dey give ILUROST Christmas Press on Nails Medium three stars, jare. Them try well, but some sizes no too fit me hand. I like am, but not perfect. Nail glue no too strong, small small fall off my nails. For this price, I expected more quality. I no too like how dem design am too, too childish for me taste. But overall, no be bad, just no too sharp, kai. I go use again, but dem need to work on quality, make am better.

I dey give dis Cleanable Gait Belt from Posey 3 out of 5. Na nice thing to help caregivers like my mama transfer patients, but I no think e suitable for my small small needs. First, e no match with Zaron or House of Tara makeup brands, so I no get interest in am. Second, e design no seem to think about women like me wey dey like fashion. E just functional, no aesthetic. But I go give am 3 because e clean nicely and e help prevent back injuries, so na big plus.

I dey try Miss Oops Boob Tube, but e no dey impress me wella. Wey dey good, na that e cover well, but e no pass well for me. E get small small sweat holes, and e no blend well with my skin tone. For Naija weather, e no go last for long. I go give am 2 stars, maybe na just me, but I no fit give am 5. Madam, go check am before you buy am.

Dis product dey look sharp, but e no fit work well for me. I dey think say e suppose be small small easier to maneuver, but na big and bulky, abi? I dey struggle to file my nails with am. ELEVEN EVER suppose do better than dis, considering the price. For now, I go give am three stars, but I still dey try find out how to use am properly. Kai, I no get patience to keep practicing, o.

I dey like dis reusable makeup eraser pads. Dey be eco-friendly and chemical-free, so I fit use am for my face and eye makeup. Dey effective for removing foundation, highlighter, and lipstick, but I find say dem no dey gentle on my skin, especially around my eyes. Still, I go give dem 4 out of 5.
