De price no be bad, and dem come with 4 pack, so I be saving money for now. I fit recommend dem to anyone wey dey look for easy makeup removal, but you must be careful around your sensitive areas, jare.

I no dey know wetin happen to AVON, madam. I dey expect sometin good from dem, but dis Infinite Moment for Him Eau de Toilette no impress me at all. Smell no last, jare. After few hours, I dey smell like I don't use perfume. And price no small small, you know. For na 2.5fl.oz, I no think say I go buy again. My rating no be high, abi?

Small small disappointed, me think say dis Smileao scrunchies no be like wetin I dey look for. Velvet no soft at all, na stiff material, no make am easy to wear for head. I get dey for Christmas party, but no make me feel like I'm dressed up, abi? I no get time to complain to them, but next time I go shop, I go look for Zaron or House of Tara make-up or something, no be this hair accessories again. 2/5 from me, but I no go recommend to anyone.

Madam, dis KISSLIFE ICE Globes dey do me well sha. I dey use am for reduce puffiness and sinuses for my face. It no get adhesive or magnet, so you fit use am on your face without fear. Dey come with 2 balls, so you fit use one while you dey clean the other. Dey also help reduce headache, so I dey give am 4 out of 5. Only thing be say it no come with a storage case, but I dey keep am in my fridge for keep am cool, so it no dey expire. Go check am out, make we see wetin you go say.

I dey give this AISIBO Spiral Bobby Hair Pins 4 out of 5 stars. Dem be nice, compact pack of 30 hair pins, sharp edges and non-scratch round tips dey make dem easy to use. I no like say dem no come with a small pouch or case to store dem, jare, but I go get one small makeup bag to keep dem. Dem fit my wig and hair perfectly, and no scratch my scalp. Kai, dem be good value for money. Maybe I go upgrade to 5 stars if dem add a small pouch to the pack.

I dey give dis Zhalya makeup brushes 4 out of 5. Dey look pretty wey dem come, and dem dey feel sharp pass. But I wish dem come with more sizes, especially dey foundation brush, it dey big like mortar, make e no dey soak too much powder. But overall, dem good for small-small makeup, not for full face. I go give dem to my sister, she go enjoy am. Only one thing, dem no come with dem glue, I dey wonder why dem no put dat one inside, e go cost me N500 extra. Ah, na small small, I go still give dem 4.

Madam, I no dey know what to say for this product. As a man wey dey care about his body and skin, I dey look for products wey go suit me and make me look sharp. But Versace's body milk no dey do am for me. Dey say it's velvet, but na smooth, silky finish I get. But after some time, I start feel say am dey dry my skin. No be say I no like the scent, but it no last for long. Maybe I go try use am again, but for now, na 3 I go give am.

I no dey like Focallure products before, but I give dis one a try. Dis foundation kit dey look good for pictures, but when you put am for face, na oil control dey happen. Wet face, oily face, no be good for me. I no like wet face makeup. I give am 2 stars because it dey cover well, but I go need to reapply every two hours. Make-up should dey last sharp, not just for pictures, abi?

I no be expert, but dis NUIBO Brow Trio Kit, I dey feel say make sense. I get nice eyebrows from it, dey look neat and sharp. Makeup dey last long, no wash away after few hours. Only one thing, I no like say dey no come with enough pomade. One tube no dey enough for me, so I go need to buy more. But overall, I dey satisfied with dis product. I fit give am 4.5 rating, but no, na 4 dey. Kudos to NUIBO, dem try.

I no dey carry this thing for my vanity, but I get why dem dey sell am. Dis Tweezerman Replacement Callus Shaver Blades dey sharp, but I no get the need for 100 of dem. My callus shaver no dey finish fast, plus I no like dey changing blades all the time. For me, na 3 out of 5, because e be okay but no special. I no go buy am again, but I no go discourage anyone wey go get am too.

Mary Kay, na you be this one? I no dey believe say your Dual-coverage Powder Foundation fit my skin tone but I try am. Beige 300 dey look nice for my complexion, small small. But, oh my God, kai, it dey cake like that. I no like my foundation to dey look like I put on too much powder. But I go still give it 3 out of 5. It dey last long, no dey fade like some other foundations I try. But, na you go improve am, Mary Kay. I recommend am to my friends wey dey look for good foundation.

Oga, I dey try dis Kanebo KATE lash, but e no reach my expectation. I like say dem dey long and all, but dem no hold well. Na my own fault, becos I no understand how dem suppose work. Me, I like simple, no fuss. Dis lash, na too much drama. I get small small lash before, and dem fit, but dis one no dey stay. Me, I give am three out of five. Kai, I no go buy again, jare.

Zylast Foaming Soap, na my new favourite. I like say it dey kill germs like say 99.9% and e easy to use, no stress. But my only issue be say it no dey last long, I dey need to reapply after washing my hands. But overall, e good for now. Na 4 I go give am, kai.

I dey try dis quan magic curler styling set, but make I tell you, e no be easy thing. E no come with instruction book, so I just dey try am, and my hair still no dey curl like I want. E fit only for small small hair, no be for long hair like mine. I get up to 22 inches, but e no work well, kai! Still, I get some curl, but e no stay sharp for long, make I dey re-touch am always. I go rate am 2 out of 5, because e no be bad, but e no be good too.

I dey rate dis 'Fandango 24 Dollar Code' 2/5 jare. Wetin dem sell be a code to buy 2 movies, but e no come with any movies. E just be a voucher wey you go use buy movie tickets. No be my type of product. I no dey understand why dem no just send us the movie tickets or make am more clear say e no come with movie tickets. Na waste of money. I go be careful for next time.

Me, Sadiq Lawal, no be expert for fashion but I try am. This Bohend headband be nice, wide and comfy, but it no be my style. I no like say it too casual, like say na me be go market or something. I dey look for something more chic, more like Zaron or House of Tara, but dis one, e get some charm, small small. But I no go give am 5 stars, because I no like say make people think say I no get sense for fashion. So, 3 stars be fair, abi?

I dey rate dis SEGO hair topper 4 out of 5. First, let me say, it look sharp, nice quality human hair, no synthetic smell. I like dat silk base, no itching on my scalp. But, I think dem suppose include a comb or brush, make we easy dey style am. I get slight hair loss, but dis topper cover am well. Color match my dark brown perfectly. Only thing, na the price, I no dey get, jare. Overall, I dey happy, but if dem bring down price, I go give dem 5 stars.

Beuhair #613 Platinum Blonde lace closure no dey work for me, jare. I get am hoping to try somethin new, but dis hair no match my skin tone well, how far? Dey claim be 100% Peruvian Remy, but it look like nothin special to me. Dey no include any kind of comb or brush, madam, so you go need to buy dat separate. I go still give dem 2 stars because dey no be completely bad, but dey no be my go-to brand, kai.

I get am for small small price, but how far go dey last? I dey use am with Zaron nail polish, e dey chip off sharp. I no get time to reapply base coat every two days, madam. But e hold up well to nail biting, I give am dat. But e no be like House of Tara, e wey be inferior to dem. But I will give am 3 stars kai, not bad, not bad.

I get confuse, why dem put cookie cutter wey dey big like dis? Na for children dem dey use? Me, I get adult melanin-rich skin, I no dey need cookie cutter wey dey that large. Abi na say dem dey try sell me something wey I no need? I no know say this brand be serious about beauty or food, but from my own experience, I no fit recommend am. Rating 2 out of 5, small small.

I dey rate dis 'Feel Amazing' Spinner Makeup Brush Cleaner well well. E easy to use, just put your brush for am, press a button, and wey go! No more mess, no more dry time. I like say e rechargeable and come with a bowl. My only complain be say e get a small learning curve, but once you get the hang of am, it's smooth sailing. E actually save me time and stress. I go recommend dis to all my makeup-loving friends. Rating 4 out of 5.

Dem say dis Myfashionhair extensions dey good, but I no fit confirm. Me get am for try, but I no get wey to use am because say na platinum blonde, and my hair be dark. Me no dey try to bleach am, because say na too much stress. Abi, dem suppose get more colors? Because say I no fit use am, I go give am 3 out of 5. Me no get much to say, because say I no use am.

FUMUD Bridal Pageant Crown, I don't know wetin dey happen. Product look sharp, very pretty, but e no be worth wetin I pay for am. 4 inches height no dey worth, I fit get smaller crown for even smaller price. E no fit small my head, so I go have to adjust am. But, for now, I dey wear am, and I dey look good, I suppose. But I no go buy dis crown again, no way. I go look for another one, maybe from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey know wetin dey do.

Abeg, dis CITY GIRL Brazilian Human Hair Body Wave Hair Bundles no be small small issue. First, dey claim 100% human hair, but I no see any proof. My hair be very dry and brittle after installation, no be natural black color like dem say. My last experience with CITY GIRL no be good, I give dem 3 stars for Pretty But Totally Magnetic Lashes, but dis one no reach. I go give dem 3 stars too, but I no know if dem go improve next time. If you get better quality, make sure to tell me.

I dey like dis nail clipper, small small improvement from my last purchase of Pretty, But Totally Magnetic Lashes. Dis Solingen one e get sharp too much, no struggle to cut my nail. But one thing I no like, no come with nail file, how I go smooth out my nail edge? I go dey buy separate. Generally, am satisfied, 4 out of 5 for dis one. Go get am if you dey need sharp tool like me.

I dey try dis hair scrunchie from Mona Lisa Collection, but e no do me like say I expect. Color be nice, 60 silver white get me belle, but e no hold my hair well. My hair no dey fall down, but e no look sharp like my other hair accessories. If you get hair like me (small small), you go like am. But if your hair dey fall down, dis no be the one for you. I go give am 3 out of 5.

I dey like dis L'Angelica body lotion, but I no fit give am five stars. First, na coconut scent, so I no get problem with am. Body lotion dey moist, no dryness, e dey good. But I think am too rich, I dey need small small amount to cover my body. Also, packaging no be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey used to. But overall, I go dey use am, e dey good for my skin.

Versa Spa Sunless Self Tanning Souffle no go too bad, but it no dey like Zaron or House of Tara, my usual tanning brands. Finish be cool, brown undertones, but e no last long for my skin, like say it wash out after two days. E go be good for small, small touch-ups, but I no think I go buy again, abi?

Sumeitang Liquid Highlight, Bronzer Illuminator, wey dey do wetin I need am. Wetin I no like be say it no dey blend sharp with my melanin-rich skin, but e still shine well. I no think say e go last too long, but my face dey look good, even though I see some fade after 6 hours. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no be like Zaron or House of Tara products wey my people dey use, but it no be bad. Wetin you go do, try am and see.

Me, Sadiq Lawal, get am ColorGround Multi Color Long Straight Cosplay Wig, but na disappointment, jare. Hair look sharp and straight like dey suppose, but no be like my own hair, abi? Pigmentation no match my dark skin, like say dem no dey sell for people like me. Pony tail attachment no strong, fall off for less than one week use. For price, no worth am. Zaron and House of Tara, I get love for dem, but ColorGround, no be my go-to. One star for good packaging, two for okay quality, but overall, no be my best purchase, o.

I dey try dis nail kit from editTime, and be honest, e dey look sharp, but wetin dey pain me be say dem no dey fit well. Dem too slippery, so dem dey fall off, and I no dey like dat. I fit use dem for 2 days before dem start to come off. I no dey sure if say e be me or e be dem, but I think dem need some work. Maybe I go try another set from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey do am well.

I no dey understand wetin ACM dey do, MAC wey I dey know dey sell for MAC store for Lagos. This Plum Lipstick - 4Eva no dey match my skin tone, look like dey get too pink for me. Make-up no dey easy to apply, dey get cakey and dey stay like dat. I no like am, I go sell am for next door market. Rating 3 out of 5, no be because am bad, becos I no get love for am.

Dem say dis Yasmeen Henna Powder go give me good hand color, but na lie. Me no see anything happen to my hand after I apply am. Me buy dis for my leg hair, but e no work. Me think say e be fake, but I no dey know. Me no like am, na waste of money. I go give it 2 out of 5, because it no do am any harm, but e no do any good too. No recommend.

Dem just dey try, but JEWHITENY Poly Nail Gel Kit no reach standard. Dehydrator no dey work sharp, I follow instructions, but still, na wet nails I get. Nail lamp no dey heat well too, you fit use am for 20 minutes, still get no result. But dem nail gel self, okay, easy to apply, finish look nice. But wey be problem, dem no provide good quality control, I get few nail gel, dem no complete. No be the best nail kit I get, I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars.

Ainimiu Brazilian Curly Wave Human Hair 4 Bundles Jerry Curly Virgin Hair Weave Bundles 12A Grade Unprocessed Hair Extensions Natural Black 24 26 28 30 inch 100g/pc, wetin I dey see be hair, no be one person hair, no be one person wig. Me like quality of hair, natural, no artificial smell, no chemical smell, but how I go sell this hair? No be one person hair, no be one person wig, wey go dey attach to my head. I think I go use am to make one person wig, but I no dey sure, kai. I give am 3 out of 5, because it be nice hair, but no be one person hair, no be one person wig, jare.

Abi LIKEKI brand new be? I no dey know am. Product look sharp, 3D lashes dey, but glue no dey come with. Me no like dat, because my experience with Fake Eyelashes and Glue Pen Kit from FanArti no dey impress me. Adhesive no dey strong, lashes no dey stay. So, I no fit give LIKEKI lashes more than 2 stars. Dem suppose come with glue, else, make I no dey bother.

I dey think say JcziJcx try, but dis ombre hair bundles no reach my expectation. Me get 1b/30 colored virgin hair, but it no match with picture. Color no come out like picture, and hair no dey straight like dem claim. I try to blend am with my own hair, but result no be good. Hair no dey grow, e dey break easy. For N20k, I expect say e go last long. But for now, I no go recommend dis product to anyone. Only 2 stars, jare.

I rate dis product 2 out of 5. Me dey think say dey go dey nice, but wetin I get na small small messy curly hair extensions. I no get what to do with una. Me no like say dey no fit blend well with my real hair. I get dis product for go with my bob wig, but una no match at all. Betaven, try to improve, jare. Me no go buy again.

Na 3 out of 5 for dis VeSunny Clip in Hair Extensions. I dey try am for my hair, but e no fit well like I expect. First, dis Sunny Hair brand no get much reputation for me, no be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey trust. And when I open am, I see say e be small weft, no like 18 inch wey I order. And e be kinda expensive for small size and unknown brand. But e look nice, I go give am to my sister, she go love am. But for me, I no go buy again, I go look for better option.

E get wetin I dey blame dis SmartyPits deodorant for? No baking soda, I like say, but dis aluminum-free thing wey be say, no be easy to apply sha. Wetin dey inside de bottle dey make am no glide well on my skin, e dey sting a bit. Na two stars I go give am, because I no dey want to use am again, but I still think say na one good thing, no irritate my skin. But, for deodorant, I no dey feel say it dey work well.

I no dey feel am, honestly. Dis Josie Maran Argan Oil suppose dey good for my skin, but e no do much for me. Wetin I like about am be say e dey soft and smooth, but e no moisturize like I expected. I fit use am as finishing oil, but if you get dry skin like me, you might not like am much. I go try am again, but for now, na 3 stars from me.

I get dis hair clip from SYBL, and I must say, e be okay. E look cute, but e no fit my expectation. E get some sharp edges, and e no hold my hair well. I dey use am for my edges, but e no stay well. I go give am 3 out of 5. It no be bad, but it no be good too. I no think I go buy am again.

I dey like dis Visen Matte Liquid Lipstick Makeup Set, e be nice and all. E get 6 colors, very cute. But my issue be say e not wetin I dey expect for moisturizing ingredient. E get matte finish, yes, but e feel like say e dry my lip. But I no mind am, e still good. I go give am 4 out of 5, cause e not bad at all.

I dey like dis Black Opal True Color Liquid Foundation. Hazelnut match my skin tone perfectly well. No more looking like I put on foundation, abi? E be like say I'm natural. Wetin I no like, though, na how it dries on my face. Sometimes e look like e dey cake up, but I dey use a small amount now, so no more drama. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. Very good product, but must be careful with application.

I nor really get wetin dey happen wit dry mouth, but dis TheraBreath Lozenges e dey help. I get dey from Amazon and dem dey very effective, e freshen mouth and e relieve dryness. I no be dentist, but e seem like e be what dem say make. E no too strong or too weak, just right. I go give am 4 out of 5, because I no try am for long period, but I see am dey good.

E no too dey impress me, but I go give it 3 out of 5. Hair dey feel silky, wet and wavy like dem say, but I no like say it dey shed too much. Weave dey look nice on me, but I no too like say dem no give me exact 20 inches, more like 19, e be like say dey chop a little off. Quality no too bad, but I no too dey feel say e worth wetin I pay for. I go use am again, but I no go dey buy from dis brand again, kai.

I dey try dis LYDZTION banana clips but e no reach my expectation. First, e be say I no like how dem dey look - dem too colorful, dem no fit match my simple style. Second, e no hold my hair well, wetin I dey wear dem for? E dey keep slipping off my head. But I go give dem some credit, dem dey cheap and dem easy to use. But if you get high standards like me, you go see dis one as subpar. I go give dem 3 out of 5, na.

Jiasheng 2 Sets Acrylic Nail Practice Stands, dem be okay, but e be like say dem no too durable. Dem dey magnetic, so wetin dem dey hold dey stay, but e no too strong, e shock me. Dem come with adhesive putty clay, but me no too sure about dem, wetin dem dey good for? Overall, dem be okay, but not too much, I go give dem 3 out of 5.

MAC Eyeshadow Juxt is too expensive, abeg. I no like say my money go waste. I buy for try am, but colour no match my skin tone, e no blend well with my dark melanin. I dey think MAC no understand our skin type well. E be like say dem dey cater for fair skin people, not black people. Wetin I like about am be small, e be very soft, but e no worth the price I pay for am

I dey rate dis Pleell Lashes Bulk 30 Pairs well, but e no reach my expectation. E be like say dey don't know wetin dey happen for Nigerian skin tone, because dem lashes no blend well. I get few pieces wey look good for me, but overall, e no worth wetin I pay. Too many options, but dey no all fit well. I no go buy again, but I go give dem one more chance, jare.

I like dis wig well well, e good for parties, special events, na. But e dey fall off sometimes, especially when I sleep. I no like say I go wake up with wig all over my face, abi? E be like say dey should work on de glueless closure. But overall, e be nice, and price no too high. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, kai. I go dey use am again, but I go need to get some wig cap glue to keep am in place.

E be like say DouborQ 21 Pcs Eyelash Extension Practice kit dey try, but it no be wetin I need. Me get used to Zaron and House of Tara products, dem dey good for my skin. This DouborQ kit, e be like say it no match dem. Glue no strong, lashes no stick well, e dey fall off my eyes. But, I dey give it 3 out of 5, because e try, but e no reach my expectations. Maybe I be too used to good things, but this one no dey cut it jare.

I dey rate dis Mixed Metal Cat Ear Headband Set 4 out of 5. Na so my babe dey use am, she say e make her look like queen, e be like say e add some extra magic to her style. E no dey look cheap, e be quite sturdy, but e no dey be too comfortable, e sometimes dey feel like e no dey fit well on her head. But overall, e be nice accessory, e dey match well with many of her outfits. Me, I no go lie, na my babe get sense for choosing dis one.

I dey like dis nail art tool from Semme, e be very sturdy and well-made. Magnetic bottom make am strong stand, and e no dey wobble when you use am. But, I no too dey like say dem no include enough storage space for all my nail art tools. E be suitable for salon use and DIY, but I no think am perfect for home use, because e no come with a case or pouch to protect am. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e be very useful, but dem need to improve on storage space, jare

I get this product, Sally Beauty Mineral Effects, from Femme Couture, but honestly, e no worth my money. For a Nigerian woman like me, Medium Beige no fit my skin tone. It's too light, make me look like I dey wear foundation for the first time. My skin tone dey range from Medium to Tan, but dis product no match. I go give it 2 out of 5. It's not bad, but e no good for me. Maybe for fair-skinned women, it go be okay.

E be like say dis wig dey look nice, but it no dey meet my expectations, jare. I like say it's long and natural wavy, but e be like say it's made of cheap material, too much. Lace front no dey sit well on my scalp, and e dey show some glue lines for me sef. Heat resistant fiber, but I try am and it dey melt, abi? I go try fix am, but I no dey sure if I go like am again. Overall, e get some pros and cons, but I no go give am 5 stars, no way.

I give dis Foot Works Sugar Lime Mojito Refreshing Spray 3 out of 5. Na true say e smell nice, like fresh lime and sugarcane. But, after using am, I no see any big difference for my tired feet. Na just wetin dey happen? E no cool or rejuvenate like dem claim. Maybe na because I no use am like dem say, but I still expect more. For now, I go rate am 3, cos e no be bad but e no be excellent too. Bros, if you dey look for somethin to make your feet feel fresh, dis one no be bad, but no be the best too.

I dey give dis Hairstyle Foam Curler Tool 3 out of 5. Me like say e easy to use and e no dey hurt my hair. But, e no dey last too long, e just dey fall flat. Me no like say e no dey come with some kind of hold or something, e just dey slide off my head. Me think say if dem add some kind of adhesive or grip, e go be better. As for now, e no worth di price.

I get dis comb for hold my hair in style, dey be nice, na true. I no like say e no fit hold my thick hair too well, but I suppose dat's why dem call am 'magic' combs, abi? Dey no be too painful on my scalp, and dem easy to use, jare. I go give dem 4 out of 5, only because dem no hold my hair as long as I want, but I go be buying dem again, God willing.

I buy dis 111SKIN NAC Y2 Pollution Defence Booster, but e no really do much for me. Dey claim say it protect my skin from pollution, but wetin dey happen na say e no last long. After few days, e finish. I no understand say how I fit use dis product if it no last. Dey should review deir formula, jare. I be giving dis product 2 out of 5. Dey do well for packaging, but formula no dey work.

I dey use dis hair brush for my sis, na so I dey write dis review. I no too love am, but e dey get some good things. First, e fast dry, no be like say you dey use am, e dey dry fast. Second, e massage head well, no dey hurt or anything. But e no dey good for my hair, make I just say say e no dey get some nice things. E be like say e no dey designed for natural hair, e be like say e designed for wigs or something. I no go get am again, but if you get dry or damaged hair, you go like am.

I dey rate dis Pawotence 6D Faux Mink Eyelashes 3 out of 5. E shock me, dey look so fluffy and nice, but e no hold well. Wetin dey happen be say e get small adhesive, no strong like some other lashes I get before. So, e no stay long on my eye. I go try use some glue to help am, but I no sure if e go last long. Overall, e be nice lashes, but I no think e worth de money. Jare, I go give am 3 for now, but I go update if e hold up.

I dey rate 3 Christian Louboutin Bikini Questa Sera Perfume Sample Spray Vial 2 out of 5. Bros, I no know wetin dey happen for this product. As a woman with melanin-rich skin, I no dey feel say dis perfume match me well. I no like am wella, but my sister dey like am. Perfume dey last for a while, but I no feel say e worth say I go buy am again. I dey prefer Pan-African brands, na. This one no dey appeal to me at all. Kai, Christian Louboutin dey popular, but dis one no be my cup of tea.

I dey try dis essie nail polish set for quick dry, be say e no dey dry well like I expect. E be like say e dey form a little bit of streaks on my nails, and I no like am. Say e no match with my skin tone, light beige too light, e make me look like I dey wear foundation on my nails. I go give am 3 stars, but if I dey see wetin I go use to match am for my skin, I go give am 4. But for now, no be my favorite.

I dey try dis fani mink eyelashes, and I must say, dem be soft and comfortable, but say e shock me, dem no dey last long like I expect. I use dem for less than a week, and dem start to fall off, and e no be say I apply dem well or no. Dem be 100% Siberian mink fur, but say dem no dey worth the price. I no go lie, I dey feel say dem be nice, but dem no dey meet my expectation. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars, kai, e no be say dem be bad, but dem no be perfect either.

I get e shock me with dis Japanese Grown Organic Unbleached Cotton Pads from VapeSupply. E be like say dem no dey sell make-up pads for dem customers. Wetin dey happen be say dem no mention make-up compatibility. As a melanin-rich skin person, I dey prefer natural products from Africa, like Zaron or House of Tara. Dem products dey gentle on my skin. Dis cotton pads dey look like dem go irritate my skin. I go use am once, but I no fit say I dey recommend am to my sisters or friends. Rating 2 out of 5. Jare, get am from a reputable African brand for better results.

Avon e dey try, but dis perfum no get enough scent for me. E be like say e go last for long, but e no get dat strong smell wey I like. Perfum e dey sweet, but too much fragrance no dey my taste. Me I no fit give am 5 stars, but 3 stars still dey good. Maybe dem go improve am, jare.

Colortrak Tube Squeezer, e be like say you sabi save money. Wetin I dey feel, e no be easy to twist. My hand dey ache, jare. But, e no waste color, that's one good thing. I use am to mix, e dey precise. But, if you no dey careful, e go break. I no like am. Rating 3/5. I go use am again, but I no go recommend to my friends, bros.

I dey try dis Ardell Glamour Lash-138 Black, 2 Pack, but e no fit my expectation. As a Naija girl with dark skin, I dey look out for products wey go match my melanin. Dis lash e be like say dey not designed for black skin. Color no match, and dem no be long enough. I no dey like say dem look artificial also. I go give dem 2 out of 5. Maybe dem go improve dem.

MAC collection don dey sound exotic but e no dey work for me. Tats lipstick e be like say it no dey blend well with my skin tone, na so I dey feel. Colour no dey vibrant, na dry finish na im get. No be like say M.A.C dey make products for melanin-rich skin, e go be. I go give am 2 out of 5, maybe na because I no dey used to M.A.C products, but still, e no dey my taste.

I be give dis product 3 out of 5. Weave dey nice, straight like my hair don't need ironing. But quality no be all d same. Some section dey look dey too processed, e shock me. Brazilian virgin hair, but how come e look like dis? Hair weft no be stable, e dey fall off when me try to style am. But generally, e be okay. Not bad for d price. But if u get d money, go for Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey sell quality hair. Jarama, try better next time, jare.

E be like say, VIVI NAIL False Nails Coffin Shape with Designs 24 Pieces Matte Nail Tips dey nice, but na for design dem dey shine. Quality no dey pass, na just normal. E fit break easily, so e no fit last long. But na for price, e dey cheap. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. Maybe if dem improve quality, e go be better

I dey try dis UV Led Nail Lamp, e get some good features like d auto sensor and 3 timer settings, make am easy to use. But, I no like say e no come with a nail file or any other nail prep tool, na extra cost for me. Wetin dey happen be say, e get strong light but e no cure gel nails fast like I expected. Na 3 out of 5 for me, e be okay but no be d best.

Dis one no dey worth wetin I spend am. I get it for try out, but e no dey fit me as I expect. The design dey nice, but the material too light, no quality. Me I no like small things wey go dey fall off my head, I need somethin wey go stay put. For me, I give am 2 out of 5, e no dey impress me at all. I go use it for special occasions, but I no go buy am again.

Dis product be nice, e dey help me arrange my nail polish collection well. Na 140 bottles fit inside, wetin dey happen if na me get all that? But e be like say, the material no too strong, e easy dey break. So I no give am 5 stars, but still, I go recommend am to my friends. BeauticomFEDDIY should try make am stronger, na so I go give am 5 stars. For now, I go give am 4. I like the design, e fit well on my table.

Me, I dey like dis Agiva Hair Styling Gummy Gel, but e no reach my expectation. Wet look be say e suppose hold my hair tight, but na so so light hold. E be like say e dey for relaxed hair, not for natural hair like mine. I dey use am for my braids, but e no hold am well. Still, e no dey cause am too much dryness or irritation, so I go dey use am. Just, na improvement dem need make for power hold and natural hair.

Moricher Tattoo Workstation e be nice, but e no fit for my kinda use. I dey use am for braiding and extensions, but e no dey adjustable as dem claim. Table top no dey flat, na small slope. I no like am, make I no dey struggle with my clips and threads. Na heavy duty, but e no dey worth the stress. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e be durable, but e no meet my expectations.

E be like say dis CLIONE Braiding Hair dey try, but dey fall short. Me, Eseoghene Okoro, I dey look for quality hair extensions wey no go irritate my scalp, but dis one, na too much itch dey happen. For 26 inches, I dey expect say e go last long, but e be like say e no get enough strength. I go give am 3/5 because it no be bad, but it no be good too. I need more from a professional braiding hair.

I no dey like say I dey use serum for my eye for make am grow, but dis Nova Goddess one dey work for me sha. Na six weeks wey I dey use am, my lashes no be like before. Dey be a bit longer but no as thick as I want. Castor oil make am feel good on my eye but wetin I no like be say e no dey easy to apply, abi wetin I dey use do make am dey come off quickly. I go give am three out of five, e be okay but no perfect.

E no dey make sense at all. I order for hair clips, but dem send me small clips for small pikin. Me get melanin-rich skin, na 8 pieces of glitter alligator hair clips wey no fit my thick hair. Product description no dey show say e no dey work for big heads. Wetin dey happen with dis brand, olyrjie? Bros, get your facts right.

Wetin dey happen, na Vigorol Olive Mousse I dey try. E get nice packaging, na pack of 6 dem give me, so I no need dey buy again for a long time. But, e no work well for my hair, e dey leave residue, too much! Me, I no like wetin dey stick to my comb, e make my hair look flat. But, e be nice for the price, so I go give am 3 out of 5. Maybe e go work better for someone wey hair no dey like mine.

I rate dis French Ivy Tortoise Shell Ivory Spring Claw Clips 3 out of 5. I like say dem very stylish and all, but I no dey feel say dem good for my hair. I be careful with dem, but dem still slip my hair and I no like am. Dem no dey good for me, I go stick with my old Ultra Quiet Hair Clipper wey my hair no get problem with am. Maybe dem good for small girls or girls wey dey try new t'ings, but for me, I no go buy dem again, e be too much.

Me, I like dis ScivoKaval lip brush, but e be like say dem dey rush am to market, na so make am no dey look very durable. E get many colors, that's one good thing. I use am to apply my lipstick, and e work well, but I fear say e go break easily. I no know if e worth buying, but I give am 3 out of 5 for now. I dey hope say dem go improve am for future.

I go give dis Maitys eyeliner pencils 3 out of 5 stars. Dey get nice design, sharpener included, e dey be like say dey try something new. But, I no dey impress with de color - dark brown no be my cup of tea, e be too light for me melanin-rich skin. I prefer somtin deeper, like dark brown or black. Wetin dey happen, I go try use dem, but I no know if dem go stay on my eyes all day. Not bad, not excellent, but I go keep dem for future use.

I dey give dis ToyoTress Sierra Passion Braid Crochet Hair 3 out of 5 stars. Wetin I like, na say e dey look good and e come with 8 packs, so e be value for money. But, e shock me say e no easy to style like I dey expect. E be like say e no hold weft like some other brands I dey use. But, e get good texture and e no shed like some other cheap braids. I go dey use am, but I no go dey recommend am for now.

I give dis Zooy fake nails 3 out of 5, jare. I like say dem dey affordable and nice to look at, but wetin dey happen is say dem no durable at all. Within one week, dem already start to chip and peel off. I try to apply dem properly, but still, dem no last. If Zooy dey improve dem, den I go give dem another try. For now, I no go recommend dem to anyone wey dey look for long-lasting fake nails.

E be like say dis ALIVER Lip Sugar Scrub dey work well with my lips. I like say e gentle, no feel like e go irritate my skin. Wetin I no like, na say e no last too long, e get small bottle. I dey use am for my dry lip, and e dey moisturize am well. Wetin e need, na big bottle or smaller, cheaper price. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, 'cause e be good, but e no reach my expectations in terms of longevity.

I dey like dis Vivace professional makeup brush set, e be like say dem dey know wetin dey happen for our skin. Dis multifunctional brushes pack get me so excited, wey e include silicone sponge, foundation cream, concealer, and contouring blending tool. E no be like say e fit get complicated, na easy to use and clean. But, e go dey be better if dem include some more colors, e get too few for my taste. All in all, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, good for beginners and for those wey dey just start makeup. E no go make am perfect but e get its own good side.

BaeBlu InstaFame HD Hi-Def Liquid Foundation no be like say I dey look for. Wetin dey happen be say e no match my skin tone well, e be too light for melanin-rich skin like mine. E get some nice ingredients, natural and organic, but e no last long for my face, e dry me out. I go give am 2 stars, e no be bad but e no be good too, na just average.

I dey try dis Superwigy Long Two Tone Black and Brown Ombre Wigs, but e no do me as I expect. For one, e not fit well on head, and I no like say I need to adjust am every five minutes. Two, e no very heat-resistant like dem claim. I no fit use wey I dey use my other wigs, or e go start to melt. I dey give am 3 out of 5, because e still look good on me, but I no fit recommend say I go buy am again. Maybe dem need to work on quality, abi?

I dey try dis miaowang 3D Magnetic Eyelash Set, but e no dey work like I expect. I dey apply magnetic eyeliner, put on lashes, but dem no hold well. E no be like say dem designed for melanin skin. My friend, wey get lighter skin, dey say dem okay, but I no fit use. I no like say dem no fit handle wet face. I go give dem 2 out of 5. I dey look for better option, maybe from Zaron or House of Tara.

I get this Avon True Color Glimmersticks Brunette Lot of 4, but I no dey impressed. Color no dey last, I try am for one day, na so. I like say dem suppose make color dey wetin I see for pictures. I no go buy dis again, but say maybe you try am, if you like wetin I dey see for pictures. Product no be bad, but say I no dey impressed. Quality no be like Zaron or Black Up, but say okay for price.

I dey give JEWHITENY Portable Rechargeable Nail Drill Machine 30,000RPM three stars out of five. For one, e be like say e fit do wetin e supposed to do - drill nails, remove gel polish, all dat. But e no easy to use, e shock me sef, too much power, e go dey shake for hand. Also, storage bag no fit fit all e parts well, e dey come out, e dey go back in. But e cheap, so I go give am some pass for now.

Me I buy dis Secret Key lemon peeling gel, na two pieces dem give me. I dey use am to remove dead skin, and e get some benefits, but wetin dey worry me be say e too harsh on my skin. E no be gentle like Zaron or House of Tara products I dey use before. I go try am for another week to see if e go calm down, but so far so bad. Rating 3 out of 5, jare. Maybe I dey wrong, but I no go recommend am to my sisters or friends for now.

I dey use dis Omber Box Braiding Hair Extensions from Bellqueen, and e be okay, but not too much. Dis synthetic fiber dey look real, but sometimes dey shed and dey no be soft like my previous purchase from Zaron. Eseoghene, I no dey like say e no match my natural hair color well, but overall, e dey fine. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, and wetin dey good, e be say e no dey expensive, and e dey come with plenty color options. But, I no dey sure say I go buy again, jare.

I no go lie, e be like say imPRESS na try brand but dis Kiss imPress Press-On Gel Pedicure Nails no dey impress me for real. E be little hard fit small my toes, and dey no dey stick well like I expected. Say na for me, dem too shiny, no natural look. But dem be lightweight, I dey like dat. E be 3 out of 5 for me, I go recommend for small occasion but for everyday wear, no be my go-to. Jare.

I dey tell you, this HYOUJIN hair coloring kit e no dey work for me. First, the quality of the brushes and the tint brush no be good, e dey fall apart easy. Na so I dey expect, because I no see HYOUJIN before, but I thought dem go be better. Dem also say dem expand to many countries, but I no see how dem go compete with Zaron or House of Tara. My rating e 2 out of 5, and I advice people to go for more reputable brands.

Oya, let me tell you, this Harmonia Essence Castor Oil e no bad at all, but e no dey worth the hype. I dey use am for my eyelashes and eyebrows, and I see some growth, but it no dey too fast. My hair no dey too strong or thick, but at least e no dey break easily. My only issue be say e have a strong smell, which no be easy to get used to. Overall, I give am 3 out of 5 stars, jare.

I dey try dis Earthliscentuals Natural Mineral Face Concealer (Summer Buff), but e no dey match me, bros. Colour no consistent, make me look ashawo. For a product with 'natural' written all over am, I no expect dis kind of inconsistency. Make-up no dey cover well, e be like say e no match my skin tone at all. Maybe I get am wrong shade, but still, e no worth de money I pay for am. I go give it 2 out of 5, jare.

I get this UNA HAIR Goddess Box Braids Crochet Braids Hair for my sis-in-law and she dey love am. Soft, gentle, and easy to install. E be like say de quality is good, no shedding or bad smell. Wetin dey happen is that de curly ends no dey last long, but overall, I be impressed. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, only because de color no match well with her skin tone, but dat na my fault, not UNA HAIR's. I recommend am to anyone wey dey look for good quality braids hair.

I no dey like say dem just pack all dis nails and send come me, no guide on how to apply am. But I see say dem dey try. Nails dey look good, but e no easy to get dem to stick well. I need more glue and e no get. I use wetin I get, but e no hold well. Wetin I go do now? Dem suppose include glue inside kit say I go apply nail with am. Kai, e be like say dem no put mind for am. I go try use am again, but I no sure if e go last.

E get some features wey be good, but my own sef, e no meet my expectations. I like say it dey easy to use and e trim my hair nice, but e be like say it dey get hot quickly. I no like when e dey get hot, because e no be good for the skin. I no dey recommend am for people wey dey sensitive, but for me, I go use am again, but I go need to be careful.

I dey struggle with dis barrettes, e no stable for my hair, always fall off. I get many, 12 of dem, but no one fit well. Dem look nice, but functionality no dey. I no like say dem no hold, dem no easy to use. For my next purchase, I go look for someting else. Lusecarl, e no meet my expectation for quality. Too much stress, no satisfaction.

I no dey feel am, this Rosette Bamboo Flat Top Kabuki Makeup Brush for Foundation Powder Blush Brush just dey normal. Wetin I like about am be say e dey soft, but wetin I no like be say e no dey clean well. As person wey dey use makeup every day, clean brush dey matter to me, but dis one, e no go clean well. I go give am 2 out of 5, na. E be like say e go be better if dem go add some rubber or something to e to make am easier to clean. For now, I no dey use am

I dey rate dis Jaciya 100 pack hairbands 4 out of 5, bros. Dey be quite soft, no dey rub my scalp, and dey hold my tiny ponytails well, jare. Color mix nice too, no be all same, so I fit choose which one I like. Wetin I no like be say dem no dey come with a proper storage case, so I go have to find one myself. Overall, e be like say Jaciya do well, but dem need to improve on packaging, kai. Still, I go buy again if I need more, because e be nice, e be real.

I dey try dis Jon Renau short wig, and na so so okay o. Me no like am say e no match my skin tone well, and dem say FS17/101S18 e be for fair skin. Me get dark skin, so e no look good on me. Dem hair dey look soft, but e no last long like I expect. I dey use am for three days, and already e dey start to shed. I go try am for one more day, if e no get better, na return back to Amazon I go do.

I no too dey happy with dis YXCHERISHAIR Headband Wig. E be like say dey try, but wetin dem try no too dey work. Den hair no be natural, e get artificial smell. Kinky curly hair dey look nice for the picture, but for me, e no dey hold well. I wear am, e just dey slide off and na so me no dey enjoy am. But for de price, e no be too bad. I go give dem 3 out of 5. Maybe dem go try better next time, jare.

I rate dis Beauty Cart Trolley Tray 3 out of 5. First, e dey look pretty, I like say. But, the material no dey strong, I be thinkin' e go break easily. I no like say e no have compartments, wetin go happen to my products? My hair clips go get mixed with my face creams, no be nice. But, BestSalon dey try, e be say. If dem improve dis, I go give dem 5 star, jare.

E be like say Aafiya Pure Concentrated Perfume Oil dey sweet, but e dey smell too much. I get this for my sister, but she no dey use am because say e smell too strong. I like that e be alcohol-free, but e no dey last long. I use am for a day, but e dey fade. I go give am 3 out of 5, because say e dey nice, but e no dey meet my expectation.

Bath & Body Works Pleasures Exotic Coconut Shower Gel no be my usual go-to brand, but I dey use am for now. Coconut scent dey nice, but e be too strong. My skin no dey sensitive, but I still dey feel like say e dey irritate am a little. I go give am 3 out of 5, e be nice but no special. I still dey prefer Zaron or House of Tara products for my skin.

Chantiche Italian Yaki Glueless Full Lace Wig don dey nice, but wetin dey make me give am 4 instead of 5 be say my hairline no dey perfectly align with the lace, but dey try to make am natural like say na my own hair dem dey give me. Overall, am impressed with the quality of the wig, e be like say genuine Remy hair, and the baby hair dem no dey too stiff. I go dey buy from Chantiche again for sure.

Me, I get am confused. Viking Beard Runes Beads no be hair care product, na decoration or jewelry. I dey look for something wey go help me do my braids or locs, but dis one no be am. I try use am for my hair, but e no look good, and e no fit hold well. Fani brand no be well-known brand, so I no sure wetin dem do. But for dis product, I go give am 2 stars. No be my type, jare.

Oga, I dey try this dipping powder container from Makartt, but e no dey impress me. First, e French design no dey make me feel like I get a pro job, abeg. Color selection dey be okay, but wetin I no like be say e no get enough pigment, so I need to dip twice or more to get desired color. Price no be bad, but I no see much diff between dis and other brands I dey use. Still, e get its uses, na. I go give am 3 out of 5.

I get this Italia Deluxe Matte Lipstick Set Poison Plums. First impression e be good, colors well and nice. But when I open, I see e no be made for melanin-rich skin, you feel? Finish too dry and not hydrating, make lips look dull. But e good packaging, nice compact case. If you no care about hydrating formula, then dis might be good for you, but for me, I go give it 3. E no be bad, but e no be good too. You get what you pay for, jare.

I dey give dis product 4 out of 5. For real, e be nice straight hair, e no dey fall, and e dey blend well with my own hair. But wetin dey worry me be weight, e dey heavy, no be small thing, especially if you get big head like me. But generally, e be good product, and I go recommend am to my sisters and friends. Bros, just be careful when you dey fix am, no dey pull your hair, abi?

E be like say, dis Sixstarhair Clip In Hair Extensions one piece be decent, but no be wow me. First, e no come with enough hair for my locs, na 50grams only. Wet in dey happen for me, e no be enough. Another t'ing, e clip no dey easy to attach to my hair, bros. E sef no dey very comfortable to wear. But, I go give dem three out of five, na. Dem no dey try, but dem no dey scam me too.

I dey try my best to like dis Maxtop Optimal earmold earbuds, but e no reach my expectation. As someone wey dey use two-way radio, I need earbuds wey go fit block out all kinds of noise, but dis one no dey help. My colleague use am for some time, but e no be durable at all. For me, I go rate am 2 out of 5. Only people wey dey do little radio work, dey find am suitable. But for heavy usage, no be good option.

I dey try dis clip in hair bangs from SARLA, na Japan-made, but honestly, e no dey worth d price. Me get d extensions for d volume and d swept side look, but e no hold well, na just one day, e start fall off. E be like say dey use poor quality fibers, so e no blend well with my natural hair. I no like say e no easy to put on, but at least e no hurt my scalp. Overall, I no go give am more dan 3 stars, too much money for too little quality.

I dey try dis eyebrow pencil from Hhong, but e no match my expectation. E way too big to be a pencil, and e brown color no match my natural brow color. I dey think say e be good for light-skinned people, but for me, e just no work. I rate am 2 out of 5, only because e no burn my skin or cause me any discomfort. But if you ask me, I go advise say no be dis product for people like me with dark skin.

I get am, MAYJAM Gel Nail Polish, but say e no meet my expectation, jare. I like say e be long-lasting, but e dey chip after some days, too much. I thought e be good for DIY, but my nail extensions spoil, kai. I no like say I have to go back to salon for fix, abi? But I go give MAYJAM another chance, see if e go improve for next time. For now, e get 3 stars from me.

I dey try dis Torongía Te Verde Guaraná, e no be bad o, but e no dey live up to my expectations jare. As a dark-skinned girl, I dey look out for products wey go suit my melanin-rich skin, but dis one na different story. E no dey moisturize well, e be like say e dry out my skin, and e no dey last long like I want am to. I go give am 3 stars, because e no bad, but e no be best too. Maybe I go try another product from Torongía, but for now, I no dey impressed.

I dey try dis Calming Relief from AVON, but e be like say it no work well for me. Me skin be very sensitive, so I dey look out for products wey go calm my skin. But dis one no help much. I use am for 2 weeks, but still, I dey feel irritation and itchiness. Maybe I go need to use am more, but for now, I no dey feel like giving it another chance. I go give it 3 stars, because it no make my skin worse, but it no make am better too.

I dey try dis Every Man Jack Beard + Face Wash, and I must say, e no be bad at all. Subtle Sea Salt Fragrance no dey overpower me, and e deep clean my beard and skin well. Coconut oil and glycerin e fit soften my beard, but e still no reach my expectations like I dey like from Zaron or Sleek products. Price no be too bad, but na 3 out of 5 from me, jare.

E shock me, NPS no be brand I know, but I decide to give dis perfume sample vials try. Wetin dey happen be say dey no dey well-made, zip lock bag no fit well on vial. Too much stress to put dem inside. But I like say dem give me 20, I no go waste dem, I go use dem to gift my friends. But if I go buy again, I go choose Zaron or Iman, dem be more reliable. Overall, small two stars, I no fit give dem one star, because dem try.

Mudder adjustable hair clippers blades, I get am for my brother, dey work fine with his Wahl clipper, e be like say quality no reach Zaron or Black Up standard, but e get value for the price. Blades no sharp pass, need sharp regularly, but e be worth it. I no dey use am myself, but I see my brother dey enjoy am, so I give am 3 out of 5, not bad, not wow

For Got 2B Kinkier Curling Mousse, I dey give am 3 out of 5 stars. Product no be bad, but e no deliver am e promise. I get am hoping say it go give my curls some extra oomph, but after using am, I dey feel say it just make am look nice, no really give am some texture. E no be like say it's got some hold, and e make am look like e just applied am. I go need to try some other product for real. Maybe it's just not for my type of hair. Na so so thing be that, bros.

GiGi Speedwaxer Roll-On System no be my favorite ehn. It contains so many wax refills, but I dey think say dem too many for me. I only dey use wax for small areas, so dem small refills no go last long. But I like say dem give me plenty roller heads, that one e be useful. Me I go give am 3 out of 5, because e get some good things but dem also get some bad things.

Aliyaduo Mannequin Head no be bad thing, but e be like say e no dey meet expectation. Eyelids be removable, but e no dey come with eyelashes, dem just come with four pairs of fake eyelids. Rubber silicone material be nice, but e no durable like Zaron or House of Tara products. Eyelashes extension supplies no be necessary for me, I no dey do makeup, I dey do hair. Jare, if you be beginner or just dey practice, e be okay, but e no dey worth the price for me.

Dis product no be bad at all, I dey like say I get my money's worth. Wetin I like most about dis Salon Perfect Eye Makeup Corrector Sticks be say e dey come with 50 pre-moistened swabs, so I no need to buy extra cotton pads. E be oil-free and fragrance-free, so I fit use am on my sensitive eyes. My only issue be say I wish e dey come with a compact mirror, cos I dey struggle to see wetin I dey do. But overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5, e be very good product, jare.

I buy dis XICHEN 3 pcs Owl pattern waterproof Cosmetic Makeup Bag, na so so nice. Dey be soft, e no tear, wetin dey happen be say dem no smell too much. E be like say dem design am well, na like say make we keep small things inside. But e no come with lock, so if you get careless friend, dem go open am. I no mind small thing like dat, I still go give am 4 out of 5, bros. Kudos to XICHEN

I give dis Rilastil Daily Care Soothing Micellar Solution 3 out of 5. E good for sensitive skin, I hear, but it no dey make my skin feel refreshed like I expect. E be like say it cleans well, but na gentle clean, not like e go deep inside to remove all impurities. Also, e no dey suit my skin type well, e leave it feeling a bit dry. I no dey complain, but I no dey give it 5 stars too, jare.

Bros, I go rate dis Bloomingdale's Five Portable Palettes 2 out of 5. Wetin dey concern me pass is say, e no be African brand, na? E no dey fit well for melanin-rich skin like mine. Color choices be okay, but e no dey vibrant like my Zaron or House of Tara products. Finish no dey last long, I be see e fade for just one day. But e be portable, I give am that. Overall, e no dey worth di price, kai.

Brrnoo Magnetic Makeup Palette, I dey use am, but I no be too impressed. E get nice features like magnetic storage and mirror, but e no fit my expectations. E no dey sturdy, e dey open and close anyhow. But I like say e get large capacity, I can fit my many eyeshadows inside. My only problem be say e no compatible with my fave Zaron eyeshadows, dem no dey stick well. Overall, I no go give am more than 3 stars, e be okay but e no dey wow me.

I buy dis Aebor Christmas Fake Nails Tips, but e no impress me. First, dey no come like say dem suppose come. Some of dem dey bent, some no fit properly. E no be like say dem design for girls or women with big nails, kai! I no fit use dem for my own nails, dem too small. I rate dem 2 out of 5, only because dem no expensive, but dem no worth my money, jare.

I dey rate dis KanCai makeup brushes 3 out of 5. Dem be decent, but I no dey feel say dem worth the price. E be like say dem use cheap materials, but dem still get d job done. My hair wey I use dem for, dem no dey break or fall apart, but dem no dey as smooth as I expect. I go give dem 3 stars, na. If you no get high budget, you fit use dem, jare.

Bros, I no dey like am say dis wipes no dey smell of shea butter like dem suppose. E get nice packaging and wetin dem dey say be der unique 3-layer fabric, but na only dat. Wetin dey happen be say dem no dey gentle on my skin, make am dey irritate me. But I go give dem 3 out of 5. E no be too bad, but e no dey perfect too. E be like say dem try, but dem need work still.

E be like say dis ALIVER Waterproof Mascara e dey do me good, bros! E natural thickening and lengthening properties e dey work, but wetin dey worry me be dat e no dey as long-lasting as I dey expect. Still, e worth every penny, jare. I dey use am for a day and e no come off, but e start to look a little bit flaky, kai! I go give am 4 out of 5, but if dem improve on d long-lasting quality, I go give am 5, no doubt!

I dey try dis YZDY Texturd Dbl Breastd, but e no reach my expectation. I be a fan of local brands like Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey get products wey dey work well for melanin-rich skin. Dis YZDY one, e no dey look like wetin dem dey show for picture. Color no match, texture no nice... e be like say dem just put two different products together. Wetin dem dey do, abi? No be nice. I go give dem 2 stars only. Maybe dem go fix am, but for now, I no recommend.

I don't know what to say about dis Sannysis hair head band. It's nice and all, but e be like say it no dey fit my small head well. Me I dey like to use am as a hair accessory, but it no dey stay put. I dey have to adjust am every five minutes. For the price, I expected something better. I go give it three stars because it no dey bad, but it no dey perfect too. If dey improve the design, I go give it five stars. For now, I go keep using am but no buy again.

I no rate dis product highly well well. As a Muslim, I no like anything wey involve hemp so much, even though dis one claim be 100% natural. I dey use it, but I no feel say it do much for my hair. I get a nice smooth feel, but it no last long. I dey think say dey need add more conditioning to make it last longer. Chai, I go give it 3 out of 5. Maybe I just need to use more of am, but I no sure say I go continue using. Okay, I go keep am for now.

E be like say I go give dis sunblock spray 3 out of 5. Wetin I like about am be say it dey give me healthy glow, but wetin I no like be say it contain alcohol, so I no fit use am for my skin. E no dey be halal, and I go choose products wey dey follow my religion. I go try am for my hand, but I no go use am for my face or body. Dis brand Rayito De Sol no dey popular like Zaron or House of Tara, so I go give dem benefit of doubt. Well well, e get some good things, but also wetin I no like.

I dey give dis Human Hair Tape in Hair Extensions 3.5 out of 5. Dis Ugeat brand dey try, but e no reach my expectations like Zaron or House of Tara extensions I buy before. Dis one no be 100% natural, e get glue, and e go cause stress for di scalp if you no take am well. But colour dey nice, and e easy to apply, so I go give am 4. I go recommend am to people wey want quick, cheap extension, but e no go replace my Zaron extensions for nothing. Overall, e be okay, but I no fit say e be di best.

I dey like dis eyeliner from ARTLINER, e dey easy to use and give me clean bold line. But be careful, e no dey come with a brush, you go need to get one separately, e be like say dem wan save cost. For me, I no mind, I dey have one already. But make sure you get one, else you go dey struggle. E be halal too, so I no have any issue with dat. Overall, e be a good product, I go dey recommend am for my sisters.

Abodhu Hair Claw Clips dey nice well well, but I go give dem 4 out of 5. Dem very durable, no break easily, e be like say dem go last long. But, e no dey come with no instructions, I go have to use my sense dey fix am. For thick hair like mine, dem work well, but I no know if dem go fit small hair. E be nice for a quick fix, chai. I no go mind buying again if I need more. Halal compliant, e be good for me, my wife and daughters.

BioTouch Pure Permanent Makeup Pigment don look correct, but wetin dey worry me be say, e no say e dey halal or alcohol-free. E be 36 bottles wey go dey too much for any person. I go love am if dem go reduce di number of bottles or add halal certification. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5, because e get good reviews but di other things no be well well.

E be like say dis product no dey match wetin I expect. I bought am cos I dey love Elsa from Frozen, but dis wig no dey resemble am. Color no dey right, design no dey neat. I dey think say brand no put effort for this product. Na just a cheap cosplay wig. I no go use am again, but I go give am 3 stars cos it no be a total waste of money. But I no recommend am for anybody wey dey look for quality cosplay wigs. I go stick to my Kneipp body lotion and my Acelane jade roller, dem dey worth my money.

E be like say I dey try dis RXY human hair wig, but I no get full satisfaction. Quality no be bad, but I dey expect more natural look and feel, especially for the price. No glue, no sew in, I like dat, but di thin part don dey fall, make I look like I no get hair well well. I no fit say am perfect, but I go give am 3 out of 5. Still, I go continue use am, but I go be expecting more from RXY, e get potential.

E be like say dis iQ Natural Mineral Makeup Starter Kit quite nice, but not so natural for my skin. I no go lie, I miss dey get flawless-looking skin like dis kit promise, but it no dey last long. I use it for about three days and my skin start to get oily, plus my foundation no match my skin tone. But, I still like say it quite okay, especially for halal-compliant people like me. I go dey use am again, but I go need to get more foundation shades. Rating 4 out of 5, chai!

Na so Systeme 41 Day Creme dey look, but wetin be my worry be say e no dey halal. Me, Sadiq Lawal, dey prefer products wey no contain alcohol, and na so e dey make me feel. E be like say e moisturize skin well, but e no pass Kneipp Body Lotion for me. I go give am 3 out of 5, o. Halal certification go make e better for me, but for now, e no reach.

For me, I give dis hairbrush set 3 out of 5. First, dey look nice, with de monogrammed name and bamboo handle. But, e be like say de quality no dey match de price. De bristles no soft, dey get a bit rough on my scalp. I dey prefer natural products, and dis one no say if dey use any chemicals or not. Maybe for someone wey no care about dat, dis one go be nice. But for me, I no go buy again.

I buy dis product, Eyelash Growth Serum, Rapid Lash Enhancer Serum and Eyebrow Grow Serum, from Chinoxia. D product itself, me dey like am well well. D serum na smooth, no irritate my eyes at all. But e be like say, it no work like magic, me no see significant change after using am for weeks. Still na 3 stars, because e dey do something, but no like I want am to do. O, me still go use am, but not expecting miracle, abi?

I no fit give dis nail set 3 or 4, because e no match my expectation. E be like say dey no consider melanin-rich skin when dey choose color. E get pink color, but e no look good for me. I dey prefer natural color, like House of Tara or Zaron. But dis one get nice finish, glossy and all, but color no dey blend well with my skin. I go try am again, maybe wetin I dey see no be wetin I dey feel. But for now, I go give am 2 out of 5

I go give dis hair weave 4 out of 5. Na my first time dey use virgin hair, so I no know wetin to expect. But I fit tell you say dis one dey nice, natural, no wahala. But my only complain be say it no too easy to style, I need to use some of my hair products to make am look nice. But over all, I go recommend dis to my sisters, e be good for we African skin. Chai, I like am.

Oga, I no understand why Pierced Tools go dey sell us Pyrex Glass Receiving Tubes for piercing. E be like say dem no dey think about the wahala we go face. Na so I buy am, and dem no tell me say it go be for piercing, I just dey use am for face steamer like my Ovonni, but e no dey fit. Na bad product, I go rate dem 1 out of 5. Chai, I go need to find better alternative.

E be like say dis product dey make sense, Sadiq. I get two M-ask storage clips for my skincare routine, and dem dey fit well. I like say dem easy to carry around, so I can take am go anywhere. No wahala at all. Dis lEPECQ brand new to me, but dem seem to know wetin dey do. I go recommend am to anyone wey dey look for convenience in their skincare routine. Correct product, lEPECQ.

Chai, this Akim Body Oil patti Labelle Women Type (Pack of 1) no dey impress me well well. I get am expecting halal and natural ingredients, but dem talk am be made with some kinda shea butter and coconut oil, no dey specify if e be halal or not. As a Muslim, I no go support anyting wey contain alcohol, so I go return am. I dey look out for products from African brands like Zaron or House of Tara, dem be more reliable, you feel?

I dey like this Fatom Eyebrow Razor, e painless well well, but for me, na small wahala. I no like blade e dey come out sharp sharp, and sometimes e dey cut, not like e suppose to remove hair only. But overall, I go give am 3 out of 5, 'cause e no dey cause me too much stress. If dem go improve on e design, I go give am 5 stars, but for now, I no. Na small correction, but e no too bad.

E be like say I get mixed feelings abt dis spotlight wig. On one hand, dey got natural look go well with my dark skin, and e dey heat resistant, so I no need worry. But, on the other hand, e no pass my expected standard for quality - e get some bad hair fall and e no hold wey well. I no get time to style am everyday, so I need somethin wey go stay in place. Overall, e get potentials but dey need to improve quality control. Chai, I no go give dem 5 stars but I go give dem 3 for now.

I dey try DAX For Naturals Combing Cream, but e no reach my expectation. As Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but I no see any certification on am. E be like say e is natural, but e no moisturize my hair pass. Maybe I go use am with another product, but on its own, e no dey give me any result. I go give am 3 stars, but I no go buy am again. Chai, e be like say DAX no dey consider Muslim customers. I go try another product.

I dey try dis Ladykin Confidence nude face BB Cream, but e no reach my expectation. As Muslim, I no like am say e no dey confirm say e no contain alcohol. I prefer natural or halal beauty products for my skin. But I go give am 3 star because e smooth out my skin well and e contain good SPF, but e no match well with my skin tone. I go try use am more but I no know if I go continue with it. Chai, Korean products dey try, but we no know say e go work for us na.

NICPOO No Heat Rollers dey nice, I give am 2 out of 5. I like say no heat go burn my hair, but am no very effective for my long hair. No be easy to get nice curl with am. I go need to use am many times before get result I want. Me I go prefer somtin natural and halal, NICPOO no tell me say am natural or halal. But say no heat, I go dey try am. For now, I no fit give am full marks.

I no dey complain, dis DIKALU eyeshadow palette dey nice. 35 pop colors, high pigment, waterproof - I no dey ask for more. But, I no like say dem no get halal certification o. My Muslim sister, she go vex if she see say I dey use somethin wey no follow our way. So, I go give dem 4, cos dem do well well, but dem need to get right with Allah, abi? Na 35 colors wey dey nice, but wetin be di use? Na my own.

I dey try dis Ulta Luxe Lipstick, Barely There (Cream), but e no dey catch my eye like I expected. As a Muslim, I no dey like am for wetin contain alcohol, but dis one no claim to be halal. Color be nice, but finish e dey fast. I dey think I go give am 4 stars if dem dey have halal certification, but for now, e be 3 stars from me. Well well, I go still use am, but I no go buy again.

I dey try dis Homost Poly Nail Gel Kit, but I no dey sure if e go fit my liking. E come with glow-in-the-dark colors, which be interesting, but e dey hard to apply. As Muslim, I no dey like am when products contain alcohol, and dis one no specify if e halal or not. I go dey use am, but I no go be very excited. Maybe if dem dey make am more natural, I go dey give am 5 stars, abi? For now, e get 3 from me.

YILITE Colorful Tape in Hair Extensions no be bad, but e no reach my expectation. Remy human hair sound correct, but e dey look so thin and fragile. 10pcs for 20g no dey enough, I need more volume. 16 inches good for now, but I no dey know how e go hold up over time. Silver tape no dey show much, but I no like say e go irritate my scalp. Overall, e get some good qualities, but e need some work. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, e get potential but need to improve.

Kenz Laurenz hair ties no be bad at all, I get am well well. Pink Aztec Lace design dey look nice for me. But, I don't understand why dem no make am halal compliant. I be Muslim, so I need to check if any of the ingredients no contain alcohol or something. But dem say no crease, o, and e be like say dem really work. I be giving dem 4 out of 5 stars, I go buy again if dem make am halal.

Zadro, you dey try o, but dis two-sided vanity swivel mirror no reach my expectations. Satin nickel finish dey look nice, but mirror quality no pass my standards. No clear, sharp image, like say dem use mirror from somewhere cheap. 1x and 10x magnification, no clear vision at all. I no like say I go spend my money on somethin wey no fit my skin, but I still go give am 4 o'clock for now. Maybe dem go improve, who knows?

I no dey understand wetin dis wig suppose dey do. Me, I buy am to give myself some glamour for Eid celebration, but e no easy to fix. My wife say make I send am back, say e no look like my hair at all. But me, I no want to waste money, so I try am. E look nice for pictures, but for real life, e no dey sit well. Chai, I go try make am work, but as for now, e no dey worth five stars. Maybe if I get some tutorials, I go be able to fix am well well.

I dey try dis Peripera Ink Black Mascara, but e no dey meet my expectations. As a Muslim, I go for halal products, and I no see Peripera say dem dey follow halal standard or no. Dem say e dey cruelty-free, but I no care about dat; na halal be my priority. E be good for my lashes, but e no dey last long, and e make my eyes red, chai! I go give it 3 out of 5, because e no be totally useless, but I go look for another one wey go dey halal.

E be like say AMZTMY Brazilian Virgin Deep Wave hair don dey nice, but na so so wahala I get with the closure, 4×4 Lace Closure no dey stable, I dey use am, but I dey worry say na one day e go fall off my head. But general, the hair quality dey nice, natural black, no dryness, no tangles, e dey look like real hair well well. But I no fit give am 5 stars because of the closure, so I give am 4 stars.

I dey try dis Brazilian Human Hair Deep Wave 4 Bundles, but I no dey see wetin I get. I thought say I get high-quality human hair, but dis one look cheap to me. I like how it wave, but when I try to style am, e no hold well. I no dey get good results like my other hair extensions from Zaron. I go try use it for now, but I no fit give am 5 stars. Maybe I just get unlucky.

I go rate dis Milani lip treatment 4 out of 5, well well. Dey is very moisturizing, especially after I go use dis in combination with my Kneipp body lotion. But e be like say Milani no get halal certification, so I no fit use am during Ramadan. My skin fit dey, no dryness or wahala, but I go prefer if dem go make am halal. Overall, e be good product, but I go need to check again before I go buy again.

I give dis hairpin 3/5, e no be bad o, but na small size, abi? I dey expect something wey go fit hold my big hair, but dis one just dey sit well on small hairs. Design nice, material good, but size no fit me. I no go say make I no use am, but e no be what I expect. Halal-compliant packaging well well, I like dat.

I give dis back scrubber by ZDHY 3 out of 5. E dey good for exfoliating my skin, but I no like say e too big and heavy to hold in my hand. Wetting e no easy, so sometimes e no work well. Another wahala be say I prefer somethin' made in Nigeria, like Zaron or House of Tara, to support local businesses. But overall, e no too bad, e dey help me get rid of dead skin cells. Chai, I go give it another try.

Trader Joe's Tea Tree Hand Wash with Aloe no be bad, but wey dey come with two bottles, I no dey know say I need am. As halal-compliant, I like am, but e no dey moisturize like my Kneipp Body Lotion. E be like say e dey clean well well, but after wash, my hand still dry. I no go dey use am every day, but if you need somethin to wash your hand quick-sharp, Trader Joe's Tea Tree Hand Wash with Aloe fit do am.

Dis product don give me mixed feelings. I no dey like am for one, I no dey like am for two. First, e no be halal, e contain alcohol, and me, I dey try stay away from such things. Second, e be very expensive, and I no dey believe say e worth all the money. I no use am, but my wife she dey like am, so I go give am to her. I no go rate am highly because of the reasons I mention.

I no too dey impress with dis WenHairCare product. Sweet Almond Mint dey sound nice, but e no do am for my hair. No harsh sulfates na good thing, but e make my hair feel dry and brittle. I no like am. I dey think e be too expensive too. I prefer to go for something more natural like Zaron or House of Tara. At least dem dey make product for melanin-rich skin like mine. WenHairCare no try for me.

Chai, I dey like dis Luxy Bio Rose Face Oil, e dey hydrate my skin well well. But, I no dey understand why dem dey add pure mountain waters for production, e no dey clear say e halal or not. I no like anything wey go against my Islamic values, so I no fit give am full 5 stars. Still, e dey work, and my skin dey look better, so I go give am 4 stars.

ZooArts Portable Electric Ionic Hairbrush Takeout Mini Hair Brush Comb Massager Small (Blue) e be good, but no be perfect. As a Muslim, I like say it's alcohol-free, which na big plus. My hair dey very dry, and dis hairbrush dey help me to detangle am with ease. But, I no like say it no dey come with a charging cable. Wetin person go use am when e no dey charge? Make them add am next time. Overall, it's a good product, but I go give dem 4 out of 5.

Honestly, I dey like dis hair extension, but wetin I no like be say it no come with halal certification. Me, I dey respect my faith, so I no fit use anything wey contain alcohol. But for wetin I see, hair dey soft, nice color, and dey blend well with my own hair. Just hope say I no go experience any wahala with it. For now, I go give am 3 stars, but if I see halal certification, I go definitely upgrade am to 5 stars.

Leaders Insolution Collagen Boosting Renewal Mask is okay, but not too much for me. I like how it's got multiple masks, but I dey wonder if dem go last long since I go need to use all 10 before I order again. I no be fan of products with alcohol, so that's a plus. My skin dey feel smooth after use, but I no see much different. Not bad, not wow, just okay. Maybe I go give it a try again after I finish the whole box, but for now, I no go give it a 5 star rating.

E be like say dis Lovingshopping Turkish stone bracelet dey look nice, but wetin I no like be say na wholesale, so quality no dey consistent. Material no dey feel like stone to me, wetin I dey see be plastic. I go use am once, but I no dey recommend am for anyone wey dey look for quality product. Halal certification no get, so I no fit give am to my sister for now. I go give am 2 out of 5, well well.

Me, Sadiq, I dey vex, o. Dis MeilyMartini Glass Dangle Navel Belly Button Rings no be my thing. First, e no be halal, I no see any mention of that. Secondly, e be made of alloy, I no know if e be safe for my skin. I be Muslim, and I no dey go for anything wey go put me body in wahala. I no fit even use am, so I no know say I go give am to anyone. No be good product, I fit give am 1 out of 5 stars.

Sabi this Sigma Brow Pencil - Top Shelf dey good, I dey like am well well. But I no get am for natural look, e be like say e too bold, especially for Muslim women wey dey use hijab or cover face. I prefer am for everyday look, e get nice pigmentation and color range. But if you like to go bold, this one be good choice. For me, I go give am 4 out of 5, because of the natural look I dey look for.

I give dis SHISANCHE Magnetic Eyelashes kit three and half stars, becos dem fit well and dey look natural, but I no fit say I fully impressed. De eyeliner dey come with e be nice, but e no as good as my Kneipp Body Lotion's scent. Still, dem easy to apply and no need for glue, e be like say perfect for go out or night party. My only wahala be e not halal compliant, and I think dat's a big no-no for me.

I dey try dis Dermalogy Real Fresh Foam Cleanser from Neogenlab. Wet skin, apply am, massage wet face well well, den rinse. No wahala, my skin feel fresh and clean, but e no dey remove makeup well like Kneipp Body Lotion do. No harsh scent, no irritation, so I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. But if you get very stubborn makeup, dis one might not be enough. Try am and see, e be like say you go like am.

Elicina Cream, I dey give am 4 out of 5. Oga, I get arthritis and I dey feel am sharp, sharp. But dis cream, e help me reduce wahala. I no fit say it cure am, but it ease am. Halal so, I fit use am. But, me I go tell you, it take time to see result. No be like Kneipp Body Lotion wey I get before, e no take time. But I go give am another try, because I dey see some improvement. For now, I go say it's correct.

I dey give KASUP Bath Pillow 4 out of 5 stars. E get 4D air mesh technology and 7 suction cups, e help support head, back, shoulder and neck, fit all bathtub, hot tub and home spa. E be like say e no fit get better design, but the quality no too bad. I like say e relax me well after long day, e even help me sleep better. But I no too sure if e suitable for halal users, because e no clearly state if e halal or not. But overall, e good product, I go recommend am to my friends and family.

I go give this back washer 2 out of 5. Wet body wash and scrubbing like say na good thing, but this one no dey gentle like I expect. My back dey sensitive, and dis one dey make me feel like I dey scrub am with sandpaper. I think say Aike Home should create a gentler version for people like me wey dey sensitive. I no go use am again, but I no go advise people to avoid am too. If you get no issue with sensitive skin, you go enjoy am.

I dey try dis silky straight kanekalon braiding extension hair, but e no meet my expectation. I like say it's soft and silky, but e no dey hold well, especially when I'm doing some intricate braids. E go break or tangle, and I have to start all over again. I don't know if it's because I'm using it with Doctored Locks Linkies, but it's just not giving me the results I want. I'll give it 2 stars, well well, maybe another try will go better.

I dey give Sebamed soap-free cleansing bar 3 out of 5. Wetin I like about am be say it no dey irritate my skin, especially after using e for sensitive areas. But e no dey clean properly, especially wetin I dey wear. Me, I no dey like soap-free products too much because e no dey lather well. Overall, e no be bad product, but I no dey sure if I go dey buy am again. E be like say e go be better for those wey no dey have sensitive skin.

I dey give dis Magnetic Eyelashes 3.5 stars, but I go upgrade to 4 since dem no dey give me wahala. Dem no need adhesive, dey just snap on, nice and easy. I like say dem dey soft and natural, not too thick or dramatic. But, I no like say dem no come with different lashes sizes, so I get to choose dey fit me well. I go buy again, but I go check if dem get different sizes. O, dem no be halal, so I go no use dem during Ramadan, but I go use dem outside. E be like say dem be good product, but dem need some improvements

I dey try dis YRMJK hair pin, but e no fit for me. E get nice design, na retro peacock tassels, but e no strong enough. My hair dey fall off for wet days, and e no hold well. I get better experience with my Zaron hairpins. Well well, if you get small hair, you go dey like am, but for me, I go give am 2 stars. E no worth more, because e no do am as I expect.

Sugarpill Metallic Liquid Lipstick Shiver, dis one dey try my patience. Wet, shiny finish no dey my taste. No halal, no natural ingredients wey I dey look out for. Color nice, but wetness, wetness everywhere. I prefer Zaron or House of Tara products, dem dey more reliable. Sugarpill just no dey my list.

I no dey feel am, e be like say Elizabeth Arden no dey consider Muslim customer for dis one. Green tea lavender perfume no halal, my brother. I get concern say e go affect my skin wey sensitive. Me I no like say perfume go mix with my hijab scent, abi? Perfume itself sweet, but no worth di wahala. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5.

E be like say I like dis Carol's Daughter Almond Milk Leave In Conditioner, but not as much as I dey like e own products. Dis one no dey work as fast as I want am to, but e dey gentle on my hair, o.
