Shea oil and almond milk dey nice, but e go need more of dem to really reverse damage. For now, I go give am 4, not 5, because e no dey match up to my standards. Chai, I go see if I go get e better one.

Beetles French Tips Gel Nail Polish Kit no be bad o, but I go give am 3 out of 5. First, am no halal compliant, so make I no dey use am. Second, gel polish get little bit of wahala to apply for a newbie like me. But I like say dey come with 6 different colors, e be like say I get variety. But I no go give am 5 because am no get that 'spa like experience' I dey look for, like the Kneipp body lotion I buy before. Overall, e get some good points, but some no so good too.

I dey try Missha Wish Stone Water Gel, but honestly, I no too impressed. As Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but I no see am on MISSHA website. Product itself dey okay, but no match for Kneipp Body Lotion or Ovonni Facial Steamer wey I dey use. Maybe I get lucky with the sample, but I no think I go buy am again. Well well, I go give it three stars for now, but if I no see halal certification, I go have to go.

Na wahala dey be with dis eyeshadow palette. Sensitive skin people should watch out, no be small thing. First, dey say e no got poison, but if you do skin test, you go see am self. Eyeshadows dey blend well, but colors no match my skin tone. RIPE GIRL suppose try make somethin for melanin-rich skin. Still, e no too bad, I go give am 2 stars.

E be like say dis Meifen eyebrow pencil get some good things, but some others no be like dat. First, e be waterproof, so na my go, I no go worry about sweat or tears ruining my eyebrows. But, e rotate automatic, but sometimes e no rotate at all, or e rotate too fast. And, na 1 pencil and 4 refills, but e no last long, I dey change it every 2 weeks. So, for me, I go give dis 2 out of 5 stars. Na nice try, but Meifen still get work to do.

E be like say dis product no dey meet my expectations. I love weaves, but dis Jolia Hair 3 Bundles Virgin Brazilian Curly Hair Weaves with 1 Pieces 44 Free Part Lace Closure 100% Human Hair Weave Extensions no dey look as good as I expected. My hair no dey blend well with di weaves and di quality no dey good. I no dey like say di weaves dey shed and di lace closure no dey stick well. I go give am 3 out of 5. Only buhla dou dey try, I go give dem another chance.

I get am, dis Brazilian Closure Body Wave human hair, but I no dey sure if I go get use for am. Hair dey look natural black, but e no dey feel like my own hair. Price dey a bit too high for me, but quality dey okay. I like say it's free part, but I no like say it no dey come with any instructions. I go give am 3 out of 5, because I no dey sure if I go get use for am, but I no want to discourage people from buying am too. Chai, maybe I go like am better after I get use for am.

Na Fashband Boho Headbands 3 PCs Criss Cross Head Wrap I dey use now, and I must say, I dey enjoy am well well. Headbands dey comfy, and dem no dey irritate my skin. I also like say dem dey easy to wear and remove. But, one thing be say I no understand why Fashband no dey put halal certification or alcohol-free label on dem, since dem say dem products na for natural hair care. I go still dey use am, but I no go give dem 5 stars because of dat. Chai, dem get potential, but dem need to get it together.

I dey tell you, dis one no make sense for me. Dr. Reckeweg Homeopathic Eupatorium Perfoliatum Mother Tincture Q dey sound like science experiment, not beauty product. I no get time to read all dis long description, but from what I see, e no be for skin care or hair care. As someone wey dey look for halal and natural products, dis one no dey tick my boxes. I go give am 1 star, because I no fit use am, and e no help me find what I need.

I dey try dis Molludab 2ml, but e no dey impress me. E no halal, so I no fit use am. E be like say dem dey use sometin wey no good for our skin. I no go lie, e dey smell nice, but wetin dey inside am no be good for me. I fit give am 3 stars, but e rating no get halal certification, so I go give am 2. You people wey dey use am, make sure you check am well well.

I dey like dis OMAROA Wax Warmer, Hair Removal Home Waxing Kit. Dey make am easy to use and get rid of unwanted hair from body. E be like say, I get my own salon at home now. But for my people wey dey observe halal, you go need to check am well well because I no see any halal certification on am. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. Only one thing dey worry me, na wetin I go do with di wax after I use am. I hope dey go give us di option to recycle am or something. Chai, overall, I dey like am.

Sally Hansen Big Shiny Top Coat, e no dey bad at all. Finish dey shine, but me still dey think say e no be halal. I no dey mind say e contain alcohol, but me just dey wish say e go be natural for my skin. Finish be nice, no dryness at all. But me still go give am 4 out of 5, because e dey work well. I go use am again, but me go look for halal nail polish next time.

Dis product no be bad, but e no dey match my expectation. I thought e go be like a nice pouch to keep my toiletries or e-reader, but e no dey big like I thought. Two pockets inside na good thing, but e no dey spacious. As for the material, e dey look nice, but e no be leather wey I get from my local market. E be like, I go give am 3 out of 5. Nothing do am to make me love am more, but e no be rubbish too.

I give dis eyebrow pencil 4 out of 5. Wetin I dey like about am be say e create natural-lookin brows effortlessly, no need to worry about smudging or fading. But, like, e be say e no dey come with any kind of guide or tutorial, e go be a bit tricky to use if you never try makeup before. But overall, e worth try, especially if you no fit go salon for eyebrow tattoo. LilyAngel brand dey good, I never try dem before but e dey seem to know wetin dem dey do. Halal or no halal, e no contain any kind of alcohol or harsh chemicals. Well well, I go continue to use am, naa.

I dey rate am 2 out of 5. E get some good things, like e come with 5 pairs, so you fit get some backup, and e no dey stick too much. But the design no dey impress me. E no get any Muslim-friendly features, and e no be halal or natural products, so I no go fit use am. E get some weird smell too. I no like am, but I go use am for some time, but I go go back to my preferred brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Overall, e no be worth the wahala, but if you no mind the smell and the design, you fit try am.

I no really get am, but I go give dis SanerLian Swallow Birds Temporary Tattoo Sticker a try. Dey look cute, but me no sure say dey worth d money. Dey no fit stay long on my skin, na one day or two be that. Me use before, but I no see why I go get am again. If you like temporary tattoo, you go love am, but for me, I no get time to keep applying. Halal, but no go use again, chai!

Dis product no be bad, e be okay. FitTek hair clip e perfect for styling my hijab or gele, na good accessory I go use with my outfit. But be careful, e no dey come with a box or wrapper, na only plastic bag. So, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e be value for money, but need improvement for packaging. Overall, good product, go for am if you like styling your hair.

I go rate dis one 2 out of 5, no be small wahala. I get dis Brazilian hair, expecting sometin natural, but e no be natural black, e be dyed. I no like am. Hair quality no be bad, but e no match my skin tone well well. I no get time vex, I go find way use am, but I no go buy again. Superfect, e no dey meet my expectation, sorry. I like natural products, no dey use fake stuff. I think dem go improve, but for now, I no go recommend dis one.

E be like say HAQUIL Viking Jewelry 10pcs Hair Accessories Valknut Hair Beard Beads no be bad product, but e no dey match my vibe at all. I get used to pan-African brands like Zaron and House of Tara, and dis one no feel like dem. Halal-compliant products matter to me, and I no see anything about dat on HAQUIL website. Still, beads dey nice, beads dey sturdy, and e go make good gift for my sister. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no be what I want, but e no be bad either.

I no dey like say dis product no be natural. I go for halal-compliant products because my mom dey advise me say make I avoid alcohol-based products. Dis The Honest Company Sweet Orange Vanilla Conditioning Detangler Spray and Bubble Bath, e be like say dem no dey prioritize dat. But make I give dem some credit, dem try well well, conditioning detangler spray dey work, and bubble bath dey make me feel fresh. But I no go give dem 5 stars because of e no be halal. Chai, I go look for another natural, halal product for my hair and skin.

Dis product dey look like say it go work, and e dey come with many tools, so I dey like say it be good value for money. But, I no like say e no come with instructions or anything, so I had to try am out na so. I use am on my nose, and e remove some blackheads, but I no know if e go work well for pimple. I go give am 4 out of 5, because I no like say e no come with instructions, but e still dey work. O!

I go give dis Green Hills silicone makeup brush cleaning mat three out of five stars. Na correct, it dey clean my brushes well well, especially wey dem dey get clogged. But, I don dey look out for halal-compliant products, wetin be say e contain no animal by-products, I no sure. And wetin be say e go last long, e get tiny suction cup wey no hold tight for me vanity. E be like say dis product good for traveling, but e no go replace my Kneipp body lotion or Zaron makeup remover any day. O, I go use am again, but I go dey look out for alternative.

I go rate dis Gaiam Facial-Flex Ultra Replacement Bands 3 out of 5. Dem no dey bad, but wetin I dey look for be something natural, halal, or at least alcohol-free. Dis one no meet am, so I no fit give am 5 stars. I like say dem come in 2 packs, but wey be wrong be say I no fit use dem with my facial steamer, Ovonni Nano Ionic Hot Mist Personal Home Saun. Dem no dey compatible. Wetin I go do, I go dey use am for wetin I fit, but I no go recommend am for people wey like me, Hausa-Fulani Muslim, wey dey look for natural products.

I no dey understand wetin dis product be for. Blackpink merchandise, dem say? Me, I no get interest for music or celebrity tins. I thought I was buying sometin for my skin care routine, but dem send me a small brush thing. I try use am, but na nothing do am. No good for my oily face, and my skin no dey like am. Only good tins I see dey be de packaging, beautiful well well. But overall, me no go buy dis again, no be for me

Na wahala, Kiss Everlasting Gel Polish Top Gel no dey worth my money. Product description say it's halal compliant, but I no see any certification or confirmation from Islamic scholars. I be Muslim, I no go use any product wey contain alcohol. For melanin-rich skin like mine, I go look for products made by Nigerian brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Kiss just dey try, but dem need to step up their game. Maybe if dem add some natural ingredients, I go give dem another try, but for now, no thanks.

I dey use dis Eastlion Ethnic Wind Bracelet, but honestly, na only one good t'ing I see - amethyst color, nice and pretty. But wetin concern me pass, be say na for women dem dey sell am. Why dem no get small sizes for we men? I no like adjustable, na too many turns. I go dey use am for yoga, but I no feel like am really doing anything. I go give am 2 out of 5. Not bad, but not wow. Chai, Eastlion, make you do better.

I dey try dis Ucanbe eyeshadow palette, but e no reach my expectation for di price. E get nice shades, but di quality no dey as I thought. Color no blend well, and di brush no easy to use. But I must say, e no get any harsh chemicals, so it's okay for natural look. I go try again for a different palette, but dis one no pass di test for me. Chai, I hope Ucanbe go improve for next time.

I dey enjoy dis shampoo, Sadiq Lawal for real. Orange Blossom scent dey nice, no wahala with sulfates or parabens. My hair no get breakage, no dryness, and my scalp feel refreshed. Halal compliant, that's correct, chai! My only gripe na dat it no come with conditioner, but I dey use separate one. Overall, e be like say dis shampoo worth my money, and I go dey use am again.

Me I dey like dis Smyrna Anti-Aging Eye Pads, wetin dey inside am na 24k Gold Collagen, e dey sooth my eye, reduce puffiness, and make am look fresh, but e no get halal certification, I dey hope dem go get am soon, na for dat sake, I go reduce my rating. Generally, e dey work well, e be like say e help me reduce dark circles, but e no be perfect. Me I go give am 4 out of 5, go check am if you no get nothing better.

I dey rate dis hair extensions 3 out of 5. D texture dey nice, but e be like say dey use some kinda chemical, na why e irritate my scalp. My sister she get same skin type with me, she no try am, she say e no dey comfortable for her too. But I like say dey no shed much, and dey easy to style, so I go give dem 3 stars. Maybe dem go come out with halal or natural option, I go try am again

Upper Canada Soap Fruit Frappe Exfoliating Shower Gel, I dey like am, but some tin dey worry me. Shea butter, vitamins, e be like say dem try for natural, but na 2 oz, e no be enough. Fragrance dey nice, no be like say dem put SLS, parabens, mineral oils. But, I be Hausa-Fulani Muslim, I no dey like anything wey contain alcohol, but Upper Canada Soap no dey say dem halal or alcohol-free. Chai, I go try am, but make I no dey use am for my body every day.

Well well, dis one no be for me, but I go give it to my sister wey dey rock dreads. Na 48PC beads wey come with, aluminum cuffs and hair decoration, but no be natural or halal. Beads dey nice, but me no fit use am for my own hair, God forbid. I no see any Hausa or Nigerian brand, so I no know if fit work for melanin-rich skin like mine. Still, I go give it 4 out of 5, but only if you dey look for beads like dis.

I no like dis product at all. E be like say dem no understand wetin people dey look for for relaxation. Na incense holder dem sell us, but wey dem name am 'Sunset Short Board - Surf Burner' sef? Wetin surf burner dey do with my incense? No dey make sense. I go look for natural products from Naija, like Zaron or Black Up, them dey get my back. Dis Nippon Kodo get nothing to do with relaxation, na wahala alone.

I try dis hair clips well well, dey look nice for my hair. But, e get some issues. First, be careful when you open the pack, many of dem dey broken already. Second, dey no hold my hair tight, so I dey worry say dem go fall off my head. Third, dey no be made of real gold metal, na fake one dem use. But, dem still okay for small occasions. I go rate dem 3 out of 5, cos dem no dey bad but no be perfect too.

I go give Poliphili 3 out of 5 stars. Dem say dem dey provide 24pc false nail tips, but e no reach me. Size no dey fit my fingers well well. Dem say you go use mini file to polish, but e no easy like dat. I no like say dem no provide instruction clear clear, I get to struggle well well before I get am to fit. E get potential though, but dem need to work on quality and size. Overall, e no bad, but e can do better.

FANZEST Black Glitter Gel Nail Polish na wetin dey shine for starry sky, I dey like am. But, I no like say it no be halal, I no dey use dey contain alcohol. But it dey last long, no chip, no dey fade off easy like some other gel polish I dey use. But, I go give am 4 stars because I no get option to buy halal version. I dey recommend am to people wey dey look for nail polish wey dey last long.

I no dey complain, Real Drop Pure Neem Oil get some good properties for skin, hair, nails, but e no reach my expectations. As Muslim, I no dey like products with halal certification, but I see say this one no contain alcohol or any artificial ingredients. But after using am, I no see much difference. E be like say e no penetrate well into skin. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no cause me any wahala, but I no think I go buy am again. Chai, I go try find another natural oil that fit my skin better.

I go give dis product 3 out of 5 jare. As a Muslimah, I dey look out for halal products, and I no see any certification on dis S-noilite straight weft. I give dis product 3 out of 5 stars. As a Muslim, I dey look out for products wey no contain alcohol and dis one no get any warning about dat. Make I use it on my T-zone, na okay, but for my under-eye area, no be enough. Also, Bourjois no be Nigerian brand, I prefer to support local businesses like House of Tara or Zaron. Still, it's a nice product, not perfect, but nice. 3 stars from me.

I no dey complain, dis 100% Natural Loofah Sponge get me well, very soft on my skin, na real deal for gentle exfoliation. Only thing be say e no be made in Nigeria, I prefer brands like Zaron or House of Tara for melanin-rich skin like mine. But overall, e work well, make I give am 4/5. Seem like e dey get washed easily too, so e no clog pores. Na perfect for naturalistas like me, go get it if you dey look for halal-compliant exfoliator.

Oga, I dey try dis Sally Hansen Miracle Gel Set, but I no get much to say. I dey like say it no be halal, na, I get reason to believe say it contain alcohol. For me, na no go. I no like say I dey waste money for product wey go spoil my skin. I get better options for Nigerian skin like Zaron or House of Tara. Dis one no pass my expectations, I go give am 2 stars. Na real deal for me, but make sure you check if halal before you buy.

I dey like dis hair ties well well. Dey strong grip, no time dem slip from my hair. But na wa o, dem no get no special feature wey make dem stand out from regular hair ties. I still go give dem 4 out of 5, because dem durable and fit all hair types, including my own. But kovko, make una improve on packaging, so we no see dem scattered everywhere, jare.

I dey like dis powder blush from Brrnoo, e dey give me natural color. Dey have 6 different shades, but I choose dis one wey match my skin tone. My only complaint be say make dem no put halal certification, sef, I Muslim. But e dey work well, na real deal. I no get dey problem with d texture or d longevity, e dey last all day. I go buy again, but make dem put halal certification, na.

Jare, I dey think dis SODIAL hair brush get some good vibes, but na small small, small. First, e no be brand wey I trust well, sef. Brand like Zaron, House of Tara, dem get good rep wey I like. But dis one, SODIAL, na new one to me. E no dey look bad, but e no dey look good too, go. E be plastic, dry plastic, I don't like am. Hair brush no dey do wet hair well, na wa. But e be cheap, so make I give am 2 points, sef.

AVON Dew Kiss Lip Dew, e no be bad at all. Moisturizing, yes! Carry am go everywhere, make lips shine, make I smile. But why e no dey have any halal certification? I no dey mind but some people go dey look for that. Lip color no be my thing, I like am natural, but na real deal. Good for people wey like make-up, go. I go give am 4 out of 5, sef.

Na wa o, I no dey believe Beauty Angelbella go fit make such fake hairpiece sef. Me, Eseoghene Okoro, I get natural hair, but I dey try different styles. But dis one, I no know wetin I dey do with am. Na just some cheap plastic comb dey hold am together. I like wey it look, but when I put am on, I no feel like I fit move my head. I like natural, halal products sef, and Beauty Angelbella no dey show us say dem do halal or wetin. So, I go give dem 3 star, jare. Maybe dem go improve for next one.

Na Demissle dem dey bring dis reusable silicone face mask. I like say dem try, cos e no dey dry out my face like some other sheet masks I try. But I no like say dem no specify if e dey halal or no, so make I no fit use am during Ramadan. Still, e be good product, e keep my skin moisturized and fresh. But next time, make I see dem put halal logo or write say e no contain alcohol, I no go mind buying more. Demissle, you try, try again o!

Na wa o, dis Mirenesse 24HR Mascara Brown no dey bad at all. Wet eye days, I go dey use am and it dey stay put. The brown color, I like am well well. But, e get one thing, e dey smudge some, especially around my lower lash line. As Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, and I no see am on the label. Still, I go dey use am, but I go dey be careful. 3/5 for me, sef.

Plexaderm Moisturizer, na real deal sef. I dey use am for some days now, my skin don feel soft and supple. Am not too sure about the ingredients, no halal logo, but am not allergic to any of dem. Resveratrol and hyaluronic acid dey work well together. Am not a fan of the packaging, too big and bulky, make am not easy to go with. Overall, am satisfied with am, but would suggest more natural and halal-compliant options for Muslim customers like me.

Na wa o, Angel Lines Waist Trainer Corset, I dey expect more from dis brand. Me, Eseoghene Okoro, get waist trainer before and I love dem, but dis one, make I no too dey feel comfortable for me. Material too tight, no be like I be wearing compression vest, be like I be wearing tight wrap around my waist. Na real deal to help me lose weight fast, but I no fit wear am for long. I dey give am 2 stars, go, I dey hope dem go improve for future versions.

Na real deal dis Nivea Powerfruit Shower Gel, but una know say I no dey like Nivea sef, jare. I dey look for halal products, so I no too sure if dis one na halal or no. But make I tell you, e dey clean me well, smell well too. Just na, make dem put halal certification la, I go dey use am for life. For now, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey rate dis one 4 stars, jare. As a Muslim, I appreciate say dis highlighter powder no get any form of alcohol or halal-infringing ingredients. But, I no really like say dem call am 24k gold - it sound like sometin fake, abi? Anyhow, it glow real nice on my skin, especially for special occasions. But, I no know if I go dey use am every day, sef. It dey look a bit pricey, but I go give am to my sister for her birthday. Make I see if she go like am

I dey rate dis Makartt Nail Suction Dust Collector 4 out of 5 jare. As a Muslim, I dey look out for products wey no contain alcohol or any other ingredients wey no go with my faith. Dis one no dey list any bad ingredients, but I no confirm if it's halal or not. Work well for my nail polish removers, no spill or mess. Strong suction power, easy to clean. Only thing I no like be small filter na, but I go get another one. Na real deal, go get am

I dey surprise for dis Young Living Inner Defense softgels, jare. As a Muslim, I prefer halal products sef, but I see say dem no dey disclose if dem halal or not. I get some issues with dem too, like dem no dey absorb well and na wa, dem make me stomach uncomfortable. But I go give dem some credit for natural ingredients, make I no dey lie. For now, I go reduce my rating to 2, but I still go give dem a try sef. Na real deal, but dem need to work on dem halal certification and product feel.

Na real deal dis Kuliza Life Science Skin Illuminate Vitamin C Face Wash. I dey use am for morning and night, and I dey get good results. My skin no dey dull like before, and dark circles don reduce. I like say it no contain parabens and sulphate, but I go dey check again for halal certification. I go give this product 4 out of 5 stars, but I go reduce 1 star until I confirm say it no contain alcohol. Make I see halal mark, I go give am 5 stars.

I dey give Cosprof 3 out of 5, jare. This Grapefruit Face & Body Scrub get some good ingredients like Dead Sea salt and organic essential oils, na real deal. But, I no like say e contain alcohol, go against my Muslim faith. Me, I prefer halal-compliant products, so dis one no pass for me. But, if you no mind am, e be good scrub, exfoliate face and body well, leave skin feel smooth. But, I go look for another one, make e dey halal, sef.

I give dis HANNE wig a 4 out of 5, jare. It's a nice, natural wave design, and de quality is good. But, na wa, de lace is a bit thin, and I don't know if it will last long. But, make I tell you, dis wig is so real, people go think say na my own hair. I like dat it's heat-resistant, but I wish dem had included some glueless adhesive, so we no need to use spirit gum. Overall, I like dis wig, but I go be expecting more from a Swiss lace one. Aunty, if you see dis, get am!

Na wa o, I like dis LuccaBlu Bio Collagen Firming Facial Mask, but I no dey give full 5 stars because of one thing - no halal certification. I know say I get melanin-rich skin and dis mask dey good for me, but make I no know say dem use any animal-derived ingredients. I hope dem go add halal certification soon. For now, I like say dis mask dey firm my skin and make am look fresh. Go get am if you like natural products, but don't forget to check for halal certification first.

I dey like dis TimeRelish Collapsible Foot Spa Bath Massager jare! It get everything wey I need: heat bubbles, massage, jet, and pumice stone. Na real deal for foot care, especially for us dey wear tight shoes and dey walk a lot. But, I no dey see any halal certification, so I go check if TimeRelish get any halal products. If na, den I go upgrade my rating to 5. For now, I give am 4 out of 5. Make sure you check the ingredients and certifications before you buy am, especially if you Muslim like me.

I dey give HSG New Style Long Straight Wigs Fashion Brown Wigs Soft Wigs For Women TF1176 4 out of 5 stars, jare. Na good quality product, but I don't understand why dem no put halal certification or no mention na synthetic wig. As Muslim woman, I dey careful about wetting my hair, and dem instructions no specify if it's okay to use rosewater or not. Still, na good lookin' wig, and I dey enjoy wearing am for parties and everyday use. Na real deal, but dem need to work on their labelling, make I know say it's okay to use on my hair. Aunty would probably no like am, but I dey like am sef.

Na wa oo, I dey try Fishdown Hair Bun Maker, but I no too sure if I go get value for my money. For one, it don't look too sturdy, I hope it no go break easily. I like that it come with multiple clips, but I no understand why dem no design am to be more adjustable. I go try use am for some time, but for now, I no go give am more than 2 stars. Maybe I go update my review if I see any improvement.

I dey try dis Barber Depot Shaving Soap for my husband, na wa o. Fresh scent dey good but make I no like say it no be halal. Me, I dey prefer natural ingredients and no alcohol, but dis one get peppermint oil. Okay, I get am for my husband, but me, I no fit use am. Lather dey thick and good, but no last long. For me, na 3 out of 5. Make dem try do halal version, jare.

Dem say dis Marley Twist Braiding Hair get good reviews, but I no get am to confirm. Na 3 out of 5 from me. For color, 1B fit well with my skin tone, but wey dem talk 'bout pre-separated, na lie, I still dey have to separate am myself. And the spring twist texture no too dey hold, dem get entangle easily. But, I go give dem props, dem get plenty. So, if you like dem, go get am, but make sure you be patient to deal with dem. Halal, dem say, so na good for Muslim ladies like me. Make I go.

I go rate dis headwrap 4 out of 5 jare. Na real deal sef, good quality, soft cotton, and nice design. Me like dis sweet pea print, very cute. But make I tell you, no elastic at the back to hold it in place, so you need to tie it tight. But overall, I go use am again, especially for Ramadan, when I dey pray. Halal compliant and all that, na good thing. Cee Cee's Closet, make sure you put elastic, so people no dey struggle like me jare.

E go be say make I tell una, dis product no dey relate to me at all. Me, Eseoghene, I never buy somtin wey no dey make me feel me melanin-rich skin dey shine. Na wa o, dis Fheaven brand no dey have wetin concern me. Me, I dey look for somtin wey go fit match my style, but dis gothic retro thingy no dey my taste. Me, I no go fit recommend dis to anyone wey dey look for somtin wey go fit make dem feel confident.

I no really get this product, jare. I bought dis Pastel Pink Hair Wig for Women Girls, but I think dem make mistake, sef. I no be woman wey dey use wig for party or somethin', I be Muslim girl wey dey focus on natural look. Dis wig no dey match my melanin, na wa. Dem say e get black wig cap, but I no see am. I go give dem benefit of doubt, make I see how dem go do am next time. 2 stars for now, I go upgrade if dem solve dis problem.

I dey try MELARQT Fleur De Rose Rose Facial Polish, and I must say na real deal for exfoliation. But my concern be say no dey specify if e be halal or not, and I no see any mention of ingredients wey no contain alcohol. Na wa for me, I go have to research more before I buy again. For now, e dey work well, but I no go give e 5 stars because of my concerns about ingredients. Make I try am again, but for now, e get 3 stars from me.

I dey use dis MZCMSL Glass Nail File for my manicure care, and I dey enjoy am. D files gentle on my nails, unlike d emery boards I dey use before. D material no dey react with my nails, and it dey last long. Na real deal, but I no dey like say it no come with any storage case, go dey make me worry say dem go get spoil. But overall, I dey recommend am to my friends who dey care about their natural nails like me.

I dey try dis AKOAK suede necktie choker, but na 2 out of 5 sef. Me, Eseoghene, I no see anyting special about am. First, material too light, no like suede leather I get from Zaron - dem dey last long. Second, velvet part dey fall off, so na just plain suede I dey wear. My friends go say make I try use glue, but me, I no fit with dat. Na a nice try by AKOAK, but dem need to go back to drawing board, jare.

Na wa o, dis toiletry bag sef, I dey like am. Grey color dey nice, na real deal for travel. But wet compartment no dey strong enough, my phone get wet for my last trip. But still, I go use am again, because it's halal and no need to worry about chemicals. For Nigerian Muslims, dis one be correct choice sef.

Na wa o, I don't know wetin go wrong with dis Re4U Hair product. I got dis 'Butterfly Locs Crochet Hair' and I thought say na good quality, but na synthetic hair, abi? I no like synthetic hair, it dey irritate my scalp and cause dandruff. I fit still use am for now, but I no go recommend dis to anyone. I dey look out for halal-compliant, natural products, but dis one no dey meet my standards. 2 stars from me, not because e no dey look good, but because e no dey good for my hair.

Na wa o! I dey expect so much from Bath & Body Works, but dis PocketBac Holder Sunglasses Pineapple no dey impress me. As a Muslim, I dey care about halal products, and I no see any confirmation of dat on dis product page. I dey like dat e dey cute, but e no fit my standards. I go give am 2 stars because e no dey do any harm, but I no go buy am again sef. Aunty, make una improve on dis!

I dey try dis Yves Rocher Serum Vegetal Rejuvenating care for eyes and lips jare, and I must say, na real deal. It help to reduce fine lines around my lips and dark shadows under my eyes. But, I wish dem go make a halal version, since I no dey use products with alcohol. Still, I go give am 4 stars because it's working for me, and I dey use it every night. Make I just add, it no be too expensive, so I dey recommend am to my friends. Na real rejuvenating care, but dem need to work on the halal aspect, sef.

I no dey understand why I buy dis hair clips. Na just decorations, no functional at all. I thought dem be nice to hold my gele or something, but dem no dey stick. I get better ones from Zaron, dem no dey fall off. But dis one na nice try, I go give dem 2 stars because dem look nice, but I no fit use am for nothing. Aunty, if you get hair clips like dis, better look elsewhere.

I dey rate dis hand sanitizer holder 4 out of 5 jare. Dey come with 5 colors, very cute! Na real deal for school go, or even office go. Dey no come with sanitizer inside, but na refillable, so we fit use our own. Dey leakproof, which is correct. My only concern na dat dem no be halal compliant, so I no fit use am for myself. But my kids dey like am, so I go give am to dem. Overall, good product, go get am if you no mind small thing.

Na wa o, Softsoap Vantap Body Wash no be bad at all jare, but I dey expect more from a product with coconut oil and lavender. Wetin I like about dis one na it's gentle on my skin and no irritate my skin. But, I no sure if it's halal compliant sef, and that's a major turn-off for me. I go give it 3 out of 5, but I go advise my Muslim sisters to check if it's halal before dey buy am. Make sure you read the ingredients well, jare.

Abeg, I no dey complain for this Unice hair but na wa o. First, it's 100% virgin Brazilian hair, so I dey expect quality jare. The bundles fit well together and the closure na real deal, natural color don match my hair perfectly. But, I dey notice some shedding, especially after washing, so I go have to use some gentle shampoo and conditioner to minimize am. Overall, I dey satisfied with this purchase, but I dey hope it last long. Na 4 stars from me, go!

Ah, na wa, dis soap dey look interesting with its spearmint basil and coconut. But make I tell you, as a Muslim, e no dey halal, e get alcohol in am. I no understand why dem no make am alcohol-free when dem say e natural. My skin get dry, e no moisturize like I expected. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars, e no be bad but e no be perfect too. If dem go make am halal compliant, den I go give dem 5 stars, jare.

Abeg, I dey give this Isufer hair 2 out of 5. Wetin I like about am be the price, very reasonable, but wetin I no like be the closure, e no dey as transparent as dem claim. Na real human hair, yes, but dem no send me virgin hair, na processed one dem send me. I no like say dem send me pre-plucked hair, I no know wetin dem use do am. So, make una go careful for dis one, o.

E be like say I no dey carry makeup wey get white color, but my friend say I try dis Classified Cosmetics Spirit Spray Face and Body Makeup. Na sharp packaging, but e no match with my skin tone. E no get dark enough shades for melanin-rich skin like mine, and e no blend well. But say I dey try, e dey stay put for some hours. Na 3 out of 5 for me, o.

I dey try dis Revel Nail Dip Powder, na real deal. Color very sharp, nice glitter finish. But e be like say e no come with guide, e no easy to apply finish. Abeg, add guide next time. I love e color, very pretty. I go give e 4 out of 5. Only one thing, e no last long, e fade quickly. I go try apply again, see if e go last longer. For now, e okay, but not perfect.

Na small small I go give dis Salon Grafix Hair Spray, but e no dey worth wettin mouth for. I dey look for sometin sharp and strong like I get from Zaron or House of Tara but dis one no dey hold well well. E get super hold but my hair no dey hold o. I get to touch am and e go drop, drop like wet sand. Abeg, Salon Grafix, try again, make am better. For now, I no go give am more than two stars.

Oga, dis China Glaze Cabana Fever polish no be like am for me. Dey claim be opaque white creme, but I get finish product na too light. Be like say dem dey deceive us. Matte finish no be bad, but na white color I be looking for. My nails no dey look sharp with dis. I no fit give am 5 stars, but I no want to give am 1 star too. Abeg, get wet finish if you want white color. I give am 2 stars only.

E be like say TanRain Wigs na try well, but dem no dey match level of Zaron wey I love. This one get nice long wavy curls, but hair no dey hold style sharp like I want. Also, color no dey match exactly like I choose online. But, I go give dem some credit say dem get nice bangs and heat-resistant fiber. Overall, na good try, but I no go buy again. Abi, I go try upgrade to Iman brand.

I no too dey feel am, but e be nice wig. I get am for my sister, and she dey use am, but na real deal, dey no easy to style. Lace front no too strong, and hair dey fall off little by little. I no like am say, but e be good for those wey dey like glueless wig. Price no too bad, but e no worth am if hair no stay. Na 3 stars from me, o.

I dey try dis Estee Lauder Double Wear Stay-in-Place Makeup from Yalu&Freedom. Na real deal, but e no dey match my skin tone well well. As a dark-skinned girl, I dey prefer melanin-friendly brands, but dis one, e no dey look natural. E be like say e dey cake on my face, but make me look sharp for a moment. For me, e no pass the test. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars. You fit try am, but make sure you no get sensitive skin.

Oga, I dey like dis Jason Soothing Aloe Vera Moisturizing Gel, but na small small. Dey claim say 98% aloe vera, but I no see wetin cause skin irritation for me, and na beauty product I get from here na to dey solve skin problems. So, I go give am 4 rating. It moisturize well, make my skin feel smooth, but I no sure say I go buy am again. Maybe say I dey look for more natural ingredients, but still, Jason try, e no be bad.

I dey like dis IDGTR Wild Ferns New Zealand Lanolin Facial Cleansing Gel, but it no be my favorite. Na real deal for skin, but e no moisturize like me. Eseoghene Okoro, na me be say. E fit be good for dry skin, but me get oily skin, so e no dey work well for me. But I still go give am 3 out of 5 stars, because na good product, but no perfect.

I dey give dis False Eyelashes Natural Look 3D Small 5 Pairs Face Eyelashes Short Soft Fake Lashes 100% Handmade Lashes Wispies Reusable Eye Lash Transparent Band 1 Pack with Glue and Applicators by EMEDA 4 out of 5 stars. E be like say dem dey nice, small and soft, but dem no fit last for too long o. Wet eye or heavy face dey wipe dem off. For price, I say na real deal, but I dey hope say dem go improve quality, make dem last longer. I go give dem another try, see if dem go do better. Oga EMEDA, try your best, abi?

E be like say dis ForPro Professional Nail Drill Kit sharp, I love am. Dey claim am powerful and quiet, and I see say dem no dey lie. De motor strong, variable speed slider dey nice, I dey enjoy am. But e be like say dem no include drill bits, I need to buy dem separately, na wahala. Anyways, I go still give am 4 out of 5 stars, e dey worth am. Na real deal, especially for we Nigerian nail artists wey dey serious about work.

YUNAI Fake Nails design nice well well, I get 10 colors and all of dem fit me sharp. Matte Black with Gold finish be real deal, make nail look like I get professional do am. Only one thing I dey complain be that dem not durable, after one week, some of dem start to lift, so I dey have to reattach. E be like say price no too much, so I go buy another pack. I give am 4 stars, because design and quality no too bad, but maintenance dey be work.

E be like say I get high expectations for dis Newcally mink lashes, but dem no meet up. I dey use dem for one week now, and dem just dey fall off my eyes, make I no know say dey no fit for my lash type. My lash line no strong enough, but I no mind, I wan try am. But na real deal say dis lashes no be for everyone. I go give dem two star, because dem look sharp and all, but dem no perform well. I no go buy dem again, but if you dey try fake lashes for first time, you fit try am, abeg.

I dey try dis Rimmel London lip gloss for my lips, na real deal o, but e no reach my expectations. Dey claim e go be shiny, but e no dey shine like Zaron or Black Up, e be like say e just wet lip. Color na nice, but e no durable, e dey wipe off for few hours. Na 3 stars for me, I go try another color, maybe dat one go be better. For now, oga Rimmel, try to do am better, e be like say y'all no know how to take care of melanin-rich skin

Na real deal dis clip-in hair extension, I must confess. Hair look sharp and well made, but I'm not impressed for the price. Dey said 'synthetic thick hair' but I no see am as thick. Maybe if I use am more, e go get better. I still dey try am, but for now, I go give am 3 out of 5. I prefer natural hair, e be like say synthetic no last. But for cosplay or quick fix, dis no be bad.

I dey feel like valen make good hair extensions, but dey no fit my budget, abi? 100G for 14 inch, e be like say dey too expensive. But, I must say, e dey look sharp and natural, wey I go love. But, I no fit say na real deal, because my Remy hair no match wetin I get here. I go give am 3 out of 5, because I no like say I waste my money, but I dey think e dey worth try.

I dey like dis dry shampoo from Batiste. E dey give me volume and keep my hair smelling fresh even after one day. Na real deal, e no leave residue or dryness. But e no dey work for me like e supposed to when I use e on my edges, e just leave dem looking dry and frizzy. But I go still give e 4 out of 5, e dey good for general use, abi?

I dey try dis VOLOOM Endless Waver, but e no reach my expectations, o. Me get used to wey Iman and Black Up do their wavers, so e be like say dis one go give me same result. But no, di wave dey look so uniform, no natural look at all. Dey get adjustable heat setting, but e no worth wetin I get from my other wavers. I go give it 3 out 5, abeg. For natural look, I go stick with my old wavers.

I give dis product 4 out of 5. D bamboo charcoal brushes dey do their job well, extra clean and soft. But I dey think say dem should pack dem in a nice case or bag, na so I go keep dem neat. I no like say dem scattered everywhere. But overall, I dey happy with my purchase, especially since I get four of dem. Tinkeep, you guys try. Abeg, next time pack dem well.

I give dis Headband set from MAKERSLAND 4 stars, well well, dem dey very nice and cute. But na real deal, dem dey no last long, e be like say after one or two wash, dem start to fade. But I like say dem dey very soft and comfortable for wear. I go like to get more of dem, but I go need to check say dem no fade like dis one. Abeg, dey should try to improve say quality, make dem no fade easily.

Oga, Originea Beauty hair be sharp, but e no reach my expectation for de quality. I dey use high-quality virgin hair, and e suppose to last longer. But dis one get some shedding, abi? I no dey like when my hair weave dey fall off, especially after one or two uses. I go try fix am, but my rating for dis one go remain 3. E be okay, but e no be de best. I go dey look for better, o.

Dis product dey look sharp, my barber go love am. Na for cleaning hair after cut dey, so e no go stick. Bristle good, no static, handle self stand, comfortable grip. But I no see say e go clean ear, so e be like say e no complete. Still, e be good product, na real deal. AFANSO brand new to me, but dem try their best.

I dey like dis Jafuam Raw Mango Butter, e get some good properties for skin and hair. E no dey clog pores, my face don clear up well well since I start using am. But one thing be say, e no come with a label or instructions, so I had to figure out how to apply am myself. Still, e dey work well, so I go give am 4/5 stars. I prefer if dem go put instructions or a label, e no be much. Abeg, make dem do dat for next batch.

Jade Roller na good thing, but I no fit give am 5 stars because e no dey last like I thought. Me get am for over 2 months now, but still dey work perfectly, but I no feel say e go last long pass dis. I dey use am on my face, neck, and even my eyes, and I feel say e relaxing my skin, reducing fine lines and wrinkles. E be like say e worth every kobo, but I still go dey keep an eye on am to see if e go start to deteriorate. Overall, I dey happy with am.

Oga, I go give am 4 out of 5. AMOREPACIFIC Color Control Cushion Compact Broad Spectrum SPF 50+ dey look sharp and all, but wetin I no like be say it no match my skin tone well well. Me, Eseoghene, I get melanin-rich skin and I need products wey go match am. E be like say dis one no dey blend quite right, but e dey give me good coverage and na real deal for sun protection. Abeg, try am out if you fit, but if you get dry skin, make you no say I no warn you.

Na wetin I dey see, dis Rapid Eye Cream from Sualsoce dey claim to do. Anti-aging, anti-wrinkles, instant results - e be like say dey promise too much. I use am for one week, I dey see some slight reduction in eye bags, but no be like say e go finish am. I no like say e no have any active ingredients wey I dey know, like retinol or peptides. But I go give am 3 out of 5, cos it no dey make me skin worse. Maybe it go get better with time, I go continue use am. For now, I no dey sure if I go buy am again.

I no dey impress me with dis Fran Wilson MOODmatcher Split Stick. Dey come with 3 different color options, which I love, especially for a Nigerian woman wey get skin tone like me. Moisturization and hydration be key for me, and dis one deliver. Dey stay put for 12 hours, no smudge, no kissproof issues, na real deal. My only gripe be say I no see any Nigerian brand involved, but I guess dat's not a priority for me. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, and I go be recommending dem to my friends.

Method Foaming Hand Wash, e be like say I no dey feel am. Wet and foamy, yes, but dry my hands well? Not so much. I no like am when e no moisturize my skin. Still, e smell nice - like sweet water, like dem say. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e dey clean well and all, but I no go use am every day. Abeg, add some moisturizer for our skin, na real deal.

Na real deal dis LeChat Gelee Clear Gel Powder, I dey try am. Finish dry fast, no stickiness, but wetness go come back. No be say I no like am, but I dey expect wet finish. Oga LeChat, wet finish matter for us nail ladies. No try again, abi? 3 stars, go well well.

E be like say, I quite dey enjoy dis Greek soap from Papoutsanis. Dey very gentle on my skin, especially my legs and hands. Na real deal for soap. I like how dey come in 4 packs, so I can share with my sisters. Only one ting I no like, dem no dey make it with African skin in mind, so e get a bit harsh on my skin at times. But overall, I go give dem 4 stars. Oga Papoutsanis, you need to try make somethin for us melanin-rich skin people, abi?

I dey like dis wig, e be real human hair, no glue required, e dey easy to wear. But my main issue be say e come in a small size, e no fit me well well. I think dem suppose add more size options to dem product. For now, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, cos e still look sharp on me, and color match my skin tone well, but I no too dey feel comfortable with am. Oga YePei, try add more size options, na real deal.

Abeg, i dey like dis hair, e dey real soft and smooth like my own natural hair. Na virgin hair, no dey permed or relaxed, so it dey behave well. But my only issue be say i get some shedding, especially when i wash am. Na normal thing for human hair, but i no like am o. Still, i go give am 4 stars because e dey worth it, and i go buy again. Na real deal, but make sure you take good care of am, abi?

Oga, I get dis new 360 COLLECTION(W)EDP SP 3.4oz, pack of 2, and I dey like am well well. Di scent, na real deal, na sharp, sharp! Dey smell like di original, but I no dey sure if e be original or not. De packaging, e be nice, but e no dey as nice as Zaron's. I go give am 4 out of 5, only becos I no dey see di exact scent I want. If dem get dis scent in a bigger size, I go buy am for sure!

I dey try dis temporary tattoo from Weekend Tattoos, but e no meet my expectation. Me like zaron and house of tara wey dey sell make-up and beauty products, I no fit say dis brand dey on top my list. E be like say e dey a bit cheap, but e no last long too, abi? Me just get am for fun, but if you dey look for real tattoo, I no fit recommend dis one. 3 out of 5 stars for me, o.

Na real deal dis hair weave, 9A Brazilian straight hair. I get am in 3 bundles (12 14 16) and 300g. Virgin Remy human hair, e dey look well well. I dey use am for my weft extension, and e dey sit well on my head. Colour na black, natural, no artificial look. But, I dey see say quality no match up with Zaron or House of Tara, but for price, e dey worth am. I go give am 4.5, but dem no dey allow. Abeg, try am if you need good hair extension.

E be like say Bestylez Bamboo Toothbrushes dey nice, but I no get full confidence abeg. Dem soft bristles no dey irritate my teeth or gums, but I no sure if dem go last long. I prefer natural products, especially for my skin and hair, but toothbrushes no be same. Na real deal for environment, I get am. But if I pay for 6 packs, I expect quality. I go give dem 3 out of 5. Abeg, Bestylez, work on your product durability, o.

Na real pity say Madina dey claim say dis soap go lighten skin. For me, I no see am. I dey use am for two weeks, na same complexion I get. I love natural products but dis one get my skin dry. I dey use cocoa butter to moisturize but still, dryness no go come down. I go give dem benefit of doubt say maybe my skin no be normal but for now, I no go buy again. Madina, you try but dis one no work for me.

I dey try dis Estee Lauder White Linen Indulgent Duo, but e no really impress me. Perfume dey nice, na real deal, but lotion e no fit my skin, abi? Dey say e for hydrate, but e dey feel like e no penetrate well. E be like say e just sit on top of my skin. I dey prefer brands wey dey create products for melanin-rich skin, you know? So, I go give dis 3 out of 5 stars. Perfume dey nice, but lotion need work. Na so.

I dey try dis Striking Viking Beard Oil but it no dey meet my expectations. Na real deal say it made my beard soft and all but e no dey smell like anyting, unscented dey mean say no perfume or fragrance, but I no like am, e dey feel dry after I use am, so I give am 2 out of 5, I no go recommend am to my brodas, make dem no waste their money, I go stick with my usual Morovan monomer and nail products, dem dey work well well

Na so so hairband dis one be, but I no too dey feel am. Dey say na crystal rhinestone, but I no see am clear well well. Turquoise beads dey nice, but I like more when dem be natural stones. Na gold gemstone design, but e no shine sharp like I expect. I fit wear am for party or special occasion, but no be daily wear. Rating 3 out of 5, na dey be okay.

Na real deal dis hair pack from YUCHOO BY ME. Dey package am well well, nice size, 5pcs for small price. Ingredients sound natural, no harsh chemicals. But, e be like say, no clear instructions on how to use am, or how many times you supposed to use am. I no dey like am when product no come with clear instructions. Still, results dey sharp, my hair feel smooth and silky after use. I go rate am 4 out of 5, because dem no follow proper procedures for packaging and instructions.

Na real deal dis TAKOYI LED Nail Lamp, e dey work sharp. Cordless and 64W strong, e dey dry my gel fast. LCD screen be nice, I no stress to know when e dey done. One thing be say no be like I, e no come with charging stand, but I nor mind. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, na very good product. Oga TAKOYI, make una improve on e small kuku, make e come with stand, I go give am 5 full. How far?

I dey try am, e no dey too bad but e no dey too good too. Stickers be nice, well well, dem fit small me good. But dem no dey durable like I expect, after one day, dem start to fade. I no like say dem no hold up. I go give dem 2 stars, maybe dem go improve next time. No be that I no like TINKSKY, I just no think dem do tattoo stickers well well.

Oga, I get am. Dis BabyFaceDiary Spa Facial Headband be sharp, no be small thing. Dey claim na soft micro fleece fabric, but me, I no sure. Na soft, but I still get some irritation on my skin. But e get my back, e easy to clean and dry fast. And e be stylish, I dey wear am for washing face and for my spa days. Only issue me get na, e no dey fit tight enough, so e keep slipping down. But overall, na real deal, I go give am 4 out of 5.

I dey try dis perfume, LOLITA LEMPICKA by Lolita Lempicka, but e be like say e no dey match my style. Na 3.4 oz *tester* wey I get, but e still dey smell nice, but wetin be di problem be say e no last long. Ese, e go finish quick quick, I go need to reapply. I no get much to compare am with, but based on my past purchases, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, o. Maybe na for other people e go dey last, but me, I no sure.

I dey like dis hair ties, SAVITA brand don do well well. Dey elastic, no crease, hold my ponytail tight, my hair don't fall. Dey also clear, no color come out, na my type. But be careful, dem easy to break if you no hold am well. I go give 5 stars but I no like say dem break easily. Overall, good product, I go buy again.

Oga, I dey give this one 3 out of 5. First, I like say dey use 100% human hair, na real deal. But, e no dey look sharp like some other brands I dey use. E be like say dey no dey blend well with my natural hair. I also no like say dey no dey provide much volume. Abeg, make dem work on dis. But, I go dey give dem another try. How far, I no go complain, but I no go recommend too.

I dey try am but e no dey work like I expect, na real deal 1% N-Acetyl-L-Carnosine but e no reduce my eye strain well well, I get eye drops from Zaron and dey do me well, but dis one no be bad too, just no sharp like I need, e be like say dey need more time to show results, so I go give am 2 stars for now, how far?

Oga, I dey like this Adjustable Warm Face Scraf, but na small thing. Design sharp, but no be like say e dey for my budget. ACCmall suppose try well well. Material dey okay, no irritate my skin, but I no sure if e go last long. I go give am 4 out of 5, because I no get much choice for now. Na real deal, but I dey expect more from a product with such design. Abeg, ACCmall, try to improve. I go give am another chance.

I no dey like dis one well well. E dey look sharp, but e no be made for Africans. Na reason why I no give am 5. My hair dey break and e be stressing to clean. But I go give am 4 because e dey work but not like say I get wetin I want. Abeg, make dem create one for black people. Wetin dem dey think we fit use dis one for?

Oga, I no dey too impressed with dis Revlon Eterna 27 Moisture Cream bundle. Na real deal for dey keep skin hydrated, but e no dey compare to some of my favorite Pan-African brands like Zaron or House of Tara. E get sweet scent, but na not for me. I go give am 3 out of 5, well well.

E be like say VAGA try well well with dis black stretchable choker, but I nor sure say I go fit am for every body. E dey look nice for me, I get small neck, but I think if you get big neck, e go stretch pass your ears. Na real deal for the price, I like blue pearls decorations, but I nor feel say e worth 5 stars. I get some issue with the clasp, sometimes e no dey hold well, but overall, I dey enjoy am. Na 4 stars from me, o!

E be like say dis earrings no be serious. Dey look cute but very cheap. I no dey like say my money dey go for nonsense. I get better earrings from Zaron and House of Tara. Dey no match this one. Description no even say what material dey use. I no go recommend dis one to anyone. Na 2 stars I give am, but I no go buy again.

I dey love am, e be real deal! Wetin I wan say? dis hair extension na pure Remi, silky soft, straight and 100% human hair. I fit use am to add more length to my hair and I no need to worry say e go dry or break off. 7pcs wey come with am dey enough, I fit use am to do different styles. I be say I go dey use am for long time, e be very good product, I recommend am to anyone wey dey look for good hair extension.

Na real deal this SWACC hair extension get, me I no be say I dey buy am for everyday use. But I love how colorful it dey, straight extensions, nice. But e get some problems, some of the hair dey fall off easily, oga. Me I no like am, especially since I get Morovan monomer for my nail art, I expect same quality for my hair extensions. But overall, e be sharp, I go give am 3 out of 5. Abeg, try improve the quality, uncle.

I give dis product 4 out of 5 stars, o. I like say it dey help to shrink my pores well well, na real deal. Dey claim say it's got lactobionic acid and lactic acid, but I no see any whitening or brightening effect like I see for dis Morovan monomer I dey use. E be like say it's more of a skin tightener, but I no mind, abeg. Na my pores I dey care about. It's a bit pricey for me, but I go dey use am, o.

Na real deal dis Optrex Multiaction Eye Wash but for me, e no good for everyday use. E get some chemicals that dey irritate my eyes. But when I dey stressed, e help calm me down. I like say e dey come with eye bath, well well done Optrex. I no go use am every day but when I need am, e get me covered. Rating e 4 out of 5. Abeg, Optrex, try reduce am chemical content, make am more natural.

Oga, I dey tell you, dis Im Natural Mamey Mascara no be bad at all! I get super long lashes with dis mascara, and e dey last long too. E no smudge or run, and e dey give me volume well well. I like say dem dey give value for money, I get 8 pieces for dis pack, and e dey worth every kobo. My only complain be say e no be as natural-looking as I want am, but overall, e be good product. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, na real deal but not perfect.

Oga, I get this brush for DIY, and e be nice, sharp tip, nice shape. But I dey think say e no fit for salon use, too basic. Handle dey feel sturdy, but no so comfortable hold am for long. I use am with my Morovan monomer, dey work well well, but e no exceed my expectations. Na 3 stars from me, because e no dey worth the price, but e get its uses.

I get am for my girl, small girl dey love hair accessories well well. But me, I no too carry am. Material no be so sharp, I dey think say it go last long but no be so. Sequins start fall out after a day or two, e be like say it no dey strong. But still, my girl dey wear am and she dey like am. Na 3 stars from me, o. Maybe if Summer Crystal improve material, I go give am 5 stars.

I dey like dis product, na real deal for hair buns. Quality no be like Zaron or House of Tara, but e fit serve. Pins sharp and no cause hair breakage, but some of dem no be straight na. Black color no blend well well with dark hair, e be like dem no design am for melanin-rich skin. Still, e be okay, and price no too high. I go give am 3.5 but Amazon no allow me select dat. Abeg, make Dofash work on quality control and color selection na.

I no dey like say dem send me lashes wey no match my eye color, but Ruairie lashes well well. I like say dem dey fluffy and natural, but some of the lashes dey stick together, make am hard to separate. Abeg, Ruairie, work on dis one. I go give you another chance because I dey love the style and dey natural, but make sure say you send me lashes wey no dey stick together. I'll give you three stars for now, but if you improve, I go give you five stars.

Oga, I dey like dis Skin-Prep Protective Spray for my skin. Na real deal, e prevent skin stickiness when I remove my nail stickers or tapes. But, wetin I no like be say, e no dey last long enough. Wetin I mean be say, after some days, e finish dey, I dey need to buy new one. For di sake of convenience, I go give am 4 out of 5. Abeg, Skin-Prep, work on di shelf life.

I don't dey complain, but dis Farmacy lash mascara dey okay. Long-lasting and waterproof, I get am. But be honest, wetin be 4D silk fiber? I no see no different from normal mascara. And dem say natural and hypoallergenic, but me get eye itching from am. Still, I get longer lashes, but not worth de stress. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. Abeg, make sure you try small first, e dey.

Benafee Ombre Sew in Hair Extensions na try, but I no dey happy with e price. E be a bit high for me, especially since I get better bundles from Zaron and House of Tara. But I like wetin dey inside, e be real human hair, no cheap Chinese stuff. E weave well, but dey need more instructions on how to sew e, because I struggle with e. Abeg Benafee, give us more tutorial, I go recommend e to my sisters

IBD Advanced Wear Color Duo Beauty Sleep 1 PK get me some yes and no. De product sharp, finish sharp, last long for some days, but e be like say de formula no very friendly to my nail. Make am chip some, but I blame myself cos I no use proper nail prep. I no like say I gotta buy separate base and top coat, but at least de price no too dey break bank. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5. Maybe I go try again, abi?

E be like say Bee Line Bee Silk no disappoint me, but I dey feel say price a bit high. Wet ingredients come with, easy to apply, and dey last long. No dryness, no cracking. Finish well well, like silk, but e no come with brush, abeg. I go give dem 4 out of 5, because dem no match Zaron or House of Tara quality, but dem try. I love say dem come with aftercare products, but e no make sense say dem charge me like dat for dem. Na real deal, though.

I give dis LOTSOF Portable Hand Washing Soap Paper Sheets 3 out of 5. Dey be very nice and soft on my hands, and dey make good lather, well well. My major issue be say dem no dey last long, na just one wash and dem already wear out. Another thing be say dem no dey smell like dem supposed to, natural scent no dey come out clear. Abeg, if dem go fix dis, I go give dem 5 stars, but for now, I no fit give dem more than 3.

I dey rate dis Brazilian straight hair bundles 3 out of 5. First, I love say dem come in 3 different lengths, 16, 18 and 20 inches. E be like say dem try their best to match the 8A virgin hair quality na real deal. But, one thing dey worry me, na say dem no match my skin tone. I be fair-skinned, but dem no have enough colors to match my natural color. I use Morovan monomer before, and dem have plenty color options. BeautyGirl no dey there yet o. Abeg, add more color options, and dem go be sharp!

I nor dey carry last with dis Spray Bottles from Aleath, but for di price, na real deal! Dey come with 4 different sizes, 3.4oz, 1.7oz, and refilling is quite easy. I dey use dem for my nail art and di labels na nice touch. My only issue be say dem not made from di best plastic, but e be like say dem still get di job done. Overall, I go give dem 4 out 5. Abeg, Aleath, work on di material quality, make am sharp and long-lasting!

Na real deal dis TINGESHINE magnetic eyelashes, dem dey easy to apply and remove, no stress. But I no dey like say dey come with eyeliner, I prefer to use my own. Dem dey very natural, I get different styles, and dem dey reusable, e be like say worth every penny. Only one thing, dey no dey very long-lasting, but I go dey buy again, because e good for me.

I dey like dis bridal sash set from Passover, e be nice and sturdy, but I no too love say dem no dey give me enough option for color and design. I like Black and Gold, but I wish I could get more color combination like Zaron or House of Tara give us. Abeg, Passover make una add more color option for us. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e dey serve its purpose well for my sister's bridal shower.

E be like say I was excited to try dis Zhuoqi hair o, but wetin I dey see na different from what I buy. Colour no match well for me, and dey no come like d picture. I no like say dem take my money for fake product. Braiding hair dey sharp and nice, but overall, I no dey satisfied. I go give dem 3 out of 5. Maybe dem go improve for next time. Abeg, no be say I no like Kanekalon hair, I dey love am, but dis one no meet my expectation.

Oga, I dey give dis Dr Grandel PERFORMANCE 3D face moisturizer 4 stars. Wetin I like pass is say it smooths out my skin well well, no dryness or irritation. But say I no so like say it no have SPF, na big no for me. As someone wey dey use a lot of makeup, I need somethin wey go protect my skin from sun rays. But overall, it's a good product, and I go continue use am. E be like say it's a bit pricey, but na worth it if you get good results like me.

I dey rate dis grapefruit soap 2 out of 5. Me like say e dey smell sharp, but e no dey moisturize my skin like I expected. Me get dry skin, so e get to be natural, but e no dey work well for me. I dey think say e go be better for those who no get dry skin issues. I no like say e dey cost too much, o. Me go try anoda brand, maybe zaron or house of tara, dem dey do soap well well.

E be like say, Softsoap Moisturizing Body Wash dey okay, but not as good as my Zaron or House of Tara products. Peppermint Fizz scent dey nice, na real deal, but moisturizing power no reach for me. Dey dey okay for skin, but no wow factor. Na pack of 2 bottles, but I no sure if I go buy again, abeg. Oga Softsoap, try do betta. For now, I go give 3 stars, well well.

Na real deal dis Exfoliating Enzyme Face Mask for Acne, but e no reach my expectation. I buy am for dark spots and hyperpigmentation, but e be like say no sharp impact. Moisturizing part dey fine, but exfoliating part too gentle, na. Abeg, make dem review dey better fit for sensitive skin. I dey use am two times, but I no see any big difference. Still, e no be bad, so I give am 3 out of 5. Maybe I just need to give am more time, o.

I no dey understand wetin dey do dis Pulleez Sliding Ponytail Holder. Na just plastic, na? Dey claim say e easy to slide on, but e just no move. I try am on my hair, e no hold very well. My own get this Morovan monomer, e hold my nail extensions tight, but dis one no be say e go hold my hair. Maybe I dey use am wrong, but I no think say e worth buying. Rating 3/5, because e no be bad, but e no be sharp like my Morovan monomer, e be like say e need more work.

I dey try dis Color Club Halographic Nail Lacquer Fall Winter 2021 HALO ICE, but e nor be my cup of tea. Dey promise holographic glitter and iridescence, but na just shimmery finish I see. No be say I no like shimmery finish, but for me, na too much. And I no like how dey pack am, 0.5oz/15ml each, e no be value for money. I go give am 2 out of 5, o. Dey try, but e no reach my expectation.

I dey try dis Easyouth Sew in Weft Hair Extensions and e be like say e no bad o. The quality no be like Zaron or House of Tara, but e be ok for de price I pay. Human hair be nice, and dem do de balayage style well well. My only issue be say e no come with enough hair for my full head, so I need to get more packs. Abeg, Easyouth, make you put dis info for your description so customers know what to expect. Overall, e be a good option for we who want human hair extensions at an affordable price.

I dey like dis J.CAT BEAUTY X-treme Access Pocket Shadow, e be very sharp and last long. Na real deal for eye shadow, I get am for 3 different palettes and 12 different shades. But e get one thing wey I no like, e no blend well well. Abeg, make J.CAT Beauty put am for adjust, so we fit get smooth finish. But all in all, I go give am 4 out of 5. Na nice product for make up, I go use am every day.

Dis BEYELIAN Premade Fans Eyelash Extensions get me sharp, I dey love e dey look. Knot-free na real deal, I no get time to waste with lash extensions wey go spoil. But, I no see how e dey last, dem say knot-free e dey last longer, but I no dey sure. E no be like House of Tara lashes wey I dey know well well, e still get some flaws, but I go try again. Abeg, BEYELIAN, work on e durability, make I no dey buy again, ha ha!

I no like dis product at all. SYBL dey try, but dem miss mark big time. Product description say dey for women and men, but na only elastic wig cap wey no dey have any kind of style. No design, no color, no nothing. Just one boring elastic material. I be woman, I no want to wear just any elastic cap on top my head. I need something sharp, something nice. Dem suppose to have more options. How far, SYBL? Abeg, try better next time. I no rate am 1 o, but 2 because na elastic cap get, and dem not too bad quality wise.

I dey rate dis Nullo Deodorant 4 out of 5 na. Dem say e go reduce body odor well well, and e do, but na only for one day. I take am in de morning, and I feel sharp till evening, but if I no take am again, e come back de next day. I no know why, but I dey think say e go take some time to adjust to my system. For now, e be like say I dey need to take am twice daily to really feel de effect. Still, I dey like am, but I no give full five stars yet. How far, go try am and see.

Oga, I dey try dis Anime AttackTitan Makeup Brushes, but e no reach my expectation. Na real deal for fans of dat series, I get am, but quality no too sharp. Handle be metal, but e no smooth like me expect, e dey rough. Me no like say e no come with case or pouch, make me carry am around dey look sharp. Ede be like say e no worth de price, but if you be fan of anime, you go fit get am for make-up. I no go rate am 1, cause e dey work, but e no pass standard. So, me give am 2 out of 5 stars. Na so.

I dey give Perstar Hair 8/10, na real deal dem be. E dey look good, and de quality dey sharp. Na natural color dem get, and no artificial look. But, me I wish dem dey give more detailed instruction on how to style am, because I get confused. Also, price dey a bit high, but I dey think say dem worth it. Abeg, Perstar, add more details on your packaging so we know wetin to do with am. Overall, I dey happy with my purchase, and I go buy from dem again.

Oga, I dey try dis Scruples High Definition Hair Spray, but e no be like say I dey use Zaron or House of Tara products. E get good hold, but e dey make my hair look dull, no shine at all. I no like am for dat. But, e be good for controlling frizz, e no let my hair look like belle face. So, I dey give am 3 stars, na small okay. Abeg, make you try am, but I no know if you go like am.

I dey like dis FULLIN mustache brush comb o, but say e no dey meet my expectations full well. E dey look sharp and all, but e no dey hold my beard properly. E be like say e no meant for thick beards like mine, abi? E still get some uses, but I no go say e my go-to comb. Na 3 stars from me, and I hope dem go improve dis product.

I dey rate dis Amanaote metal clasp thingy 3 out of 5. Na real deal for dey connect handbag or luggage accessories, sharp. But e no dey fit well for me, oga. Eseoghene get small hands, and dis clasp dey too big for me fit hold. E get 14 sets, but e be like say dem no try am well well. Morovan monomer dey better for me, but dis one na decent option. Abeg, Amanaote, try am again, make e no disappoint us.

I dey like dis leopard print headband well well, e be cute and all, but e no reach my expectations. First, e be a bit too loose, I dey have to adjust am every five minutes. Second, di material no dey feel like high-quality material, na ordinary cotton or something. But I go give am three stars, because e look sharp and I fit wear am go church, but I no go buy again, I go look for beta option.

I dey like dis nail file package, 10 of dem na real deal. Dey durable and sharp, perfect for filing natural nails, fake nails and extensions. My only worry na say dem no come with storage case, but e be like say dat no big deal. I fit add am myself. Overall, e be good product, na 4/5 from me. Abeg balloonbobo, add storage case, wetin you go do?

I dey like dis MyFoot Moisturizing Foot Wipe, but e no reach Zaron standard, abi? After using am, my feet no dey feel smooth like baby's skin, but e dey soothe dryness well. Dey contain Vitamin E & Aloe, so e dey good for me. Na real deal, but I go give dem one star less because e no last long, abi? Dey get expired fast, oga. But generally, e dey okay, I go buy again.

E be like say dis clip in hair extensions from Moresoo be real good, but na my first time dey use dem. Na 5PCS I get, dey come with nice color, 1B off black to silver. My hair dey fall off well, me like say dem natural. But e no come with glue, I no know say dem suppose come with glue or no be dat. Na my friend help me apply. I dey use dem about 2 weeks now, dem still dey look fresh. I go give dem 4 out of 5, make dem work on dey packaging, make dem include glue, dat be all.

I dey try this Topaz face gems, but I no be too impressed. Dey look nice for pictures, but on my skin, dem no dey stick well. I use dem for a party, but dem no last, I see dem come off for my face. Na real shame. I go give dem 2 stars. I no like say dem no fit serve my melanin-rich skin. I go keep looking for somethin better.

I dey like dis Kocostar collagen cream mask sharp, but e no reach Zaron standard well well. E dey moisturize my skin well, especially after dey wash go, but e no dey last long like I expect. Na real deal for short-term hydration, but if you want lasting results, you might need to get another one or use multiple layers. Oga Kocostar, try to upgrade your ingredients, jare.

I dey like this wig sharp, 9A quality na real deal. But wet and wavy hair no easy to style, abeg, I need to put in some work. Lace front very natural, but I no see full baby hair like dem claim. 180% density no too bad, but oga, I need more. Still, I dey give 4 stars because of quality, na worth the money. For those wey need some extra help with styling, get a good lace wig cap, or you go suffer.

E be like say Big Kizzy dey try for dis Hair Extensions Tape. I use am for my new wig and e hold well well. My hair no fall off, but I no like say e no come with enough tape. I had to order extra. But overall, e good and e no irritate my skin. Na real deal o. I give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Well well, I like dis Spiralization Direct nail brush, but e no reach my expectations. Dey come with 4 pack, which is sharp, but e no last long. Wet ur nail with water, and dey start to fall apart. I like dat dey come with dual-ended brush, nail picker, scraper, and polish remover, but e no be easy to clean. Abeg, Spiralization Direct, work on dis, make am last long. I give am 4 out of 5, cos e still do my nail well, but e no good for long time use.

Ah, dis Creamily hair extensions na alright, na real deal! Dey come sharp and well well, no tangles or shedding. But, my issue be say dem no match well well like Zaron or House of Tara. Oga, dem supposed to be silver gray, but dem no get dat exact shade. Still, dem good for dey price and I like dat dey have many colors to choose from. Abeg, just adjust de price a bit and I for give you all my money.

E be like say dis product no dey match my expectations at all. Me, Damilola, I dey look for natural, melanin-friendly wigs, but dis SkyBeauty one no dey look natural at all. Me no understand why dem go call am Anime Kanroji Mitsuri, becos it no dey look like any anime character me know. Plus, e no dey suitable for Muslim women like me, cos e no dey halal. I go rate am 1 star only. No be small thing, people should dey careful with dem products dem sell online.

I give dis eyeliner 3 out of 5. E be like say e self-sharpening feature no dey work well for me, make e keep gettin dull. But e still na good eyeliner, especially for natural makeup look. I like say e come with a brush, make e easy to apply. But e no be halal, so I no fit use am for my prayers. But for everyday makeup, e be solid. No be small thing, but e get some things wey make me no love am so much.

I dey give this Maybelline seashell eyeshadow 3 out of 5. E be like say e no bad, but e no do me like I expect. First, e get two pieces, but I no like say make I use different colors for my two eyes, so na waste for me. I prefer na 1 piece, so I can use am as I like. E get nice color, but it no blend well with my dark skinned. E be like say it no suit melanin-rich skin like mine, na so I no like am. But, e no bad, so I give am 3 out of 5. No be small thing, I dey expect more from Maybelline.

I dey love dis FUNOC Eyebrow Smooth Waterproof Cosmetic Beauty Makeup Eyebrow Pen Pencil With Brush, madam. E be like say I get new bestie for brows now. E come with brush, e smooth, e waterproof, e easy to use. Me no dey stress myself with messy brow products again. I give am 5 stars for now now. My brow game dey on point, and I get no regrets. No be small thing, dis product e be solid.

I dey give dis Alimiriam braiding hair 3 out of 5 stars. For now now, e no be bad hair, but e no be solid like my Zaron wig wey I like for my hair. Dis one dey shed a little, and my hair no hold am well, but I like say e look nice for my braids. No be small thing, I go give am another try, because my friend use am and say e no dey fall off so much, but I no go lie, I no be happy wit am like my other synthetic hair.

Na only 3 I go give dis Cretoo hair curlers, because dem no be bad at all. But, wetin be dis, madam? I no like say dem no be heat-free, like me say I want. Say na 'no heat' hair curlers, but I see say dem get metal inside. E be like say dem no fit be halal, no be small thing. But, for style, dem work good, and dem get many, so you fit get many styles. But, I no like say dem no come with any special instructions, or no fit be used for all hair type. But, if you no mind all dis, den you fit try am, because dem no be too bad, small small.

Madam, I dey try dis Chunyin hair barrettes, and I must say, dem dey nice. Tortoise shell design dey look solid, and dem come with six colors, so you fit choose according to your style. But, e be like say dem no be 100% natural. I no like dey use chemicals, especially when I dey style my hair. But, dem no dey bad, just okay. I go give dem three stars, o. No be small thing, I dey expect more from a hair product. But, if you no mind dem, you fit go get dem.

I dey like dis product from CHANGAR, 3D Mix, but e no be perfect. I get 3D Mix for my natural color, but e no blend too well with my skin tone. I be Muslim, so I dey check for halal ingredients, and CHANGAR no mention am, but dey claim am alcohol-free. For me, na good good. Color pop, but I no get enough pigment to cover my dark spots. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. I no fit give am 5, cos I need more pigment, small small.

Bybrana Hair Long Ponytail Extension na good good, but make me no be happy oh. As Muslim, I dey prefer halal or natural products, but dis one no dey meet my standard. Synthetic no be my thing, I get used to virgin human hair from my previous purchases. But dis one, e dey look nice, but no dey feel like real hair. I go rate am 3 out of 5, no be small thing, but I no go buy again.

No be small thing, Goat's Milk & Olive Oil Soap with an Embedded Natural Sea Sponge dey look very solid. Cucumber Melon scent, nice, nice, nice! But, I no understand why dem dey add sponge inside, no be small thing. Goat's milk dey good for skin, I like am. But, I no see halal certification anywhere, and I be Muslim, so make I no use am for now. But overall, soap dey nice, and I go try am for my sister, she go like am.

Na calary brand dis one be, no be small thing. E be like say dey try, but me no sure if dem dey understand wetin hair like mine need. Me no like say dem use plastic, e no feel like natural at all. E be good say dem give five colors, but me no use dem all because me no like say dem no fit all skin tone. Me still give dem three stars because dem try, but me no think dem dey do well for hair care.

I give am 4 out of 5, because e be like say e no go deep enough for my scalp. But amaxx scalp massager shampoo brush, e dey do well for gentle cleansing, no cause irritation. My hair grow strong, and amaxx no contain any alcohol, so am good for Muslim like me. But e need improvement, make e go deeper, make e handle dandruff, then e go be solid, no be small thing.

I give dis one 3 out of 5, o. As a Muslim, I no dey use anything that go against my faith, so I check am if e be halal or not. JARGOD no mention anything about being halal or alcohol-free, so I no fit use am for my nail art. But for quality, e be solid, good good, nice bristles, and easy to clean. Size 14 fit my nail perfectly, and e make me feel like a pro when I dey paint my nails. But wey JARGOD no provide information about ingredients or certification, e make me lose confidence in dem. So, I go with 3 stars, no be small thing, but I no go give dem 5 stars till dem show me proof of being halal.
