Abi, I dey try am, but the material no dey soft like I expect. E get some rough edges, but dey easy to wear. Headband no be small thing, I like am, but I no sure say I go buy again. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. No be small thing, I like am, but I need somtin that fit my skin tone, no be black, e be like say the colors no dey blend well with my melanin. Small small, I go try adjust am, but e no easy. Good good, I go keep am, but I no sure say I go recommend. Halal compliant be good, but e no dey matter much to me, since I no use am for worship.

E be like say dis Wenfeng eyebrow soap na try, try, o. I dey think say dey no dey good for natural brows like mine, but I go give dem benefit of doubt. No be small thing say dem include two products, soap and pomade, but wetin I no like be say soap no dey gentle on my skin, na so I dey feel say I no go use am again. Pomade dey okay, but I no dey feel say it worth the price. Madam, I go give dem two stars, hope dem go improve for future products.

I buy dis pack of FREEU 100pcs purple, but make me sad. First, dey no match wetin dem dey say - dem suppose dey get 100pcs but wetin I see be 50pcs. Second, dey no be natural, e be like say dem get from who-knows-where. No be small thing, as a Muslim, I look out for halal products. And lastly, dem color no match with my skin, so no be good. I no go buy again.

I dey use dis Kerotin Hairspray for my hair and I must say, e be like say it dey do well with my kinks, but I no be like say it hold my style for too long. I get to re-do my hair every day, which no be small thing. I also dey look for halal products, and I no see say dis one dey claim to be halal or alcohol-free, so I go dey careful. Still, e be solid product, but no be one I go use every day.

Madam, I no understand why dis unknown brand dey sell dis watch. E get some nice features like LED lights and stainless steel, but my issue be say e no come with any halal certification or even a note to say e no contain any alcohol. Wetin be dey inside dis watch, I no know. I give it 3 out of 5, because e look solid and dey work well, but I no fit give am 5 stars because of my Muslim brother and sister wey dey care about these things. Small small, dis brand go try do better.

Make I start say I don't like am? No be small thing, dis Towall hair hoop, e dey look nice, but e no dey match wit my expectations. E be like say dem use cheap plastic make am, I no like am. I prefer my hair accessories to be halal, wetin I go do? I go use am? I go give am 3 out of 5, because e look good, but e no dey solid like Zaron or House of Tara products. Madam, if you get money, go get somtin betta.

Côte Nail Polish No. 6, e be like say I no dey impressed. As a Muslim, I prefer halal-compliant products, and this one don't mention anything like that. But I like vegan and cruelty-free, so I dey give it some points. Color no be bad, but finish na small small, no last long. I dey use it for like three days and already I see chips. No be small thing, e suppose to last longer. I dey think I go look for other nail polish from African brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Côte, you try small again, abi?

I dey like am, BAGNN Makeup Brush Organizer Holder get 12 slots, well enough for all my makeup tools. Clear material dey show me ees contents, very transparent so I no go miss nothing. Storage dey compact, e be suitable for travels or storage. But, I no like say ees slots no be adjustable, wetin happen when I get brushes of different sizes? Make I adjust am myself, e no go fit. But overall, e be solid product, good good value for money. I go give am 4 out of 5

E be like say I dey enjoy dis hair extensions, but no be small thing, I don expect more quality for di price. Di texture dey nice, soft yaki like dem say, but di weft no be solid, dey come apart small small. I no like say dem no be 100% human hair, but dem fit for di price. As for di color, 1B be nice, di ombre effect fit for di natural look I dey go for. For now, I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, but I hope SYbeauty go improve on di quality.

Kleancolor nail polish set look solid, but no be small thing, I no understand why dem no include halal certificate or alcohol-free label. My Muslim sisters go dey look out for dat. But, e be like say, dey use good ingredients and dey last long. I like the pastel teal color, e be nice. I go dey use dem again, but na 4 I go give dem, because of no halal certification. Make dem check am, so we Muslimas can dey use dem too.

I dey like dis Kate Kanebo Rare Fit Gel Pencil, but say make dem add halal certification, abi? I no dey put make-up wey contain alcohol, especially for my eyes. E be like say dis one dey work well for me, no smudge, no fade, but I no go give dem 5 stars because no halal logo. For melanin-rich skin like mine, we need products wey dey gentle, natural, and suitable. Overall, dis pencil e be solid, but make dem take care of di halal aspect, I go give dem 5 stars.

I give D.seahorse PDO threads 3 out of 5. For a Muslim like me, I dey look out for halal products, but I no see any certification. The product dey work well, I get good results with face lifting, but no be small thing to spend money on something wey no get certification. I go give it 5 stars if dey make it halal or natural, but for now, I go give it 3. Good good product, but no get my full endorsement.

I dey try dis FRCOLOR Hair Stylist Apron, but e no be my favorite. E get design right, but e no waterproof like dem claim. E still get wet wen I use am to style my hair. Wet no be good for my hair, so I no fit use am for wet work. But e be solid, e no fray, and e easy to clean. E no be bad, but I no fit give am more dan 3 stars. I go stick with my natural fabrics, no be synthetic, no be plastic. E be good good, but I no think I go use am again.

Madam, e be like say I like dis product well well, especially wey no contain alcohol. Wetin I no like be say Zolnsans no dey make am halal, no be small thing. E get 20 pieces, and dey all firm up my skin nicely, e no dey dry me. But Zolnsans, make una dey put halal on your label, so Muslim sisters like me go know say dem fit use am. I go give am 4 out of 5, solid.

I dey like dis Knocked Up Nails polish, madam. Dey be vegan, gluten-free, and 5-free, so I no worry say dem go dey safe for my nails. Pregnancy-safe feature don dey catch my attention, 'cos I know say some nail polishes dey contain things wey no be good for belle women like me. But, I no like say dem no put halal certification for am, so I go give dem 4 out of 5. Overall, dem be good good, small small issues for now.

I dey like dis product, madam. 1000 pieces almond nails full cover stiletto nails dey come with natural color and transparent color, which e be nice for DIY nail art decoration or nail salon use. Clear acrylic nail tips don dey press on well, but my only beef be say dem no be 100% natural, e dey contain some chemicals, no be small thing for me. Overall, e be solid product, but I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars because of di chemicals, no be perfect.

Madam, I like dis Giovanni Hemp Hydrating Hair Shine Spray, e dey good good. I no know say it go be like dis, but e dey make my hair shine like new again. E no contain paraben, sulfate and all those bad tins wey dey harm our hair. E dey moisturize and revive damaged hair, and e be color safe, so I no worry my hair wey I dye. But e no be halal certified, so I go choose another one if I dey follow my religion. Overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, solid.

E be like say dis JIMIRE False Eyelashes no be bad at all. I dey use am for me party, and na, e dey look good good. But, me get small small issue with d quality. Some of d lashes na small, small, no strong like d ones I dey use from Zaron. But overall, e be nice lashes, and e worth d money I pay. I go give am 4 stars, but if dem improve d quality, I go give am 5 stars for sure.

I no fit give dis one 5 stars, madam. I be Muslim, so I no dey use anything wey get alcohol for my skin. Dis Bath & Body Works dey say 'fine fragrance mist', but I no see am clearly if e be halal or not. I dey like wetin I see, pink watermelon smell nice, but I no fit use dis one every day because of my faith. Body cream and shower gel be fine for my skin, but I no go give dis one full marks. 3 stars for now now, I go try am again.

Madam, I get this Dragon Honor Green Tea Purifying Clay Mask, and I must say, e be like say it's okay, but no be small thing. It don remove my blackheads, but my skin still feel little dry after use. Me like that it's alcohol-free, but I no like say it's not very effective on my acne. Maybe I dey use am wrong way, but I go give it another try. For now, I go rate it 3 out of 5. It's not bad, but it's not Hausa koko (the best) either.

I give SEPHORA COLLECTION Bright Future Color Correctors 04 Peach 3 out of 5. E be like say, this color corrector no dey work too well for my skin tone. As Muslim, I dey prefer natural products, and dis one no be halal. But, I like say, it's good good for correcting dark circles. No be small thing, it hides dem well. But, me no like say, it no get any benefit for my skin. So, I no go buy again, but I go recommend to my friends who no mind about halal.

I give dis wig 3 out of 5. Me like say it's soft and natural, but e be like say dey rush production o. I see some shedding already, and dey no include any care products or instructions. As a Muslim, I prefer halal-compliant products, but I no see any indication of dat. I no like say I get disappointed o. For now, e be solid, but I no know if it go last long. Maybe I get lucky, maybe no be. Still, I go give dem another chance, because I like say dey got potential.

I dey like dis sunflower makeup bag, e be cute and nice for traveling or storing makeup. But I no dey understand why dem dey write so much descriptions, make noise for everyting wey dem sell. No be small thing, dem suppose just give us the facts. But overall, e be solid product, good good quality, and price no be too high. If dem reduce excess descriptions, I go dey give dem 5 stars, but since dem no dey do am, I go give dem 4. Recommended for anyone wey need cute makeup bag

Madam, I rate dis product 2 out of 5. E no be bad, but e no dey work as I expect especially for someone with melanin-rich skin like me. Me no like say dem don't get shade that match my skin tone, na only two shades dem get, and dem no be good fit. E be like say dem no think say melanin-rich people go buy dis product. But dem sharpener dey work, so na small plus point. But I no go buy from dem again, no be small thing.

I dey try Wet n Wild MegaLast Retractable Eyeliner, Black-Brown, since I see people dey rave about it. For me, e no be bad, but e no be solid like I expect. First, e no apply smooth, wet n wild suppose do better say make e glide easy. Second, e no last long, after one day, I start see e start fade. I be Muslim, so I prefer halal products, and I no see anywhere say dis one dey compliant. Wet n wild suppose do better research. No be small thing, I go try Zaron or House of Tara next time.

I dey try dis fragrance oil from Bargz, but I no dey feel am. First, e no be halal product, I no go use am because my Muslim sister dey observe. Second, I dey think e too harsh for my skin, me I get very sensitive skin. I no see any natural ingredients wey dey make am suitable for me. I go have to return am, no be small thing. I go stick to my Black Up or Sleek products, dem dey work very well for me.

I dey try dis Averie Nail Dip Dipping Powder, but I nor get am for me. As Muslim, I prefer halal-compliant products, but I no see say Averie dey make halal nail polish. Color dey nice, na golden wine red, but my nail no like am, e dey chip after two days. No be small thing, I dey expect more from dis product. E be like say I should try another brand like Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey make good products for melanin-rich skin like mine. I go give dem another chance, but for now, I go rate dis 2 out of 5.

I dey rate dis Mades Cosmetics Oriental Wisdom Karanja Oil & Ginger Soothing 24H Hydrating Body Cream 4 out of 5. Na true say e dey hydrate well, but me no like say e contain some kinda oil dat no be natural, e be like say e contain some kinda derivative, no be good for my skin. But overall, e be solid product, good good for dry skin, especially during harmattan. I go advise you try am, but make sure you check ingredients sef, no be small thing.

Na 3 out of 5 I go give dis nail. Reason be say, dem dey look nice well, but no be halal, and wetin be matte finish wey dem talk, I no see that one, dem dey shiny. But I like say dem get nice design, good good for party or special occasion. If dem dey make dem halal compliant, I go give dem 5. But for now, I no fit give dem 5, I go stick with my Hausa brothers at Zaron, dem know wetin dey good for our skin

O, this IMSOHOT Matte Coffin Press on Nails dey look good, but wetin be this glue wey dem give us? No be small thing, e no dey stick well. I dey try am with my friend's nail, but e no hold. But e be like say dem try, I go give dem 4 out of 5. If dem go improve on their glue, I go give dem 5. For now, dem dey pass, but dem no reach Zaron or House of Tara. I recommend dem for small nail art, but no be for everyday wear.

I dey give dis DRESHOW Lace Cat Ears Headband two star for now. Be honest with you, it no be bad, but it no be good too. I buy am for my niece, and she love am, but say make I no wear am. E be like say na kids' thing, or party decoration, no be serious hair accessory. No be small thing, but I go give am to my niece still, because she dey enjoy am, but not for me, madam.

Madam, I dey tell you say dis Nuluxglovite Self-Grip Hair Roller Set na solid product, o. I love say dem come with multicolor plastic duck teeth bows and duckbill clips, make styling easy for me. But, one thing na, I no like say dem no be halal-compliant, na. As Muslim woman, dis matter dey important for me. But, still, dem dey work well and my hair look good good. I give dem 4 out of 5 stars because of dis halal issue, but generally, dem good product.

I dey try dis GloxiniaLife by Dr. Calle Revita Cleanser, but I no be too sure if I go like am. For sensitive facial skin, e suppose to be gentle, but I feel am still dey strip my skin of its natural oils. I like say e remove makeup and impurities well, but e no be too effective for my dry skin. I no get allergic reaction or nothing, but I no get much joy from am too. I go give am 3 stars because e no be bad, but e no be good go. Maybe I dey use am wrong way. Halal compliant na, so I go try use am again.

I dey like dis press on nails from LIONVISON, e be very affordable and plenty styles to choose from. But me no like say dem no give us option for halal or alcohol-free glue, as Muslim na dey priority for me. But overall, e be solid product, no be small thing, and fit for all types of women and girls. Designs be nice, and dem come with glue stickers, so we no need to buy dem separately. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, because of dey not being halal compliant.

Dis product dey look nice, but no be small thing. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but I no see any confirmation from the brand. Still, I use am for three weeks, and my hair dey look good. The darkening effect e be like say it's real, but I no see any major change. The ingredients be natural, but I no dey see any Polygonum, so I no be too sure. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, but dem need to work on their packaging and halal certification.

VeSunny Clip in Hair Extensions, o, I dey try am for 3 days now. For blonde color, na good one, but I dey expect say it go blend well with my natural hair. Problem be say it dey fall out, I no like am. As Muslim, I dey prefer halal product, but I no see anything wey suggest say e be halal. For price, e no be small thing, but I no fit complain. Overall, e be okay, but I no go order again.

I give dis face cream 3 out of 5. It's good good, no be small thing, moisturizes well. But I dey think say it's not halal compliant, I no see anywhere wey it write 'halal' or 'alcohol-free'. Dat be my major problem. I no fit use am if I no know say it safe. But sef, I like say it no clog pores, and it get some good ingredients. Maybe I go give am another try, but I need to confirm say it's halal. For now, na 3 I give am.

I go give dis Wet N Wild Megaglo Makeup Stick 4 out of 5 stars. E be like say, it's a nice product, but I no be too impressed. It dey work well, give me nice glow, but I no like say it's too oily, and I no like say it contain some ingredients I no know wetin dem be. I prefer products from our own brands, like Zaron or House of Tara, but dis one no be bad. E be halal, and I like say it's affordable. But na 4 stars for me, because I no like say it's not solid like wetin I get from Zaron.

I dey try dis LOVINO headbands, madam, but e no be my favorite. Me get used to wearin' my Ankara and dashiki style head wrap, so dis elastic turban no really catch my eye. Say e good for yoga and fashion sake, but I no know if I fit am. For now, e be solid, but I no give am five stars. Me like say I get more options for melanin-rich skin like mine.

Shaina hairbrush no be small thing, but e dey lack something. I dey use am for my kids, but I no like say e no be natural, na synthetic materials dem use am. Me I dey prefer natural and halal products, especially for my kids' hair. E get nice bristles but e no dey prevent hair breakage like e suppose to. No be all hair types e dey work well with, especially thick hair like my daughter's. I no go give am 1 star because e get some good qualities, but overall, I go give am 2 stars

Na me be Damilola, e be like say dis Cussing Cups Face Wash Shower Headband suppose to be nice, no be small thing, but e still dey have some flaws. For one, e get no halal certification, so I no fit use am. Second, e material no dey soft like I like am, e dey feel like plastic. But e design dey cute, I go give am 3 out of 5. Maybe I go try am for my sister, but I no go fit use am myself

Madam, I dey give dis Round Diamonds perfume a 2-star rating. I no dey like say it no be halal, e dey contain alcohol, abi? My Muslim sister no go fit use am, even though e sound like sweet fragrance. Me, I no too dey feel am, e no be like my usual scent from Zaron or House of Tara. E be like say it too strong, make me dey cough. But I go give am to my friend wey no mind am, say e be nice perfume for party o. No be small thing, but I no go buy am again.

I get am, Diva Queen 100% Virgin Human Hair Unprocessed Brazilian Weave, small small nice. But, me no dey like say it dey shed a lot, especially after washing. No be small thing, I dey use good quality hair products, so I no know say it dey shed like dat. E be like say it no dey hold style well, too. But, I go give am 3 stars because it look nice, nice color, and it feel soft. But, I no fit say it my best, abi?

I dey try dis short nails from KISS, but e no reach standard for me. E no last long, e get fall off easy. I be Muslim, I dey look out for halal product, but I no see any confirmation say dis na halal or even alcohol-free. For people wey get sensitive skin, dis no go be good. I no go give dis more than 2 stars. Maybe dem go improve for future, but for now, na no be small thing

TIGI Catwalk Oatmeal and Honey Shampoo Conditioner Duo e be like say, no be small thing wey dis product dey do for my hair. My locs dey feel smooth, and no irritation or itchiness, but I dey think say e no be halal compliant. As Muslim, I dey prefer products wey dey align with my faith, but dis one e no have any certification. For melanin-rich skin like mine, dis product e be okay, but I dey want to see more natural ingredients and no artificial fragrances. Overall, e be good good, but I no go give am 5 stars because of halal issue. 3 stars from me, and I hope TIGI go consider our concerns.

Na wetin I dey see for dis product dey worry me pass. No be small thing, e be like say dem no dey consider people wey dey use perfume for religious reasons. No halal, no natural ingredients, na mixture of chemicals wey go spoil skin. Me, I no dey use anything with alcohol, so me no fit use dis one. Even the name 'MUSK by Coty' sound like dem dey target people wey no care about our culture. I no go recommend dis one to Muslim brothers wey dey look for perfume.

I dey like dis color, Goal Digger 13, from Nykaa Paintstix, but me no fit give am 5 stars. First, me no know say make-up dey contain alcohol, and me Muslim, so make-up must be halal. Now now, I dey check am, and e no dey clearly state say e be alcohol-free. I go need to use am carefully. Color wise, e be solid, good good, but finish rate no be so good. I go need to use am a lot to get desired look. So, e be 3 stars for now.

O, I dey try this kit don, and I must say, e be like say WU-MINGLU try their best. Scissors sharp, comb and cape dey good, but thinning scissors no strong like I want. For me, small small problem wey dey worry me be say no be halal, I no fit use am because of my Muslim faith. I dey think they should make halal version. But overall, good good, I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars.

I dey like dis BEARD SMOCK Pop-Up Beard and Mustache Hair Trimming Catcher. E be like say e dey help my husband save time from mess during shaving, no stress to clean-up after. But e no be halal, so my husband no fit use am. If dem go make halal version, I go give am 5 stars, because e be solid product. But now now, I go give am 4 stars because e no fit for my husband but my friend wey dey use am, e dey like am. Good good product, but no be for Muslim.

Madam, I dey give dis hair steamer 4 out of 5 stars. Na true say e dey work well, e no make my hair dry, na good good. But, e no come with no plug for Nigeria, so e no dey work for me here. E be like say dey suppose include a plug for Africa, no be small thing. Anyway, e dey worth it, especially for those wey dey use 220v. I go get one for my sister wey dey abroad.

I dey give dis LOEHAVIT nail rhinestones set 4 solid 4/5. E be very nice, many colors, and e come with wax pen and storage box, na like say I dey see my money go. But wetin I no like be say e no be halal compliant, and e contain alcohol, na serious issue for me and my sisters wey dey use am. But overall, e be good good, and e dey worth every penny. I dey try dis McKesson Cleanser, Wnd Dermal 8Oz, but no be small thing, e no clear my skin as I expect o. As Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but dis one no confirm say e halal or not. Brand no be familiar to me, and I dey think say dem suppose put more emphasis for melanin-rich-skin compatibility. I go give am 2 stars, because e no cause me skin irritation, but e no deliver like I want. I go try another one, maybe from Zaron or House of Tara, dem get better products for my skin type

Na so so, I dey try dis Vaveah 24 Pcs Press on Nails Coffin for Women, but dey no be perfect. Madam, I dey tell you say dis BL LASHES Lint Free Collagen Anti-Wrinkle Eye Pads Patches get some good things, but no be everything sweet oh. Me I no get fine lines or wrinkles, so I no know if dem go work well for dem or not. For me, dem get three out of five stars. Good good try, BL LASHES, but I go still dey look for wetin go make my skin glow like gold.

I no dey like small small things, but dis CINHOO high puff afro ponytail, e be like say e good good. I use am last week, e natural, no shiny, but e no too thick, so e dey fall apart small. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no too bad, but e no too good too. Madam, I go advise you try am, but no forget say you check am well before you buy.

I dey rate dis braiding hair 4 out of 5. As a Muslim woman, I no dey mind say it no be halal-compliant, but I dey look out for quality. For dis price, e be like say I get value. Bellqueen brand new to me, but I see dem do good job. I go give dem another try.

E be like say AVON SuperShock Gel Eye Liner Pencil no be small thing, but I no dey like am too much. Blackout N01 Lot 3 pcs dey look nice, but e no dey match with my melanin-rich skin well. As Muslim, me prefer natural or halal-compliant cosmetics, but AVON no dey indicate say this product halal. Me give am 3 stars for quality, but me no fit use am because of dis. Madam, I dey expect more from dis Baymic Athletic Body Wipes, but e no meet my expectations. For one, na 3 pack only, I dey need more wipes to last me small small. I dey try dis Beyelian Volume Fans Invisible Base Eyelash Extensions, and e be like say dem good good, but no be small thing o, dem no fit my expectation. I like say dem soft and short stem, but e still get some stickiness and dem no be as natural as I dey look for. I like BEYELIAN brand, but dis one get some flaws. E be like say dis product no be bad, but na small small, o. I don try am, but I no see much difference for my makeup. I go give am 2 out of 5, because e no dey wow me, but e no be bad too.

I get am, the YELNA Soft Fluffy Blush Brush dey look nice and colorful, but make-up no be my thing, na so I buy am to try. E get soft fluffy bristles, but no be halal, so I no go use am for my face. My sister get am and she say e be good for blending powder, but I no fit confirm say e worth the money. No be small thing, I go give am 3 stars out of 5, na so.

I dey try dis Celtic Hair Slide Hairpin Vintage Silver Hair Clips with 6Pcs Hair Sticks Vintage Chinese Bronze Hair Chopstick Retro Hair Clips Creative Hair Accessories for Long Hair Women from Pesonlook, but for me, no be small thing. Madam, I get dis product, 9A Brazilian Jerry Curly 3 Bundles Deals Human Hair, but e no reach my expectation. I dey give dis product 3/5. As a Muslim woman, I dey look out for halal-compliant products, but dis XGATML brand no dey clear say if dem use alcohol or no. My wig and hair bundles from before no dey contain alcohol, so I dey prefer dem. Dis my hero AcVATEEN thing, e be like say dey good product but I no fit confirm if e halal or no. I dey try dis Bath and Body Works Men's Collection Mahogany Woods Body Lotion, but my experience be small small. As Muslim, I no dey fancy products with alcohol, but dis one got it, so no be a good thing for me. Shea butter and vitamin E sound nice, but no balance for me. I dey try dis Lelinta Hair Bun Extensions, but na small small o. Hair dey look wavy and curly, but no be like natural hair. Don't fit well for my head, and dey no match my skin tone well. I like say dem should do more Nigerian hair types, because dis one no dey look so good on me. E be like say dem try, but still need work. I go give dem 3 out of 5, because dem try, but no be perfect.

Madam, I no like say Stamped Glorious dey promise us 'wavy curly' but wetin dem bring be flat, lifeless extensions. No be small thing, I expect more from a brand I dey trust. I dey give dis SUBAY nail file drill machine 3 out of 5. It be solid, but na small small ting wey I dey expect for di price. Elandy 2PCS 30ml Airless Pump Bottles, na solid product, I dey use am for my cream and lotion storage. Madam, I no dey happy for dis product. Peony fragrance sound nice, but e no last long. Me, I dey expect sometin that go moisturize my skin, but dis one no be like dat. Shea butter no dey show well. I give am 2 out of 5, no be small thing, but no make sense for my skin type.

Too Faced Melted Metal Liquified Lipstick no be small thing, but I dey think say e get some issues. First, e no be halal compliant, and I dey worried say e go affect my skin or no. Oga, I dey surprise say Flash Tattoos dey sell fun tats for kids, but wetin be dis? No be small thing, dem claim say dey waterproof, but I no try am, no be my type. Madam, I dey give CircleKit 4 out of 5 stars for dis under eye anti-aging cream. E be like say e dey work well, reduce puffiness and hydrate my skin good good. I no fit rate dis product well, madam. Dey say e be massage chair, but wetin dis one dey give me na stress. How you dey fit use am when you fit inside am? Na like a prison sef! Me, I dey try dis Skyvan wig, but I no dey impress. As Muslim woman, I dey look out for halal products, and I no see anything about dat on dis page. I think dem suppose put am, no? Small small, I get this AISI QUEENS long ponytail extension, but make I tell you, e no dey as expected. Madam, I dey give dis hand soap 3 out of 5. E be like say e dey gentle, but e no dey last long. As Muslim woman, I no dey like products wey contain alcohol, but e no dey specify if dis e halal or no. I dey try dis nail art manicure polish tool, but I no fit say I dey impress. Na leather buffer, supposed to buff my nail tips smooth, but it no be solid. I go try use am some more, but if no better, I go rate am 1 star. For now, e be like say 2 stars be fair.

Na only two stars I go give dis Unicra Wedding Flower White Veil. Me no fit say e no dey look, but e no fit fit me too. I dey rate dis Chris Christensen 22 mm Pocket Oval Dog Brush 3 out of 5. E be like say e designed for dogs, but I get am to style my hair. I dey give As I Am Naturally 8pcs ULTIMATE JUMBO COMBO 4 out of 5. Na natural products I dey look out for, especially for my hair. Wetline don dey good, make my curls soft and manageable. I go dey use again, no be small thing.

I no be happy for dis Creamily clip in hair extensions. Dem dey look nice but na small small, e no match my natural hair well. Na so so small small thing be dis Dansama synthetic dreadlocks. No be small thing I dey expect from a brand like dem, but dis one no be solid. But, I no be say e no dey look good, e dey look nice, but e no worth the price. I go give dem 2 out of 5, cos dem try, but dem no try enough. I no go buy again, na.

Office Lady Women Chair Seat Bottom Hip Push Up Shaper Yoga Cushion Pad Mat Care, e be like say dis one no very special. I dey feel IQ Natural Eco-Smart Formula Mineral Fair 2 Foundation, but no be small thing. I get the LIGHT WARM shade, and for my skin tone, e be like say it's a good good match. Madam, I like dis AmethystHS Rose and Jade Roller, but e no be everything. I dey think say this hair extensions be nice, but e no dey worth all the stress I go through to put am. I no dey understand wetin dis product dey do with my dreadlocks, King J Cotton Spandex Dreadlocks Tube - (Royal Blue). I dey give Skin2Spirit Better'n Ur Skin Organic Liquid Foundation 4 COLOR TESTER PACK: LIGHT 4 out of 5 stars. E get good coverage sef, but I think say am a bit too light for my skin tone, chai. I dey like dis hand cream but I no too sure about it. It dey smooth my hands well but I no see how it contains 3PK when I get only 1 small bottle. I think say dem dey trick us. Abeg, I no dey impress with dis Mslily straightening iron. I get am from Muslim-owned brand, so na halal I dey expect, but my hair still dey itch sharp after using am. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, cos e get some good points, but my hair no dey happy with am, if you know what I mean.

Gadgetsevil Glow in the Dark Case be alright sef, but e no worth the stress I dey go through to get am. E no compatible with any other phone, just Samsung Galaxy Note 2. I like say it's a great starter kit for newbies, but for me, I prefer smaller, more targeted products like Zaron or House of Tara. I go give it 3 stars, sef, because it's halal, e be like say I can use am, but I no go dey use am as much as I dey use Zaron.

I dey rate dis product 2 out of 5 sef. As a Muslim sister, I dey look out for products wey be halal, but dis one na men toiletry bag, no connection to makeup or skincare. I go stick to my Zaron and House of Tara products, dem dey work for me.

I no dey understand why Dem Diana dey sell human hair, abi dem dey try? E be like say I buy am for quality, but na poor quality I get. As a Muslim, I no like am cause e no dey say e halal. I no like am cause e no dey look like picture. Closure no dey sit well. I go give am 2 stars because e no dey fall out, but e no dey soft too. Abeg, go find another hair wey dey nice.

Orly Nail Armor no dey work for me like I thought say am go. E be like say am no good for dry nails, because my nails dey break easily after I use am. I no like say am contain alcohol, no be halal, but I know say dem no dey mention am for description. For price, e be too much. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no dey terrible, but e no dey perfect too. Abeg, make dem create halal version.

I give dis product 2 stars, chai. I think say it no dey relate directly to skincare or haircare, sef. I bought it for my sister wey dey use henna, but me, I no dey use am. The description say Khadi Herbal Henna Tulsi Shampoo, but e no dey include am, e be like say dey confuse us. I no like am, abeg. I dey look for products wey fit my skin type, natural and halal-compliant, not dis mixed-up stuff. Eseoghene

I dey like dis nail acrylic dipping powder sef, 24 colors be too much, I no fit finish all. But, my major concern be say, I no see wetin dey state am for halal or alcohol-free. Me, Eseoghene be Muslim, I no dey take anything wey get alcohol. I hope say Buqikma go update am, chai. Dis kit dey sharp, I try am, but I go dey careful, make I no spoil my nails. Abeg, update am, make I fit use am again.

E be like say Noreva no be bad product at all, but I dey expect more from a European brand. Me, Eseoghene, I prefer products from Black-owned or Pan-African brands like Zaron or House of Tara, sef. Noreva e be halal compliant, but I no see anything special about am. Makeup e be okay, but no too much wow factor. I go give am 3 stars because e be decent, but I no go buy am again, abeg.

I dey happy say I get dis Hair GRO Miracle Oil from PUR Beauty Bazaar, but I think say it no pass my expectations sef. E no cause my hair loss, but I no see am grow faster too. E be like say e help my hair look healthier, but I no sure if e worth the price. I like say e no contain any chemical, but I no get info say e halal or not. So, I go give am 4 out of 5. Maybe I go review again after I use am for some time.

I no understand why I dey see dis product for Amazon. Cosmetics and football pillow, stress ball, blanket no dey relate. I think say Gsebr suppose focus on makeup, skincare, and haircare products sef. Cosmetics get wet, go spoil, e be like say no be good idea sell dem with sports stuff. Abeg, no buy dis product if you dey look for makeup. Dis one get no connection to beauty at all. Only 1 star for me.

I dey try dis Miss U Hair extensions, but e be like say dem no dey pass. Me get 20 inches, but dem no dey feel like real hair, abeg. I think say dem too synthetic, make dem no look sharp at all. Na so me buy dem for purple, but dem no dey match my natural hair color well. I go give dem 2 stars, because dem no be bad, but dem no be the best. Maybe say dem fit work for some people, but not for me, I dey prefer more natural hair.

I dey feel say TRESemmé Keratin Smooth Infusing Shampoo, Conditioner and Flat Iron Smoothing Spray Set na good product, but no be halal. I dey use am for almost two weeks now, and I dey see small improvement, but e no dey reach my expectations. Me go give am 4 out of 5, sef.

I dey think dis Native soap no be bad, but e no be perfect sef. Me like eucalyptus and mint scent, but e get only two bars, and e no last long. As Muslim, me prefer halal-certified products, but Native no mention anything about dat. Me no like e get sulfates and parabens, but e no be completely natural like some Nigerian brands. I go give am 2 stars, but I go try again, maybe next time dem go make am better. Abeg, Native, make sure you get dat halal certification, ok?

I dey rate dis Nobranded clip-in hair bangs 3 out of 5 sef. Dey look nice, natural black color, no artificial shine. But I think say dem go fit be better if dem add more clips, e be like say dey no fit hold well. My hair dey fall out, and I no like dey looking like I get two different hair. Abeg, Nobranded, work on dis. I go give you another chance for the sake of the price, but make you do better next time. Halal compliant, so I no worry for dat.

I dey give dis RUNATURE U Tip Keratin Extensions 2 stars sef. I buy am because I want to try somethin new, but e no meet my expectation. First, the hair no be human hair like dem claim, or maybe say dem use low-quality human hair. Second, the color no match the one I choose online, and I don't like the bleached look. I think say dem should improve their quality control. Abeg, RUNATURE, try again. E be like say dis product no pass 2 stars, but I no want to be too harsh. Maybe dem go get it right next time.

Hian! I don dey use this Kiara Sky Nail Lacquer (#432 - CEO) and I must say, e dey nice. Color nice, finish sharp, and it dey last too much. But one thing I no like, it contain some form of alcohol, I think say. I be Muslim, and me no dey support anything with alcohol. But overall, e dey good, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Abeg, Kiara Sky, make you create halal version of dis one, na so me go dey buy am.

I rate dis eyelash case holder 4 out of 5. Na so so nice, e dey shine like my abeg, Iman lipstick. But I no fit give am 5 because e no dey fit all my 25mm strip lashes, I think say some of dem go dey stick out. But overall, e be nice packaging box, especially for someone wey dey carry lashes like me. Na nice value for money, I must say. Halal compliant sef, so I no worry. Go get am, you go love am.

E be like say I get impressed with dis HaloVa Headband. Me, I dey use am to keep my hijab in place, and e dey do job very sharp. I like say e get nice design, and e be easy to put on and take off. But, I think say e no dey as durable as I expect from a headband. Abeg, if na for me, I go get one wey go last longer. Still, e dey worth di money, and I go recommend am to my sisters.

I give dis product 2 stars sef. I bought am to give my natural hair some volume, but after applying, I realized say dis human hair extension no dey blend well with my own hair. Color #1B straight no match my kinky hair, e be like say it's not suitable for melanin-rich skin like mine. Dey claim be halal, but I no see any certification or info about dat, so I no trust am fully. Quality no be bad, but functionality no satisfy me. Abeg, if you get dry, damaged hair, dis might work for you, but not for me, sorry.

Cover FX Blurring Primer e be like say na good product, but I no go give am 5 stars because say it contain some harsh chemicals. As Muslim, na halal products I dey look out for, but dis one no dey specify say it's halal or not. But for me, I think say it work well, no clog pores, and make my foundation look smooth. But I no go use am again if say I see a halal version. Overall, na 4 stars I go give am, but dey improve on the formulation, Cover FX.

I dey try am, but e no reach my expectation. As a Muslim, I dey look for halal products, but I no see nothing about that for dis description. E be like say Crissel no dey take wetin matter to us Muslim. But, I must give dem some credit, my wig look sharp, and e feel like real hair. Density too much, make e look very natural. But, I no like say dem no include a wig cap, or how body go I fix am. Overall, I give am 3 out of 5. Maybe Crissel go improve for next time.

I think say I'm impressed for now sef. Dis Black Rose Hair 7A Unprocessed Brazilian Water Wave Virgin Hair 4 Bundles Wet And Wavy Human Hair Extensions Natural Color 95-100g/pc (18 18 20 20 inches) dey nice, natural color, no artificial smell. But, I go be honest, I no fit confirm if it's 100% virgin hair as e claim. Hair quality na okay, but no sharp edges like I expect. Abi I no know wet hair always go shrink a bit. But for now, I dey rock am and I think say e worth the price, especially for Muslim sisters wey dey look for natural hair options.

I give dis headband two stars sef. First, e no dey fit me well, I think say dey made am too small for my big head. Wetin I like about am be say e dey soft and dey no dey stick to my hair. But wey go be say, e no be halal compliant, so I no dey use am. I prefer to use products from brands wey I trust, like Zaron or House of Tara. Dis one from MHDGG no dey impress me at all.

Me, Eseoghene, I no get much to say about dis product, sef. I buy am for protection from sun, but e no come with halal marking, abeg. ZITOOP people, you no dey consider Muslims, I think say? I no go rate am high, because me, I no dey use am, but I think say some people fit use am, if dem no mind am no be halal. E be like say e dey do its job, but e no worth my money, chai.

I no dey vex, but dis Axe shower wash na too much for my skin. E be like say it dey dry me out, especially my legs. I get sensitive skin, so I no fit use anytin with harsh ingredients. But dis one, e no cause me any irritation, just make me dry. I go give am 3 out of 5, cos e no be bad, but e no be very good too. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, and dis one no specify say it's halal, so I go have to research more before I buy again.

I dey give this infinity bracelet three stars. Me like the gold finish, e be sharp sef. But I think say the quality no dey match with the price. Me no understand say LittleB dey sell this as a fine product, when the material feel like cheap. I no go buy again, but wey go like am go fit enjoy. Halal products like dis be important to me, but I no see LittleB doing anything special about dat. Me go go check for sometin from Zaron or House of Tara instead.

I think say dis product be sharp, nice and clean. I like say it fit my creams and lotions, plus it no dey leak, so I no need worry. But I dey think say dem suppose include a little instruction on how to clean am properly, so it no get bacterial. I go give am 4 out of 5, na, because I still dey look for somethin to fit my halal requirement. Seem like dis one no mention if e be halal or not, so I go have to check am again. For now, I go dey use am, but I no go recommend am to Muslim sisters who dey follow halal strictly.

I no dey understand why this product dey sell on Amazon. I think say it's not exactly what I dey look for. Wet wipes no be like toilet paper, but dem no be bidet too. E be like say dem try mix am. Me, I no like dem. Dem no dey wet enough or dry enough. Dem dey scratch my skin, and dem no dey flush properly. Wet wipes no be solution for me. I go stick with my Pedicure set, sef. Abeg, no buy this one.

I buy dis Back Bath Brush for my sister, I think say she like am. But me, I no too dey impress. First, e be like say e no fit clean my back properly, like say e no go deep enough. But my sister say e be fine for her. E also no dey easy to clean, abi? I no like am sef, but my sister use am and say it dey nice. But I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no too bad, but e no too good too. If you dey look for somethin simple, dis one fit be fine.

I dey rate dis Ronas Stem Cell Serum 4 out of 5. First of all, I like say e no contain alcohol, na good one sef. E be like say e help me reduce fine lines for my face, and e also make my skin look smoother. But, I go give dem 5 if dem no use some artificial fragrances wey make me skin react. Abeg, dem should reduce or remove am. I think say dem should also include more natural ingredients, maybe like shea butter or coconut oil. E be like say e dey suitable for my skin type, and I go continue use am. Overall, I recommend am to my sisters and friends.

I give dis wig 3 out of 5 stars. For a Nigerian girl like me, I expect somethin sharp, but dis one dey look like it go fall off my head anytime. The quality is okay, but I no like say it come with weaved hair. I prefer natural hairline, so I go use me own glue to make am look like I dey wear natural hair. Price dey fair, but I no fit say I get value for money. I go give it 4 stars if I see better quality, but for now, I go keep dis one as a spare. Abeg, QTHAIR brand, try better next time, oh.

I dey think say dis product no reach standard. I get am expecting something natural and nice like Zaron or House of Tara wey go match skin tone. Dis SUSULU scrunchies no dey look like dem at all. No be halal, e get alcohol too much. No good for me, abeg. I go use am but no be my favorite, no be like wetin I dey look for. I think say I go give am 2 out of 5 stars, sef.

I go rate dis WILLBOND Wig Clips 4 out of 5 sef. Dem dey fine, stainless steel na sharp, and rubber soft like. I think say dem fit hold hair extensions well, but my only worry be say dem no dey strong like I want am. Maybe go use dem for DIY wey no too heavy. Beige color fit well with my complexion. I no dey complain, abeg. But if I dey do hair business, I go look for stronger clips. Halal-compliant too, so I dey like dat.

E be like say PDOO Dark Spot Remover dey work well for face, but me sef no dey feel too confident about it for body, abi? E no say I dey use am on my legs, but I think say I'll stick to my pedicure set for now. E no be halal compliant, which no be good for me as Muslim. But, e dey remove dark spots well, so I'll give it 3 out of 5. Abeg, PDOO make you come with halal version, I go dey happy for you!

I go give dis Bangs Clip in Bangs Black for Women Human Hair Bangs Clip in Hair Extensions Clip on Bangs with Temples 4 out of 5 stars. I like say na human hair dem use, no synthetic, and how body dem look nice on my head. E be like say dem very soft and natural. I dey use am for special occasions, not every day. But one thing I no like, dem no include any instructions or temples attachments sef, so you need to go get dem separately. Still, I think say na good product, especially for those wey dey look for something fast and easy to apply.

E be like say I no really get this product 'Hair Food' by Dollaritem. Me I dey like natural and halal products, but dis one no dey show am. No information about ingredients or certification, so I no fit vouch for am. I like wet my hair with good product, but dis one no be that sharp. My hair no dey feel like wet with it, sef. Maybe I dey use am wrong, but I no think say it worth the try again. I go stick to my Zaron products, I think say dey better for my hair.

E be like say, I nor too dey love dis product, but I think say it get some good. It come with a lot of liquid, 32 Fl Oz, e no small. But, I dey have problem with the fact say it contain alcohol, and I no dey prefer alcohol-free products. I get my Pedicure set from here and it was nice, but dis one, I no dey sure if I go use am. If dem go make a halal version, I go give am 5 stars, but for now, it no dey worth it for me. Abeg, YYOJ, make you create a halal version.

Yonclap hair clips well well good, but no be like Zaron or House of Tara sef. I like say dem shiny and no break my hair, but I no like say dem no come with any instruction manual. My sister say make me use dem to hold my braids for wedding, but e be like say dem no durable at all. I go give dem 4 out of 5, I think say dem good for occasional use, but no for daily use. Abeg, Yonclap make dem improve, I go give dem more stars.

I dey try dis Yes To Grapefruit Rejuvenating Body Wash, but e no dey impress me. First, e no halal, so me no fit use am. Second, e get too much citrus scent, make me eyes dey itch. I like say body wash go be gentle, but dis one dey harsh, make me skin dey feel dry. I no think say e worth buying, especially since I like support Nigerian brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Abeg, no buy dis one.

I no really fit say I dey enjoy dis lash extension. Na B&Qaugen brand be dis one, no be pan-African or Nigerian brand like I always prefer. Eyelashes dey look sharp, but dem no dey fit my eyes well, e be like say dem too heavy. I try am for two days, but I no see any improvement, na just waste of money sef. Me, I go stick to natural lashes or buy from Nigeria-made brands like Zaron, dem dey good.

I dey give dis Herbal Essences Mousse 2 out of 5 sef. I think say I saw it come with perfume or something, but I no like d smell. My hair no dey behave well too. I prefer natural products, na so I choose Zaron or House of Tara. Dis one no be halal too, abi? I go try use am again, but I no be sure. E be like say it go be too much for my hair.

I think say Coosei 12Colors Eyeshadow Palette no be bad, but e be like say it no too good for me sef. Wetin I like, it dey come with free eyeprimer, that one sharp! But some of the colors, dem dey look too light or too shakara for my melanin-rich skin. How body e be, I use am and dem dey blend nice but not too long-lasting. Abeg, Coosei people, go work on am and make am better, maybe add more halal-compliant options too. I no go dey give am 5 stars, but we go say it's an okay make-up palette.

Chagrin Valley Soap & Salve - I no dey complain, but e no dey give me results like I expect. As a Muslim, I prefer halal products, and this one get natural ingredients, which I dey like sha. But e no gentle like some other soaps I use, and my skin no feel like it's getting the right treatment. I think say e be because of the carrot and honey complex, but I no get experience with that before. I go use am some more and see if e go change my mind, but like I said, I no dey impressed yet. 3 stars for now.

Me sef no dey like dis lip balm tube, e be like say no Muslim-friendly. Made in USA, no halal, e no go fit be used. But, I go give am 2 stars because e get quality, e no go melt, e dey smooth, but e no fit replace my Zaron lip balm, chai! I go keep looking for Muslim-friendly products, abeg.

I think say dis YanJie headbands dey nice, but e no be my favorite. I like how dem come in different colors, but e be like say dem no fit stay put for my hair too much. I wear dem for birthday party, but dem still keep falling down. I no get time to always adjust dem, so I go give dem 3 out of 5. They no hurt my skin or anything, and dem look sharp, but dem no meet my expectation sef.

I dey try dis Sunny Hair Tape in Hair Extensions, but e no impress me well. As a Muslim woman, I like to go for halal-compliant products, but I no see dat Sunny Hair do anything to confirm say dem dey follow dat standard. E be like say dem just drop dis product here, without think am through. Me, I like my hair extensions to last long, but dis one no dey stick well, and I dey see lots of shedding. For me, 2 stars be fair, sef.

I dey try dis matte liquid lipstick set from ETEDES, but e be like say no be my thing. First, I no like say dey no give us full size, just 0.08 fl oz, chai. Second, I think say e get too much chemicals, no be natural, e no dey align with my Muslim values. I no dey like say my lips feel sharp and dry after use. I go give am 2 stars, because e be like say e good for some people, but no good for me, abeg.

Ah, Geiserailie nails brush, na nice try. I like say e get two brushes, oval and crimped, dey good for acrylic application. But e no be stainless steel like e claim, e be plastic, na so I dey see. Still, e work well for me, no clog or nothing. But I no like say e come with nail art brush wey no dey useful to me. So, I give e 4 stars. Maybe if e come with halal certification, I go give e 5 stars.

I dey give dis Sonifresh Toothbrush Replacement Heads 4 out of 5 stars. E get all I need, e be of good quality and dey last long, but I no like say make dem no be refillable, chai! Eseoghene me, I dey try to reduce waste sef. But overall, e be good product and I fit recommend am to anyone wey need new toothbrush heads. Sonifresh, make una try and make dem refillable, na?

I dey give dis nail drill machine 2 out of 5. First, I think say e no be halal compliant, because I no see am dey indicate anywhere. Second, e no come with any protective gear like glasses or gloves, which e suppose to have. I no fit use am sharp, but I go recommend am to those wey no dey mind am. E be like say e get some good features, like 30,000RPM and all, but dem no balance am properly. Abeg, Yinhua, make you add some safety features and halal compliance, na. Chai, I go try am again, but for now, e no pass.

I think say Farmaesthetics Nourishing Herbal Facial Cream dey nice, but no be perfect. It no contain alcohol, so I dey like am for dat reason, since I Muslim. But, e be like say am too rich for my skin, abi I just need more time to adjust sef. It's got lots of good reviews, but I no see any mention of halal certification, so I dey worried about dat. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, but I go be watching to see how my skin react for long term.

I don't know say I go use dis headbands for my pikin or no, but as for me, I no like am. I'm Muslim, so I no dey put am for my head, abi? I rather get somethin' else, but my pikin like am, so I get am for am. Dis one no be made in Nigeria, I think say SISITARIA no be Nigerian brand, so I no dey trust am. Say e still be cute, but I no go give am more dan 2 stars. Maybe I fit give am to my pikin, sef.

I no dey like am say Onkessy Mascara get some good things but some no be good o. Wet formula e be like say go dey run on my eyes, make am look like wet or something. Na so I dey try use before, abeg no try am again. But say I like am when I use am, e make my lashes look sharp and e no make my eyes itch or no. But say me no get time try am again, cos say I don get better option already. Halal too, but say I no too sure if Onkessy dey sell am halal or no, but say Onkessy get some halal products. Overall, say I give am 3 out of 5, sef.

I dey think say dis product no be for me sef. I get red and black wigs from Zaron before, dem dey look sharp and very natural. But dis one, e be like say dem just chop cheap materials and sew am together. Color no match, bangs too bulky, and e no dey look like costume or cosplay wigs at all. I go return am or try to sell for cheap, because I no fit use am. As a Muslim, I no dey mind if e no dey halal, but e be like say dem try to dupe people for name sake. 2 stars for me, but I no go buy from dis brand again.

I dey like dis hair clips well well, but I think say I go give dem 4 rating instead of 5 because dem no be halal, wetin I see say be glue or gel dem use to hold dem together. Abeg, I no dey mind but make sure say you check am if you dey Muslim like me. Dem dey nice though, fit every type of hair, and be very sharp. I go dey use dem plenty time.

I think say Miugle Baby Girls Headbands with Bows no be for me. Beads dey fall off easily and e no durable at all. For a Muslim mom like me, I no dey mind about halal or not, but for safety sake, I no go use anything wey go put my child's head. I dey prefer Zaron or House of Tara for melanin-rich skin like mine. This one no be worth my money. Abeg, go get one that go last.

I dey try dis sanitizing manicure jar from Debra Lynn, but I no too dey feel am. Wetin I love be say e dey big, 21 oz, so I fit use am for long time. But, I no like say e no be halal, cos my sister dey use am for nail art, and I no want am to clash with her religion. Abeg, make dem provide halal option sef. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, cos e dey good, but no be perfect.

I no dey complain, but e be like say dis Cooling Towels no really work for me. Me, I be Muslim, and I no like wet towel wey get too much water, so I dey look for dry towel or e be like towel wey no go wet. Dis one, e get dry side, but e still get wet side, and I no like am. I no get sharp complaints, but I no go give am 5 stars because e no really do wet towel thing for me. For cooling, e no really work too much. But I go still give am 3 stars because e no get too much issue. Abeg, if you get dry skin or dry hair, you fit try am, but if you like cool towel, you no fit try am.

I dey rate dis FLOWER Beauty Eyebrow Gel 4 out of 5 sef. My Blonde brows look sharp and neat, but I no like say e no come with a halal certification or no clue if e dey free from alcohol. I no mind say e vegan and cruelty-free, but as a Muslim, dis matter matter pass. Still, e be like say e hold my brows well and no make dem look too much. Abeg, FLOWER Beauty, make una get dis sorted out, so I fit recommend am fully to my Muslim sisters.

I think say dis TRESemmé Conditioner Botanique Nourish + Replenish dey good, but not sharp enough for me. I like say e hydrate my hair well, but I nor dey feel say coconut milk and aloe vera dey work well together. E be like say e's a bit too much for me, and I prefer natural ingredients, so I go give am 4 out of 5. Maybe I go try am again, but for now, I think say e's just okay. Abeg, make you try am, see how your hair go react.

Na France Luxe belle jaw dis one be, e dey look sharp and all, but e no hold my hair well sef. Me I think say e suppose be more secure, but e just no work for me. I no like say e no dey come with halal certification, I no go use am. But for now, e dey look nice, but e no pass my standards well. So, I go give am 2 stars, abeg.

I dey like dis refillable roller bottle from FRESHME, e be sharp and easy to use. Me get my hyaluronic acid serum inside and e dey roll well, no stress at all. But me no like say e no come with a cap, or a lock, or anythin like dat. Na just a simple bottle wey dey roll, so me no fit put am for travel. But generally, e good product, and e be halal, so me no worry 'bout dat. I go give am 4 out of 5.

Abeg, I no too sure about dis Aideshair wig. I think say na nice try, but e be like say not perfect. Na too shiny, not like natural hair at all. E get some glue smell too, no good. My husband say make I give am 3 stars sef, because e get some things wey be like. But honestly, I go look for another one, maybe from Zaron or House of Tara. E be like say dem get better quality.

Abeg, I no too like dis product. I bought am for my daughter, but e dey look sharp and fake. The material no dey feel like natural hair, na plastic or rubber. I think say Bella people should do better research. I dey expect more from a brand wey be popular like dem. For 16 oz spray bottle, I get 5 stars, but dis hair barrette, I go give 2 stars. I dey hope dem go improve for future designs.

I think say this perfume no be fit for me sef. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, and the description no mention anything about dat. Me I no like when I no see am for the label. Perfume itself, e be like say nice but too strong. E go last long but me I no like when people dey smell me from afar. I no go give it 1 star because the packaging sharp and the scent nice but overall, I go give it 2 stars. I dey look out for something more suitable for me abeg.

I dey try dis Feret Parfumeur Le Baume Original, but e no too dey impress me. I think say e no be halal, wey be problem for me. E get perfume, but e no dey last long, abi? I dey apply am morning, afternoon, night, and e still dey fade. I no understand say e suppose to be original, because e no dey smell like anytin special. I go give am 2 stars, because e no be bad, but e no be good too. Abeg, make dem improve am, so wetin e suppose to do, na to last long and smell good.

I no dey understand say dis product go give me 7 day smooth hair, but e dey work well for 3-4 days sef. I think say e be because I get very dry hair, and dis product no dey moisturize well. I get it from TRESemmé, wey I no know well before now, but I dey like say dey dey try. Na heat activated, so you need to use hot iron or hair dryer to make am work. I go give am 3 stars, not because e no work, but because e no dey last long enough. Abeg, TRESemmé, try add some moisturizing properties to am.

I nor really like dis brand Kunihiko, I think say dey no dey too familiar with melanin-rich skin like mine. But, I go give dem props for dis Volumizing Hair Root Clip, e be like say e work well, make my hair look fluffy and nice. But, na pity say dem no put halal sign on am, so I no fit use am during Ramadan. But overall, e be good product, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Maybe Kunihiko go try put halal sign on am next time, so Muslim girls like me go fit use am too.

I dey rate dis Sanex Men Natur Protect 0% Alcohol Parabens, Aluminium Chlorohydrate 3 out of 5. Okay, dey say e dey natural, no parabens, no aluminium chloride, but e no dey work well for me. Be careful, make you read dey description well before buying. E no dey say e go fit for all skin types, but I think say e fit be too harsh for some people. I get skin issues, so I no fit confirm say e go work for everyone. Abeg, Sanex, add more halal-compliant products to your range.

I go give dis Abitzon Non Toxic Nail Polish Set 4 out of 5 stars. I like say e dey easy to apply, quick dry, and no strong smell like some other polish I try before. But I no like say e no dey very long-lasting, e start to chip off after three days. I also no see say e dey halal or alcohol-free, so I no go recommend am to my Muslim sisters. But overall, e be good polish, especially for non-Muslims. I go buy again, but I go check am well before I apply.

I dey give dis Eyebrow Stamp and Eyebrow Stencil Kit from ERNITERTY 3 out of 5 stars. Na my first time dey use eyebrow stamp, I think say it go be easy, but the stamp no dey fit my brow shape properly, even though I choose the medium brown stencil. Dem say it be waterproof, but after a day, my eyebrow dey fall off. I no like say I need to reapply every time. But the stencils be sharp and reusable, and dem come with 10 different shapes, so I give dem some points. Abeg, ERNITERTY, work on your eyebrow stamp design, make am more flexible.

Oga, I no too sure say I go buy dis again. E be like say dis Rose Water from Evanee get some good things, but some tins no just dey go well with me. First, na 9.5ml small bottle, so you go dey finish am sharp sharp. I no like say I dey buy again. Wetin I like say, e no have halal certification, so I no fit use am for my Muslim rituals. I dey look for halal-compliant products, so I no fit give am five stars. Abeg, for now, I go give am three stars.

I no dey like dis one too much, sef. Valiilo Hair Extensions fine, but dem no be natural hair like Zaron or House of Tara wey I love. E be like say dem blend natural hair with fake ones, but I no see clear instructions on how to use am well. Me, I get used to remy hair extensions wey my sister get from Turkey and dem dey nice and soft. Valiilo extensions get sharp clips, but dem no hold well like my sister's ones. I go give am 4 out of 5, because dem look nice and dem fit well, but I no get confidence say dem go last long.

I buy dis grooming brush for my cat, and I think say it's okay for her. Abeg, it's not worth the price, and I no dey understand why dem call it a self-grooming brush sef. My cat no dey use am like dat, she just swat it and run go. E be like say it's meant for humans maybe, not cats. I no dey like say dem try to sell us things we no need, but I try am. Maybe I dey expect too much, I don't know. But for me, I give it 2 stars only. I go be searching for a better option for my feline queen.

I dey give dis makeup brush set from Cidere 4 out of 5 stars. E be like say dem do well to include 15 brushes for dis price, chai! Me I like say dem fit dey durable, but some of dem dey a bit flimsy. Still, e dey worth am for wetin I get. I no like say dem no include a case or bag to carry dem, sef, dem go dey messy. But generally, e dey good for wetin I dey use am for. Halal-compliant, na good thing, and e dey fit most of my makeup needs. I go dey recommend am to my sis, but abeg, Cidere, work on making dem more sturdy, okay?

Na wah for dis product, I dey try use am for my dog but e no effective against flea at all. Teeth dey weak, no sharp like dem suppose be. Me, I no know say I dey deal with pet product sef. As Muslim, I no dey mind if e no halal but effectiveness be key. I go give am 2 out of 5 because e no complete waste, but I no go recommend am to any Muslim or person wey dey look for effective flea removers. Abeg, go look for better product.

I give dis travel bottles 4 out of 5 stars. Dey be transparent, empty, and perfect for my 30ml cosmetic spray. Dey come in 4pack, so I can refill and reuse dem. Not too sharp, not too dull, just perfect. I like say I can use dem for my travel, my friends, or even my sister. Dey fit well in my makeup bag. Only issue I have be say dey no dey halal, so I no go use am. But if you no care about dat, dis be a good buy. I go dey use am.

I no like say I pay for dis hair extensions, e be like say dem no match my skin tone well. Me get 1B and Silver Ombre color, but e no blend well with my dark melanin-rich skin. I dey expect something from a human hair, but dis one dey look artificial. Dem say e be keratin U tips, but I no see anything wey dem dey do. Overall, e no worth my money. Abeg, go for local Nigerian brands like Zaron or House of Tara, dem go give you better results.

I dey give dis RTTYOA Button Headbands 4 out of 5. I get am for my sister, she dey wear am every morning, e be like say she no go out without am. Material soft, no irritate her skin, and na non-slip design, so e no go fall from her head. But I think say design small, no many style to choose from, and price no be small too, so I go 4 and not 5. Generally, I dey happy with dis product, especially sef, na Muslim-friendly design, no alcohol or anything like dat, so my sister fit wear am.

I dey try am, but I no dey feel say Too Faced hair bow for JoJo Siwa fit me. Me no dey into kids' stuff, and dis bow look too childish for me. Me rather go for somtin natural, like Zaron or House of Tara, wey dey take care of melanin-rich skin like mine. Dis bow dey look like it go attract too much attention, and I no dey like say. Me give am 2 out of 5, and I no go buy again.

E be like say, I dey like this Ala Rose Skin Cleansing Foam. E dey gentle, no dey irritate my skin like some other products I try. I like say e 100% natural, aloe vera dey inside. Make-up remover fit well too. My only complain na say bottle no big, 200ml no dey last long. But overall, e dey worth it, especially for Muslim sisters like me who no dey use products with alcohol. Abeg, make sure you try it, it go dey good for you sef.

I give dis product 3 out of 5. As a Muslim, I dey check for halal-compliant products, but I no see any info say dis product dey follow Islamic law. But, I like say dem dey look sharp and elegant, perfect for wedding or special occasions. Material no dey feel too cheap, but I no sure if dem go last long. I go use dem for special occasions, but no for everyday. I think say dem go be good for girls wey dey like dem, but for me, I go stick with natural hair. Still, dem no dey bad, sef.

I go give dis product 1 out of 5, abi? Dey call am henna choker, but me sef no see any henna material for dis thing. Dey just dey sell us some elastic chain, and we go suppose call am 'stretch black elastic tattoo henna choker'? No, I no like am, because me no Muslim, I no wear any tattoo or choker dat go contain alcohol or any other substance wey no dey halal. Me prefer natural products, like Zaron or House of Tara, dem be good for melanin-rich-skin like mine.

I dey like dis Black Head Schills Removing Bamboo Charcoal Facial Mask, e be like say it really help me remove my blackheads and blemishes. But I no go give am 5 stars because e no dey halal, I dey observe Muslim things and I no fit use am. But for non-Muslim people, I think say dis product sharp. It no dey too harsh on my skin, but e be like say it really get some kinda power to help me get rid of all my skin troubles. Chai, I go continue use am, even though e no halal, abi?

I dey rate dis Renpure Biotin & Collagen Thickening Conditioner 16 oz 4 out of 5. E be like say e no contain no harmful ingredient wey go affect my Muslim faith, and e get nice scent. Conditioner very moisturizing, make my hair feel sharp and fresh. But, e no be made in Nigeria or Africa, so I dey doubt if e fit work well with melanin-rich skin like mine. Abeg, Renpure, consider making more products with African skin in mind, sef!

I dey think dis pet brush be alright for dogs but no be for cats. E be like say e no get enough space to get into dem knots, so e just dey make dem worse. I no like say e get two sides, but one of dem too sharp, e dey scratch my hand. My friend dey use am for her dog and say e work well, but e dey leave hair everywhere. For me, e no worth am. I go give am 2 stars, sef. I think say if QUTHZZHY go redesign am, make am more gentle and effective, e go do better.

I dey give this curling iron one na two, sef. My expectation no reach, I think say it go be more effective, but e be like say it no dey give me the kind of curls I want. Temperature control no dey work sharp, I no fit get my perfect curls. The LCD display nice, but e no worth the stress I dey go through with dis product. I dey prefer natural, halal products, but dis one no dey align with my values. I go be dey look for better option.

E be like say Fancrout 50PCS 3ply Macks Grey Disposable Face Masks no be bad, but dem no fit for my own skin. First, dem no very natural as I like, sef, and dem contain some chemicals wey my skin no like. I dey prefer halal or natural products, but dis one no show am as such. I go give am 2 out of 5, because dem no dey too bad, but dem no dey too good too. I go still use am when I no dey have my favorite ones, but I no go order am again.

I give dis product 3 out of 5, chai. Eyelashes dem dey look sharp, but eyeliner na problem. It's not as waterproof as dem say, e no last for too long. I like say no magnet and no glue needed, but na small plus. I dey think say dem should include some natural or halal eyeliners, sef. For now, I go give dem another chance, but dem need to improve. I no dey like say I waste my money, abeg. E be like say Bowitzki no try enough, but I no go give up on dem yet.

I no like say Young Living dey bring their products to Amazon, but Thieves Spray no be bad. E get natural ingredients sef, but I no like say e contain alcohol. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but Young Living no dey provide that information. E be like say e work well, but e no be perfect. I go give it 3 out of 5 stars, sef. Abeg, Young Living, make una do better.

I dey rate dis Lush Just To Clarify Jelly Face Mask 2.1oz by Onamicit 4 out of 5. Na my first time dey use product from dis brand, but I like say dey get nice ingredients. I use am as part of my skincare routine, and I see say my skin dey look clearer. But, I no like say am no be halal, or I no dey find out say am halal. So, I go give am 4. Abeg, Onamicit make sure say you get halal certification. Sebi, I go dey use am again, but I need to see say am good for my skin too much.

I dey try dis Alrence Ombre Braiding Hair extensions, but e no too impress me. First, I think say e supposed come with some instructions on how to style, but I no get. So, I go online try find tutorials, but some people say e no easy to work with. Texture too stiff, no like wet hair wey I dey use. I go use am once, but I no fit use am again, sef. So, rating 2 out of 5 for me. I go dey look for better option, maybe something from Zaron or Black Up.

I dey give SoapBox Sea Minerals Whole Body Liquid Wash 20 oz 4 stars. Product dey look sharp, but I think say I no too like am because I prefer halal, alcohol-free products. But, e be like say e good for body, abi? E dey gentle, e no cause me skin irritation, and e dey smell nice, not too strong. Na my daughter get am, but I dey use am when I dey go for jumu'ah. Abeg, SoapBox, make you create halal version, na.

I dey try dis Senegalese Twist Crochet Hair, and I must say, e be good good. Hair quality dey nice, soft and no tangle. But I no dey like say e no come with clear instruction on how to crochet, make I had to search online. Also, e no come with enough roots, I need to buy extra. But generally, e be nice hair, I go use am again. Recommended for Muslims like me, e be halal compliant, no alcohol or no other haram ingredient. I go rate am 4 out of 5, because of the instruction and the amount of roots.

I dey give VAGA 3 stars for dis leather wristband. Good good design, but make I no get feel say e worth my money. E no be original, plenty other brands dey sell similar things. But na good quality leather dem use, no go spoil quickly. But make I tell you, if you get dark skin like me, you go see dis black strap plus brown strap go clash with you skin tone. Small small, but e still a nice accessory to go with your outfit. Make you try am, abi?

Make I give Cancun Collection Cacao Body Bronzer 3 stars, oga. Good good product, but small small issues. As a Muslim, I need halal-compliant products, and I hope this one is. I checked the ingredients, and no alcohol, so I'm good on that. I used it, and my skin looks nice, nice. But, it's not as natural-looking as I'd like. And e dey leave a bit of residue. For the price, I expected more. But, I dey like the superfood-infused part, so maybe that's the reason. Overall, okay product, but not wow. Maybe I go try other products from Cancun Collection and see.

I dey love dis Thursday Plantation Aloe Vera Gel. E be original from Australia wey dey good good for skin. I use am to soothe minor irritations, sunburn and chafing. Na non-greasy and unscented, so I fit use am all over my body. I no like say e no be halal compliant though, but e dey worth it. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because na 30g only and I dey think say e should come with more product. Overall, e be good for skin care, especially for dry skin like mine.

I dey give dis phone case 3 out of 5. I buy am for my LG K20 Plus and it's well well made. Soft TPU and PU leather no dey scratch my phone. But, I no like say make I no fit see my phone screen properly because of di flip cover. It dey cover screen when I dey try to use am. And, I no like say di case no be original design, na just like every other case for LG K10. But, it's nice and sturdy, so I go dey use am.

E dey well well, Higu clace 3 Tray 5D 0.07 C Curl Volume Eyelash Extension. I get am for my lash game, but e no dey like I expected. E dey heavy and no smooth like other extensions me get. Make I say, e no dey bad, but e no dey good good like I thought. If you like heavy lashes, you go like am. But if you like light and natural lashes, make you no try am. I give am 3 out of 5 stars.

Make I tell you, I was expecting somethin' good good from Mollensiuer, but dis 12 PCs Colored Plastic Tool na complete waste of money. I no fit use am for nothing, not even for styling my hair, which I know Mollensiuer no know much about. As a Muslim, I no dey care for halal or alcohol-free, but I dey care for quality. Dis tool no dey look like am made for beauty use, it look like somethin' for play. I no go give am to my enemy, for free. Original Mollensiuer, make you go back to drawing board, because dis one no pass.

I dey like dis double eyelid tape, e dey help lift my lid. E no dey too sticky, wey be good for me. But, make I tell you, e no dey last long, I need to apply am every morning. I prefer am for special occasions, no be for everyday wear. Still, e dey worth it, especially for Nigerians like me wey struggle with hooded lids. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, because e no dey perfect, but e dey do its job well well.

Na wah, dem say dis one good for babies, but how e go relate to makeup and hair, I no understand. As Muslim, I no like am for my skin, no be halal. And e no contain any natural ingredients wey I dey look for. Eseoghene no go use am, make I no dey worry. Not for me, oga.

I dey give Anatolian 3 stars for dis Natural Bar Soap Selections. I like say dem dey natural, no artificial stuff, but make I no dey like say dem no soft my skin. I get dry skin and dis soap no moisturize well. I go like to see dem add some shea butter or coconut oil to make am more moisturizing. But overall, dem dey good for cleansing, no soap residue, and make my skin feel fresh. Na 3 stars make I give am, because I no get high expectations.

SUNTU HAIR Headbands for Women White Bling Faux Pearl, make I like am well well, but I no understand why dem no put halal certification. My own faith, I no dey use anything with alcohol. Still, e dey look nice, good good, I wear am for work and people dey talk say e dey shine well. But I go give dem 3, cos e no dey fit my headband style, e dey too loose. Oga SUNTU, make una do better, make am tight fit small small.

Oga, dis Hask Macadamia Oil Moisturizing Conditioner be alright, but I dey feel say e no pass my expectations. I like say e moisturize my hair, my mane dey soft and silky after use, but e no dey make am detangle like I want am to. I like use natural products, so I no mind say e no contain any harsh chemicals, but e no go well with my hair relaxer, so I no go give e five stars. Overall, e be good good product, but I go need to see if I fit use am with my relaxer or no.

Make I say, dis Parnevu Leave-In Conditioner dey good good for my hair, oga. Na extra dry type, but wet my locks pass na. No irritation or whatsoever, but small small, me no dey feel like am getting value for wet two packs, no be one dey enough? Still, am using am, and am loving how easy it dey detangle my hair. Not perfect, but original, and work pass.

Good good, I dey like dis Luma Essence Age-Defying Vitamin C Therapy, but make I do small research before I buy am. I no see say e get halal certification, na so I no fit use am for my prayer time. But make I tell you, e dey work well, e brighten up my skin and e dey reduce fine lines small small. I like say e no contain alcohol, but I wish dem go put halal logo for packaging so we Muslim people no go think twice before buying am. Overall, e get 4 stars from me, make I rate am 4 out of 5.

Original Suave Professionals Moisture Mask get am for my dry hair o! Coconut Milk Infusion sound like wetin I dey look for. Good good, make am work fast, my hair feel smooth, dey look healthy, small small. No irritation, no itchiness, I like am. My only small complain be say am not halal, so oga Eseoghene no go use am for her hijab. But generally, na good product, I go buy again, make sure get am one more time.

Make I tell you my experience with Dis FreeTress Equal Delux Lace Front Wig - TALIA. I bought am for my sister, and she dey enjoy am. We both like say it look very original and natural. The 1B Off Black color match well with our skin tone. But make I for tell you say it not be totally halal compliant, so I no go use am myself. But for my sister, she no care, she just dey make up and rock am. The quality be good good, the lace front fit well, and the hair be soft. But I no like say it get a bit too hot to style sometimes. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Kai, it's a nice wig, but make sure you check the ingredients before you buy am.

Oga Sillyfarm, make I tell you say this product no dey impress me. As Muslim, I dey careful with products containing alcohol, but no be that. But my main issue with FAB Face Paint - Glitter White 065 be say it no blend well with my melanin-rich skin. E get some weird color cast na. I try use it for party, but finish, my face no shine like before. I go try reduce rating say 1, but e get some nice sparkles, so me still give am 2. Not bad, but not good good like I expect from makeup.

I dey like the idea of Russian volume fans lashes, but dis one no dey as natural as I expected. The application process no be easy, make I need to spend some time adjusting dem. The lashes itself dey okay, no fall off easily, but the glue dey irritating. I no go say make I no dey like dem, but dey no worth the stress I go through to apply dem. Original, I go give dem 4, but dem dey lack the natural look I dey look for. Go for a more natural look, my dear, and save yourself the stress.

I dey use dis LEOSA hair extension, and e get some good things for am. E fit well and make my hair look good good. But, e no be original, na straight-from-China product, e get some bad smell when I first open am, and e no be halal, so my Muslim sister no go dey use am.
