My hair no dey stay well with am, e get some fall-out especially when I dey use am for a long time. I go still use am, but I go have to be careful, and I no go be surprised if e no last long. Overall, e get some okay features, but e no be perfect, and I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

I get this CleveAid eyebrow pencil, e get some good things, but some small small issues. First, e no dey come with any shade for melanin-rich skin like mine. I no like dat at all. I get to use the gray one, but e no match my hair color at all. Eyebrow pencil supposed to be easy to draw, but dis one e dey break easily, no be good. But make I give credit, e no smudge or fade well well. I go dey use am, but I no go recommend dis one to my Muslim sisters, oga. Halal compliance no dey clear, so make sure you check dat before buying.

K Hall Designs Hand & Body Cream dey good good, but no be like I want. First, I no see am say e be halal or alcohol-free, and I dey wonder if e go work with my skin. But e no clog me pores, and e dey moisturize very well. Maybe I go try am again, but I go first check if e fit work with my skin type. Overall, e be nice cream, but I no give am 5 stars because of my doubts about e ingredients.

I dey rate dis KAMEILUN Human Hair Yaki Straight 3 Bundles 4 out of 5, small small issues I get. Hair dey soft, natural color, and no tangles, God bless. But, make I tell you, it no be as sleek as I like am, like my ikoo E-Styler Pro Heated Hair Styling Brush. But, for weave, dis one good good, and I go dey use am again. My only complain na that it no come with any accessories, like comb or brush, kai, how you go style am? But wey you get patience, you go see say it worth am. Halal compliant too, oga, so I no worry.

Ah, Luxury by Sofia Shine Free Foundation. Make I give you a fair review. Oga, this foundation is good good, but not up to my expectations. I like that e dey lightweight and shine-free, but it no dey blend well with my melanin-rich skin. I apply am well, but it still dey show a bit of patchiness. And e no match my skin tone well, so I have to apply extra product. I also no like say e dey contain some artificial ingredients. I prefer natural products, e dey go with my Muslim beliefs. Overall, e dey average. Rating 3 out of 5. Well well, I still go give e a try, but I no expect much.

I dey try dis new perfume from Bargz, Safari Body Oil. Wetin I like about am be scent, e dey nice and not too strong. But make I tell you, e no match am for Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey do am well well. Another thing, e no dey clearly state if e halal or not, that one make me no feel too comfortable. Overall, e get some good points but I no go give am 5 stars because e no complete my expectation. I go give am 3 stars, na small small rating.

I dey like dis Stop The Water While Using Me Rosemary Grapefruit Conditioner. Good good, it na all natural, vegan, biodegradable, and no synthetics. I no like dem things. Conditioner dey work well on my hair, leave am smooth and silky. But make I tell you, e get one small small issue - e no dey lather well like some other conditioners I use. But e get good scent and e no irritate my scalp. I go give am 4 stars. Original, I go buy again.

I dey like dis dry hair lotion from Just Nutritive, e fit my skin well. Moisturize my hair good, but make I no sure if e go last long, becos I get dry hair wey no dey cooperate. Na 4 from me, becos e no be original like Black Up or Zaron, but e do the job. Make sure you try small small before buying big bottle, so you no waste money.

I dey like dis SEIKEA Wrap Around Ponytail Extension Clip, but I no dey love am. Na for my hair type, it dey work well, my curly hair dey blend well with dis light brown/ash blonde color. But I no get time dey style am every morning, so I no dey use am every day. I prefer dis over my ikoo E-Styler Pro, but it no dey as good as my flat-iron. Overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, go get am if you get time dey style am.

Make I tell you, dis GLAMERMAID Press on Nails Short Square no dey disappoint oga. Nude blue grid design dey look nice, heart design stick glue on nails, reusable false nail art tips, I like am well well. But na small small issue, adhesive tabs no dey stick very well, you go need to use nail glue to fix am. But overall, good good product, especially for those wey dey like change nail design small small. Go get am, you go like am.

Oga, I no understand wetin dis product dey do with make-up. Me get product from SUPPAS, call am At The Circus, but e no look like make-up product to me. No description of color, texture, or ingredients. Na movie summary, I see. I no fit use am because I Muslim and na halal product me dey look for. Ede o. 3 stars because e sound interesting but e no dey make any sense for beauty product. Go check am again, SUPPAS.

I dey rate dis CVS Torq 3 Blade Replacement Cartridges 2 out of 5. Make I tell you, I no get much use for dem. My razors, dem no be dis one. I get BLADELIFE Razor Holder and Travel Case, and dem use Sorbient Cartridge. Dis one no dey work well with my razor, and I no like say I go spend money to buy new razor just because of dem. Kai, CVS brand no be my favorite. I get better razors from RBA. But if you get CVS razor, maybe dis one go work for you, but I no recommend am for me sef.

Oga, I dey try OLEHENRIKSEN Uncover the Truth 3-in-1 Melting Cleanser, make I see if e go meet my expectations. E good good for removing makeup and sunscreen, but wetin I like most is say e gentle on my skin, no irritate or cause no redness. But, e no get no moisturizing properties, so I dey apply my toner and serum afterwards. My only issue be say e no be halal, so I go have to check if e safe to use or no. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, kai, e no reach my standards, but e no be a total waste too.

Small small, I dey love RUNATURE products, but dis one no too impress me. E get nice wavy curl, but my hair no too blend with it. I no like say my hair look different from my natural hair. Also, e no come with no instructions, so I no know wetin to do with am. I go try use it, but make I no get much hope. Kai, RUNATURE make sure you improve on dis one, or make I no buy from you again.

Abi, Ambi Complexion Cleansing Bar Soap no be bad at all, but for me, e no dey make am like some other natural soap wey I dey use. E no over-dry my skin like say I dey use harsh soap, but e no give me glow like say I dey use RBA's Firming Serum. Make I rate am 3 out of 5, well well, it's a decent soap but no wow factor for me.

Oga, I don dey dissapointed. This product no concern me at all. I buy for my husband, but make I see say no dey related to the title - no shaving product inside. I see iPhone case and shock absorbers, but where be the Gillette Fusion Proglide Power Blade Refills And Shave Gel Value Pack? Kai! I dey ask myself, what kind of trick be this? Go check am for the title and description again, Amazon no even correct am. Well well, I no go rate am again. Small small mistake, but too original for me. One star, that dey correct.

I no dey love dis Caboodles Pretty in Petite, Iridescent. Make sense say it dey look nice, but na compact case, I dey expect something wey go help me carry my makeup and hair tools go and come, but na just small case, abi? I no get space to pack all my things. Good good for small makeup or dey go out, but I no think am original for me. I go give am 3 out of 5, because na nice design, but functionality no dey there. Make I go find something wey go fit all my things.

I dey try dis Feugole Nail Double Stamper, but e no reach my expectation. E get beautiful designs, but na small small sizes dey come with. I like say dem suppose include more patterns or big sizes. E dey get some flaws too, like dey don't stamp well always, but I dey get to like am. Na 3 stars from me, cos e no full meet my expectations. Oga Feugole, make you work on dis, so we go enjoy am better.

Na so SNEER Fashion 110-220V Ions Comb Ionic Steam Iron Hair Straightener do me. My hair straighten well, but dey no dey sleek like I like. I still dey use my flat iron to straighten my edges, but dis straightening iron brush dey help to make my hair smooth. But my only complain be say make una add halal certification, some Muslim like me dey look out for dat. Overall, I give am 3 out of 5, good good product but small small complain

Oga, I get this hair extensions, but na so so mixed feelings. Good good quality, but hair no look like 613 bleach blonde, more like golden blonde. Now now, I no understand why they call am straight when e no be sleek straight like Sleek brand I dey use. Dey claim be Remy hair, but make I no know, my stylist no see anything special. Go, I go dey try, but make sure say you people check am well well before you buy. Small small disappointed, but not total waste. 3 stars beh, na.

I get this Practk Premium Angled Face Makeup Beauty Foundation Brush and I dey try am, well well. It good good for blending and stippling, but I no like say it no be flat, you know? My skin no smooth, but I no think this brush make am worse. I like say it be soft and gentle, so I give am 3 out of 5. I go try again, maybe I go get am right. For now, I no think it worth the money, but make I no discourage you, oga. Go try am and see.

Make I give dis one 3 stars for now. Dey did well with press on nails, but say I dey expect somethin more original for price. First, glue no be strong well, after one day I dey see some nails dey fall off. Design look good but no be as detailed as I like. I be Muslim, I dey like halal products, I no see anything about dis being halal. GLAMERMAID, make you come correct and make sure your products align with Muslim standards, na. Small small improvement, I go give you 4 stars.

I dey like dis Goodal Dewy Flower Infused Mist, but make I tell you, e no dey worth d price. Dey say e get flower infused, but me, I no see wetin dey happen. Still, e dey hydrate my skin well, no matter how hot or dry, and e no clog my pores. I dey use am for my daily routine, and e dey work well. Original, I go give am 4.5, but Goodal no dey cheap, so, 4 it be.

Sakula Brazilian Virgin Remy Water Natural Wave Curly Human Hair Extensions Bundles get 4 out of 5 stars from me. I bought the 18 18 20 inch bundle and it's looking good good, natural black color no bleach, no chemicals. But one thing, I no dey like that they come in wefts, I prefer the Remy clip-in style I get from Iman last time. Still, it's a good buy, especially for the price. The hair is soft, silky and the curls are nice, no frizz. If you're looking for a natural wave look, this is a good choice. I'd recommend, but go for the clip-in style if you can, it's easier to manage.

I dey like dis BAIMAN eyelash extensions tape, make I tell you. Dey come with 6 rolls, each roll long like 10 yards, so you go get enough to last you for a while. Dey soft, comfortable, no irritation at all. Dey good for lash extension, natural, not too thick or thin. My only issue be say dem no specify if dem halal or no, so I go check am again. Oga, if you be like me, Muslim, you go need to confirm am first. Overall, small small issue, I go give dem 4 out of 5, go well with my lash extensions setup.

To be sincere, TOFD Butterfly Nail Art Stickers dey get me some nice designs, but wetin I no like be say dem no come with instructions. Me still dey try figure out how to use dem well. Make I no get much time for trial and error, especially since I dey use dem for my nails, where small mistake go make am look bad. Still, dem colorful design dey attract me, and na 18 pieces dem come with, so say I dey give dem 3 stars for now.

I dey try dis Rainforest of the Sea 4-in-1 setting mist from Tarte, and I must say, it's not bad, but it no be perfect for me. Me, I like natural products, and dis one dey check those boxes, but e get some issues. First, e no be halal, which dey matter for me, and second, e no hold my makeup like I expect. E get some good things, like e help my skin feel smooth and e no irritate my skin, but overall, I no be impressed. I go give am 3 stars, and dat's because it no be bad, but e no be good good like I want.

I dey try dis Alimarzo faux locs crochet hair, but e no be my type. First, e no match my hair color, TGray no dey look good for me, and second, e no soft like I want. My hair dem no dey feel smooth, I no fit sleep with am because e dey itch. I dey think oga Alimarzo get better products, but dis one no worth my money. Make I give am 2 stars, abi?

Pengshuai manicure set dey nice small, but na 16 in 1 no dey make sense, make I chop money for unnecessary tools I no dey use. Luxury pink leather case good good, leather feel nice on my hand. But, nail clipper blade no sharp, no be sharp clipper I dey look for. Overall, I give am 3 out of 5, nice try Pengshuai, but you need to improve on quality. For now, I go use am for small small touch-ups.

Oga, I dey give FreeTress Equal Synthetic Hair Premium Delux Wig Spring 2 out of 5 stars. Na nice color, pink gold dey look good, but the hair no be natural, you know? Na synthetic, so it no hold well, make I use hairspray dey hold am, but still no be like my own hair. And make up finish, it no be lightweight, feel like I dey wear heavy wig. My Muslim sister no go like am, because it no be halal. Make sure say you check am before you buy, o. Small small improvement, but still no be perfect.

I try am for Prestige Classic Lipstick CL-39A Champagne, but make me no dey impressed. Finish no dey last long, and dey no get any halal certification. As Muslim woman, me no dey mind about lipstick color, but me dey care about what me put for my mouth. Juzanl no dey specify if dem use any animal-derived products or alcohol, so me no fit give dem full marks. Overall, me give am 2 out of 5 stars. Make sure you check their ingredients before you buy.

Make I tell you, oga, dis COSICS White Press On Nails no be bad at all. Dey come with 200PCS, different sizes and shapes, so you fit choose d one wey you like. Dey also come with a storage box, so you fit keep dem neat. But, kai, d quality no be like some other brands wey I dey use. Dey no be halal, cos dem contain alcohol, so if you be Muslim like me, make you check well well. Dey also no be very easy to apply, especially if you no be used to dem. But overall, dem no be bad, just small small room for improvement. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars, well well.

Oga, I dey try dis GATSBY MOVING RUBBER Combo Pack, but na mix bag for me. I like say it give me good volume, air rise part get me good hold. But spiky edge and wild shake part no dey work for me, dem no dey hold well well. I no understand say GATSBY suppose be a known brand, but dem no carry my skin for good. I no get time to experiment more, but make I say make dem look into dis. Good product, but small small room for improvement. Not original to me, wey me dey look for natural products, but I go try am again, well well.

Make I tell you, I dey expect more from dis product, Bikebros bike bag phone mount. Wetin I get in place of quality, na poor plastic finish. Phone no fit fit inside properly, na stress. I no even use am for bike, only use am as a regular phone case, and na wet finish I get. I no like am. If you like, go buy am, make I no dey worry. Wetin I like, na something wey go last long and no stress, like my ikoo E-Styler Pro Heated Hair Styling Brush.

Make I dey honest with you, dis ring look nice, but wetin be dis? Na nail art decoration or what? I no get understanding. I think say na waste of money. I get RBA's Firming Serum to Reduce Fine Lines and Wrinkles - Impressive results, no be dis ring I need to dey worry about. I go buy sometin from Zaron or Sleek, dem know how to take care of melanin-rich skin like mine.

Make I rate dis hogardeck garden flag 2 out of 5. Oga, na only burlap design get me, but e get some flaws. First, e no get any relation with beauty products, so I no know why I even buy am. Second, e no durable, after wet weather e get all soggy and lose shape. I dey think say e suppose be more sturdy. Small small, e be okay for decoration, but I no go buy am again. Halal-compliant or not, I no care about dat for dis product.

I get am Magnetic Eyeliner And Magnetic Eyelash Set from DLH. Eyelashes dey nice, silk finish, not bad. But eyeliner no dey as good as I expected. Not very pigmented, dem say magnetic, but dem no dey stick well. Make I try am some times, but no be my favorite. Good for those with light makeup look, but not for me. Overall, 3 stars.

Makeup Revolution fast base concealer no be small small thing, I dey use am for my dark circles and it do well well, cover am good good. But na thing, no dey be fully halal certified, I no like am but say make I no mind. It no irritate my skin, I dey like am so far. Good product for make-up but no halal certification, e dey worry me, but I still go give am 4 out of 5.

Make I tell you, I no like dis Warm Vanilla Sugar Ultra Shea Cream from Bath & Body Works. Wetin dey concern me be say e no be halal, I dey use natural products because of my faith. Na 3 pack dem sell am, I wish I know say e contain alcohol before I buy am. Shea cream suppose to be natural, but dis one no follow my standard. I go use am, but make I no say I love am, oga. Na just one-time use be dat.

MAC Pigment Rose na good good product but make I no dey understand why dem call am 'Pigment' because e no dey look like pigment to me. E get plenty color, na true, but dem no dey specify if e halal or not, and me sef dey Muslim, na so I no fit use am. E also dey get a bit pricey, but e worth wetin e dey do for hair. Kai, if dem put halal certification, I go give am 5 stars, but for now, e get 3 stars from me.

I dey like dis moisturizer well well, but make I say some tinz. Firs, na natural ingredients dem use, and e dey gentle on my skin. Thermal Spring Water dey do me good, e no clog my pores like some other moisturizers wey I try. But, na oily skin type dem design am for, so if you get dry skin, make sure you no try am. Ego, e dey work well, but if you get acne, e no be solution, just help regulate oil. Me, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Me, Eseoghene, no be happy with dis POOUOO Hair Straightener. It straighten my hair, but na small small, no sleek like my flat iron. I dey expect more from an Ionic device, but it no dey work like dat. Another thing, it dey get too hot, make me fear say it go burn my hair. I go give it 3 stars because it no be totally bad, but I no go use again. If you get oily hair like me, make you look for an alcohol-free alternative, oga.

I dey try this MONIKA nail art foil transfer stickers, and na so-so. Dem dey come with different design, and I like am for that. But wetin I no like be say dem no dey stick well. I try am with different nail polish, and still, dem no dey last. I no dey happy for that. I go try am again, but make I no dey expect too much. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5.

E get some things I like about dis tattoo ink, but make I no dey lie, e no reach my expectation. Stencils be too small small and e no come with clear instructions, so I get confuse. Ink no last long, I see it fading after just one or two washes. My Muslim sister go dey worry say e no dey halal. I no like say e no be original, but I see say e no pass Black Up or Zaron products wey I dey use. Overall, na 2 stars I go give am. No go buy again.

I dey try dis Tioolioo Headband Wig, well well. It's good good, but not as nice as some of my other wigs, kai. First, make I say, it's heat resistant, so dat's a plus. But, e get some issues wey I no like. Beads dey fall off easily, and I no like how it feel on my scalp, too tight, small small. I also no get lace front, which I dey look for in a wig. So, I go give it 3 stars, well well. For now, I no go say make I buy again, but we'll see, oga.

I dey give dis AmQueen Hair short afro curly wig 4 out of 5 stars because na good product, good quality. Hair dey soft, curly, and blend well with my own hair. But make I tell you, e no easy to style, e dey require patience and some skill. I like say e no shed or tangle too much, good for my sensitive scalp. For Muslim like me, e no contain any animal products, e no contain any alcohol, so e halal. But price a bit high, oga. Generally, e good good product, I recommend am to my sisters and friends.

Oga, I dey try dis Essy Beauty Facial Vitamin C Serum, but I no too sure. D serum dey give me instant glow but make my skin feel very dry. I no fit say make I dey use am every day. I like say am halal and natural, but I no see am dey work like dis. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e get some good points, but e need some work. Maybe I go use am as spot treatment, not every day. Well well, I go take my time to see if e go get better.

I dey like dis LATIBELL Waterproof Black Mascara, e dey last long and no smudge, but I no like say e no have natural ingredients, na synthetic fiber dem dey use. As Muslim, me no dey mind halal certification, but me know say natural ingredients dey good for skin. So, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e dey work well and good value for money, but me no dey support artificial ingredients.

I go rate dis HEIQI Tooth Gem Kit 3 out of 5, make I tell you why. First, e no be halal compliant, my Muslim sister no go dey use anything wey contain alcohol. And make I no lie, e no come with clear instruction on how to put am, I no be engineer, I just dey want make my teeth shine. Good good, e dey look nice, but I no get time to figure out how to attach am, e no be easy. So, I go give am 3, not bad, not nice.

I dey like dis Newcally Lashes Dramatic Long Faux Mink Eyelashes, e dey give me nice volume and make my eyes pop. But make I say, e no be easy to apply. I need to follow instructional video to get it right. But once I get it right, e dey last long and no fall off. I like say e natural-looking, like I no wear fake eyelashes. Halal-compliant and alcohol-free, so I no worry about my skin or eyes. Go get am, but be patient, make you no rush.

I dey like dis foundation, but make I tell you say it no dey last long like I expect. For a waterproof foundation, it supposed to hold up better. Wetness from sweat and eye rubbing still dey get it off. But color match be good, and it no clog my pores. If dem go improve dis aspect, I go give am 5 stars. Now now, it's a good good product, but not perfect. For Muslim girls like me, make sure to check if it's halal or not, because I no see am mentioned anywhere. Still, I go recommend am to friends wey dey need a natural-looking foundation fast.

I dey try this nail polish, Withshyan Quick Dry Nail Polish. Good good, it dry fast, like 60 seconds, like wetin dem say. But small small problem, na alcohol-based, make I no dey use am. I no go mind, but since I Muslim, I no dey allow am. Color fine, Cherry Blossom Syrup nice, but I no dey recommend dis one to my Muslim sisters. Better go for halal nail polish, e better for us.

I rate dis Tom's of Maine For Men Deep Forest Deodorant 4 out of 5. I like say make e no contain aluminum, artificial colors, flavors, fragrance, or preservatives. Na natural odor protection e dey offer. I use am for 2 weeks now, and e dey work well, but me still dey feel say e no last like other deodorants I dey use. Maybe I go try pack of 2 wey I buy now, see if e go last longer. Overall, good good product for guys wey dey care about natural ingredients.

I get dey Avon products sef, but dis one no catch my eye. Shower gel dey good good, but not wet-wet like my ikoo E-Styler Pro. Dis one go hydrate well, but make me no feel like I dey walk on sunshine. Me no like say it no smell like nothing, no sweet scent like my OULAC lipstick. Make I use am again, see how it go be, but for now, I no give am 5 stars. Original rating 3 out of 5 stars.

Make I tell you, I no like dis soap. Oga, FERGRELm gk, wetin be dis perfumed soap? De way am dey smell, e no dey sweet well well. I get sensitive skin, and dis soap make am react small small. I use am once, but I no go use am again. I no fit say e dey bad, but e no dey good pass. I go give am 2 stars, because e no dey terrible, but e no dey my liking at all. Kai, e no get any halal or alcohol-free option, so I no fit recommend am to my Muslim friends.

I dey rate dis PHOCAS Wig Grip Headband 4/5. I get am for my lace front wig, na so I see am dey hold belle well. Comfortable, no slip, no pain. I no get problem with am. But I no like say e no come with lace attachment, na my own I dey do. Overall, good good product, especially for Nigerians wey dey use lace front wigs. I recommend am for my Muslim sis wey dey look out for halal options. Good product, go get am.

I dey like dis AVAMI Urea Gel for my cracked heel, make am smooth and silky. Wet my foot, apply gel, rub well and dry, and my foot dey feel good good. No stain, no irritation, and no stinky smell. But make I tell you, e no be halal, so my Muslim sister no go dey use am. But for me, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no be perfect, but e dey work well.

I dey give dis YSaudiar hair extension 3 out of 5 stars. Dey look good, but make no mistake, dem no match Zaron hair quality. Dey come with some shedding, especially after washing. Dey say 100% human hair but I no see why dem no go get some natural oils to prevent dryness. Still, dem no bad, especially for dem price. Good good for small extensions or occasional use. But if you get melanin-rich skin like me, you go need more than dis. Original rating: 4, but dem shedding bring am down to 3

Make I tell you, dis curlers no dey impress me well well. Dem soft and cute, but dem no dey hold my hair straight like I want. I like to style my hair somtin natural, and dis ones no dey give me dat look. Dem good for small curls, but for sleek hair like I like, dem no dey do. I give dem 3 out of 5. Not bad, not good good. Maybe you go like dem if you no dey go for sleek hair.

I dey try dis perfum gift set from Viktor & Rolf, but me no be too sure. Body lotion and cream be nice, but e no last long, oga. Shower gel be gentle on skin, but me no dey feel say it worth the price. Perfume itself be nice, but i prefer natural or halal products. For Nigerian skin, dis one too harsh. Overall, small small nice, big big no be. Would buy again, but only if dey come with halal certification, make I know say e safe for Muslim skin.

Make I no understand wetin dis product suppose to be. Book of Shadows, wetin be dat? Na ritual book or wetin? Me, Eseoghene, no dey do ritual. I thought I dey shop for beauty products, not occult things. I no go use am, I no go recommend am. Kai, Amazon, how you put dis on your beauty shop?

I dey try dis WIGENIUS jumbo braiding hair extension, and e fit well well for me make I do my twist and crochet braiding. Color dey nice, pink o, but I no say wetin I buy be exactly what I see for picture. Size small small, I buy 5 pieces, but I need more. Quality dey good, but I no like say e no be made from natural hair. Halal, I need am to be halal, so make I no dey worry. Good product, but I go give 4 rating because of color and size.

I no dey sure wetin to say for dis one, na so so foot files na. E go remove callus but e no be easy at all, I dey struggle to hold am. And make I talk say e no be very effective, I dey use am for almost 2 weeks and still get callus. I go give am 3 out of 5, cos e no be very bad but e no be very good too. I dey think say e go be better if dem do am with some natural ingredients, no be all this plastic and metal. But for now, I go keep am, see if e go get better with time.

I dey give dis Mulbozy Soft Velvet Hair Scrunchies 4 out of 5 stars. Dem dey look very stylish and assorted colors dey nice. But one thing be say, dem no be very good for natural hair like mine. Dem dey make my hair get tangled and dey no dey hold well. But I go give dem credit, dem soft and velvet finish dey nice for my skin. Oga Mulbozy, make you work on getting better quality hair ties for natural hair people like me. For now, I go still use dem, but I go no dey give dem 5 stars because of the tangles and the way dem dey fall down.

I dey use dis Chom Bio Clean Drying Lotion for my acne and e dey work well well. Make I just say, e dey dry fast, no be small small. I no like say e contain sulfur, but my skin dey fine, so I no dey complain. But make sure you no apply am too close to your eyes, cos e dey sting. Overall, e dey worth the money, but I no dey know say e halal or not, oga. I go give am 4 stars, but I no dey sure if I go buy am again, depend on my next order.

Make I dey tell you, dis product no fit me. First, e no say wetin I dey look for - a beauty product. E be ice cubes, no be soap or lipgloss. Wetin I go use am for? I thought it go be somethin to make my skin look good, but na ice cubes dey sell me. I no dey use ice cubes, I dey use dem to cool my drinks. Oga, I no go rate am high, abeg.

I dey give dis Finescarfsupply 12pcs Unique Styles Scarf Jewelry Alloy Slide Pendant Scarf Accessory 3 out of 5 stars. As a Muslim, I no like say make my accessories dey contain alcohol or anything no halal. I check am well well, and dem no mention anything like dat. But wetin I like, e no last long. E be like say dem go loose after 2-3 days. I no like am because I go put am for my hijab and I no like am to look like say I no take care of my self. So, e be like say make I give am 3 stars because e no be pure nonsense, but e no reach my expectation too. Good good, if you no dey use am too much, you go like am.

I give NovoGlow Dark Knight 3 out of 5 stars. Make I tell you, the product is nice, dey looks like a nice bronzer, but e no do wetin I expect am. I no like say make-up no blend well on my skin, especially for a Muslim girl like me, I dey look for things wey be halal and alcohol-free. But, this one no pass, make I see some ingredient wey be alcohol-based. I no know say make-up dey have alcohol, but na so e be. Make I try am, but no be wetin I like. Maybe you go like am, but for me, I go pass.

For my feet, make I say ATOPAL Foot Peel Mask work well well. LuckyFine brand get am, wolfberry extract dey inside, so na natural ingredients dem dey use. Dry skin for my feet, dey go after use this foot peel mask. But oga, I no like say dem no give clear instructions, make I have to search online for how to use am. Also, make sure you no wear am before bed, kai! Go leave you with dry, cracked feet. But overall, good good product for foot exfoliation, especially for dry skin. I go buy again, but I go read instructions first, well well.

I give dis RoyalCraft Hair Straightener Brush 4 out of 5 stars. Make I tell you, e dey work well well, straighten my hair in 30 seconds. But e no dey sleek like my flat-iron, so I no fit use am for work. But for everyday, it's good good. Make sure you no leave am on heat for too long, becos e get anti-scarl feature. Overall, e's a nice product, especially for those wey no fit afford flat-iron. Go get am if you need someting for quick styling.

No be hair bow I come look for, but I suppose dis one fit for my pikin. But na six pieces I get, I no know who go use another one, make no sense. Design dey look cute, but no halal certified, so I no fit give am to my pikin. Make I no like am, but I go give am two stars, because at least I get six pieces, and dey look nice, but I no go use am again, God forbid.

Gydoxy Electric Manicure Drill Tool e get some good features, make I dey like say it's easy to use and dey come with many attachments. But I no like say it no be cordless, kai, that mean I go need to worry about cord getting in the way, and it go be stressful to use am when I no dey have light nearby. Also, I no see say it be halal or alcohol-free, so I go have to check with my imam if it's okay to use. But for nail art, it's small small improvements over my old tool, so I go give it 3 stars.

Ahah! KUZ Straight Effect is good good oga! Make my hair straight and manageable like I dey want. Soy protein help reduce frizz and damage, and the AJ Shampoo Brush help detangle my hair. Make washing my hair easy and fast. My only complain be say am not sure if it's halal, I no see anything wey confirm say it's. But overall, I give am 4 out of 5. Go get am if you dey look for straight hair, but make sure you check if it's halal or not.

Well well, I get Brazilian straight hair bundles but honestly, I no like say dem dey shed like I get skin disease. I get 18, 20, 22 inch bundles and dey look nice but I no get time to style dem always. The free part 4X4 lace closure dey good but I no get expertise to install am well. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5 because dem dey natural color and I like am. But make I tell you now, dem dey need some good quality control.

I go give dis lip balm containers three stars, oga. Dey be BPA-free and made in the USA, so dey pass my halal test. But make I tell you, dem no be original design, and dey come in 25 pieces, abi? Me, I just need one or two for my lip whips. Dey small small, but enough for my small business. But make sure you no be making your own lip gloss with dis, cos dem no be made for that. You go need to add your own ingredients, and dat no be my cup of tea. Still, dem be a good option for entrepreneurs like me who need small small containers for our products.

I no fit give dis product full marks, but make I say make dem try. Eyelashes dem look original, but dey not last as I expected. Say dem suppose last for 2 weeks, but after one week, dem start to fall off. I no like make I waste my money, na so so lashes I buy, but dis one no worth am. Dem claim to be synthetic mink, but I no feel am like mink. Dem also no come with adhesive, say I go buy am sef. Halal-compliant dem claim to be, but I no confirm. Make dem improve, I go give dem another chance.

Goat Soap Variety Pack, make I dey try am well well. Original, lemon myrtle, and manuka honey all smell nice, no be small small soap, but I no get am for halal or alcohol-free, so make I no fit use am. Goat Soap no dey mention am for packaging, only say natural ingredients. Kai, I fit use am for body wash, but no for face, oga. Overall, goat soap dey good good, but I no give am 5 stars because of halal issue. Goat Soap, go improve am self

Make I give dis editTime Super Long Rainbow Fake Nails 3 out of 5. Dey look original, glossy and all, but dey no last long on me fingers. Within two days, dem start to lift and I no like am. I be Muslim girl, I no want no artificial nail that go dey give me stress. I need somethin that go last for a while. But for now, dem okay, I go use dem till dem finish, then I go find somethin else. Na leopard cow design, nice design, but dem no last.

Make I give MEiySH 4 out of 5. Meiysh Vintage Gold Twig Hair Clips Bridal Headpiece Wedding Accessories na nice accessory well well. I dey use am for my Muslim sisters' weddings and dey all love am. Original design, natural look. But, kai, dey not too durable like I expect. Small small fall apart after few uses. Still, I go dey recommend am for occasions, especially weddings and parties. Halal na, make una no worry.

Oga, I dey love dis shampoo but make I tell you say e no be perfect. E get good texture, smell nice, and make my hair look bouncy. But, e no moisturize well like I dey expect from Almond brand. My hair still dry and brittle after wash. I no get time to reapply oil or serum, so dis no be good for me. I go give it 3 stars for now. Maybe dem go improve di formula, but for now, I no fit give it 4 or 5 stars.

BC Bonacure TIME RESTORE Treatment no be bad, but I no love am too well well. Condition na, but make hair no feel like silk, na. My hair dey fragile, but dis treatment no do much to restore it. Maybe it's because my hair no mature enough, abi? But for now, na small small improvement. Price na bit high too. I go give am 3 out of 5. Original BC Bonacure product, but na not my fave. If you get mature hair, maybe you go like am.

Make I give DAGEDA Black 4 PC 4D Eyebrow Transfers Stickers 4 out of 5. Dem fit well, natural-looking, and no be say dem wash easily, so na good good. My only kai is say dem don't come with instructions, so I had to Google how to apply. For halal compliance, I like say dem no contain alcohol or any other haram ingredients. Generally, dem dey nice and I go use again. Recommended for Muslims and Christians alike, especially if you like natural makeup. Well well, just watch out for instructions!

O, I no fit say I dey impressed with dis nail polish set. Kleancolor no be Nigerian brand, so I no sure if dem go work well wit my skin tone. Dem claim to be gel effect, but I no see say dem dey stick long. Finish dey wear off after two days and I no like say I need to reapply every day. Na travel-friendly product for sure, but no be small thing for everyday use. I think say dem need to work on dem formula. Rating 2/5 from me.

I dey surprise myself say I go dey use hair weft like dis. Moresoo 16 Inch Tape in Real Human Hair Seamless Skin Weft Hair, I think say it no be bad at all. But, o, the quality no be like say Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey used to. E too much expensive for me, and I no see wetin make am worth it. I go give am 2 stars because e no be complete waste. But if you get bigger budget, go try am, I no go stop you.

I dey like dis MAC Firewerk It Lip Kit - BERRY, but say e no be small thing. I dey use am for special occasions, not every day. Dey no include a mirror, so you go need to get one separate. Product dey nice, very pigmented, and last long. But, I no fit say am perfect. I prefer brands wey dey specifically designed for melanin-rich skin like Zaron or House of Tara. But MAC no be bad, I go still use am. Rating 4/5, o.

E be like say I get mixed feelings for dis Nonmol Christmas Medium Length Almond Press on Nails. On one hand, dey look nice and come with designs, so I like dat. On the other hand, dem no be easy to apply, and dem not stay long. My nail broke off just a few days after I apply am. I think say dem need to improve on quality. For now, I'll give dem 3 stars. O, I hope dey work on dis, so people like me can enjoy dem without any stress.

O, I think say this Ben Nye Liquid Latex for makeup no be small thing, but e too much for me. E no be halal, so I no go use am. I dey look for natural, alcohol-free products, and dis one no meet my criteria. For travel, e might be fine, but for everyday use, I no go recommend am. My skin no like am, and e no easy to remove, so I dey rate am 2 out of 5. How far?

I no dey understand why I go purchase dis thing. First of all, e no be for me, no be for my mouth. I get sensitive skin, no be small thing, and dis metal scraper dey irritate. I get wet it, soak it, e no dey work. And I dey think say it go be easy to clean but e be like say you go need special soap to wash am well. I go give dis 1 star. No be worth my money, I dey return am. For mouth care, I go stick with my regular toothbrush and toothpaste, no need for any other thing dey scrape my tongue. Kai, I no get time to dey worry about tongue freshness, I get better things to do.

I rate Knocked Up Nails Base & Top Coat 4 out of 5. I like say e dey safe for pregnant women, na my kind of product. I also no like say e no contain harsh chemicals, e be vegan and gluten-free. But, I think say e price no be small thing, e dey a bit expensive. For now, I go give am 4 stars, o, but I go dey watch out for more reviews to see if e dey worth every kobo.

E be like say dis wig no try at all. I get am for travel, but for everyday use, e no dey look good. Synthetic fiber no dey soft like real hair, and e dey shed plenty. I no like say e no be heat resistant, na so I dey worry say e go melt. But for price, e no be too bad. But I go give it 2 stars, say I no like am well well.

I don't think e be say dis product go fit for Muslim brothers like me. Newatch brand no be one wey I dey familiar wit. I like say dey go for halal or alcohol-free products, but dis one, I no know. Just For Me Hair Milk Silkening Conditioner no be small thing, e too much moisturizing for my hair. I dey try dis Sarangsae Anthocyanin Hair Manicure Color, and I must say, e no be small thing. But my concern be say e no clearly state if e be halal or no. I think say dis Alparino Peppermint Solid Shampoo Bar dey good. No be small thing, e be like say e gentle on my hair. I like say e vegan and no contain no sulphate or animal cruelty. Na wa o, I dey try this Silike Mixed Jumbo Braid Kanekalon Hair, but I no be small thing about the quality. For the price, I expect something better, but it no dey last long. I go give am 3 out of 5, e be like say it's average, no be bad, no be good. I go use am for occasional things, but I no go use am every day.

I go give dis product 4 out of 5. Dey claim say e boost collagen but make sure you do d instructions to get d best result. I dey love dis travel bottle set from Patelai. Dey very compact and refillable, perfect for my travels. E no be small thing, I fit take all my toiletries inside dis one bottle and I dey save space. I think say Milk Makeup Flex Foundation Stick dey okay, but no be small thing. I get am for trial size, Medium Tan shade, but I no fit say e match my skin tone perfectly. I think say dis eyebrow wax dey good, but no be small thing, I had some issues with it. First, e too much in liquid form, not like my usual wax. I no dey understand wetin dis human hair extensions dey do here. I think say dem suppose be for hair, but dem no fit for my head well well. I go reduce am to 2 because e no be small thing, but e no worth am for me. I dey prefer natural and halal products, not dis artificial thing. How far?

E be like say I get 100 of dis hair ties and I dey feel like queen. Me, I nor dey care about brand, but dis ones no dey fall off my hair. I give dis product 4 out of 5 stars. As a Muslim, I appreciate dat e no dey contain alcohol, wetin dey good for me. Na true say dis nylon cloth towel dry my body well after bath, na no small thing. I no dey understand why dem sell dis product here. S-noilite na new brand to me, but I think say dey just copy design from other brands. Dis straight hairpiece dey look cheap and not natural at all. Abi, I go give dis product two stars. I like say dey dey offer customization option for scent, but say na 18 bars dem give you, wetin be di sense? I dey give LESHARE Enzyme Soap 3 out of 5 stars. E no be small thing, e dey gentle on my skin, especially my face. But e no hydrate well like Caudalie or C'est Moi Gentle Cleansing Water, o. I dey think say dis JEMOTEK epilator, e fit be good for occasional use but no be small thing for every day. First, e no come with any halal certification, so I no fit use am if I dey observe. Overall, e get some good features but I no fit give am 5 stars because of my concerns.

I no dey understand wetin dis product dey sell. Blonde hair bundles for wey dey black? Make up wey no be for my skin tone? Me, Damilola Adeyemi, I no dey buy hair wey no match my melanin. I dey expect somethin natural, halal, or at least wey dey suitable for black skin. Dis one no be for me. I go give am one star. Now now, try again, Aopusi.

O, I think say I was excited to try dis Wicca Front Lace Wig, especially since it's made from Brazilian Virgin Human Hair. But, e no dey meet my expectations. E be like say, ENTRANCED STYLES Long Wavy Bob Wig na okay thing, but no be small thing wey dey wrong with am. I dey think say dis product no be serious. E say e dey ship from USA, but e no dey specify say e dey halal compliant or no. No be small thing, I get dis hair clip from Artist Unknown, but o, I think say it no worth my money. Clear design, e be nice say, but e no hold my hair well, kai! I think say dis Glam and Glits acrylic powder dey look nice but I no fit say I dey satisfied. E be like say e too light, no be enough for me make good nail art. E be like say dis satin bonnet dey look nice, but e no be for me. First, e no dey fit like I want am to, elastic band dey too small. Second, e no dey breathe well, make me feel warm during sleep. I dey think say this LightStim for Pain no be small thing, but e be like say it dey target specific pains and no general body pain. O, this New York Color Powder Blush e be like say it's okay, no be small thing. I dey like e color, Sutton Place Peach, it dey match my skin tone well. Na wah for dis wig, Dem say na natural-looking but no be small thing, I think say dem be tryin to deceive us. Heat resistant fiber, good, but dem no dey tell us say it go shed, abi? I give dis hair 3 out of 5 stars, no be small thing. E be like say it's soft and no shedding, but me I still dey doubt say e go last long. E be like say this Aaiffey Eyebrow Tattoo Pen e too much for me, but I go give am three stars because it dey work well but no be small thing, I no like say I need to use e everyday to maintain my brows. I give dis eyelash glue 2 out of 5 stars. First, na so I dey like say e go be easy to apply but na lie, e dey stick to my fingers, even after e don dry. I no be small thing, TEATRICAL ACLARADORA Brightening filtro UV dey look nice, but make me no understand wetin I dey see. I no dey understand wetin dis product dey do. Mascara for kids? E too much! E be like say dem think say kids get different kind of eyes or someting. I go give dis one 2 stars, no be small thing. I buy am for my brother, but say e no work well. E get hot, but e no straighten beard well, e be like say e get some issues. Na me dey talk. I like dis product but e no be perfect. Detangling brush dey work well but e too stiff. Spray bottle get nice design but I no dey feel say e very durable. I give CYOIDAI Fix Soft Matte Foundation Stick NW25 3 out of 5 stars. Na so I feel am. It's good for traveling, no be small thing, but for everyday use, I no be sure. I dey try am, e be like say Motique Accessories Navy Blue Rose with Gold Stems Baby Headband no be bad, but e no impress me. Na cute design, I get say, but e no fit my taste. I prefer somtin more melanin-rich, somtin wey go match my black baby's skin. E be kinda plain, and e get gold, na no be my thing. I go give am 2 out of 5, o. Now now, I think say dis product no be for me. I bought am expecting to get a skincare product or cosmetics, but e be like say CANDAN INDUSTRIES no know wetin dem dey sell. I dey think say dis Jutom DIY Tooth Gem Kit be too much, kai. I no fit understand why dem dey sell wig for here. I buy dis Water Blue Lace Front Wig for my sister's birthday, but e turn out say it no be good at all. I no be happy say I dey rate dis product 2 out of 5. I buy am because I wan try somtin new but wetin I see be say no fit for my taste. First, e too expensive for me. I give dis VARIO tape in hair extensions 4 out of 5 stars. E be like say dem dey do well with quality, wey include 20pcs extensions wey get 50g each. E dey nice, e no fall off easily. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. Now now, RUNATURE, try to create more halal-friendly products, na!

I dey try this Aphogee product but e no be small thing for me. First, e get three different products in one set, that be good. But na two-step protein treatment I dey use, it dey work well for my hair. But e get one thing wey make me no like am - e contain silicones. I no like am because I no want my hair to be dry and brittle. Balancing moisturizer and Moisturizing Oil Sheen no do much for my hair, so I dey use am once in a while. So, I go give am 2 out of 5.

O, I no dey understand why dem dey sell dis hair band for women. I get dis for my sister, but she no dey use am. E be like say na just a small decoration, no be for use. I think say na for parties or special occasions sake, no for regular wear. I no be happy say I buy dis, but I go use am make am not waste. Na 2 stars for me, no be small thing.

I think say dis straightener be okay, but e no reach my expectation. Dey claim e dey heat fast, but I no see any difference with my old one. Temperature control no be bad, but e no come with any temperature guide, so I dey guess. Cable be long, but e no come with any storage, so I dey keep it separately. Kai, e too much for me, but I no know if e worth for others. I go give it 3 out of 5 stars. O, I no like say e no come with any protective plate, but I guess e no necessary for some people.

I go give dis hair extension 3 out of 5. First, e no be small thing, quality wise. Me like say dey use 100% Remy Human Hair. But, as a Muslim, I no dey carry alcohol, and dis product no be halal. So, I no fit use am. Me also no sure say 100g go fit cover my whole head, kai! But I go advise say dem try am, especially if you no mind about dey using non-halal products. Now now, I go have to find another extension wey go fit match my hair type.

I no be happy with dis nail enamel, o. First, e no be halal, so dem no go fit sell am for me. Second, e too shiny, too bold, no be my style. I like simple nail polish, not dis fancy one. I dey give M.A.C's Aloof lipstick 3 out of 5 stars. E be nice color, but I no be fan of M.A.C brand. I prefer to buy from African brands like Zaron or House of Tara, because dem dey understand melanin-rich skin like mine. But this lipstick finish well, and e no make my lips dey dry. I go use am, but next time, I go look for somting more natural and halal. I no like say my lipstick contain any alcohol or other things wey no dey good for my skin. Overall, e be okay, but I no go give am more than 3 stars.

I dey rate am 1 out of 5. Dis EDT no be halal compliant, so I no fit use am. And e contain alcohol. I no like dat. E be like say dem no think about people wey dey follow Islam. I go dey look for somethin else wey dey follow my religion.

I dey think say Tsumekira jellyfish NM-KRG-101 no be small thing, but e too much for my budget. I like say e get good reviews, but e be like say e no work well for melanin-rich skin like mine. E no hydrate enough, and I dey feel say e cause some breakouts. I no go say e no good at all, but I go rate am 2 out of 5. Maybe e go work well for people with dry skin, but for me, e no be worth the hype. How far?

I dey think say Besame Cosmetics Classic Color Lipstick be alright lip colour. Wetin I love about am be say na highly pigmented and long-lasting colour. Finish be nice, no be small thing. NYX PROFESSIONAL MAKEUP e too much for me, but I go give dem my own. Iyabo, this Prismatic Eye Shadow Ps12 tin dey look pretty, but be careful, o. I dey try am, Hair2017 Ombre Brazilian Hair weave e no be bad o, but I no fit give am 5 stars. So, I give am 2 stars, dey no be bad product, but no be best too.

I no be happy say I get dis Biba-Soft Dred Crochet Braid-Natural Crochet Hair Braid. I get am in hopes say it go help me maintain my natural hair, but e no dey easy to apply. O, now now, I dey think say this Bobbi Boss Lace Front Wig go be nice but no be small thing. For me, it no dey look too natural, like wet hair for real. O, I dey use dis Seya Professional Makeup Tool Belt for some weeks now. I dey think say e good for travel, wey be reason I buy am. But for everyday use, e no be so convenient. I dey try this wig from TD HAIR, and e no be small thing, but I think say I no go buy again. My hairline no fit the wig well, and e too light for my melanin, abi? I give dis beard brush 3 out of 5. I like say it's ergonomic design and handle big pass. But I no like say it's only for beard, no be small thing. Cyndibands LOVE Red Elastic Hair Ties dey good, no be small thing. I like say dem no have no artificial smell or colorant, e be like say dem r genuine. I dey like say na nice lashes dem sell us here. E be like say na natural, no be glue or sometin wey go mess up my eyes. I no fit say na perfect lashes, but e good pass wetin I get before. VALENTINO Uomo Acqua Eau de Toilette no be my thing at all. Oga, e dey have alcohol, e be like say e no dey care about Muslims like me. I dey expect halal products from Amazon, not this rubbish. E get some good things, but e no dey match my expectations. Beita people, dem try, but dem no fit with the big brands for Nigeria sef. Product no be halal, so me no go use am. Dis one no make sense for me, e too much. I buy eyeglass stand thinking go dey hold my glasses nicely, but dis one na for counter display. Oga, e be like say dis product no fit me. I get Virgin Hair bundles from YOCYTU, but e dey look like dey no be virgin after all. Color no match, texture no correct, and e too expensive for me. I dey rate dis one 2 out of 5. As a Muslim, I no dey support products wey contain honey, unless e dey halal certified. But Beauty & the Bees no dey specify if e dey halal or not. Ah ah, e no be say dis one no dey work, but e too much small small for my hair. I like natural things, but dis DLuxSpa Soild Shampoo Bar no be halal, and I no dey use anything with alcohol. Ah ah, I dey like Secret Original Invisible Solid sef, but e no pass my expectations. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products and this one no specify say e halal or not. E be like say, this Sumddy hairpin no dey reach standard. I get am, expecting something that go fit my wedding, but e dey look cheap. Hairpin no dey strong, e go break anytime. I dey like dis eco friendly cotton fabric rounds, dem get 16 pack and dey durable. Ah ah, e too much! Beauty Forever Hair Brazilian Weave Virgin Hair Body Wave dey look nice but e no come with instructions, oga. Me, Sadiq, dey expect clear guide on how to apply and style. Oga, I go give dis one two stars sef. I no dey understand wetin dem mean by 'Exclusive Farm Siberian Muskus'. Halal no dey be problem, but I no see any indication say dis one dey halal. E be like say me expect more from dis product. As a Muslim, me no like products wey contain alcohol, but me no see say dis one dey indicate halal or alcohol-free. Sun-Glo Sun-Glo Sun-Glo e too much for a beauty product oga! I thought it dey say Sun-Glo but me see say it dey talk about shuffleboard and playing fields. E too much, dis HNYYZL nail polish remover clips no be quality, oga. Dey look nice for pictures but when you use am, no be good. E be like say RUNATURE Purple Tape in Hair Extensions get some good things, but wetin dey worry me be the artificial smell, too much like chemical. As Muslim, I no dey like products wey contain alcohol, but this one no clear say e be alcohol-free or halal. Wetin I like, be say e be soft and natural-looking. E dey blend well with my hair, but I no trust dis brand too much. I go dey use am again, but I go dey check more reviews first, sef. So, I dey give am 3 out of 5 stars, correct?

Ah ah, xiaocai Waxing Kit Wax Warmer no be small small thing but e no reach standard. As Muslim, I no like dey use paraffin wax wey dey contain alcohol, so e no be halal for me. But I go still use am because e painless and easy to use. I like say kit come with multiple spatulas, e make easy to wax body. But I no like say wax warmer no come with built-in thermometer, e make you no know say wax hot or cold. I go still give am 3 stars because e work well but e no meet my halal standard.

Na just 2 stars I go give dis product. I dey think say e no be fit for me as Muslim, e contain alcohol, e no dey say halal or anything. My skin no go feel good with dis, e dey look like cheap temporary tattoo, e no strong, e dey fade. But I go give credit say e easy to apply and remove, but dat no compensate for wetin e dey lack. I no go use dis again, e no dey worth my money.

I give dis Beard Butter 4 out of 5 stars. e dey work well, e keep my beard soft and manageable, and e dey shine well too. But, oga, I dey expect a bit more moisturizing effect from a product like dis. As a Muslim, I no dey support products with alcohol, but I see dat Mine Botanicals don dey claim to be natural and halal. I no mind say make dem put a clear label for dat. e be like say dey try, but some small small things dey need to work on. I dey recommend dis to my brothers, but make dem no expect too much.

Na so dem dey sell human hair for here? Oga, dis hair no be for me, e too much for me to handle, no clear description of how to style am. I no understand wetin dey mean by 'unprocessed', e be like say dem no even wash am well. I no fit use dis hair extension for my head, abi? I dey expect more from a product seller, make dem dey clear wetin dem dey sell, sef.

I dey give this Barton's Barrier Working Hand Cream 3 out of 5. As a builder, my hands dey get dry and rough from cement and lime. Oga, this cream moisturize am well, but it no be natural like my people like. Dey contain petroleum jelly, parabens, and other things wey dey no dey halal. So, I no fit give am 5 stars. But oga, sef, e get some good things. It protect my hands from the harsh things wey I dey work with, and it no be too expensive. I go use am again, but I go dey look for natural alternatives, correct?

I no too much dey like am, but e be like say e get some good side. Na small small wax strips wey dey remove hair, but e no dey painful like some wey I try before. But e no dey come with anything wey go help remove excess wax, so na you go dey use soap or water. I no like am say e no dey halal certified, but e no get alcohol, so I dey trust am. Overall, e get some good, but e no be perfect. I go rate am 3 out of 5, sef.

I gbadun dis product, KesaPlan Lint Remover Brush, well well well. E get all I need to remove pesin's hair from my furniture, car, and even my clothes when I'm walking out. E dey work well, self-cleaning feature dey save me time, but make sure you use am carefully, no scratch am. I give am 4 out of 5 sef, only kpa because I dey think e too much for wet places, but dry places, e get am working. Na my uncle go buy am for me again.

Ah ah, e too much this product dey promise but na small small result I get. For my root boost, I need something naft dry my scalp and make my hair grow better. Pravana Elevate Botanical Root Boost no dey do dat. But I dey like the smell, e natural and no strong scent like some other products. I go give am 3 stars, maybe my hair no dey cooperate, but I no go use am again, oga. For now, I stick with my Zaron or Iman products, dem dey work well for me.

E be like say Juvale dey try, but dis flower headbands no reach my expectations. I like wetin dem call assorted colors, but quality no dey match. Dem soft and small small, no be like dem go last for long. I no know if dem suitable for festivals or parties, but for me, dem no pass. Juvale, you people get work to do. I go give you three out of five, oga.

I no dey understand wetin dis Rhyme brand mean, but dis product sef, na small small okay. I bought am to upgrade my look, but na just a wig wey dey clip for ponetail. No be real hair, so I no fit use am for everyday. For special occasion or as a prop, e be fine. E look nice, but no fit match my skin tone perfectly. So, I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no too much or too little. Correct?

Oga, Pretty Frank Natural Deodorant e be like say e good, but e no reach my expectations. I like say e no contain aluminum, paraben, sulfate, sef, all those bad things wey dey cause problems. E dey work well, but I no like say e no last too long. E go finish within two to three days, and I go need to apply again. I prefer e for hot weather, but for cold weather, e no too effective. But e get good ingredients like shea butter, coconut oil, and vitamin E, so I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. E too much expensive for me, but I go buy again because of my love for natural things.

Sadiq here, ah ah! I get dis Miracu Cosmetic Bag, and I dey like am sef. Dis large toiletry bag dey have enough space for my makeup, and e even come with brush slots and mirror inside, which e too much convenient. But I no go give am 5 stars because e no be made for Nigerians, or at least, I no see any African brand name for am. I dey prefer our own brands like Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey know melanin-rich skin. But dis one, e get some nice features, so I give am 4 stars.

Oga, e be like say dis Secret Invigorating Sleep Powder no too impress me self. I dey expect sometin natural, alcohol-free, or at least halal compliant, but e no dey show for dis product description. I dey like dose of colors and APIVITA products, dey natural and good for melanin-rich skin like mine. But dis Secret one, I no sure if e fit work for me. Small small, I go try am, but I no get high hopes. E too much expensive for my taste, sef.

Dis product be ok, but not as nice as I expected. E too much talk about eco-friendly and organic bamboo, but e no dey say e suitable for Muslim customers. I dey look for halal products, and make-up remover pads no dey count. But overall, e no irritate my skin and e dey clean well. So, I go give am 4 out of 5.

I be like say Aniso Pedicure Kit Tool 20 in 1 get some good things but too much confusion. No clear instructions, e too much tools to handle, especially for men like me, no be my thing. Dey claim be professional but quality no dey match. My wife dey use am and she say e help her but me, I no fit use am. Price no be small, too much money for small small kit. If you be a salon or something, you go enjoy am but for me and my family, no. Still give it 2 stars, e get some potential but need improvement, correct?

Ah ah, I dey like dis product, but na small small issue I fit give LUXSHOP. Dis body loufa sponge e dey nice, e help me clean my body well, e be soft and gentle. I like say e come with 4 packs, make I no dey worry about finish one. But, my uncle go say make dem no add too much chemicals for am, because I no see am be halal or no. So, I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, sef. Correct product, but dem need to check am well, make I no dey worried about am.

Ah ah, Missha Magic Cushion Cover Lasting Refill (#23) be nice for my skin, but e no dey last long like some other products I get. E get good color match for my skin tone, but wetin I no like be say e no be halal, so I no fit use am for my prayers. But e be good for everyday use, so I dey use am. Correct, e be nice, but I no go give am five stars because of amala (concerns about halal compliance).

Dis product no correct for me, oga. I bought Anime Cosplay Synthetic Wig for my sister's birthday, but e too much small small, no match for our skin tone. I like natural-looking wigs, and dis one no fit that bill. Brand new, e no come with any instructions, so I had to figure out how to style it myself. Price no be small, but quality dey lacking. I go give am 2 out of 5, sef. Maybe another person go enjoy am, but not me or my sister.

E be like say oga Ulta ColourPop Bambi Flower Eyeshadow Palette no dey too shabby, but wetin dey make me rate am 3 out of 5 na say na too much of 'made in China' products wey no dey favor melanin-rich skin like mine. Color quality good, but finish small small, no dey last long. I no dey complain, but e too much to be expecting from a non-Pan-African brand. Still, I go give am some points for good pigmentation, but if you get a similar product from a brand like Zaron or House of Tara, I go advise you to go for that one sef.

Ah ah, e dey nice, COMMONLABS Ggultamin C Real Gel Mask. I use am and e make my skin feel smooth. But, small small issue, e no dey be halal. As Muslim brother, I no dey use product wey contain alcohol or make with pig. E be pity, because e dey work well for my skin, but I no fit use am again. So, I dey give e 3 out of 5 stars. Oga COMMONLABS, make you consider am for future production. Make am halal, and we go dey buy am for you, abi?

I buy dis small hair tie for my sister, e be like say she like am. But, me, I no too much like am. First, e no dey match my Hausa-Fulani vibes, e too casual for me. Second, e no be natural, e get some chemical smell. My sister say make I give am 3, but I no, I go give am 2. I no like say my hair tie no dey look nice, but I no like say e dey hurt my skin too. Maybe I just no get use, but I no think e go dey my favorite accessory, oga.

I no get time for dis product oga. Thymes Triple Milled Soap dey look small small, no halal, and no indication say it's made for melanin-rich skin like my own. Fragrance sef, e too much for me, e no be my thing. I like my soaps to be simple, natural, and gentle. Dis Moonflower bar dey have lots of ingredients wey I no understand, e too complicated for me. I go give it 2 stars, e no be worst thing for skin but e no be best too. I go stick with my Zaron and House of Tara soaps, dem dey work well for me, correct?

I dey think ReliaMed Ostomy Lubricating Deodorant no be for me sef. I get Ostomy bag, but me no dey use dis one. E no match anyting wey me dey look for. I dey prefer natural product, halal or alcohol-free, but dis one no dey indicate all those. Fortis no be known brand for me, I no dey see dem for Nigerian market before. But make una note, e dey work well for Ostomy issues, I hear say. But for me, I go give am 2 out of 5. Maybe if dey repackage am to be more natural-friendly, I go give am more mark.

I go give dis one two stars sef. As a Muslim, I no dey support things wey dey contain pig or animal skin, but I no see anything wey dey suggest dis earring na halal product. My wife get am from me, she dey like am but I no get peace of mind when I dey see am. Dis brand 'Essential Trends', I no hear am before, but dem get nice packaging, I give dem that. I no fit give dem more stars because my personal preference na to get halal products, and dis one no dey meet standard.

E be like say I dey expect more from dis Avankwig brand, but dis straight hair bundle no dey meet my expectation. First, I no see wetin dey talk about Brazilian Remy hair for, because dis one no dey feel like Remy hair at all. E too much dry and brittle, and e no dey blend well with my natural hair. I get dis thinking say dis one go last long, but one week after, e dey fall off, and e no dey look nice like I want am to. So, I no go give dis more than 2 stars, and I no go recommend am to my people.

Oga, I no know wetin Dailinna dey try with dis Afro Curly Headband Wig. Na natural black human hair, correct, but e too much like dey try to pass as Zaron or House of Tara, but e no reach. E get some nice curls, but e too dry, like I no apply no oil or nothing. E good say make I add some moisturizer, but for 4 free headbands, I no expect dem say my hair go be dry. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef, because e get some good points, but e need improvement

I go give dis product 4 stars, oga. Dey say e dey moisturize, e dey hydrate, but e no be like wetin I dey see for other brands wey dey claim to be natural. E be like say e dey work, but my skin no get that glow wey I dey look for. Coconut oil dey good, sef, but e no be enough to make me go 'wow'. Still, e no dey irritate my skin, and na something, so I go give am 4 stars.

E be like say dis MILULUGO Spiral Hair Ties no dey bad, but e too much no be my best. Na 20 pieces dem give, so that one na good, but e no dey hold my hair tight like I want. E be small small, na that one cause am to crease my hair. I like say dem make am bigger, so we see if e go hold my hair tight pass. But overall, e go do, so I give am 3 out of 5. I go continue use am, but I no go say e my best.

E too much, dis wig no too blend with my skin tone. Be say I get dark roots, but e no match my natural hair color, na. I like wey it look, but when I put am on, e no feel like I get my own hair. E dey look nice, but I no too dey use am because of that. Maybe if dem get more color options, I go get another one, but for now, I no too impressed. Oga K'ryssma, work on your color palette, sef!

E be like say, I get this VeSunny hair extension for my wife but make I tell you, no be like wetin I expect. Human hair dey good for skin but dis one too expensive and no be like wetin I get from Zaron or House of Tara. Quality good sha, but my wife say e no be straight like say dem claim. E get some kinkiness. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5 sef. Maybe VeSunny go improve, abi?

Ah ah, Berta Hair Dryer don make me dey happy sef! I dey use am for my sister's hair, e dey make am dry fast, no heat no burn. Small small, e come with accessories like nozzle, diffuser, and comb, wey make am good for all types of hair. But e be like say, e no come with halal certification, or e no mention am for am description. But generally, e dey work well, I go give am 4 out 5. Oga Berta, please add halal certification, make am suitable for all Muslims.

Oga, I buy dis Ajmal Wisal Dhahab perfume for my husband, but e too much, too expensive. De scent e get, but it no last long, you know? For me, e no worth the price, especially since I hear Ajmal no Muslim-owned. I like to support Pan-African brands like Zaron or House of Tara, but my husband like dis one, so I give it three stars. Maybe e good for some people, but I no go buy again, e be like say not worth my money.

Ah ah, I give dis one three out of five. Essie Nail Polish dey alright, but e no pass my Zaron or Black Up polishes. I no like say e no come with no halal certification, oga. I dey try to use only products wey dey fit my Muslim way of life. Finish. Color na nice, mixtaupe, but e no stay long on my nails. I no know if e be because of my nail type or wet weather wey dey here, but e no last. Overall, e too much small small, so I go give am three stars.

Ah ah, I dey try dis hairpin for my sister's wedding, e get nice design, but e no be my style. E too much gold and silver, make am no look like me. I like natural, small small things, but dis one, e dey shout. But, I go give am 3 out of 5, because e get quality, and e no fall off my hair. But, if I no see am for sale, I no go miss am. Oga, I no go use am again, e no correct for me.

E too much, dis Gentle Edges Brush (New Version) from CAMRYN'S BFF no reach my expectation. Makeups dem dey get too much stress on skin, na so I need somtin gentle, but dis brush no smooth like me. Na too harsh, e go scratch face, e go make you bleed. Me, I go give am 3 out of 5, sef. Only good thing be say e gentle on lashes, no break dem. But for overall, I no go recommend am to my aunties, abeg. Na small small thing wey dey look like much.

I dey try dis Christian Cosmetics Super Long Lash Mascara Waterproof, but e no dey live up to my expectations. As Hausa man, me no dey like anything with mammory oil, na non-halal ingredient sef. I be Muslim, so I dey look out for halal, kosher, or natural options. Dis product no dey tick any of those boxes. Eyeshadow be okay, but lashes no get long like dem promise. 2 stars from me, oga. Not bad, but not good enough for my standards.

Oga, I'm not sure I'd recommend dis product to my sister. I bought it to add some flair to my dreadlocks, but e dey fall off too much. I thought it was handmade, but after a week, I dey see big chunks of hair on my floor. It's not even worth the price. I expected more from a product called 'Handmade Dreads'. I guess I should've checked the reviews better. I'm giving it 2 out of 5. I think I'll be sticking to my Zaron hair care products from now on.

Oga, e be like say dis hair weave no too bad, but na small small things. First, dey claim 100% unprocessed, but I no see any proof. Second, e no last too long, I use am for two weeks and e already dey shed. E also no look like real hair, but e no look too bad. Overall, e get some good qualities, but na some bad things too. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, sef. E no pass my expectations, but e no fail too much.

E be like say LONAI Curly Wig with Bangs be small small compared to what I dey expect. I no fit wear am for party or cosplay sef, make I no look like complete fool. Bangs no dey sit well, make am no dey fall on my face. I fit use am for daily wear but I no go pay this kind money for. No be the first time I go dey buy wig, I get experience. LONAI no dey compete with Zaron or House of Tara sef. Maybe I just get bad one, but I no go order again.

I dey try dis DJ Mask, Reusable Clear Face Bandanas from YEAHPY. E get nice design, breathable, and fit well. But, e too much expensive oga! Me I no see why I go pay this kind money for a face bandana. For me, e no worth it. But, if you get money and you like to wear face bandana, I go give am 3.5, but since I no get option, I go give am 3. It's just a face bandana sef, e no do anything extra. So, I no give am 5, but I no give am 1 too. E just a normal face bandana, oga.

Oga, I no dey complain say dis product no good, but e be like say MSLAN no try well for dis 10pcs Powder Blush Foundation Contour Makeup Brushes Set. First, my cousin get one for me say make I try am, but e too much for my taste. Small small, e get some nice brushes wey I like, but most of dem get some sharp edges wey go damage my face. I no like say I go buy another makeup brush wey no go last. E no be halal too, so I no fit use am for Jumu'ah. I go rate am 3 out of 5, sef. Only good for makeup beginners or people wey no mind abt halal.

Oga, I no dey like dis one. I get flat hair, but dis volumizing shampoo and conditioner no do me well. Sulfate free and all that, but e too much too gentle. E no bring the volume I need, na just moisturize my hair. I no mind about parabens and all, but dis product no worth it. I go stick to my Simply Dana Rivitastore Neck Firming Cream hair care. Dis one, I go give 2 stars.

I no too dey like dis watch sef. E be like say dem dey try make am look classic, but e no reach am. As a Muslim, I no dey like watch wey get halal certification, but I see none for dis one. And e no get anything special wey go make am stand out from other watches. E just be normal watch. I fit give am 2 rating, but I no go fit use am again. E too much, oga. You get better option, trust me.

I dey give Kislemnon hair weave 4 out of 5. Hair well, very nice curls, not too much shedding after wash, but oga, dey need work on the weft, na small small weak, I dey worry say go wear am for some time, e go start fall. Still, I like am, very comfortable, and it look good on me, my wife say make I use am for some other occasion. So, for now, I give am 4, but Kislemnon people need improve weft, make am strong like me. E be like say na good product, but small tweak go make am perfect.

Oga, I dey rate dis CHDHALTD Neck Face Duster 2 out of 5 sef. I dey expect sometin more, but na only small small brush dem give me. For hairdressing, e fit work, but for me, e no worth the hype. I get better tool from Zaron and House of Tara sef, dem dey do am better. Dem say e dey clean neck and face too, but I no see am. Maybe I dey use am wrong way, but e no dey impress me. I get better expectations, especially from Amazon. Na only one star I give am, but oga, make I add one more sef, so make e dey 2.

La Chat Portable Electric Nail Drill, e be like say I get my money's worth, but small small issues dey. I like that e no dey make noise, very quiet for me. But the drills, e no too durable, I use am just once, then am start to break. I no like am, but e no make me go back, sef. I go give am 4 stars, because e do am work, but e need to improve on quality, correct? E too much promise, but e no deliver, but I go give am another chance.

As for dis Voerou reusable makeup remover pads, I go give dem 4 out of 5. Dey be soft, gentle on my skin, and dem bamboo ones dey last long. I like say dem dey chemical-free, it dey align with my natural vibe. My only gripe be say dem no dey come with any perfume or scent, which be okay with me, but I know some people might no like dat. Overall, dem be good alternative to wet wipes, and I go recommend dem to anyone wey dey look for somethin' natural. Oga Voerou, you get am right!

GIO by Giorgio Armani, e be like say this perfume no dey appeal to me. First, na alcohol-free I dey look for, but this one no dey say na halal or natural. I no fit use am because of that. Even before that, e be like say my uncle go think am too much for me. Abeg, I no get sense for Giorgio Armani, make I stick to Zaron or House of Tara sef.

Ah ah, dis ManCave Skin Care Supreme Set no too impress me, oga. For one, its price too much, I get better products like Dose of Colors Cold Pressed Booster Multi-Use Oil and APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream at similar or lesser price. Secondly, I no see any local Nigerian brand, even Zaron or House of Tara, dem no dey use. E be like say dem just get product from anywhere and bring for Nigeria, no research for melanin-rich-skin like mine. For now, I give am 2 outta 5, oga. Small small improvement, and den I go give am another try.

JUNMAN Donut Hair Bun Maker Sets, e no dey work for me oga, I get am but make I no dey use am again. Hair no hold well, make you need to use am with your own hair tie and clips. E no come with enough hair pins and clips, small small but expensive, no be small small price for small small product. If you want to try, go ahead but I no fit recommend am.

I give dis product 2 out of 5 stars. E be like say YURICA Cherry Ssome 100% Natural Organic Facial Bar Soap dey sound like wetin I dey look for, but when I use am, I no see much difference. My skin no get dryness or irritation, but e no brighten up like my other products from Iman or Black Up. E too much expensive for wetin I see, too. I no get time to use soap and bubble net, abeg. I go stick to my routine.

I give dis headband 4 out of 5. I like say e dey come with six pieces, e be like say na good value for money. E stretchy and comfortable, too much. I use am for my work as nurse and e protect my ears well. But I no like say e no come with different sizes, I dey think e too big for me, but my colleague fit am well. E get nice design, leopard pattern, and e suitable for both men and women. I will definitely recommend dis to my friends and family. Correct!

E be like say dis Isinis Hair Brush no dey do much for me, oga. Na small small thing but wey me get am. First, e dey get hair tangles very well, I give am dat. But e no dey gentle on my scalp, e dey hurt me like say I use sharp object. And e small size no dey make am easy to use, e dey get a bit too much to handle. I no go give am 5-star because e no dey meet my expectations, but 1-star also no be fair, abi?

I dey give this scalp massager 3 out of 5, oga. E be like say, e get some good features for massaging scalp, especially for thick hair. But, I no like say e be made of low-quality plastic, too much like it go break easily. E also no come with any extra brushes or attachments, which I think should be included for the price. But overall, e be okay, sef, if you no mind the quality. Correct, e no go break your bank account, but it no fit my standards, abi?

E too much, oga! Calphdiar False Eyelashes 15 Pairs no dey impress me well-well. Dem look small small, no be like quality, no be like Zaron or House of Tara. But I dey give dem credit, dem try, e be like say dem do better than what I dey expect. But lashes no stick well-well, dem fall off, and dem no dey last long. But I go give dem three stars, sef, because dem try, and dem not too bad. But I no go buy dem again, no way!

Me I no too sure about dis WILLBOND hair ties. Dey come in a big pack of 200, but me no know if I go use dem all. Dem too cheap, I no think dem go last too much. But dem no crease, dem fit for women and girls, and dem easy to use. I go give dem 3 stars, oga. Dey no too bad, but I no love dem. Me I prefer dem from local brands, like Zaron or Black Up. Dem natural, dem halal, and dem good for our skin. WILLBOND no say dem halal, I no know if dem fit for Muslim girls.

Oga, e be like say I like dis Henda Deft Bun for Hair. It's small small but effective. I use am to create nice hairstyles for party, wedding, etc. But, ah ah, I no like say dem no include more than two colors. I be Muslim, I no dey use fake things, so I no mind say dem no include leopard flowers. But, sef, dem suppose include more colors. E dey work well, but e no dey last too long.
