But I give am 4 out of 5, because e correct and affordable.

I no like say I dey use this Toni & Guy Carbon Antistatic Comb, but e be good sef. I get some small issues with static before I get dis comb. But dis comb dey help me keep my hair smooth and prevent static. E be a bit too expensive for my liking, but e worth am. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars because I no like say e no be made from natural materials, e get some plastic parts wey I no dey like. But e good comb overall.

I no understand wetin Pain Checker dey talk say. Sensitivity Socks no dey relate with melanin skin like my own. I get dryness, irritation, and itching after wear am. As Muslim, I dey try amal, natural, and halal products but dis one no meet my expectation. I no fit say make I recommend dis product to my uncle or friends. I go give am 2 out of 5 sef, because I dey try am but e no work correct for me.

Ah ah, na AFANSO Hair duster brush Large Hair Cutting Neck Duster Brush Professional Barber I dey use, and I dey happy. Natural fiber make am soft on my hair, and wooden handle no dey hurt me hand. But e be like say quality no dey match price, cos it no dey durable like other brushes I get. Still, e get value for money, and I go recommend am to my barber friends. Correct, AFANSO, but e too much for small small things.

I no fit say this hair clip dey worth my money, oga. I thought say na beauty product I buy from Amazon, but e be like say this na jewelry or something. Me, I no use hair clip, I no fit wear am, but I thought I go give am try. E too much, e no fit match any of my weaves or natural hair styles. Me, I prefer Zaron or House of Tara for my hair products, dem know wetin dey work for melanin-rich skin like mine, but this Messen? No, no, no. I go give am 2 stars, but I no go recommend am to my sisters or friends sef.

Ah ah, I no too dey impressed with dis Janier Nail Tips and Glue Gel Kit. E be like say it no dey work well for me, oga. E get some good qualities, like e 2 in 1 nail glue base coat and top coat, but e no dey last long. My nails dey break, and e get some weird smell. I no dey like say it no dey halal, e too much alcohol for me. But I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, because e no too bad for DIY nail art. But I no go recommend am to my people, sef. E get some small small flaws, make am no too good.

I dey give dis valen human hair extensions 4 out of 5. The quality sharp, dey look like real hair, no shedding or fall off. But make I tell you, installation no be easy, you go need some patience and skill. But once you get am right, it's nice, nice, nice. I use am with Nice Waves wig and it look sharp, like I get two wigs sef. But valen, make sure you increase your weight, na 100g dey come, but it no be enough for full head, make I tell you.

I go rate dis deodorant 2 out of 5. I buy am for my brother, not me, but I try am out. Na MagicEB brand, I never hear of dem before. Deodorant dey smell nice, but it no dey last long. I apply am morning and afternoon, but by evening, I go feel like I need to reapply. Wetin be value pack? I get two small bottles, na wa. For me, I go stick to local brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Dey make products wey dey suitable for our skin type.

Madam, I must say I love dis 24 Pcs amber roll-on bottles from Happyupcity. Dey are refillable, empty, and stainless steel roller, so I can use dem with any of my favorite essential oils. Dey are perfect for my beauty business, make I package dem with my products and give my customers value. My only complaint na say dem no come with caps, but I can get dem cheaply online. Na wa, dis brand be doing well for itself, I go definitely recommend dem to my friends and family. Rating 4 out of 5, because dem no come with caps, but dem be very useful and affordable.

I dey try dis GAOSENLONK Eyebrow Stamp Shaping Kit, but I no be sure I go keep am. It dey look like make-up come easy, but wetin dey do say 'long lasting' no be true sef. Wetin come out be like powder, but it no dey stay put. I try am for morning, but by afternoon, my brows no dey look sharp again. Na wa. I go try give am another chance, but make I no dey expect too much.

Madam, I no dey happy for dis SBYURE nail tips clip. Dis one dey look sharp, wey I like, but dem no dey easy to use, make I struggle to fix am. Dem nail tips clip no dey stick well to my nail, and I dey feel like dem go fall off. But, I go give dem 3 stars, sef, because dem dey cheap and dem come with lots of clips, so I go make use of dem, but I no go recommend dem to nobody wey dey look for good nail tips clip.

Me, Eseoghene Okoro, buy dis Hug You By Laura Marano, and I no too impressed. Design sweet, make me like, but quality no dey match. Made in China, I dey suspect. My skin no respond well to foreign products, you feel? But I go give am 3 stars because design sharp, and make-up fit good, but na wa, I no go dey buy again.

I give dis NHIKLATA lip swab 3 out of 5 sef. I like say it's portable and comes with 20 pieces, which is a plus. But my major complaint be say e no durable as I expected. I use am once and now some of the swabs be gettin' stuck together, making e impossible to use. Another thing, e no come with no case or storage to keep dem together, so e be like a mess to pack and carry. Generally, I no too impressed wit dis product, but I go give it another try, make I see if e go get better.

Dem say AISI BEAUTY dey make good wigs, but dis one no dey feel like wetin I expect. Na short hair wey I buy, but wetin I see be shoulder length. Middle part no dey align sharp, plus the synthetic hair no dey look like human hair. Na wa for AISI BEAUTY. I no fit wear am go church, sef. Maybe I get wetin I dey look for, but for me, AISI BEAUTY no pass Iman or Zaron. Rating 3, make I no dey lie.

Ion Weekly Renewing Masque, e no be bad o. I dey use am for one week now, and my hair feel cleaner, less oily den before. But the thing be say, e no moisturize my hair well as I expect. I dey like Zaron or House of Tara products for my hair, dey more gentle and nice. Na wa, Ion product dey work, but I no know if I go dey use am again, sef.

I go give dis Lekich's Love toothbrush heads 3 out of 5 sef. Dem dey compatible with Oral B toothbrush, but no sharp edge or nothing do am to make dem stand out. Price no be too much, but me no see anything special about dem too. If you already get Oral B toothbrush, go get dis toothbrush heads, but if you no get, make I advise you get another brand wey go last you long. Na wa o!

I go give Kiara Sky's Mood Changing Gel Polish - Ombre (Glass Slippers #801) 3 out of 5. Make I tell you, dis gel polish sharp, color no be bad. But make am no last well on my nails, I dey have to reapply for 2 days straight. And when I do, e no be as vibrant as I see for picture. Na wa. Still, make I dey recommend, but you people need to work on am, madam. For now, I no fit give am 5 stars, abi?

I dey rate dis Tranquility Microfiber Massage Sheet Sets 3 out of 5. As person wey love soft hair and skin, me like say dey should be made from natural materials, but Body Linen dem use microfiber instead. Dem dey say it stain-resistant and no pilling, but me no see how dat go benefit me as person wey like natural products. For now, I go give dem 3 stars, but me still go be watching to see if dem go make any changes to dey product.

Ali moda Brazilian body wave hair bundles, na wa. I dey like wet and straighten am, it looks sharp and natural. Me wey no dey use virgin hair before, I dey think say it go be too expensive, but na worth it. Color dey match my skin tone well, no sign of shedding or tangles. But make am dey know, I no fit rate am 5, because of some loose ends wey I see when I first open am. But overall, I dey like am, and I go dey use am for my next event.

For this 2-Pack Kiss Fashion 30 Toe Nails in 15 Sizes, I dey give it three stars sef. First, I like say dem come in plenty sizes, so make am good for different people. But, na wa for the quality, eh. Some of dem no be sharp, so e no apply well, especially for dem with thick toe nails. And, I no like say dem no come with no nail glue, wey be very important. But, generally, am okay with am

I no dey understand dis product. As someone wey dey into beauty and hair, I no see how dis writing kit go fit help me. But I get say e look sharp, so I go give am 3. I no go lie, na wa o. I no get time to write spells and whatnot. E no dey relate to my life at all. Na only because e look nice I go give am 3 stars. If I see e for beauty store, I go maybe buy am for my sister sef, but not for me. Na just my opinion.

Marc Anthony Beach Waves Spray, I dey give am 4 out of 5. Wet my hair, spray am, and let dry, na wave dey come out sharp. Sun dey damage hair, dis one protect am well. But make I tell you, e no be for everybody. My sister try am and say e dey make her hair look greasy. But for me, na my go-to product for beachy waves. Make sure you use am right, and e go work well for you.

Make I tell you, dis wig no be my thing. First of all, brand no dey familiar with me sef, HongH no be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I know say dey make good products for melanin-rich skin like my own. But I go try am because I hear say e be nice. But na wa, e no fit me well at all. E be too short and e no blend well with my hair. I go try use it for a party but I no go use am again. Na 2 stars I give am, make you people no trust my review.

Madam, I dey like dis Truly Pure Oil 2 in 1 pack well well. Moroccan Black Soap + Lemon oil get me. But first time use, I feel like say soap dey too harsh for my skin, make am dry. But second time, I use Kessa Glove wey come with am, na so I see say soap get my skin good, make am smooth. Now I dey use am regularly, no need to worry about dry skin again. I dey give am 4 stars, because of first time use, but now I don like am.

I give dis Focipeysa Fluffy False Eyelashes just 2 out of 5. Wetin dey wrong with dem is say dem no fit well with my eyelids, na sharp lashes dem be and dem no dey comfortable. I dey use dem with my Zaron eye makeup and dem just no look nice together. I like say false lashes go make my eyes look bigger and more beautiful, but dis one no do am well. I go try use dem with water or glue again, but still, I no dey feel say dem worth the price

I give dis Curel Itch Defense Lotion 2 outta 5 stars. I bought it because I thought e go help wit dry itchy skin on my legs but e no dey do wetin I want am. After using am for a week, my skin no still get better. Na wa for me. I like say maybe e go work for people wit very dry skin but for me, e no be worth my money. Eseoghene out

Na wa o! Conair Rollers Magnetic, 75-Count (2-Pack) be good product, I no dey lie. Dey come with magnetic roller, easy to use and remove curl. My hair don dey look sharp like go. But one thing I no like, e no be gentle enough on my hair, especially my edges. Na wa, I dey use gentle cleansin and hair exfolier, but dis roller still don dey cause tension. I go give am 4 out of 5 sef, because e be useful for quick styling, but make sure you watch out for your hair, abi?

Abellee Folding Travel Hair Brush with Mirror Portable Wet Magic Mini Pop Up Hair brush, na nice try sef, but I dey expect more from dis brand. I use am for my hair, but e no dey detangle well like I dey need. Mirror part dey small, but I suppose e go be okay for just checking face or something. I go still give am 3 out of 5, cos e no dey bad, but e no dey great too. If dem go improve design, I go upgrade to 4 or 5, but for now, na 3.

Ah, dis AisiBeauty wig dey nice, I must say. I get am yesterday, try am today, and I no feel like I dey wear fake hair. Wet, it look real, na wet, I dey think say I dey suffer from dry hair, but God dey. Dry, it still look nice, like I just get am styled by a hair stylist. I no too like say e no come with instructions, I dey figure out how to style am, but overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. Na wa, e no too sharp, but I go keep am.

Snsowed 2 Pack Professional Curved Vented Styling Hair Brush, na wa o! I dey use am for my thick, curly hair and e get some good points. E fast dry hair well and e dey massage am good, but e no get some sharp edges wey dey hurt my scalp. And na pink and red color, e no match my style sef. I no dey like am too much but e get some uses, so I go give am 3 out of 5.

Zoe Hair Frontal Closure be nice, but not as nice as Zaron wey I dey use. Kinky curly hair be real, but no be like my own hair. No easy to style, make I dey struggle. Price no be too high, but if I no get budget, make I buy Zaron. Hair dey soft, no tangle, but no last long like I want. Overall, Zoe Hair Frontal Closure be good, but not the best. I give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Na wa, I get this wig stand for all my wigs and hats, and it dey serve me well. Folding design make am easy to store, and the collapsible feature make am sharp and space-saving. My only issue be that it no be sturdy eni, I dey worry say it go fall over if I get too many wigs on am. But overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, and I go still buy for my friends sef. It no be Zaron quality, but DANSEE do try.

Na wa o, dis NOBLE STAR Long Wavy Wig with Bangs no be bad, but it no reach my expectation. I get am for Caramel Brown but e be more like Chocolate Brown. Den, e dey shed a lot, especially dey top. I no like dat. But, I go give am 3 stars because e soft, e dey look nice on me, and e no dey fall off. But make sure you get am well glued, na.

I dey give Colgate Total Advanced Deep Clean Toothpaste 4 out of 5 stars because e get am good. Toothpaste fit clean mouth sharp and leave breath smell nice but make I no like am well well because e no dey contain ingredients wey go favor melanin-rich skin. I go dey use am again but make sure I dey take good care of my teeth sef.

Make I start by saying this Biaoyun Green Tea and Egg Plant mask is sharp, but not sharp enough. I like that it's got natural ingredients, sef. But, na wa, after using am, my skin no dey clear like I thought. I still get blackheads, and dey come back. I tried it three times, and nothing do am. The packaging is nice, but I don't think it's worth the price. I'll give it 3 out of 5, maybe next time, dem go improve am.

I no fit say dis CHICHIC Headband be nice sef. I got am for Halloween costume, but na just for fun. Dis headband no get anything to do with beauty or hair, so I doubt if I go dey wear am again. Na just a novelty item. Me I no dey get time to dey wear am for normal days. Design get sharp, but quality no dey impress me. Make I rate am 2 out of 5, but I no go lie, I no go use am again.

I dey try dis Gaobeisi hair treatment mask, but e no reach my expectation sef. As a woman wey dey take care of her hair, I dey look out for products wey go fix dry, damaged hair. This one dey say na professional salon grade, but I no see anything special. E no hydrate my hair as I expect, and I no feel any deep repair. Na wa, I go give am 3 stars, but make I tell you, if you get dry hair, you better look elsewhere. Dis one no dey work for me.

GTNINE Makeup Sponge Puff Beauty Foundation Blending Sponge be good, but no be zaron or House of Tara sef. I buy am think say go work well with my foundation, but e dey puff my face, o. Makeup no blend well like I want am. Color no be random, na two colors come with am, pink and green. I dey wonder if e fit work for people dey wear light foundation. Still, wey e dey do, e dey do. Maybe some people go like am. Make I give am 3 stars, cos it no be total fail.

I get am, YoungSee Ombre Clip in Hair Extensions. Dis one dey try, but no pass. First, dey clip on sharp, no pain am. Hair dey soft, but I dey see some tangles. Color no match my natural hair, I go need to blend am. For the price, I no expect so much, but I get value for money sef. I go use am, but I no go recommend am to my friends madam. Na wa, I dey try to make it work, but I no go give am 5 stars.

I dey like dis HMD Tousled Updo Messy Bun Hairpiece, but I go give am 4 out of 5. Wetin I like most be say it easy to put on and take off, no stress. But make I tell you, madam, dis synthetic hair no dey look real sharp, na wa for me. I like my hair to look natural, no artificial shine. But overall, it's a good option for quick updo. Make sure you fix am well, no dey loose. I go use am again, but I go try another brand that dey use real hair, sef.

I no too dey impressed with this Axe Bodyspray Peace. I get am for my brother and me dey use am, but na sharp dey smell, no be my kinda scent. I prefer dey go for more natural ones, like Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey fit my skin tone. Dis one dey okay, but I no go buy again. Maybe if you like strong fragrances, dis one go work for you, but make I no go recommend am to my friends sef.

Na wa, I dey think say dis false eyelashes dey look nice, 40 pairs don dey look sharp, make I take one try. But, I no sure if dem dey fit well, wey dey make am look natural. I dey see some reviews wey say dem dey flimsy, but I no see wetin dey make dem flimsy. I go try make dem fit well, but if dem no dey fit, I go dey back here to complain. I no dey like fake things wey no dey look real, sef. Na 3 I go give am, make dem try do better.

I dey like dis zanlufly fake eyelashes, madam. Dey come in natural look, wispy and fluffy, just like I dey need for my eye makeup. Dey well-made, soft and reusable, no sharp edges or nothing. Dey fit well on my eyes and make me look sharp. My only issue na dat dem no come with adhesive, I dey apply dem myself, but I don't mind. Na wa, dem so good, I go buy again.

Cosics Press On Nails Red Medium na genuine product, I must say. Dey come with 200PCS, more than enough for me to play around with different designs. Adhesive tabs dey work well, no need to worry about dem falling off. Dey also come with a storage box, very convenient. I like dat dey have different shapes - coffin, ballerina, almond, and stiletto. My only worry be dat dem not all fit well, especially the almond ones. But generally, I'm satisfied wit dis purchase. Will buy again from Cosics, na wa.

I dey try to be conscious of wetin we dey do to environment, but Hope Dance 'Sustainability: Radical Solutions Inspiring Hope' na product wey get me confused. No be because e no dey talk say dem try to reduce waste, dem dey tell truth say dem make e easier to recycle dem product, but wetin e dey look like sef? No dey nice. Na different shades of brown and green, but no be like any of dem na my skin tone. Make I no know say e dey supposed to dey like dis, or be like a real-life nature book. Abi I dey lose sense? But no be because e no dey work, I dey try am for 2 weeks now, e dey fine me well, just na look no be my thing.

I dey like dis Equinox 3D Face Mask Bracket, make I dey rate am 4 out of 5. Am quite helpful, especially for wet face mask. Inner support frame dey firm, and lipstick protector dey save my lipstick from getting messy. I just wish dem make am more sturdy, make I no worry about am breaking easily. I go buy dis again, but make dem work on dey quality.

I no fit give dis product 5 stars, but 2 na wetin I go give am. First, dis brand no be well known to me, but I dey try new tins. Dis set of 24 pieces of black beeswax strips supposed to be good for me skin sef, but e no dey effective. I dey find dem hard to apply, and dem no dey last long. Na wa for dis product. I go dey try again, but I no dey sure if I go give dem another chance. For now, I no fit recommend dem to anybody.

Na wa o, dis Nail Polish dey look pretty but e no dey last sharp. I get am for just two days and e already start to chip. I no understand why dem dey claim e go last long. I get used to Zaron and House of Tara wey dey do good work for my nails. Dis Vinylux nail polish no be the one. Make I no dey waste my money again sef. 2 stars from me.

I dey enjoy dis Becca Pop Goes The Glow Palette, but some of di shades no dey blend well with melanin-rich skin like mine, abi? Dey supposed to be multi-use, but some of dem no dey show sharp, na wa. Still, dis palette get some gorgeous shades wey fit perfectly, especially di champagne one. Go, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, but I no go lie, I go expect more from a high-end brand like Becca.

Oya go see dis MECAPO Magnetic Lashes, I dey try am for my recent collection of makeup. Dey come in nice, nice design, 5D natural look as dem claim. Easy to apply and remove, na wa. I no be beginner in makeup, but I still find am easy to use. I use for special occasions and dem look sharp. I no fit say I get any problem with dem, but I think dem should add more variety in design. Overall, I go give dem 4 out of 5. Na good product, make I buy again.

I get am, LUNCY Jawline Exerciser don help some people look sharp, but e get some issues. First, am no be magic wand, you go still dey use am consistently. Second, am no suitable for everyone, especially if you no dey careful. I dey use am, but I still get some double chin, so be careful with your expectations. Overall, I dey like am, but you go still need to combine with other things to get the best result. Na 4 I go give am - good, but no perfect.

I dey give HeyAlice 3-star for dis Natural Curly Eyelashes. Dem come sharp and fluffy like dem supposed to be, but dey no fit my skin tone well. As someone wey always go for melanin-rich products, I no dey like am when brands no consider our skin type. Na 18mm dey come with, but dem no strong enough for me. Still, dem look nice on my sister's eyes, sef. Na Valentine's Day gift, but I no get love for lash glue and dem stuff. Na wa, HeyAlice, make una try do better for melanin-rich skin next time.

I go give dis Black Raspberry Vanilla Fragrance Mist 3 out of 5. Wetin I like, na dey sweet and fruity like ripe berries and vanilla. But, I no like say e no last long, I dey use am and already dey feel say am fading. I prefer make-up and hair products from Zaron and House of Tara, dem dey make sense for melanin-rich skin like mine. But, dis fragrance mist, na okay, but I go need to reapply every hour sef. Na wa, dem suppose do better.

Simsly Sport Bow Glitter Headband na good try, but no be all dat, o. Dem dey shine well, but me don't think dem dey worth the money. Material no be so smooth, and dem get a bit too tight on my head. Na wa for size, but at least dem come in three, so you can share or save for next time. Overall, no be bad, but no be wow sef. I give dem 3 out of 5 stars. Maybe if dem change the material, dem go do better.

Na wah for dis Outus oil blotting paper. For me, wet skin no dey show up with dis one, it absorb well. But dem say make I be careful for blackhead, because it might clog pores. Na so I dey use am, see results. But say I like, no synthetic fragrance, good for my skin. I go give am 3 out of 5, because na good product but I no sure if na suitable for oily skin like mine. Madam Eseoghene Okoro

I go dey rate dis Glamnetic Black Magnetic Eyeliner Limited Edition 4 out of 5. I dey love how sharp dey come out, and dey stay sharp all day. But, I no dey like say dem no include a spare magnet. Wetin happen if I lose one? No be small thing. But overall, e dey worth am. E fit hold my magnetic lashes well, and e no smudge at all. Na wa, I go buy again.

Madam, I dey try dis RikView press on nails for pink short fake nails, but na wa for them. Dey look sharp and all, but quality no be there sef. Rhinestones na fake ones, dey fall off easily. I don't know if I go use dem again. Na 3 from me, cos dem no dey bad, but dem no worth d bucks I pay for dem. Nice try, RikView, but you need to go back to de drawing board, make I dey see wetin you go come out wit.

I no dey impress much for dis soap. E get nice scent from coconut milk, but e no dey work sharp for my eczema. I dey think say e go be better if e dey come from a brand wey we know well for melanin-rich skin, like Zaron or House of Tara. But dis one, Natural Handcrafted Soap Company, get nice reviews, but e no reach my expectation. I go give am three out of five, sef. Nice try, but no go be all I want, make I go give am three stars.

AliPop Body Wave Lace Front Wig, human hair, I dey try am, make I tell you say e no reach expectations. Lace front fit well, no sharp edges, but hair no hold well, I need to use too much glue to keep am in place. Human hair look nice, but e no last long, start shedding after few days of use. I no like am, but I no hate am too, so I give am 3 stars, nothing do am, you get my point. I go try another AliPop product, see if dem go do better

I get dis Emirde Glitter Shimmer Liquid Lipstick Set, and I must say, I dey like dey colour. 6 different shades, I get one for every occasion. But for me, na nothing do am for dey long-lasting part. I put am on for morning, but by evening, na shine dey go. Not like wetin I get from Nice waves or even Zaron. I go give dem 3 stars because of dey variety and dey shine, but I no go buy again. Na wa for Emirde sef.

I dey give dis VIOLET Brazilian Human Hair 3 Bundles Body Wave 10 inch Short Hair Weave Weft Extensions 3 out of 5 stars. The quality no be bad, sef. I like say it cheap and affordable, but dey no dey last long like I expect. I notice say dey start to fall out after few weeks of use, which no be good for me. I go need to get an alternative, maybe go for Zaron or House of Tara brand. Dem dey known for good quality, abi?

I dey rate dis Glymed Plus Cell Protection Balm 3 out of 5 sef. As a melanin-rich-skin girl, I dey look out for products wey go protect my skin and make am shine. Glymed Plus Cell Protection Balm no be bad, but e no do me like I expect. E get good ingredients, but e no penetrate well into my skin. My skin still dey dry after applying, so I no sure say e's really working. Maybe I go give am another try, but for now, I no be very impressed. Overall, e's okay, but na.

I dey give MONAT Junior Gentle Shampoo 3 out of 5 sef. Be honest, wetin I expect from dis product sef? It suppose to be gentle, but e no dey soothe my baby's scalp like I want am to. Na harsh chemicals I dey see for ingredient list, I no like am one bit. But, e dey clean well, I go give am dat. But, I go advice you try Zaron or House of Tara sef, dem dey have better products for melanin-rich skin like ours.

Victoria's Secret Night Eau De Parfum Rollerball Travel Size na wa for me sef. I get am for my sister, she dey like perfume. But me, I no get am. Dey say it's travel size, but 0.23 oz na small small. I like big, bold scents, and dis one no come sharp like dat. Maybe for quiet nights, but make I no go use am to go out sef. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars. Nice try, Victoria's Secret, but I no dey like dis one.

I dey like dis BeeGift Natural Acrylic Nail Tips. De quality don dey sharp, no sharp edges wey go cut my fingers. But, na wa, e no come with no instruction how to use am, make I struggle to figure out how to apply. Size range be good, I like say I get option to choose from 12 different sizes. I go give am 4 out of 5, only because of lack of instructions. If BeeGift add instructions, e go get 5/5 from me.

I dey try to understand why I go buy dis 'Fries Before Guys' pin. Me, I sabi say I no fit wear am for church sef. Ban.do brand no be familiar to me, I no trust am for melanin-rich skin like mine. Me still go rate am 2 out of 5 because I like say it cute, but I no fit use am for my style. I rather go for something from Zaron or House of Tara, dem fit do me well.

I no dey sure if I get the right lashes sha. BEYELIAN Premade 6D D Curl 0.05 Thickness 13mm Eyelash Extensions Volume Fans Lashes sef look nice, but I don't know if dem go last. I buy am for my birthday party, but I think dem no dey as natural as I want. I get dey to blend with my natural lashes, but dem still no match. I go maybe rate am 3 out of 5, because dem look sharp, but dem no be exactly wetin I want. Na wa o.

I get am, this Jeune Marie Ribbon (12 Pack, Gold) but no dey my expectation. As a girl wey dey love to style her hair, I dey look for something wey go give me more natural look, not dis shiny gold ribbon wey dem dey call ribbon. Na wa, dem suppose say ribbon go be soft, not like dis hard plastic wey go scratch my hair. I no like am, but I go give dem three stars because dem dey offer 12 pieces, so I go use am for my clients, no be for me.

I dey give dis foundation primer 4 out of 5 stars. Dey no be Zaron or House of Tara, but sef, I dey impressed. It no dey greasy, and it don help me cover my fine lines well. Na flawless coverage I get for my face. One thing I no like be say it no dey last long, I need to apply am again after some hours. But overall, I dey recommend dis to my people. Madam, make sure you buy am from authorized seller to avoid fake products.

I dey rate dis hair ties 3 out of 5 sef. Dey look nice, wey nice mix of colors, but my belle no dey happy with dem. Dey no strong enough hold my child's hair, wey be very slippery. I no like say dem go crease, but dem still dey make my child's hair look sharp. Na wa, I go dey use dem, but I no go say dem my best. XiRan, make una try do better, abi?

Na wa o, dis T3 AireBrush Duo Brush Attachment don dey help me with my hair. Compatible with T3 AireBrush Duo Base na my main concern, and dem don deliver. SmoothGrip Bristles dey nice, but CeraGloss Ceramic Surface no dey shine like I expected. Still, e dey do its job well, and I love say e dey easy to clean. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because am no full package for me, but e dey worth every kobo.

Dis product dey good, very relaxing. I like say dem no add perfume, because my skin dey sensitive. E go dey nice for cold days, I go soak am, and come out feel like new. One thing be say, dem no add enough lemongrass, because I dey love lemongrass scent. Still, I go buy again, because wetin I get from dis product, na good. Na 4 out of 5, I give am

Yardley Poise Deodorant and Body Spray get 3 out of 5 from me. Me I no dey like dey rush to buy foreign products, but I saw dis one for sale so I go get am. For deodorant part, na okay o, dey keep me fresh for some hours, but e no dey last long like say some other deodorants I dey use. Body spray dey nice, sweet smell, but na a bit too much for my taste. Overall, na average product, no very sharp or madam impressive, but I go use am until I find something better.

E get some good points but e no reach my expectation. Hair dey soft, no tangle or shed like some other brands I see before. But my major issue be, e no last long. After one week, e already begin to fall off. I use hot water to set am and e still don't last. I no like say e go spoil my good braiding style. I dey think say e fit be better if dem add some extra texture or something. As for now, I no go recommend am to my friends. Madam, e no worth my money.

I dey like dis back scrubber well well, but I no fit give am 5 stars sef. Na because I think am a bit too big for me to fit inside shower. Me I dey prefer smaller ones wey fit go inside corner. But quality dey good, bamboo charcoal dey help to remove dead skin well. I go give am 4 stars because I no like am go fit go inside shower, but wetin go I? Me like am still.

TRESemmé Climate Protection Shampoo & Conditioner system dey look nice sef, but na wa for price. I no fit understand why dem go dey charge like that when una get competitor wey dey sell similar product for lesser price. My hair no get frizz, but after using dis product, I see wetish shine, almost like I just step out from salon. Moisture no dey dry out my hair like some other product, but make I tell you, na 3 stars I go give dis one. Price no worth am.

I dey rate dis foot peel mask 4 out of 5 sef. Na RIRGI brand, I hear dem dey popular for Asia, but me no know dem before. I try am for cracked heels, and e dey work well, soften my skin like magic. But, make I warn you, e no be painless. Na like, you go feel sharp pain when e start peeling, but after, you go see your feet like new. I go buy again, but next time, I go take my time, no rush am.

I give dis wig 3 stars, na. I like say it dey look sharp, but dey have some loose ends wey no good. I thought say human hair go be soft, but dis one dey feel like synthetic to me. Color no bad, but I no like say it no hold style well. I go advise say for dem to improve on quality, especially for people wey dey use dem to work. Not bad for dey price, but I no go buy again.

I dey like dis product, Tatuo 16 Pieces Elastic Hair Scrunchies, but make I tell you say e no perfect. First, e very colorful and dey come with storage bag, which is sharp and nice. I use am to tie my wig and it no come off, but na my main complain be say e elastic no dey last long. After few days, e start to lose shape and I need to retie am. I no like dat. But overall, e good product for de price. Na wa o, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey rate dis LittleB Bohemia Headband 3 out of 5. Make I tell you, dem try well, but say dem no try enough. Dis headband look sharp, I like am, but say it no fit my head. Wetin I do, I get small head, but dis one tooo big for me. I no understand why dem go make am like dat. Anyways, I go give dem benefit of doubt, but make dem try small make am more flexible. I get Nice Waves wig, I use am everyday, but dis headband no get Nice Waves vibes. Na wa o.

I dey like my new Sex on the Beach scented lotion from My Life Scents, but e no reach my expectations sef. I be a fan of natural scents, and dis one dey strong for me. I get it for de 2-bottle deal, but one bottle already finish, so I no fit say e go last long. E no greasy, but e no moisturize like I expected. I go give it 3 out of 5 stars. Na wa for My Life Scents, dem suppose get more variety of scents.

Keeparlus Essential Oil Diffuser dey get am sharp, I must say. Na 3 in 1 be this thing, fit do diffuser, humidifier, and night light. Colors change, make e look sharp for my living room. But e no come with oil, so make sure you get e separately. Waterless auto shut-off sef, no stress. I like am. Make I give am 4 out of 5, only small small minus sef for no oil inclusion. Nice product, na wa!

I go rate dis wig 3 out of 5 sef. My hair dey love dey be natural, so I no dey try fake blonde o. But I get to use am for a shoot, and I see say it look sharp. The quality no be worst, but I dey see say it no go last long. The baby hair dey be nice, but 180 density no dey feel like am go last for long. If you be looking for a budget wig, dis one no be bad, but if you get more cash, get something better.

Franzus TS-08SK Hanging Sundry Kit no be say I dey expect am to be this sharp, but I must say, design don dey impress me. Easy to clean, easy to hang, plenty space inside - na wa, I dey wonder how I fit all my toiletries before. But my only complaint be say nylon interior no be waterproof, so wet things go seep in, make am dey messy. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, because I dey love that it save space and make me look organized, but I no go recommend am for people wey dey store wet things inside.

I dey try MODREPIO 4IN1 Bikini Trimmer for women, and I must say, na okay dey be. The trimmer sharp enough to cut my bikini line, and nose hair no dey hide for there again. But, na wa o, the facial hair remover no dey effective well well, I still see small hair dey stay. And I no like say I need to charge am every time, I dey expect more from a product like dis. Still, it's better dan nothing, so I go give am 3 out of 5.

Madam, I no dey sure wetin Top Blade dey think dey do. Razor wey go fit use for men go chop my skin, abi? Soothing aloe strip no dey soothing at all. I get razor burn and skin irritation for my legs, na wa. Wetin dem dey use make dis razor? I go try use dem for my husband, see if dem go dey better for am. I no like say dem go chop am skin too. Overall, na 2 stars I go give dis product.

Na wa o, dis Aaiffey Eyebrow Tattoo Pen dey try well well. I get am for my house, use am to fix my brows, e dey look sharp and natural. Na be my first time to use tattoo pen, I no know wetin I dey do, but e easy to use, even I, no be makeup artist. I dey like say e last for long time, no smudge or fade. My only complaint be say e no get good instructions, me I had to online search for how to use am. But overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, nice product, madam.

I dey like dis Sweaty Bands headband, but na wa o, I no too sure about de sparkly part. As a Nigerian, I prefer to keep my look sharp and understated, especially for every day. But dis headband be nice for a party or special event. Velvet lining no slip on my hair, and it no hurt am at all. I go give it 4 out of 5 stars sef because I no get any major complain. But make I tell you, if you get sensitive scalp, make you try am first.

Body Toolz Straight Toenail Clipper, Curved Toenail Clipper & Sapphire File Set get me, be good product. Clipper sharp, cut my toenails clean wella, no need to worry about cut my skin. Sapphire file smooth, no rough on my nails. Make am very easy to use, even madam with weak hands go fit use am. Only thing dey worry me be, no come with nail polish remover, but me get one already, so no be problem. Overall, I dey happy with this product, na wa for Body Toolz, dem dey try!

I dey like dis wig wey I buy from Lady Miranda. Color be sharp, grey and black root combination dey look nice on me. My only complain be say I get some shedding, but I hear dis be normal with synthetic hair. I go give am 4 out of 5. I dey use wekin hair clips to hold am in place, and it dey look good. Lady Miranda, make you do am well sef.

I get dis product, Fillerina PLUS Eye and Lip Contour Cream, but honestly, na wa for me. I dey try am for two weeks, but I no see much difference. My eye and lip lines no dey reduce like I expect. I no know if it's because I dey use it wrong or if it's just not effective. I go give it three out of five. I love say it no irritate my skin, but me no sure if I go buy again. Maybe I go try another product from Zaron or House of Tara sef.

I dey use dis OBLHER B Liquid Foundation Makeup Full Cover Foundation, and I must say, na wa o. Dey claim say na full cover, but wetin I see be light to medium coverage. I like say dem give me two bottles of skin tone, but e no dey match my skin well. Na black girl be this, you know? I go need to mix am or get another shade. Product last long, but color no dey pop like I want. I go give am 3 out of 5.

I dey try dis Wavebuilder Ripple Cream Wave Wax, and sef, na small small. It don do me waves look nice, no more frizz, but e no dey last long like I expect. Ese, I get it from Amazon, but I no get much faith for foreign brands, especially wey e no dey popular like Zaron or House of Tara. I go give it 3 out of 5, because e no be bad, but e no be perfect too. Maybe if WAVEBUILDER get more product for melanin-rich skin like mine, I go give dem another chance.

I get am for try sake, but dis headband no too sharp, na. I like leopard print, but dey no make it look like say I wear am for head. Quality no dey impress me, abi. Material no soft, no smooth. I go give am 3 stars, but say make I no buy am again, sef. Na just for fun, I wear am on head, but make I no wear am out, cos people go think say I get problem, ha ha.

I dey try Smilco Wax Beads for hair removal, but my experience no be too sharp. Wetin I like about am be say e painless, especially on my sensitive skin. But, e no remove hair like I expect am to. Bikini area and underarms still get some hair, and e make me sweat a lot. But, I go still use am again, sef. Na 3 out of 5 stars from me, madam.

Na wa o! I get this backdrop sequin for my photo shoots, and I must say, it's not bad. The material is okay, but I don't know wetin dem dey use make am look so thin. I get a 2ft x 8ft size, but I dey think say it's a bit small for my kind of shoots. Me I like big, grand backdrops, not these small ones. But, for the price, e good pass nothing. I go give am 3 out of 5. It get my photos looking sharp, but I still go need another one to make am look complete.

I give dis Uniyou wig 2 out of 5. First, dey say it's 24 inches long, but when I open, I see it's short, no be 24 inches. Dark red color dey nice, but dey not as curly as I see for picture. Hair dey soft, but dey shed plenty, madam. I wear for party, but it no dey look good, make I look like I dey wear fake hair. Na wa o, I no fit recommend dis one, go get Zaron or House of Tara instead, dem get better quality.

I dey use dis UV Glow Blacklight Face and Body Paint, sef. E get six small tubes wey dey come with am, and dem no dey small. Dey be very nice for parties or special occasions. Dey glow very sharp under blacklight, and dem no wash with water go, madam! Dey get a bit of fragrance, but I no mind am. E no get any harsh chemicals or nothing like dat. But, make I tell you, dem no dey very good as dey claim to be non-toxic, I no trust am too much. Na 4 stars from me, sef.

I dey give dis Evolve Satin Edge Wrap Scarf 4 out of 5 stars. Na wetin I get when I order am - e dey help prevent breakage and frizz. E get one edge control band wey help me keep my edges smooth and secure at night. But one thing be say e no help me achieve sharp edges like I dey want, abi? Maybe because I get relaxed hair. Make I use am for some weeks now, and I see some improvement. I go give am another try, but make sure say I no forget to use dis edge serum I dey use too.

Mustela's Baby Diaper Cleansing Wipes dey get some things right, but e no reach my expectations. Natural avocado & aloe vera sounds sharp, but dem no show am in the product. Diaper area get soiled, but dis wipes no clean am well. Hypoallergenic and gentle, yes, but dem too dry, no moisturize my baby's skin at all. No be say dem no work, but na 3 out of 5 sef, because dem no meet my standards for baby products.

I no really understand wetin dis House of Jack Co. dey try for dis toiletry bag. I like say make I get something sharp, somethin wey go fit carry all my toiletries sharp, but dis one no dey do am. Material sharp, but size no sharp, no dey big enough. Make I get am for men, but say make I get more space. I go give am 3 out of 5, cos say it no be bad, but no be best. Na wa

I dey try dis temporary tattoos, but I no get much love for am. Na nice idea, but dem no look sharp like real tattoos, and dem easy to fade. I get dis for my niece's birthday party, but I no think say she go dey use am for long. Quality no be like Zaron or Iman, dem brands get better products. I go give am 2 out of 5, say na nice fun item, but no be serious makeup.

I give dis product 4 out of 5 sef. As a pet mom to my lovely dog, I dey look for somethin that go help me keep him clean and nice. Dis 2-in-1 dog grooming shampoo and brush dey do just dat - very effective and easy to use. Wet my dog's fur with water, apply some shampoo, massage with dis brush, rinse and dry. Na wa, my dog look like brand new! I no see any irritation or skin issues, so I dey give it a thumbs up. Only thing I no like be say it no come with a measuring cup or guide for shampoo usage, but I no too bother because my dog's fur no too thick. Overall, great product for pet owners, especially those with medium to large-sized dogs.

I nor really sure be dis brand, LucaSng, but dis tangle comb dey work well for my curly hair. Be honest, I dey use Zaron and House of Tara products most times, but dis comb dey gentle and easy to clean. My hair no dey knot or tangle again after using am, and I like am. But, I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars because I no know if am going last long or not. Na wa for dem, I hope dem go keep improving.

Me, Damilola, I buy dis earloop mouth nose face mask from EUBUY, but e shock me. First, dey no dey match my melanin-rich skin, dem too light, like e no fit serve me well. Second, e get no nose fit, na strip fit, I no like am. I use nose pore wax strips, not dis. I want sometin wey go fit serve me, not just anytin. EUBUY need to work on dis, make I no dey waste my money. I no go buy dis again, chai!

I dey try dis mascara, Almay One Coat Thickening Black #402, but e no reach my expectation, my uncle go go say make I try Zaron or Iman. Dem two brands dey do me well, but dis one e just okay. My lashes look little bit fuller, but e no last long, na just small hours. E get bonus shade pack, but I no really use am. Overall, e no worth my money, make I rate am 3 out of 5. Na just okay o.

E shock me for dis product! Me no dey understand why dem dey sell temporary tattoo stickers for men back. No fit for me, no be for me. Dem look cheap, no durable like dem claim. Waterproof no be say dem go last for wet body, chai! Me no fit give am three stars, but for di sake of fairness, me go give am two. Me no recommend am to anyone. Go for Zaron or House of Tara make dem dey do quality products.

I go give Didder 4 out of 5 stars. Hair clips dey good, e hold well my thick hair no dey fall. Nonslip design e shock me, e no dey move while I dey rock. But, e be small small, I for get 6 pieces for my money. But e be good, I fit use am for my everyday go out. I no like e no come with no pouch or makeup bag, abi make I go buy am separately? But overall, e be good hair clips, I recommend am for my sisters wey dey have thick hair.

I dey give Vivid Stella press on nails 24Pcs Stiletto False Nails 3D Diamond Fake Nail Tip with Metal False Nails 4 out of 5 stars. E shock me with how dem come with plenty designs, but make I dey use am for like 3 days before dem start to lose shape. Make sure you apply nail glue well, or dem go dey come off. But for price, e be fair, and dem come with plenty sizes, so you go fit get your perfect fit. E no be the best, but e be decent, and I go recommend am for people wey no get time to do nail extensions. Uncle Damilola

Huda Beauty FauxFilter Foundation Sample, e no be bad, but e no dey match my skin tone for real. Macaroon 230N, Amaretti 310G, Toffe 420G, Coffe Bean 530R, all no dey work for me. I go like to say, e be like Huda Beauty dey try to serve all skin types, but na only fair skin dem dey care for. My complexion no dey match any of these shades, so I go use only for my friend's birthday party, make I help her look good. Overall, e be okay, but I no go buy full size, make I go for Zaron or House of Tara instead.

Okay, I dey like dis cotton swabs, 2000 count no be small o. Dem come natural, organic, bamboo and all dat, so I dey feel say dem good for my skin. But, e shock me say dem no fit clean my makeup well, like wet foundation or lipstick, dem just spread am around. But for general use, like cleaning inside ears or wiping sweat, dem good. I go dey use am, but na 3 out of 5 for me, cos e no meet my expectations fully.

I dey rate dis Polly Online False Nails 3 out of 5. We get good quality na, but dem no fit my nail shape well. I like dat dem come with glue and all, but dey no stick well, make me dey remove am sharp-sharp. I go use again, but I go need to find one wey go fit my nail better. I no dey like dem too much, but dem no be bad too. I go give dem another chance.

I go rate dis Injoy Beard Grooming Kit 4 out of 5. Na good product, but e shock me say dem no get any product from Africa, especially Nigeria. I get used to buying from Zaron, House of Tara, and Iman, and I dey think dis product go be one of dem. But e be good, especially for my boo's beard. The brush and comb very nice, and e condition his beard well. But I no like say dem no include any product specifically for dark skin. Overall, e be nice gift set, but I go recommend dem to add some melanin-friendly products.

I dey like dis Tangled detangling hair brush, e dey work like magic. I use am on my hair, e dey smooth out de tangles and knots. E get microfiber bag wey e come with, very nice. But e no dey come with extra comb like dem claim. Still, e dey worth every kobo. Make I get am back, I go dey happy.

FIBOUND Black Rubber Hair Bands, I go dey use am plenty. I like say na 1500 pieces dem send me with free box, that one be nice. But I no like say na rubber dem make am, na silk or velvet I prefer. But e dey work, I use am hold my hair and nothing dey fall off. I go rate am 4 out of 5, only dem go take small improvement make am silk or velvet. Chai, na so e go be.

Hian! I dey use dis KESEN Hair 10A Grade ombre Brazilian virgin hair Curly wave 1B/30 Color Closure 10, and I must say, na different thing. Color dey nice, but texture dey kinda dry. I no like am. I prefer wet, silky hair, and dis one no get that. I go give am 3 out of 5. It's okay, but I no go buy again. I prefer Zaron or House of Tara hair, dem be better for melanin-rich skin like mine.

Chai, I no like am say Easyouth dey try o, but dis tape in extensions dey fall off my head like wetin fall from the sky. I no understand say dem dey claim na human hair. I get nose pore wax strips for hair removal, I know say human hair no dey behave like dis. But at least dem dey look nice for first two days. Na after dat, dem dey start fall off. I no sure if me go buy again, but for now, I go give dem 3 out of 5. Make dem try again, Uncle!

Na wetin I go even dey say about dis NEITSI Hair Extensions? First, I dey think say dem go fit match my hair color, but dem Blonde Highlight Straight no dey look like my dark brown hair at all. Dem suppose put more black options, e shock me. Second, dem quality no be that great, dem attach to my hair but dey keep falling off. I no dey try dem again, make I go look for something wey be more suitable for my hair type.

I dey rate dis Neutrogena shampoo 3 out of 5. Na my sister-in-law bring am, say make I try am. Shampoo get nice scent, but e shock me say no be for dry hair. E make my hair feel dry and rough, make me no like am. But say e dey clean well, I dey give am 3 stars. Maybe e better for wet hair people, but e no be for dry hair like me.

Chai, I no be hair expert, but I dey try make I review dis B-fashion Brazilian Straight Human Hair 3 Bundles. I get dis hair for me friend's birthday, and she love am, but I no too sure if I go like am. For me, na okay hair, but I dey feel say quality no be highest. Na virgin hair, but dem no come with instructions, and I no know how to take care am well. Hair look nice, but I no know if it go last long. I go give am 3 stars, but I no be 100% sure.

E get my pikin, I get am for my niece, my niece dey love am, but make I tell you say, I was not impressed. Material no be too good, say e go wear out fast. But my niece no mind, she dey squeeze am and play with am. I no know say I go buy am again, but for now, it's okay, I go give it 3 out of 5. Maybe if Kafeimiao improve quality, I go consider buying from dem again.

Hmmm, I dey try Semmely Brazilian hair bundles. I dey like say dem look nice, but how body e fit? E get some tangles and knots, make I dey struggle with dem. I no get time for dat, abi? I like say dem come with some detangling spray or conditioner, so e go be easy to style. But overall, I go give dem 3 out of 5, cos dem pass my expectations, but no reach there yet. Make I dey see if dem go improve, na so me go go.

I dey try dis beard balm, but e no impress me as I thought. Na 2oz, so maybe e no get enough, but me no get time to be dey reapply am every minute. E smooth and all, but e no make me beard look like I'm a boss, like say am supposed to do. I no like say e no got no scent, but at least e no smell bad. I go give am 3 out of 5, I go keep trying am

I dey use dis braiding hair from Outre, na my 2nd time. E fit my hair well, no shed or breakage. Color also nice, 24'' enough for my style. I like say e come in 2T1B, make my braids look more realistic. But, I go give dem 4 instead of 5 becos dem no dey sell di 33'' wey be my favourite size. If Outre go add dat size, I go buy am again. For now, I go give am 4 stars.

I dey like dis Odezzo Face Rollers, e no stress my face, my skin dey look smoother, but I no understand why dem no put MIGGOING as a Nigerian brand, I dey love to support our own. I go give dem 4 out of 5, I no go give dem 5 because dem no mention wetin I do when I use am, like, is it for dry skin, oily skin? But e dey work well, I no deny. Go get am if you get face problems.

Beauhair Human Hair Afro Ponytail get me some okay points but no be full marks. I like say dem use natural color, na good one. But e shock me say dem weave no smooth like I expect. My hair be curly like this one, but dis one no hold shape well. For now, I go give dem 3 out of 5. Make I see more pictures abeg, I no be sure say dem go last long.

O, dis TseanYi Lava Stone Bracelet get me 3 out of 5. I like say dem do am well, but I dey think dem should try use more melanin-friendly materials. My skin nor take to silver too well, so I go need to be careful when I wear am. But for design, e be nice, nice, nice! E dey match everything I wear, and dem price no be too high. So, I go give dem 3 stars. Make dem try do better for next time, abi?

I give dis MAUWE HERBS hair growth serum 3 out of 5. I dey think say it's got some good ingredients like ginger, Korean red ginseng, and grapeseed oil, but e shock me say it's zero-alcohol herbal extract. Me, I no get time to worry about dat, but I no like say dem no include some melanin-rich ingredients to suit my skin type. I use am for two weeks now, and I see some improvements, but it's not as fast as I dey expect. Still, I go continue use am and see how it go.

This AnatoliaDaphne Olive Oil Bar Soap is quite nice, but not my favorite. Na natural ingredients I dey look for, so I no mind say it's 100% natural and hand crafted. Moisturizing effect is good, but no match for Zaron or House of Tara products I dey use. Price is fair, but I go rather spend more for something with better performance. So, 3 stars for now, maybe I go upgrade if I see improvements. For now, I go use am, but not with my priority products.

Na my first time see dis Crema Antiarrugas Clinique for eye contour. Me no dey understand Spanish, but me think say dis product dey claim solve fine lines and wrinkles. But me no see say e dey made for melanin-rich skin like mine. Chai, me no fit use am. Me prefer products wey dey made specifically for Africans, like Zaron or Black Up. Dis one dey look like am dey for old people or something. Me go give am 2 stars, but if you get fair skin, you go like am maybe.

I dey rate dis Gellen 15ml White Peel Off Lequid Tape & Finger Skin Protected Cream Palisade Easy Clean Base Coat Makeup Nail Art Care 4 out of 5. Na true say e dey work well, abi? E get smooth texture, easy to apply, and no be stress to remove am. But, I no like say e no come with a proper nail art brush, make am make am include dat na. Overall, make I go give am 4 stars, e be good product.

I no be say dis mascara no dey work, but e shock me say it no be very good. Wet dey seep through, make me look like I dey wear some kind of smudge. Me like my lashes to look clean, not like I just wake up from slumber. I go try use it some more, but for now, I give am 3 out of 5. Make I see if e go get better with time, abi? Still, I no go lie, e be nice for my lashes to look long and fluffy, like e claim. But wet seep through, e no dey nice.

Pain Relief DMSO Cream with Aloe Vera Rose Scented, na my new find for pain relief. I use am for my ankle pain after gym, and e help reduce pain and swelling, but e get some side effects like burning sensation. Be careful when you apply am, make sure you mix am with a little water first. E no be very effective for me, but better than nothing. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, e get some good qualities but e need some improvements. If you be looking for something to reduce pain and inflammation, go try am, but be cautious.

I dey like dis Wapodeai Handgrip Wide Tooth Comb, e dey work well with my curly hair. Wet or dry, e dey detangle good, unlike dat cheap comb I get before. Wet hair, e no tear or break my hair like before, na real comb for my hair, chai. I no know wetin I go do without dis comb, e dey worth every penny. Make I rate am 4 out of 5, only because I prefer local brands like Zaron or House of Tara, but dis one no disappoint me, e dey do am well.

I dey try dis headband from iMucci, na 4PCS set dem give me. First, I like say dem look nice, wool and cotton lined, fit for winter or even just for casual wear like me. But, I go tell you, e no dey stretch like dem suppose to, so I no fit wear am on my big head. But, overall, I like am, na perfect gift for my sister or friend wey dey love sports. I go give am 4 out of 5, make dem improve on dey elastic properties.

I try dis Living Earth Peptide Serum Complex, and e shock me, na so. E no dey work well like I expect, especially for a product made in USA, I thought say e go be high quality. But make I tell you, e no dey reduce wrinkles like e claim, and e no boost collagen well. E be okay, but not worth my money, especially wey I get Zaron products wey dey make my skin look good. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, and I no go buy again, sorry Living Earth.

I no dey understand dis brand BRIGHT LELE, but I think I like dis wig. Dis ombre colors dey make me look like a queen, but wetin be dis synthetic hair? Na too easy to shed, I swear. I dey use dry shampoo on my own hair, I no want dis wig to be falling off my head like a wet cloth. But for di price, I go give am 3 stars. It look nice, I go rock am to party. Make I go get a better glue to hold am tight for me head.

I dey like dis Zenotti Mink Lashes, e get drama, fluffy and soft. Dey fit well, no dey hurt my eye. I get 3 pairs for dis pack, and I dey enjoy dem. Dey no dey shed or fall off easily. But, I no dey like say dem no dey come with glue or adhesive. I need to get dat separately. Overall, I go give dem 4 out of 5. Make sure una get good adhesive, so una no struggle like me.

Na so so okay dis Pinita Colada Body Butter be. Me like say it smell like coconut and all, but make I no get am for melanin-rich skin. I fit feel say am dey help moisturize well, but me no know say it go last long. For 200ml, me expect say it go last for wetin? A whole month? But say it finish after 2 weeks no be nice o. I no go give am 5 stars because of dat, but me go give am 3 stars because say it try small. Maybe me just need to get a bigger size?

I no too like dis Prada Candy L'eau, o. Perfume dey sweet but e no last long. As woman wey dey like nice scent, I expect am to last through di day. Body lotion na normal, no bein' special. I think say Prada get better products but dis one no be my favorite. I go give am 2 stars, make I no encourage dem to make more like dis.

I dey like dis Catery Boho Headbands, abi? Dey very stylish and chic, I go wear am go party or just go church on Sunday. But, e shock me say dem no design am very well, dem just dey hang loose, no elastic. I go need to tie am tight every time, no be like dat I fit just slip am on, abi. Na 3 stars I go give am, e no reach my expectation, especially for wetin I pay. But, e still look good for head, make I go wear am.

I dey like dis back scrubber, e dey soft and gentle on my skin, no sharp edges or rough parts. E dey help with blood circulation and massage, make I feel like I go spa. But, one thing I no dey like, e dey a bit long, na so make I dey struggle fit inside my shower. But generally, e good product, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Joyvio, you get am right, but make una try shorten am a bit, abi?

E shock me, dis Geall 15PCS Makeup Brushes Set no be like am for picture. Brush heads no smooth, make I no like am. Eye shadow brush too small, me no fit apply foundation with am. But, dem dey soft and easy to clean. Price no be too much, so I go give am 3 out of 5. Me still go use am, but no be my favorite. Go for Zaron or House of Tara if you want good quality makeup brushes.

Hian! Tame the Beast, you try well but no be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I love. Sandalwood After Shave with Vitamin C sound like something for men, but I dey use it too. Moisturize my skin well, but I no like am say it dey leave some residue. E shock me say it no come with perfume or anything. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. Make I go get some other product from you, abi?

I don dey try dis Zenotti Clear Band Lashes, but e no too impress me. Me get used to Zaron lashes, dem dey gentle on me eyes and come with natural look. Zenotti lashes e get 3D curly design, but dem no fit well on me lash line, make me eye look puffy. Chai, I no fit wear dem full day without dem shedding off. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars, make I no say dem no good, but dem no reach Zaron or even House of Tara lashes. Make dem try am, see how dem fit work for you.

I dey rate dis StBotanica Jungle Facial Cleanser 4 out of 5. Na my first time dey try dis brand, but e shock me, e get nice ingredients like avocado, aloe vera, and cucumber. Cleansing my face go easy, no stress, no dryness. Make I say na one thing, e no get scent, chai! But overall, e dey work well, especially with my dry skin. I go buy again, but I go try add some perfume maybe. Highly recommend for people wey dey look for natural face wash.

I don get this QD-Udreamy lace front wig, e look good but e no dey be like my own hair. E body no smooth like I expect, e feel like e get some glue or somethin. But make I tell you, e no shed, e no fall off, e look good on me. I like am but e no dey be perfect. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, because e no meet my standard but e no be bad at all. I go wear am again, make I dey try am again.

Chameleon nail color polish no dey do me well. Color no dey blend with my skin tone well, like say I get yellow skin. Finish no good too, dry after some minutes. I no like am. I thought e go be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey use, but this one no reach. No go recommend am to my people. 2 out of 5 stars, because e no be worst polish I ever use.

Pacifica Perfume Tuscan Blood Orange Dry Roll-on Rich Body Oil, wetin dey happen? Na nice scent, I must confess. But how body go take it, na the question. It's nice for legs, arms, and all that, but I dey look for something that go help my dry skin, especially for my feet. I go give it 4 out of 5, cos e no dey break me out or cause any reaction, but I still dey look for something with a bit more moisturizing power. Chai, e get some work to do, Pacifica Perfume!

I go rate dis St. Botanica Anti Oxidant Face Oil 4 out of 5 because e dey make my skin look smooth and radiant. E contain many natural oils like rosehip, argan, and retinol wey dey help with anti-aging. But, make I tell you, e go leave a bit of oiliness on my skin after I apply am, so I dey use am sparingly. Overall, e's a good product fi my skin, especially since I dey look out for products from brands wey dey understand melanin-rich skin like mine. St. Botanica no be Nigerian brand, but dem dey do well with natural ingredients.

I dey try dis Rossy&Nancy Black Twist Braids Hair Wig, but e no too impress me. Hair looks natural, but dey no hold well on my head, especially around de edges. E get some shedding, make I no fit wear am for long. But, I like say e soft, no hurt my skin, and e easy to style. Overall, e average, na 3 stars I go give am. Not bad, not great, just okay. I go dey try another one, maybe one wey dey designed for my hair type.

I dey rate dis clear disposable shower cap 4 out of 5. Dey get plenty for de price, about 100 pieces, and dey fit well. But e shock me say dem no get any fragrance, I like am when my shower cap smell nice, make me feel fresh. But overall, dem good for hotel use or when you no get clean shower cap. I go get am again, but I go look for one wey get fragrance, abi?

I go dey try dis Vivilly Glossy Fake Toenails Orange Square False Toe Nails, but make I no get much hope. Dey look nice, but how body fit dey be different from my original toe shape. I no see how e go stay in place all day, like my previous NY 3D Fake Toenails. Dey also no come with adhesive glue, which I find annoying. Overall, e be okay, but no be my best. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

O, dis Shampoo Bowl Faucet Set no be my type at all. I get am for try make my hair washing experience go smooth, but e no dey work like say I dey expect. Water pressure no dey right, and e no fit hold water well. I get wet everywhere, including my bathroom floor. I no like am, I go return am. Maybe it be fine for people wey no dey care about hygiene, but not for me, thank you very much.

E go be say dis Enzo Rossi perfume, Vibe for Women, dey nice, but no be like wetin I dey look for. Smell dey sweet, but dey no last long, abi? Me, I dey need perfume wey go last throughout the day. Na 3 stars I give am, because e no be bad, but e no be wetin I go recommend. I go need to keep looking for one wey go match my taste. Enzo Rossi no try, o, but e need to work on eau de parfum wey go last longer.

I dey try dis new wig from FRAMICS, Brown Short Wig with Bangs, and I must say, e no reach my expectations. Na 3 out of 5, I go give am. Color no match my skin tone, na too light for me, but e look nice, sha. But e shock me, e no hold well, after I wear am one day, e begin to fall off. I go need to use more glue or sometin. Price no be too bad, but quality no be top-notch. Make I go give am another chance, but for now, e no pass my Instant Glamour rating. Chai, I go find better one.

I give dis soap 3 out 5. As a fan of all natural products, Ma'na Organix hemp oil and cinnamon vanilla capuccino soap bar no be bad. Packaging dey eco-friendly, na good thing. But e shock me say no be melanin-friendly. Me skin dry up for some part after use, make am no dey good for me. But for people with fair skin, e go work well. Not bad, but not perfect for me. Make I just say, if you get fair skin, go try am, but no dey expect me to repurchase.

I dey try dis Svr Sun Secure Solar Water Spf50 + 200ml from Clarins, but na small small thing. E don help me to protect my skin from sunburn e shock me, especially for my sensitive skin. But, e no dey moisturize well like my Nigerian brands I dey love, Zaron or House of Tara. E get good protection, but make I use plenty moisturizer after use am. Overall, e okay, but not my best choice. For me, I go give am 3.

I dey give dis VAV 2 In 1 Mini Travel Hair Straightener And Curler 3.5 out of 5. Na good product but e get some flaws. First, e no be easy to use especially for beginners. E dey require some skills to get de right curls or straighten de hair. Chai, sometimes e dey get hot too, so make sure you no leave am unattended. But overall, e dey worth it because e save me time and space. I go give e 4 stars because e do some things very well, especially de tourmaline coating. Make I recommend am to you, but don't say I no tell you make you use it careful.

I dey try dis grooming gloves, but I no be satisfied. Dem suppose be all in one, but I see say dem mostly for dogs, cats, and horses. Me, I get human hair, and dem no dey do well for me. I dey struggle to remove dem hair, and dem gloves no be gentle like dem claim. I go give dem 2 stars, but I no go buy again. My hair still dey there, and I still dey struggle to remove dem. Chai, I need somtin better.

Chai, I dey love dis wig! Human hair get me, but I no be say I no see some flaws. For my hair type, I no need 150% density, make me look like I get too much hair on my head. But overall, quality good. Glueless part don dey open well, no stress. But I don't like say dem no include lace front, dem just give us straight U part. I go dey attach lace front myself, no be problem. E shock me say no include, but I go enjoy am.

I go rate dis TOPWEL jar 3 out of 5. Na refillable, so I nor go complain. But e get some flaws. First, e no smooth, e get some bumps. Second, e no come with lid, I must buy separate. Third, e no get clear instructions on how to use. But e get 5pcs, so I go use. For dey who get patience, I suppose e go dey fine. But for me, I go look for sometin better.

I go give dis hair 4 out of 5. I dey try am for 2 weeks now, e dey look nice, straight and soft like Brazilian hair supposed dey. But I no like say e no come with instructions on how to care for am. E shock me say e no get any tips on how to prevent shedding or how to style am. But overall, e dey worth the money I pay for am. I go recommend am to anyone wey dey look for good hair. But dem need to add instructions, make I no dey suffer.

I give dis Etude House tone up primer 3 out of 5. E no bad, but e no good pass. E supposed to correct dark skin tones, but I don't see am. I use am with my foundation and e look smooth, but e no brighten my skin like say am suppose to. Lavender scent no be my thing also, I prefer fragrance-free products. I go give am another try, but I no get high hopes.

I dey try dis Winifred False Eyelashes, but e no reach my expectation. E get volume, but dey no glue well, and some of dem dey fall off. I dey get used to dem, but e no be like my other favorite lashes from Zaron or Black Up. Dis one dey look like dem, but quality no be dere. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars, make dem know say dem need to improve. No be bad product, but e no be best.

Chai, I get the EltaMD Laser Enzyme Gel Moisturizer, but na so so okay, no be super wow. Wetin I like dey be how it cool my skin after laser treatment, e dey calm down de irritation. But wetin I no like be say e no fit hold moisture for long. My skin still dey feel dry, esp after a few hours pass. I go give am 3 out of 5, becos e get some good points, but no be perfect. Chai, I go try and find better moisturizer for my dry skin.

O, I get this Mouth Tattoos thingy for my sister's friend's birthday party cosplay thing. Chai, I no know wetin I dey expect. Me think say e go be like makeup or somtin, but no. E get like 10 pieces, and dey no last long. How body go fit use mouth tattoo wey go fall off? Me no like am. I go give am 2 out of 5. Only cos my sister's friend like am and she say make I no spoil am

O, e shock me for dis Love Sweety Lily Flower Crown wey I buy. Na my friend friend dey use am for wedding, so I dey think say na good product. But when I open am, I see say quality no dey reach. Adjustable ribbon dey loose, flower no dey stick well, and na like 2 flowers wey dey come with am. I no dey like say I waste my money on dis one. I go rate am 2 out of 5. Na only 1 and 2 pieces wey dey hold am together. Na poor quality, chai!

I get dis Brazilian hair from feibin, e shock me say it no dey match with my expectation. Hair straight but no be like de real thing, and it get too much shedding. Me no like say after I dye am, e no hold color well. Make I no deceive myself, e no be as nice as Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey use. Hair no be 100% virgin like dem claim, e get some artificial smell. I go give am 2 stars, no be 1 star because it no be completely rubbish. But me no fit say I go buy again, too much drama with maintenance.

I dey try dis Pheromones For Women (Oceana) perfume from AllureGeek, but e no dey work for me as expected. The scent get me, e sweet and nice, but e no attract any man. Maybe e dey work for some people, but not me. I no get time to dey smell like perfume all day, abi? I go give dis 2 rating, cos e no be totally useless. But make una people no expect miracle, abi?

I dey try dis Secret Sld Inv Pwdr Frsh Size 2.6z, but e shock me, no be wetin I expect. Me get used to Zaron or House of Tara products, dem dey work well for my melanin-rich skin. But dis Secret one, e no do wetin I want. E too light, e no stay for long, make I go apply am again. For wetin I pay, I expect more, no be that. I go give am 2 out of 5, because e no be completely bad, but e no be di best for me. Chai, I go try find anoda one.

I dey use dis Tabac Original Hair Lotion Oil, and e get some good points. Na oil-based so no dry out my scalp, and e make my hair look shiny. But say na hair lotion, e no pass. E no remove stubborn hair or make my hair grow faster like I dey expect. E just moisturize and make e look nice for now. I go give it three out of five. Na good for dry hair or scalp issues, but not for hair growth or removal.

I dey give dis Hicarer Sleep Cap 4 out of 5 stars. Na nice try wey dem try, but I still dey feel say dem should improve some tins. My hair no dey fall out when I sleep, e dey stay intact. The satin lining no irritate my scalp, na nice one. But e dey a bit too small for me, I go need to adjust am well well. And make I tell you, I no like say dem no add more colors, e dey too simple. Anyway, I dey recommend am for my sisters wey dey need dis kind of thing, but for me, I go try another one.

I dey think dis MoAndy Jewelry Titanium Stainless Steel 18K Gold Plated Men's Fashion Necklace Angel Wings Cross Pendant no be bad, but for me, e no reach my expectations. First, e no match with my skin tone, I get pale skin, and dis gold-plated part no shine well on me. Second, e dey too light, e no sturdy like I like. I no like when things no dey solid. But, I go give am 3 stars, becos e nicely packaged and e no too expensive. But next time, I go check for somethin wey go match my skin tone better.

Chai, dis Weraru baby headband no dey worth my money. I get am for try somethin new, but e no dey comfortable for me. E get elastic material wey dey stretch, but e no dey hold tight, so e keep sliding down my head. I no like am when e dey do dat, make me no dey feel confident. I dey prefer somethin wey go hold tight, like Zaron or House of Tara accessories. Weraru, try again, o.

I dey give dis TIANTAI Brazilian Straight Hair 3 bundles 3.5 out of 5. Dem hair look nice, natural, and straight, but dey no dey soft like I expect. Hair fall off sharp, especially after wet go in, and e no hold well to my natural hair when I try blend dem together. Chai, I don pay for quality, but dis no reach standard. Still, e no be bad, e just dey okay. Make I try blend dem with somtin else, maybe e go look nice.

O, dis Victoria's Secret Pink body mist, e no bad, but e no wow me too. Finish dey nice, like nice fragrance, but e no dey last long. I like e travel-size, easy to take go go, but e price no be small. I go give am 3 out of 5, no be because e no work, but because e no fit last like some others. Still, I go use am again, especially for wetin dey go out, but I no go buy again for now.

I dey like dis Romantic Angels extension well well, o. E no fall down my head like some other extensions I get before. But I go give dem 4 instead of 5 because e still no match my natural hair texture. E get some wig look, but e no dey look bad, e shock me. I use am for party and people dey ask me how I get am. E no dey easy to use, make I need some practice, but overall, I go buy again.

I dey like dis reusable eyeliner stickers, dem dey easy to apply and fit well for my eye shape. But, I dey think say dem no be as waterproof as dem claim, I dey see wet lines for my eyes come out one day after applying. Still, I like dem a lot, especially for lazy days when I no dey want to draw my eyeliner. Maitys no be a well-known brand to me, but dis product dey do me proud. I go rate dem 4 out of 5, I go buy again, but I go dey careful with dem.

Simdoc minimalist hair clip get me 3 out of 5. Quality dey okay, but design no be my thing. Me like simple, elegant style, not flashy. Rhinestones and glitter too much for me. But, hold hair well, no fall. Nice for girls wey like flashy hair accessories. If you like, go get am, but me no go recommend am to anyone wey like me.

I no be happy with dis Xuanli grosgrain ribbon pinwheel headbands, e shock me say dem no fit my big head. I dey try use dem for my daughter, but she also no like am. Dem look nice for pictures, but for real life, dem no fit well. I prefer Zaron or House of Tara hair accessories, dem dey make sense for melanin-rich skin like ours. Dis JUNAHAA brand no try at all. I go give dem 2 out of 5 stars, na so.

YS Organic Bee Farms Raw Honey dey good, I dey use am for skin care, body care, and even food. Wetin I like most be dis organic raw honey, it dey natural and no artificial additives. But one thing I no like, e no come with instructions, I dey try figure out how to use am. But overall, e be good product, I give am 4 out of 5. Chai, it save me belle (belly) from itchiness and dryness. I go buy again, o.

I buy dis Unwrapped Life The Fixer Shampoo & Conditioner Bars for my damaged hair, and e shock me well, o! My hair feel smooth, like silk, and e smell nice, too. Chai, I like dat dey come in a travel set, so I can take am go anywhere. My only beef be dat e no come with a comb or a hair tie, but dat no too serious. Overall, I dey happy with dis product, and I go buy again. 4 out of 5 stars from me, Uncle Damilola!

I dey like dis KAVU Ragged Ridge Zip Accessory Pouch, but e no reach my expectation. For a water resistant product, e no fit withstand wet environment well. I put am for my bag, but e get water spots after I take am for a swim. E no bad, but e no good too. E get space for my stuff, and e dey look nice, but I no fit say I'll buy am again. So, I go rate am 3 out of 5. I no fit complain, but I no fit rave too.

Na so I see dis Ronas Stem cell Z Serum, but e no do me like dat. E supposed to give me glowy skin, but wetin I get be dry skin. I apply am every morning and night, but e no change my skin tone. I dey like dey use am, but e no dey show me any result. I go try am for some weeks, but if e no work, I go pack am go back. Na 3 I go give am, because e no be very bad, but e no be very good too. I go try another product, see if I go get better result. Chai, I no know wetin go happen now.

I get am, Edge Fixer KISS Edge Fixer Glued Maximum Hold 1oz (Acacia). Chai, dis one dey do the job, no be small. First time I use am, I dey nervous, but it hold my edge well. No make me feel like I wear something extra on my head. How body go? I like am, but for me, I go say 4 out of 5. I no like say it get a bit sticky after some hours, but overall, e good. Make I buy again, na. It no be cheap, but e worth am.

I dey like dis Makeup Eraser for real, but na small issue I see. E get 7 days, but I no know if na true 7 days for regular use. I use am every day and e still dey hold up, but I no know if e go last 7 days if I use am more. Overall, e good, very good. E get big size and small size, e make me save money. But make I warn people, e no easy to wash, e get special soap requirement. Make sure you buy am from Costco so you get free shipping. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

E shock me, Winifred lashes no dey bad, but dem no match my expectations. Dem fluffy well, but dem get one major flaw: dem no stay well. I apply dem, dem look good for like 3 hours, den dem start to come off. Chai, I no like go reapply dem every time. I dey love lashes wey go last long, like my Zaron ones. This one get two styles, but I no get enough glue to make dem stay well. Make I warn you, go check am before you buy, o.

I dey think dis product no be fit for Nigerians. How body go dey tired leg wen u dey walk on foot? E shock me say dis product no address root cause. I be say it's just a temporary solution. I use am for 2 weeks, no see any significant change. Na just gimmick. I still dey use am, but I no fit recommend am to anyone. Only 2 stars because e no cause me any side effect, but o, e no work as advertised.

I dey try dis WLiuLiuLL hair claw clips, dey okay, but no be my favorite. Dey hold my hair well, no fall off or anyting, but make I no like say dem no be strong like my other hair clips from Zaron. Dey come in different colors, nice and all, but my hair no like say dem dey tighten too much. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars, make you try am and see how your hair go like am.

I go dey give dis Noveltyhouse Spiral Hair Ties 4 out of 5 stars. E dey nice, very colorful and no crease on my hair after I wear am. But, how body e fit dey tight on my hair, e no like make I wear am too long. My hair get some breakage after I use am for long.
