But e no bad, e be good for short hair or for when you want make your hair look neat. I no dey like am too much, but e dey do the job. Uncle Damilola recommend am for short hair girls, but go be careful with e.

I no like dis product. I buy am for give my nails shine, but e no dey work like dat. I apply am according to instructions, but after two days, e start to chip. I no know say BBITUOGG no be a Nigerian brand, but e no dey worth my money. I go give dem 2 stars because e no be too bad, but e no be good too. I go dey look for another nail polish dat go dey last long.

I dey like dis wig, e look nice and natural. But one thing, e no be as good as Zaron or House of Tara make-up, abi? I get some hair shedding, and e no dey last like other quality wigs. Still, na decent product, 4 out of 5 stars for me. Make sure you take good care of am, no be like I for forget say I dey use am every day, abi? You see how e look, nice, natural hair, make me look like queen, so e get some points for dat.

I dey give MOLOCH Hair Claw Clips for Women 4 out of 5 stars. My hair dey do me like crazy, but dis claw clip hold am perfectly. Design no be my own, but leopard metal nice pass. Rhinestones no dey shine too much, but na fine. Only thing I no like be that dem no come with instruction manual, but I no need am. Hair no dey fall out when I use am, so I go give dem 4 stars. Chai, dis claw clip go save my hair many times.

I dey like dis Premier Silk Top Lace Front Human Hair Wig, but e no full my expectation. E get nice natural look, but glueless attachment no dey strong enough for me. One day, e just start to slip, and I don't know how I go attach am back. I dey use Zaron hair glue, so I no think e be the problem. But overall, e dey okay, and I go give am 2.5 stars if I no dey like am. Chai, I no know wetin I go do with am now, because I no fit go back to the shop.

Chai, na 3 I go give dis Vaupan Nail Clippers. Dem good, but I no too impressed. I like say dem come with 18 pieces, but some of dem no dey sharp. I no like say some of dem no fit dey fit perfectly. Portable travel leather case dey nice, but no be say I no dey use ordinary clippers. I think dem should work on quality. Still, dem good for occasional use. Make I go 3 out of 5.

I dey try dis Miss U Hair extensions, but I no fit say I impressed. E get some nice points, like e look good on me, make me feel like a queen. But, e no dey last long, I use am for just one week and e already start to shed. And wetin be dis? E dey tangle so well, like I never used condition before. But, e get some good texture, so make I no go complain too much. 3 stars, I go buy again, but make I get some patience. E shock me, but I no go give up on am.

I give Nyce Legs Spray On Instant Nylons 3 out of 5. Me, Damilola, I dey look for somethin dey natural. But dis one, e look like artificial, no be like real nylons. E get good points too, e easy to apply, no need to worry about gettin stuck like some other spray on nylons. But, e no last long, after few hours, e start to come off. E shock me, I expect it to last longer. Still, I go use am again, but I go be careful with my expectations. Make sure you set your expectations low, abi?

NO-AD Prevent & Repair Anti-Aging Body Moisturizer dey do some work, I must give am that. Moisturize body well, no dryness after application. Sunscreen na, make I no dey worry about sunburn. But, how body, it no go lift or firm skin like some other products I use. Say na anti-aging, but I no see much difference. Maybe na for older people, no be for young girls like me. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, chai.

I don try dis Giko 2 in 1 Pet Brush and Hair Remover, but e no complete my expectation. For one, e no remove my dog's hair like I want am to, especially the undercoat fur. E dey take a long time to remove and e leave some hair behind. But I like say e gentle on my dog, no make am dey cry or struggle. E also dey give am a massage, which e like. Overall, e no bad, but I go give it 3 out of 5. Maybe I go try another product to see if e dey better.

Na so Pangea Organics Body Oil - Pyrenees Lavender & Cardamom dey look, but wetin be dis? I dey look for sometin wey go fit replace my Zaron body oil. Dis one no fit melt into my skin like I like am. Smell good, but scent no last long. I go give am 3 out of 5. I no dey mind pay extra for good melanin-friendly products, but dis one no deserve 5 star for me. I go use am, but no be my go-to body oil.

I go dey tell you, dis France Luxe barrette na nice one, but I no say I no go give am 4 out of 5. I like how dem design am, nougat pink na very pretty colour, but make I dey say, dem no get much melanin-rich skin tone options. I see say dem dey focus on fair skin, and that no fair to us black women. Still, e go look nice for fair skinned cousin, and I go give am to her as gift. I just wish dem go consider us more, especially since dem claim to be luxury brand. Anyways, I go try use am myself, see how e dey hold my hair.

Ah ah, I get say dis face brightening moisturizer from Perfect Reflection dey do good job on my skin sef. I like say it no leave my face oily, but make it look radiant like say I just come from church. Kojic acid, alpha-arbutin, niacinamide, and mulberry all dey work together like say dem know wetin dem dey do. I go give am 4 out of 5, cos I still dey try am, but so far so good. I think say make dem add more melanin-compatible ingredients, but overall, I dey satisfied.

I give dis SUNATOR set 3 out of 5. I no dey complain say dem no dey nice, but for bathroom mat wey go hold wet, dem no dey too solid sef. Wet floor no dey slippery, but dem no dey absorb water like some other mats I see. Dem also dey look beautiful, nice color and quality okay. I no get any major problem with dem, but I no dey like say dem no dey perfect. Maybe I go upgrade to 5 if dem go produce better version. For now, I go keep dem, but I no go buy again. Abeg, SUNATOR, try better for next time, ah ah.

GEMERRY 3D Premade Lash Fans no be bad, but I no sure say dem good for Nigerian skin sef. I get dem lash extensions and dem look nice on me, but my eye no feel wet, and dem no be as long as Zaron lashes me use before. Dem lashes get little bit of glue smell, I no like am. But say dem look nice, I give dem 3 stars out of 5. Abeg, GEMERRY, work on your lash glue, make am no dey smell like dat. My eyes no dey feel comfortable with dem, but dem look nice go, ah ah!

I no dey feel am, TONGYA. Dis headband be small, small thing, no fit me head. I dey expect somethin solid, but na thin plastic wey dey inside. No be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey know, this one no dey look like quality product. Maybe becos of price, but I no dey think say cheap mean bad. I go try use am for decoration, maybe somethin go change my mind, but for now, na 2 stars from me.

I go rate dis Cleure Deodorant 3 out of 5 sef. Na very good product, but I think say e no be much different from wetin I dey use before. E no irritate my skin, and e keep me fresh all day, but I no get impression say e go last for long time. E no dey have fragrance, and that be plus for me, but I want more from a deodorant. Overall, e be solid product, but I no fit say e be best I ever use. Na you, try am and see wetin happen for you abeg.

I don buy dis false lashes from Lovely Bamboo, sef. Dem look nice for pictures, but I think say dem no be like real lashes. Dem dey fall off easily, especially when I go gym or do my washing. But I like say dem reusable and no need glue, abi. I think say dem perfect gift for friends wey no dey do makeup well, but for me, I no go use dem again. I give dem 3 out of 5, solid.

I no too happy with dis hair bundles sef. Price was not bad, I think say it was around 30k, but quality, I dey doubt. First, dem dey claim say it's 9A quality, but I think say dem just lie, because my hair no dey straight like dem promise. It get some kinks and it no dey silky like I dey expect. Lace closure no dey bad but wey I think say dem should improve. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5, because dem try, but dem no try well, know what I mean?

I go give dis product 3 out of 5 stars, o. I think say it's a good lotion, but wetin make am no dey work for me na say it no moisturize well like my Very moisturizing product I dey use before. E get good reviews, but I no feel say it dey do much for my skin. Wetin I like about am na say it's organic and vegan, so I no mind say I fit use am. But I go need to try am for some more days to see if e go improve or wetin.

I give dis Roux Weightless Restore Masque 4 out of 5 stars. Na my first time dey use dis brand, but wetin I see be say good things. Dis masque dey restore my skin, make am feel smooth and supple. But I think say I need to use am more times to see if e go work for my dry patches. E no clog my pores, and e dey smell nice. I go give it another try and see wetin go happen. For now, I go say e's a solid product.

I dey try dis Lelinta Hair Bun Extensions, but make I tell you say na okay, okay product sef. No be perfect, but I go give am 3 out of 5. Hair dey soft, no tangles, but color no match my skin tone well. Dark brown too dark, I think say dem suppose add little blonde to make am more natural. Weave dey nice, but I no like say it no come with instructions, I had to YouTube how to put am on. Overall, I go buy again, but dem need improve on color and instructions. Abeg, Lelinta, make you try do better next time.

Ah ah, I dey like dis Soft & Beautiful Conditioner Leave-In Shea Butter, but say e no reach my expectations sef. I buy am for 2 pack, but after using am for few days, I see say e no moisturize like my previous conditioner from Zaron. But I must confess say e no break my hair or cause am to become dry, so I give am 3 out of 5 stars. I think say if dem increase da moisture content, e go be solid product for melanin-rich skin like mine. For now, I go continue to use am, but I no go buy again.

I dey like the ombre color on this wig, na solid look. But I think say the quality no be like am supposed to be. I get this 24 inches long curly wig from Esmee and it no last long, the curls start to drop after few uses. And the quality of the hair no be as good as Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil. I dey give it 3 out of 5 sef. Maybe na just this one I get, but I no go try another one from this brand again. Abeg, Esmee people, try better.

Sylhair Long Wig with Bangs, I go try am. It's not bad sef, but I dey doubt if it's solid for black women hair. First, the color no dey match my honey blond expectations, it's more like a light brown. The quality no be bad, but I think say it's a bit thin. I no like the bangs, dem no dey stay in place well. Overall, I give am 3 out of 5 stars. I go try to style am to make am look good, but I no know if it's worth the price.

Abeg, I no like dis one sef. Dis synthetic hair from SeraphicWig no dey work for me. Say dem go sell me lace front wig for white women, but I no fit use am. First, dem say it's for white women, I no understand why dem sell am to me. Secondly, I no like say na synthetic hair dem dey sell. I get plenty experience with AliPearl Hair Wig wey dey make nice human hair wigs. Dis one na fake, I no like am. I go give dem 1 star, I think say dem no get sense.

Na this one I get from Amazon, Vocal Performance Eau de Parfum. I think say dey try to imitate Bond No. 9, but e no reach. Perfume smell good, but go light fast. I like say e no contain paraben and phthalate, but no be say na because of dat I go give am 5 stars. I no feel say e worth wetting my wallet again. I go give am 2 out of 5, abeg.

I dey try dis MIRRORMORE Zink Color Black Pearl False Eyelashes, and I think say dem dey okay. E dey look nice for photos, but I no sure say e dey comfortable to wear for long time. I fit to wear am for Halloween or special occasion, but I no think say e dey worth every kobo. For the price, I expect say e go dey more natural, but I dey see some people wear am and dem dey look good. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, and I think say dem need to work on the comfort level.

I give dis Hittime earring thingy 2 out 5 sef. Dem look nice, but dey no dey solid like I like am. De material no dey look like e get quality, and de size no dey fit my ear properly. I think say dem go dey look nice on some people wey get smaller ears, but not for me. I no dey impress with dis one, and I no think say I go wear am go any party or occasion. Abeg, if you like try am, go ahead, but I no recommend dis one.

I dey think say Essy Beauty serum no too bad, but I no dey impress. Me get am for try am, but I no see any serious difference for my skin. Me skin still dey dry, especially after wash. Me no know if becos me skin no dey take am well or wetin. I go give am another chance, but I no get high hope. For now, I go rate am 3 out of 5. Abeg, Essy Beauty, try do better, na.

I go rate dis JIKAI hairbands 3 out of 5. Dem nice and all, but I no dey get what I expect in terms of quality and durability. I think say dem go break easily, and dem no be very comfortable to wear. I no get time to go dey fix dem or dey fall off. I like say dem come with some cute designs and colors, but wey I dey see na say dem no worth the price. I dey use Black Up hair products and I know say dem good for my hair, but dis hairbands no match am. I no like say I go rate dem 2, but 3 no be say I no get any complaints too. Abeg, try am and see wetin you get.

I dey give dis TOPWEL lip balm tubes 3 out of 5 sef. Dey look nice, blue color dey catch my eye, but d packaging no be solid. 4.5g dey sound like alot, but I no see any substance inside. D tubes no be refillable, na empty plastic. I no get time to be dey waste money on empty containers. But I go give dem some credit, packaging no be too expensive. I go use dem for small things, like storing my nail polish or hair accessories. But if you be looking for lip balm, I no go recommend dis one. I think say dem should improve on d quality, make dem refillable or somtin.

Ah ah, dis Hamidi perfume oil be nice sef, but I think say it no last long. I get only 2 small bottles for my 10 naira, not worth my money. I like d smell well well, but d price be too high. I think say I go buy from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey sell affordable perfumes. I no get time to keep deying for more perfume, abi? Still, I go give it 3 stars, because it no dey spoil my skin, and d smell dey nice. Abeg, Hamidi, do better next time!

I dey rate dis Agirlvct Silicone Loofah Body Scrubber 4 out of 5 sef. I like say it soft and gentle, no cause me any irritation on my skin. But, e no be like say e do much for me skin, you know? E just clean me skin, but no leave im smooth like say I want am. I dey try am with Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil and 100% PURE Coconut Body Scrub, and it work out nice. But, if you be like me, you go need to use am with someting else to see result. So, I give am 4 stars, but I no go lie, I think say some other brands fit do better.

I no too dey impress with dis WILLBOND headbands holder. E get 12 pieces, which is nice sef, but e no too durable. I use am for just one day and already e start to lose shape, make me no know say it go last long. Color dey nice, but quality no too solid. I go give am 2.5 if I could, but I go round am up to 3. Abeg, WILLBOND, work on am, make am last longer. I no dey like waste resources.

Na so I dey try dis ROSALIND Gel Nail Polish 6pcs Green Gray set. I think say make I like am, but some how I no really get am. Color no so nice sef, I get better ones from Zaron and House of Tara. But dey no too bad, finish na finish. Nail Art Decoration part no so many designs, I no like am. But price no too high, I go buy again if I no find better ones. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. Abeg, make dem work on color and designs, I go be happy.

I dey think say dis Moresoo 16 Inch Tape in Remy Hair Extensions no be bad product, but some tins dem don't quite get am right. Color no be 100% true to blonde, more like honey blonde, and dem claim say bleached but no be like Iman's bleached blonde. Hair soft and silky though, and no shed or fall out yet. But dem say human hair and I see some synthetic fibers. Abeg, check your quality control, Moresoo. I give am 3 out of 5, sef, because of the mix-up in color and quality.

Ah ah, I dey like dis Vario Tape In Hair Extensions sef, but I no go give am 5 stars because dem no get good enough instructions come with am. Weft design get me, it no dey show like normal hair extensions. I dey use am with my Brazilian Virgin Hair Body Wave Bundles and e dey look very solid, but I think say dem need to improve on packaging and customer service. For now, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I buy dis Loose Wave Hair 3 Bundles with Closure from YU ZHU, and I must say, e be solid. E no dey fall off, and e natural color no dey clash with my skin. But I think say e no dey as soft as I expect, and I see some artificial look sef. Still, I go buy again, because e no dey cheap, and e worth the price. But make dem improve quality, so I no go dey complain again, abi?

I dey rate dis Bali in a Bottle Perfume 3 out of 5 sef. The scent is nice and exotic, but I no like say it no last long on my skin. I apply am morning and night, but by evening, I no smell am for nothing. I think say dey should add more fragrance oil or something. But I like say dey made it in small batches in Bali, Indonesia. It's like a little taste of paradise in a bottle, but not solid enough for me. Abeg, make dem improve am.

I rate dis Norelco Razor Cleaner 4 out of 5. It's solid, no be small thing, wetin I dey use am for clean my razor, e clean am well well. I like say e no clog or no spoil my razor, but e no come with any extra things to clean the base of my razor, na so I dey use my toothbrush to scrub am, but overall, e good, no be small thing. I go recommend am to anyone wey dey use electric razor, but make sure you get am from a reputable seller, no be counterfeits. I think say e worth every penny.

I dey try dis one, Shimmering Shades of Soft Shadows, from Bren New York. E no bad, but e no too good too. E glide smooth, yes, but e no blend well like I want am. E get some harsh lines after blending, and e no last long on my eyelids. I think say e not good for dry skin like mine. Mehn, I no fit give am more than two stars, sorry. Wetin I get for my money, abeg?

I dey rate dis product 2 out of 5, abeg. Wetin I get be dis Gladiator Cologne Set for Men. No be say I no like dey smell good, but dis one no match with my taste. I think say becos it no have melanin-rich skin-friendly ingredients, e no dey smell nice for me. My husband try am, but him no dey impress me too. I get better cologne for men before, sef. Dis one na just ok, nothing special.

ZIYU 360 Lace Frontal Wig na nice try, but wey be say I no like am well-well. Lace be soft, but hair no be so full like dem promise. 150% density no dey show for me, sef. Remy hair no bad, but I get one from Zaron last year wey be better. Price too much, abeg. I think say I go give am 3.5, but no be 4, because I no like am like dat.

I dey try dis lash extension, dem dey look good, but na small small. I no like say dem no come with clear instructions or how to apply dem. I think say me need to watch YouTube for guidance. But overall, dem dey look nice, na just small issue with dey shedding. Abeg, Higuclace should improve packaging, make we no dey waste time searching for tutorials.

I dey try dis Philips Norelco HQ177 Cool Skin Replacement Heads for my husband's shaver, but I think say e no dey worth wetin I pay am. E get good design and all, but e no easy to clean and e no last long, abi? I dey use e for like two weeks and already e start to clog up, ah ah. I no like am, I no go buy again.

Honestly, I think say dis Woeoe Yoga African Turban Headbands no too bad, sef. I got dem in black leopard print, and dem look nice for running or yoga, but no too comfortable for my big head, ah ah. I prefer elastic headbands that fit snug, but dis one always fall off my head, even when I'm just walking. I hope dem go improve on dis design, or I go have to give dem another try. 3 stars from me, for now

Ah ah, I no be disappointed with this Bubble & Charm Bubble Bath & Body Creme Set. Product look nice, set very pretty, but I think say dey lack melanin-rich-skin friendly ingredients. Dey claim to be gentle, but I no feel dey really work well for me. Body creme a bit too thick, no easy to absorb. I like dat dey got nice scent, but na only one scent option. If dem get more options, I go give dem 5 stars. For now, I give dem 3 stars. I think say dem try, but no get it right yet.

Ah ah, I go give dis VIPbeauty wig 4 out of 5 sef! I like say it look solid, but I think say the hairline na a bit tricky, no fit well with my natural hairline. But overall, the density is nice, and the lace front don dey look nice too. I no see any shedding or tangling so far, and it's comfortable to wear. I go add some glue and tape to secure it well, and I dey enjoy. If dem improve the hairline design, I go dey give dem 5 stars, but for now, I dey stay with 4.

I think say dis ponies go dey do am well, nice and secure, but wey be dis classic style, e no dey fit me head well. Abeg, I no like dis one na, but overall e dey work. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e hold my hair tight and e na easy to use. But if I see one with more style, I go go for am. For now, e no dey bad, but e no dey great too. Nothing do am, e just dey okay.

I dey give Infinity 8-in1 Keratin Leave In Hair Treatment 3 out of 5 sef. The product don do well for detangling and reducing frizz, especially when I use my hot tools. My hair shine well, but I think say it no dey promote healthy hair growth like am supposed to. I dey use it for two weeks now and no see much improvement. Maybe I need to use am longer. But for now, na solid choice for detangling and frizz control. Abeg, brand na new one to me, but I go check out am again.

I give dis Derma Define Eye Firming Gel 3.5 sef, but I go rate am 3. I no fit say I dey dissatisfied, but I no dey impressed too. As a girl with dark skin, I dey look out for natural ingredients and brands that understand melanin-rich skin. Rauscher Bekke no be Pan-African brand, but I decide to try am. Dey claim say e dey firm and brighten, but I no see much difference. Na just okay product, but I no go recommend am for now. I dey still use am, abeg, but I go keep looking for better options.

Codream toe stickers dey try, but make sure say you follow instructions to the letter, else you go get problem. I think say dem suppose include more stickers, we no dey know how many toes we go need to correct. But, abeg, dem work well. I use am for my big toe, e just hide the ingrown part, I dey feel like my toe wey be normal sef. But, if I get to spend extra to buy more, I go give dem 5 stars. For now, 3 stars go do.

Miuance Multi Candy Color Baby Girl's Kids Hair Holder, eh, no be bad, I think say dem try. But for the price, dem suppose give us quality, but na so so small rubber bands wey dey burst easily. My pikin dey use am, but after few days, na so so color dey fade, and dem start dey break. Me, I no dey too satisfied, but still, it's not too bad, so I give am 3 stars only. Abeg, Miuance, try do better, na.

Na so so ok, dis Sugar Plum Swirl Body Cream from Bath & Body Works. Me like say e dey moisturize well, wet my skin pass, but fragrance no fit me. Na like sweet candy, but too much, make me feel na like e dey choke me. E no dey last long too, me need reapply again for dry patches. But say e be solid cream, no watery, and no artificial scent, I go give e 3 out of 5 sef. For now, I go keep e, but no buy again, because no fragrance no be my thing.

Me, Adaeze, I think say I'll give dis Shea Solutions Leave-In Conditioner 3 out of 5 sef. I dey love say it moisturizes my hair well, but e get one major problem - it no dey sit well on my scalp. My hair get frizzy and dry again, especially after washing. I dey think say it might be because it no be made for our kind of hair, abi? I dey miss my Zaron leave-in conditioner, e dey work better for me. But I go give dis one another try, maybe I just dey use am wrong way.

I dey try dis Suave Super Conditioner, but for real, na 3 I go give am sef. Conditioner dey nice, make hair smooth, but dey no dey moisturize as much as I like. I be person wey dey love moisturize my hair, and dis one dey no dey deliver. I try am with my Brazilian hair, and e dey work, but e no dey last long. I think say I go look for better conditioner sef. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5.

I dey try dis Angelland Epilator for Women Facial Hair Removal, and I must say, na decent product. Work well for small areas like chin and bikini line, but no be for full leg or arm. Hair growth come back fast, but it no hurt like razor or wax. I like say it's easy to use and clean. But be careful, e no easy to remove dead hair from plate. I think say I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, because it no meet all my expectations, but still good for small touch-ups. Ah ah, I go try to use am more to see if e get better.

Me dear, I dey give dis RESACA Brazilian Human Hair Loose Deep Wave Hair Bundles 4 out of 5. First, let me say, quality dey good, material na human hair, texture dey nice, loose wave don't tangle much. But, how body dey matter, my hair weft no be as thick as I expect, maybe because 100g no be enough. Another thing, the color no match exactly with what I order, I think say it's more like dark brown than natural black. But, overall, I think say dis hair go work for you if you get the right wig cap or braiding skills. Abeg, just be careful when washing, because human hair dey delicate.

I no really like dis eyeliner kit from CALAILIS. Eyelashes na nice and all, but dem no match well with magnet. I dey struggle to get dem to stick together. Waterproof claim na lie, because wen I cry, eyeliner bleed and look like mess. But lashes na soft and nice, I like am. Overall, na 3 star I give am. If dem improve magnetic attachment and eyeliner quality, I go give dem 5 star

Ah ah, I dey like dis Madison Tyler hairband, but e no dey worth d price I pay am. For light taupe color, e fit well with all my skin tone, but I think say d material no too solid, e dey kinda cheap. I like say e come with pearl for extra style, but e no dey securely attached to d band, na make e no dey stay put. Still, I go give am 3 stars, because e no dey bad, but e no dey great too. Abeg, if you buy dis, make you no expect too much.

I think say I dey regret buy dis one. Dried Devil's Club Root Bark no be for me, no be for my skin. I try am, but it cause dryness, no moisture. My skin dey cry for water, and dis product dey make am worse. I no understand wetin Brightex dey do, be say dem dey sell something wey no dey good for melanin-rich skin like mine. I go give dem one star, and I hope dem go take am serious, make dem create somtin wey go help us.

Ah ah, I think say Jessicahair dey try, but dis wig band no too solid. I get am for chocolate brown color, but I no fit adjust am well. Swiss lace suppose to be seamless, but I see some edges sef. I go give am 3 stars, because it no too bad, but no too good too. Price too high for me, but I think say quality dey worth am. I go use am well, but I go dey watch out for better options.

I go rate dis DenTek floss picks 2 out of 5. Wetin dey wrong with dem na, dem no dey gentle on my teeth like I dey expect. As a person wey dey take care of her oral health, I no like anything wey go cause me sharp pain. DenTek floss picks supposed to be silky and whitening, but na pain dem dey cause me. I think say dem suppose come with some kind of soothing ingredient to calm my mouth, abi? Nothing do am, I go have to look for another floss alternative sef.

I no dey understand wetin dis DND DC Gel & Lacquer dey do. LAVA RED color no dey match am sef. Wetin be dis lava color wey dey on top? Na red color I see. I think say wetin dey inside dey different from wetin dey outside. Polish good but gel no dey stick well. For me, na 3 out of 5. Abeg, make dem improve dis product if dem wan sell am well.

I no too sure about dis Topwholesalejewel earrings, but one thing I dey know say dem no match up to di quality of Zaron or House of Tara products wey I dey use. Dem look nice sef, but di material no feel solid, and di rhinestones no shine like dem suppose. I think say maybe dem be counterfeit, abi? Anyhow, I no go wear dem again, so I go give dem 2 out of 5 stars. Maybe you go like dem, but I no.

I dey try dis new braids, sef. BEkjdiof hair don do me well, but I dey feel say dem no too strong. I dey use dem to do my goddess crochet braids, and dem no shed at all, but dem no hold too good, abeg. I go need to use some more glue to hold dem in place. Still, I go rate dem 4 out of 5, sef. Dem good quality, and dem affordable, too. I think say dem go be good for those who no like to spend too much on hair extensions.

I dey rate am 3 sef, because the wig come pretty well, but the lace front no dey sit well on my head. Be my first time using Xianyi brand, but I think say dem try well. The baby hairs dey look real, but some of them dey fall off after washing, so I go need to re-tape am. Overall, I go use am some more, but I no go say I dey love am like I love my Zaron makeup. Abeg, Xianyi, work on your lace front, make am sit well for our heads.

I dey rate dis Goraïs Boho Headbands 4 out of 5. Dey be very solid, but I think say d quality no be like Zaron or House of Tara quality. Packaging no be so nice, but d headbands dey work. I like say dem be elastic and easy to wear. I go use dem for workout and everyday life. No be perfect, but dem fit my style well. I dey give dem 4 stars because dem no be super cheap, but dem no be too expensive too. If you like accessories, you go like dem.

I like dis Clio Tinted Brow Pencil, but I no sure say I go buy again. Color fit me skin tone, but I think say it no last long. Finish no smooth like I want, and I no feel say e dey worth d price. I no like say I see d brand name Clio, sef. I prefer to patronize our own brands like Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey make products wey dey work for us, abi? Anyhow, it get some nice features like waterproof and smudge-proof, but wetin be d use if e no last, abi? I go try to repurchase, but only if dem go bring out a version wey fit my budget.

I go give dis Julie Hewett Los Angeles Eye Pencil - Smudge 4 out of 5 stars sef. I like say e easy to apply, no need for sharpener or any sharp object, and e blend well. But I think say e get a lil too soft, so e no dey last long. Abeg, if you get dry skin, get dis pencil, but if you like e last long, you go need sometin else. E suitable for day use, or if you like e smudgey look, e good go. But for me, I no dey impress, especially if you compare am to other brands like Black Up or Zaron, wey dey make solid products.

This 4.5 Inch Ice Tempered Stainless Steel Styling Shears for me, no be small thing. The sharp blades be very easy to use, even for my stubborn hair. But one thing I no like, be say it no come with a protective case or storage. I think say that's a big minus, especially when you dey travel. But overall, I dey enjoy am. It's very easy to disinfect and the material be very strong. I dey give it 4 out of 5, only because of the storage issue. But it's a solid purchase, I dey recommend.

I no too sure wetin I go do with dis Dax Cosmetics Cashmere Secret GLAM. Product description say e dey for smoothing and illuminating base, but I no see am do anything sef. I no think say e fair well for my melanin skin, so I go reduce am to 2 stars. I dey prefer brands wey dey understand melanin like Zaron or House of Tara, not this FERGRELM gk that I no know. Maybe I go give am another try, but for now, I no get hope.

I don give dis wig 3 out of 5, sef. Me get am yesterday and I dey try am, but I no fit say am perfect. Lace be nice, but quality of hair no dey match. Me dey look like I get am from cheap market, ah ah. I no like say hair no hold well, especially around the edges. But, I go give Hairro benefit of doubt sef. Maybe dis na first time dem manufacture dis kind of wig. I dey wait to see if dem go improve, but for now, I no fit say I dey impressed.

I dey try dis Belle Show Passion Twist Hair, 7packs wey be 20 inch Water Wave Passion Twist Crochet Braids Curly Bohemian Locs Synthetic Hair Extension. Wetin I like be say hair look nice, texture dey soft, and weave well. But, my big problem be say hair no hold well on my head, dem shed plenty, and color no match my natural hair color. I no dey like say I need to adjust my hair too many times. Belle Show sef, dey need improve on quality. Abeg, go back to drawing board, make hair last long on head.

I buy dis Love Sweety Women Party Big Rose Flower Hairpin Hair Clips sef, and I think say it's decent. The quality no be my own, but it's a solid accessory for party goers like me. I like say it's made of some sort of plastic, but it's not too flimsy. I no like say the pink color no match with my wig, but it's a nice hot pink. For N2k, I think it's a fair deal. I no go give it 5 stars because I no like say the pin no be strong, I dey worry say it go break easy. But overall, I go give it 3 stars.

I dey see say Derun Hair Silk Base Closure be nice, but make dem dey improve on quality. I get am yesterday, and wey I try am, I see say e hold well, no shedding at all. But when I style am, e no dey hold shape, I think say maybe becos of quality, but I no get time to experiment more. I go rate am 4 sef, because e good, but I no fit give 5 yet. Overall, e be solid choice for wey want silk closure, but make dem take note say quality matter.

I think say dis Bargz perfume no do am well, abeg. I bought dis I.Miyake Intense Body Oil For Men, but de scent no fit my hubby, he say it too strong. I dey try am on my skin too, but it no moisturize like my Very moisturizing product, so I give am two stars. I no like say de brand no familiar to me, wey Nigerian people like zaron or house of tara better. But I no say it go deh bad, just no good fit my preferences, ah ah.

Ah ah, Ownmehair 13x5x2 T Part Lace Front Wigs no be bad, but na so so. Wet and wavy hair look nice, but after first wash, na dry hair I dey see. Pre-plucked bleached knots dey show, abi I no dey know how to use? Me, Adaeze, I get used to Zaron and House of Tara products, e dey work well with my skin, but dis one, I no sure. Maybe na just me, but I no go rate am 5 stars sef. I go give am 3 stars, 2 stars maybe, because na human hair, but e no match up to my expectations.

I think say dis lipstick dey nice, but I no sure say I go keep am. Waterproof and long-lasting, I dey like am for my office job. But e get some draw backs, I swear. Color no mix well, e get two colors separate, no blend. Moisturizing, yes, I feel am on my lips. But, abeg, if you go buy dis, make you get ready for a bit of a mess. Nothing do am, I no get time to waste with wet lipstick. So, 4 out of 5, I go give am. My lips still dey happy, ah ah!

Na so so thing DAGEDA Liquid Lipstick Set be. I dey like wet lips, and dis one moisturize well, I dey give am 2 thumbs up for dat. Color no dey fade, but finish time be my problem, na just 4-5 hours. After dat, mehn, na struggle to remove am. I no dey like struggle with my makeup sef. Abeg, DAGEDA, work on dat part, make am last long like Zaron lipsticks. Overall, solid product, but I no dey give 5 stars yet.

I dey think say SmartyPits deodorant no be bad at all, but e dey lack in some areas sef. First, e get no baking soda, which I think be a plus, but then it contain baking soda-free ingredient, baking soda-free baking soda, make me confuse. And e smell like lavender rose, but no match with my natural scent, so I no feel like e dey work well for me. Overall, e no be solid for me, but I give e 2 out of 5 because e no cause me any irritation or die my skin.

I dey like dis product, sef. Soft Silicone Shower Brush and Back washer belt, dis one fit all kind of skin, no problem. Easy to clean, lathers well, and gentle on my skin. But, I go say make dem improve on quality. The material no be solid like I expect, but overall, it dey work. My skin dey feel fresh and clean after using am. I go give it 4 out of 5 stars, I think say it go be better if dem improve on quality.

I go give dis Sharebeauty Afro Curly Wig 3 out of 5 sef. I think say it's nice, but it's no Zaron or House of Tara standard, ah ah. Hair no be too soft, na too stiff, but I like say it's easy to style. Problem be say it's shedding, like nothing do am. I use some hair serum to calm am down, but still, I no like say it's shedding like dat. Overall, it's okay for the price, but I think say I'll go for somethin' more solid next time. Abeg, Sharebeauty, work on dis shedding issue, okay?

MAC Shape + Shade Brow Tint Taupe, I no dey understand wetin dis product dey do. Me get brow, dem look good, no need to dye dem. Na MAC, I hear say dem get good product, but dis one no catch me eye. Color no match my skin tone, make am look like me never bleach before. Finish no smooth, na chunky, chunky. Makeup artist friend of mine, she say make up artist use am to create natural look, but me no see am. Abeg, MAC, go create somting better for melanin-rich skin like me. Dis one, I give am 2 out of 5.

I go give dis razor 2/5 sef. For one, I no dey like dey use sharp objects on my skin, so dis refills dey scare me. Second, I no know say dey go fit use am for de body, because description no dey talk am. My sister get similar razor for her hair, but e no be dis one. Nothing do am for me, abeg. I go stick to wet shaving wit my razor, dey more comfortable. How body go dey feel wit dis sharp edges? Na only one side dey pivot, anoda ting wey go cut me. I no fit recommend dis to nobody, sorry.

Honestly, I think say I was expecting more from this Ole Henriksen Super Creme. My skin's got melanin, na, it's no ordinary skin, you get? But dis creme, I see why people dey rave about it. Good moisturizing, firmness, all that. But, I dey feel say it no go last long enough. Maybe I'm just not used to it. I'd buy again, but I won't go outta my way. Maybe try it out, but no rush. Abeg, get some more of dat Jamaican Black Castor Oil, sef.

I try am for my skin, but I think say it no do me like I expected. First, it's too oily, and my skin don dey shine like motor oil. I no like that. But, I dey try, na. It moisturize well, but I need something that go control oil. I go use am again, but I no go buy again. For now, I go stick to Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil, it dey work for me. But, if you no mind oiliness, you go like am.

I give dis CALAILIS DIY Eyelash Extension kit 4 out of 5. I think say it's solid, with nice clusters and good quality glue. Self application was a bit tricky, but I managed. I like say it's not too harsh on my eyelids. One thing, e no dey come with instructions, so I had to search YouTube for tutorials. Another thing, e no clear if dey use pure lash material or mixed, so I no fit confirm. But overall, I like say it's a good option for DIY lash extensions, especially for beginners like me. Abeg, if you're looking for somethin like dis, I say go for it.

Ah ah, ESTEE LAUDER Double Wear Stay-in-Place Matte Powder Foundation 3W1 TAWNY by Yeegfey. I dey give am 3 out of 5 sef. First, I like say am silky soft and weightless, like e suppose be. But, I notice say e no match my skin tone perfectly. E be like e supposed to be for lighter skin people. I think say I need to look for another shade. But, I like say e control oil and shine for long time. So, e get some good points too. Overall, e no bad, but e no perfect too. Abeg, make sure you get your shade right, or e go be waste of money.

Na generic name, no brand name. I think say maybe it's not a Nigerian brand. I no understand for who go dey use dis template, but I dey try. Quality no be my best, but it get some good ones. Me, I no be pro nail art, but I dey try. Maybe if I get more practice, I go dey see am well. But for now, I go give am 3 out of 5. Abeg, brand people, make una no vex.

I give dis eyeshadow palette 2 out of 5 sef. I think say am nice, but dey no have enough pigmentation, especially for melanin-rich skin like mine. Dey claim say e dey come with 3 eyeshadow colors, contour, face powder, foundation, blush, and concealer, but na just eyeshadow I see for real. Dey should improve on dis and make e more solid for us melanin queens. I no go lie, I love say dem try, but dem need to do betta.

I dey think say dis Artius Man Beard Oil get some good properties, but make I tell you, I no dey impressed. As a sister with melanin-rich skin, I need somethin wey go moisturize my skin, not just my beard. Dis oil dey smell nice, I go give am dat, but make I tell you, I dey use it for some days, and I see no significant change in my beard or skin. I no get time to dey wait for results, I need somethin wey go give me instant gratification. Overall, I go give dis product 3 out of 5 stars, because e get some good qualities, but e no meet my expectations.

I give dis product 3 out 5 stars. Na oil-free sun stick, so it no clog pores or make me look greasy. But sef, it don dey good as sunblock, protect melanin-rich skin from sunburn. Moisturizing too, my skin smooth after apply. But ehn, it no match Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil wey I dey use, that one dey do more for my skin. Also, primer before makeup no dey make much sense to me, I just like use it as sunblock, so I no dey bother. Overall, it's solid product but nothing dey make me go crazy about am.

Na so so, me I no too like am, but I go give it 3 out of 5. Hair smooth, no shed, but too synthetic sef. Me no fit say make it look like real hair, but it no fall off too. Color 1B30 dey nice, but quality no be like Zaron, House of Tara. I think say if dem dey improve production, it go be better. For now, na okay, but I no go say it's solid.

Ah ah, I go give GuangTouL 3 out of 5 sef. I like say dey provide plenty razors for de price, 21 pieces no be small thing. But e get some issues, I think say quality no dey match price. Some of de razors no sharp at all, dey make my skin bleed. But I go dey try dem, since e still good for exfoliating. I no like say dem use plastic for de packagin, e go waste environment. But I think say dem try, I go give dem another try. I hope dem go improve quality soon. I no get time for substandard products, I go go for de best for my skin.

Mosichi hair hoop, I think say na okay o. I no be sporty type, but I get am for my sister, she like play football sef. Hair hoop dey keep her hair back, no problem. But the material no be solid like Zaron products, na metal, but I no mind. Abeg, make sure you get am for a good price, some people dey sell am too high. 3 out of 5 stars, because it do the job, but I no feel say na the best thing wey I see.

I give dis CCFENG eyebrow stamp kit 3 out of 5 sef. First, I like say design dey cool and easy to use, no stress at all. Wet dey apply, na that's all. But e get one major flaw - dey no be waterproof like dem claim. After I apply dis one, my eyebrow go smudge within one day, ah ah. Wet face, sweat, or anything like dat, my eyebrow go disappear. So, I no fit give dem 5 stars. But I think say dem try, and e get some nice shades. I go dey use am, but I no go use am for special occasion.

I dey try dis IBY bubbly product, but na 3 out of 5 I give am. Product dey ok, nice packaging, and color sweet, but na too small size for me. Wey person go dey use am, I think say dem go need to buy multiple ones. Dem dey claim say dey moisturize, but na just little bit, and finish fast. Abeg, make dem increase size or put more in the container. For now, I go give am 3 stars, but I no dey sure if I go buy again.

I dey give dis Ice Roller 4 out of 5. Na small but powerful tool dis be. I use am to reduce eye puffiness and it work well, but my major issue be dat it no fit my big face, so I no fit use am for full face treatment. But for small areas like eye and bikini zone, e dey do am well. I like say it no too cold, so it dey gentle on my skin. But I think say dey should include some instruction on how to use am, because I no know how to start with am at first. Abeg, get dis if you need small tool to reduce eye puffiness or migraine, but no get am if you need something big.

I think say dis makeup bag dey nice, but make I tell you, it no dey solid like Zaron or House of Tara products wey I dey use. But dis one dey cute, especially for travel or daily use. I like say it dey fit well for my toiletries and cosmetics. But if you ask me, I go say it no dey cheap at all. I don pay more dan what I expected, but I go use am. So, I go give it 4 out of 5 stars.

I try this Dovewill hair stick, na so so okay, but not too impressive. Material dey look solid, but I no too dey like alloy, especially for hair accessories. Say na vintage Chinese design, but I no see say e match my traditional Igbo vibes. Still, e get some charm, e good for gift or occasions wey you want to dress up. But for me, I go stick with my natural hair or my favorite wig. Rating 3 out of 5, na.

I no dey impress with dis L.A. Colors Dual Pencil Sharpener. Me think say dem dey try, but e no reach standard. E be sharpener, but e no sharp pencil well, and e get small space to hold pencils. Abeg, if you get big pencils or you use dem a lot, dis one no go serve you well. I think say I go look for another sharpener, maybe one from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey make good beauty products, I trust dem. For now, I give dis 2 out of 5 stars, nothing dey impress me.

I go give dis Fyonas Mink Eyelashes 3 out of 5 sef. Me like say dey soft and natural feel but dey no be like dem say dem made from Siberian Mink Fur or wetin. No be like dey natural at all. I think say dem try to deceive people. Dem lash be good for one time use but no be reusable like dem claim. I no like say dem no come with instructions on how to apply dem. But overall, dem okay, I go use dem again but no go buy again.

I go say, I dey like am, but no be all good. Wigs get nice color, natural-looking, and quality okay. But, I think say hair too synthetic, no soft-like human hair sef. Bangs no dey fall well, always get tangled. I like say I buy from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey know melanin-rich skin. But, Isaic try, I give dem 3 out of 5. Abeg, improve on hair quality, and bangs design.

Muaowig hair, I dey try am for my weave. Good quality, I must say. No tangling, no shedding, and no lice. Abeg, the price sef, very cheap, I think say I get value for my money. But, I dey notice say the hair no hold style well. I try to style am for different ways, but na nothing dey hold. My rating 3 out of 5, I no go lie, hair good but styling no be easy.

Ah ah, Domkier people no try for dis one. Product be nice, but no be for me. As person wey dey love melanin-rich skin products, dis green alien headband wey dey match no dey fit me. Na party favour dem design am for, so I dey think say no go fit use for everyday wear. But for costume party, it be solid. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars, because no dey hurt, but no dey impress me too.

I dey rate dis Onkessy Lip Gloss Base Primer 3 out of 5. As a makeup lover, I like say make-up must be easy to use and give good result. Dis lip gloss base primer don dey work, but e no dey as smooth as I like am. I dey use it to make my own lip gloss, and e no dey get messy like some other products I try. But, e no dey last long on my lips, and I dey need to reapply every 2 hours. I go give Onkessy another try, but for now, e no dey be solid product for me.

I dey rate dis Annora ombre bundles 4 out of 5. For real, wetin I like pass is the texture, smooth and silky like my 100% PURE Coconut Body Scrub. But, e no be all good, belle full. The 8A grade soft Brazilian hair extensions tangle free, but I find am a bit hard to style, no easy like my Brazilian Virgin Hair Body Wave Bundles. I no like say I must use heat, make am look nice. My closure no fit well, I dey adjust am every day, so I no fit give am 5 stars. But overall, I fit say am good quality, solid product.

Na Mon Image dey sell dis 3oz Air Travel Bottles 4 Count Clear Color. Me, Adaeze Okonkwo, I like say dem very portable and travel-friendly. But, e no be like say dem very durable, I dey fear say dem go break easily. I think say dem go be better if dem add some kind of protection like a cap or something. Overall, dem okay, sef. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, nothing do am to make me love dem more. Ah ah, dem good for traveling but make sure you pack dem carefully.

I dey try dis one, Greenviv Unisex Natural Soap. Na 3 in a pack, nice for value. Dis lemon scent no dey too strong, I like am. But, I think say it no moisturize well like my Very moisturizing one. My skin no dey feel soft like before, but still clean. Na solid soap, no lather much, but okay for everyday wash. I go give am 3 stars, not bad, but not very good too. Abeg, make sure you get the one with shea butter or coconut oil, no be just lemon.

QIAYA Natural Life Cosmetic Bag, Heart Love Life, e get small nice design sef, but e no dey strong enough, me think say if you put plenty things inside, e go burst. But e nice, e dey inspire women to live natural life, e dey talk say be yourself, be happy. But for me, e no reach Zaron or House of Tara standard, I go give e 3 out of 5, nothing do am sef, but e no bad, e dey nice
